    B["使用多智能体合成组件生成多轮对话蓝图"] --> C["通过人机协同流程录制47名说话人的452段无脚本对话"]
    C["通过人机协同流程录制47名说话人的452段无脚本对话"] --> D["保留音频中的自然不流畅、语音修正和副语言信号"]
    D["保留音频中的自然不流畅、语音修正和副语言信号"] --> E["将每个理想回复分解为1712条原子级实例特定评分标准"]
    E["将每个理想回复分解为1712条原子级实例特定评分标准"] --> F["与人类评估者验证评分标准达到93%一致率"]
    F["与人类评估者验证评分标准达到93%一致率"] --> G["使用LLM评判模型需满足所有评分标准才算通过"]

name: AutoCodeBench
intro: AutoCodeBench是一个大规模代码生成基准，包含3920个问题，均匀分布在20种编程语言中。它旨在评估大型语言模型在具有挑战性、多样化和实用性的多语言任务上的表现。该基准利用名为AutoCodeGen的自动化方法生成，通过LLM与多语言沙箱的交互来创建高质量的测试用例，无需人工标注。
intro_en: AutoCodeBench is a large-scale code generation benchmark containing 3,920 problems evenly distributed across 20 programming languages. It aims to evaluate large language models on challenging, diverse, and practical multilingual tasks. The benchmark is generated using an automated method called AutoCodeGen, which creates high-quality test cases through interactions between LLMs and multilingual sandboxes, requiring no manual annotation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Initial Problem Requirements] --> B{{Automated Generation Method}}
    B --> C(Generated Code Problems)
    C --> D{{LLM Generation}}
    D --> E[Problem Filtering & Distribution]
    E --> F{Quality Validation}
    F -- Fail --> G[Problem Refinement]
    G --> E
    F -- Pass --> H(AutoCodeBench Dataset\n3,920 Problems, 20 Languages)
    H --> I[Model Evaluation]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
    J --> K[Benchmark Release]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract multilingual code snippets from Stack-Edu as seeds spanning function, class, and file levels"] --> B["Refine seeds into self-contained code solutions using DeepSeek-V3-0324 and validate correctness via multilingual sandbox"]
    B["Refine seeds into self-contained code solutions using DeepSeek-V3-0324 and validate correctness via multilingual sandbox"] --> C["Generate test inputs with LLM, execute in sandbox to obtain outputs, then combine into complete test functions"]
    C["Generate test inputs with LLM, execute in sandbox to obtain outputs, then combine into complete test functions"] --> D["Generate programming problems from code solutions and test functions using reverse-order prompting"]
    D["Generate programming problems from code solutions and test functions using reverse-order prompting"] --> E["Filter too-easy problems via multiple sampling with DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite across ten runs"]
    E["Filter too-easy problems via multiple sampling with DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite across ten runs"] --> F["Apply LLM-as-Critic to discard low-quality problems from the candidate set"]
    F["Apply LLM-as-Critic to discard low-quality problems from the candidate set"] --> G["Tag and filter problems to ensure balanced distribution across 20 languages and 14 categories"]
    G["Tag and filter problems to ensure balanced distribution across 20 languages and 14 categories"] --> H["Evaluate over 30 LLMs using Pass@1 metric on AutoCodeBench and AutoCodeBench-Lite"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从Stack-Edu提取多语言代码片段作为种子"] --> B["用DeepSeek-V3精炼种子为代码解并用沙箱验证"]
    B["用DeepSeek-V3精炼种子为代码解并用沙箱验证"] --> C["LLM生成测试输入沙箱执行获取输出再组合为测试函数"]
    C["LLM生成测试输入沙箱执行获取输出再组合为测试函数"] --> D["基于代码解和测试函数逆向生成编程问题"]
    D["基于代码解和测试函数逆向生成编程问题"] --> E["用DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite多次采样过滤简单问题"]
    E["用DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite多次采样过滤简单问题"] --> F["应用LLM评判器丢弃低质量问题"]
    F["应用LLM评判器丢弃低质量问题"] --> G["标记并过滤问题确保20语言14类别均衡分布"]
    G["标记并过滤问题确保20语言14类别均衡分布"] --> H["用Pass@1指标在两版本基准上评估30余个LLM"]

name: AutoCodeBench-V2
intro: AutoCodeBench是一个大规模代码生成基准，包含3920个问题，均匀分布在20种编程语言中。它旨在评估大型语言模型在具有挑战性、多样化和实用性的多语言任务上的表现。该基准利用名为AutoCodeGen的自动化方法生成，通过LLM与多语言沙箱的交互来创建高质量的测试用例，无需人工标注。
intro_en: AutoCodeBench is a large-scale code generation benchmark consisting of 3,920 problems evenly distributed across 20 programming languages. It aims to evaluate large language models on challenging, diverse, and practical multilingual tasks. The benchmark is generated using an automated method called AutoCodeGen, which creates high-quality test cases through interactions between LLMs and a multilingual sandbox, requiring no manual annotation.

    F -- Pass --> G[Refine & Format Problems]

    G --> H{Validate Correctness & Difficulty}
    H -- Valid --> I(Final AutoCodeBench-V2 Dataset\n3920 Problems, 20 Languages)
    H -- Invalid --> G
    I --> J[Evaluate LLMs on Code Generation]
    J --> K[Analyze Model Performance]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract multilingual code snippets from Stack-Edu as seeds spanning function, class, and file levels"] --> B["Refine seeds into self-contained solutions using DeepSeek-V3-0324 with few-shot prompts and validate in sandbox"]
    B["Refine seeds into self-contained solutions using DeepSeek-V3-0324 with few-shot prompts and validate in sandbox"] --> C["Generate test inputs with LLM, execute in multilingual sandbox to obtain outputs, combine into test functions"]
    C["Generate test inputs with LLM, execute in multilingual sandbox to obtain outputs, combine into test functions"] --> D["Generate programming problems in reverse order from code solutions and test functions using LLM prompting"]
    D["Generate programming problems in reverse order from code solutions and test functions using LLM prompting"] --> E["Filter easy problems via DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite multiple sampling, discard low-quality ones with LLM-as-Critic"]
    E["Filter easy problems via DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite multiple sampling, discard low-quality ones with LLM-as-Critic"] --> F["Apply diversity-based tagging using Claude Sonnet 4 categories and DeepSeek-V3-0324 classification across 20 languages"]
    F["Apply diversity-based tagging using Claude Sonnet 4 categories and DeepSeek-V3-0324 classification across 20 languages"] --> G["Evaluate 30+ LLMs using Pass@1 metric with standardized system prompt and greedy decoding"]

    B["用DeepSeek-V3精炼种子为完整解决方案并沙箱验证"] --> C["LLM生成测试输入经沙箱执行获取输出并组合测试函数"]
    C["LLM生成测试输入经沙箱执行获取输出并组合测试函数"] --> D["从代码解决方案和测试函数逆向生成编程问题"]
    D["从代码解决方案和测试函数逆向生成编程问题"] --> E["多次采样过滤简单问题并用LLM评判丢弃低质量问题"]
    E["多次采样过滤简单问题并用LLM评判丢弃低质量问题"] --> F["用Claude生成类别和DeepSeek分类实现多样性标注"]

name: BABE
intro: BABE（Biology Arena BEnchmark）是一个综合性基准，旨在评估生物AI系统的实验推理能力。该基准独特地构建于同行评审的研究论文和真实世界的生物学研究，确保任务反映了实际科学探究的复杂性和跨学科性质。BABE挑战模型进行因果推理和跨尺度推理，提供了一个评估AI系统能否像科学家一样进行推理的框架，从而更真实地衡量其对生物学研究的贡献潜力。
org: Junting Zhou, Jin Chen, Linfeng Hao, Denghui Cao, Zheyu Wang, Qiguang Chen, Chaoyou Fu, Jiaze Chen,
eval_feature: 因果推理, 跨尺度推理
intro_en: BABE (Biology Arena BEnchmark) is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the experimental reasoning abilities of biological AI systems. Uniquely built on peer-reviewed research papers and real-world biological studies, it ensures tasks reflect the complexity and interdisciplinary nature of actual scientific inquiry. BABE challenges models with causal and cross-scale reasoning, providing a framework to assess whether AI systems can reason like scientists, thereby more accurately measuring their potential contribution to biological research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Peer-reviewed Research Papers) --> C[Data Collection & Extraction]
    B(Real-world Biological Studies) --> C
    C --> D[Information Structuring]
    D --> E{{Hybrid Methodology}}
    E --> F[Task Formulation]
    F --> G{Quality Assurance & Expert Validation}
    G -->|Validated| H(BABE Dataset\nExperimental Reasoning Tasks)
    H --> I[AI System Evaluation]
    I --> J[Experimental Reasoning Assessment]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select peer-reviewed research papers from real-world biological studies across twelve subfields"] --> B["Question setters read papers and create question triplets from experimental data and context"]
    B["Question setters read papers and create question triplets from experimental data and context"] --> C["Reviewer No.1 checks format and correctness of original question set"]
    C["Reviewer No.1 checks format and correctness of original question set"] --> D["Reviewer No.2 performs format and correctness check on qualified questions"]
    D["Reviewer No.2 performs format and correctness check on qualified questions"] --> E["Reviewer No.3 validates questions and removes unqualified items"]
    E["Reviewer No.3 validates questions and removes unqualified items"] --> F["Deploy powerful LLMs to remove simple questions and label difficulty"]
    F["Deploy powerful LLMs to remove simple questions and label difficulty"] --> G["Classify questions into strong-correlation and weak-correlation types based on logical dependency"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从十二个子领域的真实生物学研究中选择同行评审论文"] --> B["问题设置者阅读论文并从实验数据和背景创建问题三元组"]
    B["问题设置者阅读论文并从实验数据和背景创建问题三元组"] --> C["审稿人一检查原始问题集的格式和正确性"]
    C["审稿人一检查原始问题集的格式和正确性"] --> D["审稿人二对合格问题进行格式和正确性检查"]
    D["审稿人二对合格问题进行格式和正确性检查"] --> E["审稿人三验证问题并移除不合格项"]
    E["审稿人三验证问题并移除不合格项"] --> F["部署强大语言模型移除简单问题并标注难度"]
    F["部署强大语言模型移除简单问题并标注难度"] --> G["根据逻辑依赖性将问题分为强相关和弱相关类型"]

name: BABILong
intro: BABILong基准用于测试语言模型在极长文档中跨事实推理的能力。包含20种多样的推理任务，如事实链、简单归纳、演绎、计数及列表/集合处理。这些任务本身具有挑战性，且当所需事实分散在长文本中时难度更大。
org: AIRI, DeepPavlov.ai, and London Institute for Mathematical Sciences
build_method: 自动生成
eval_feature: 长文本, 防污染, 思维链
intro_en: The BABILong benchmark tests language models' ability to perform cross-fact reasoning in extremely long documents. It includes 20 diverse reasoning tasks such as fact chaining, simple induction, deduction, counting, and list/set processing. These tasks are inherently challenging and become even more difficult when the required facts are scattered throughout long texts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Task Schemas & Rules) --> B[Define Task Parameters]
    B --> C{{Automated Data Generator}}
    C --> D[Generate Raw Task Instances]
    D --> E[Construct Long Documents]
    E --> F{Validate Task Logic & Length}
    F -->|Pass| H(BABILong Dataset)
    F -->|Fail| G[Refine & Regenerate]
    G --> D
    H --> I[Language Model Evaluation]
    I --> J[Performance Metrics]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 20 reasoning tasks from the original bAbI benchmark"] --> B["Extract books from PG19 dataset as background text source"]
    B["Extract books from PG19 dataset as background text source"] --> C["Insert task facts between background sentences in natural order until target length"]
    C["Insert task facts between background sentences in natural order until target length"] --> D["Generate splits at multiple context lengths up to 10 million tokens"]
    D["Generate splits at multiple context lengths up to 10 million tokens"] --> E["Evaluate LLMs on QA tasks measuring accuracy at varying context sizes"]
    E["Evaluate LLMs on QA tasks measuring accuracy at varying context sizes"] --> F["Test RAG pipelines with chunk-based and sentence-based retrieval methods"]
    F["Test RAG pipelines with chunk-based and sentence-based retrieval methods"] --> G["Fine-tune recurrent memory models using curriculum training from short to long sequences"]
    G["Fine-tune recurrent memory models using curriculum training from short to long sequences"] --> H["Evaluate fine-tuned models on sequences beyond training length up to 50 million tokens"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从原始bAbI基准中选择20个推理任务"] --> B["从PG19数据集提取书籍作为背景文本"]
    B["从PG19数据集提取书籍作为背景文本"] --> C["按自然顺序在背景句间插入任务事实直至目标长度"]
    C["按自然顺序在背景句间插入任务事实直至目标长度"] --> D["生成多个上下文长度的数据分割最高达1000万词元"]
    D["生成多个上下文长度的数据分割最高达1000万词元"] --> E["在不同上下文大小下评估LLM的问答任务准确率"]
    E["在不同上下文大小下评估LLM的问答任务准确率"] --> F["测试基于块和基于句子的RAG检索管道"]
    F["测试基于块和基于句子的RAG检索管道"] --> G["用课程训练从短到长序列微调循环记忆模型"]
    G["用课程训练从短到长序列微调循环记忆模型"] --> H["在超出训练长度的序列上评估微调模型最高达5000万词元"]

name: BeyondAIME
intro: BeyondAIME是一个精心策划的测试集，旨在评估高级数学推理能力。其问题来源于高中和大学数学竞赛，难度与AIME竞赛问题相当。该基准测试的创建遵循高难度、抗污染、注重推理而非知识、鲁棒问题设计和自动化评估等核心原则。
build_method: 专家构建
intro_en: BeyondAIME is a carefully curated test set designed to evaluate advanced mathematical reasoning abilities. Its problems are sourced from high school and college math competitions, with difficulty comparable to AIME problems. The benchmark is created following core principles of high difficulty, contamination resistance, emphasis on reasoning over knowledge, robust problem design, and automated evaluation.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collaborate with mathematics specialists to develop original problems informed by established competition formats"] --> B["Systematically adapt existing competition questions through structural modifications and scenario reconfigurations"]
    B["Systematically adapt existing competition questions through structural modifications and scenario reconfigurations"] --> C["Ensure no direct duplication occurs from source competition problems"]
    C["Ensure no direct duplication occurs from source competition problems"] --> D["Filter out problems with trivial answers explicitly mentioned in problem statements"]
    D["Filter out problems with trivial answers explicitly mentioned in problem statements"] --> E["Modify problems to guarantee all answers are integers without specific numerical range restrictions"]
    E["Modify problems to guarantee all answers are integers without specific numerical range restrictions"] --> F["Compile final set of 100 problems with difficulty matching or exceeding hardest AIME questions"]
    F["Compile final set of 100 problems with difficulty matching or exceeding hardest AIME questions"] --> G["Evaluate models using integer answer matching for simplified and stabilized assessment"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["与数学专家合作基于竞赛格式开发原创问题"] --> B["通过结构修改和场景重构系统改编现有竞赛题"]
    B["通过结构修改和场景重构系统改编现有竞赛题"] --> C["确保与源竞赛问题无直接重复"]
    C["确保与源竞赛问题无直接重复"] --> D["过滤掉答案为问题中明确提及的简单值的题目"]
    D["过滤掉答案为问题中明确提及的简单值的题目"] --> E["修改问题确保所有答案为整数且无数值范围限制"]
    E["修改问题确保所有答案为整数且无数值范围限制"] --> F["编制100道难度匹配或超过最难AIME题的最终集"]
    F["编制100道难度匹配或超过最难AIME题的最终集"] --> G["使用整数答案匹配评估模型以简化稳定评估"]

name: BeyondSWE
intro: BeyondSWE 是一个扩展 SWE 类评测范围的软件工程基准，覆盖跨仓库问题解决、领域特定问题、依赖驱动迁移以及从文档到完整仓库生成等真实世界代码代理任务。
org: Renmin University of China, AweAI Team
build_method: 500个真实实例, 四种任务设置, 解决范围与知识范围双轴扩展
task_type: 软件工程, 跨仓库修复, 代码迁移, 仓库生成
eval_feature: 跨仓库推理, 外部知识整合, 全仓库生成
intro_en: BeyondSWE broadens software-engineering evaluation with cross-repository reasoning, dependency migration, domain-specific tasks, and full-repository generation.
build_method_en: 500 real-world instances across four settings, expanding both resolution scope and knowledge scope
task_type_en: Software Engineering, Cross-repository Fixing, Code Migration, Repository Generation
eval_feature_en: Cross-repository Reasoning, External Knowledge Integration, Full-repository Generation

    C["Collect 120 dependency migration tasks involving breaking changes in upstream dependencies"] --> D["Collect 50 document-to-repository generation tasks from natural language specifications"]
    D["Collect 50 document-to-repository generation tasks from natural language specifications"] --> E["Combine 500 real-world instances across four settings varying resolution and knowledge scope"]
    E["Combine 500 real-world instances across four settings varying resolution and knowledge scope"] --> F["Deploy code agents to attempt task completion across all four settings"]
    F["Deploy code agents to attempt task completion across all four settings"] --> G["Measure success rate for each model and task type combination"]

    B["收集12个需要专业领域知识的特定问题"] --> C["收集120个涉及上游依赖破坏性变更的迁移任务"]
    C["收集120个涉及上游依赖破坏性变更的迁移任务"] --> D["收集50个从自然语言规范生成仓库的任务"]
    D["收集50个从自然语言规范生成仓库的任务"] --> E["组合500个真实实例形成四种不同范围的设置"]
    E["组合500个真实实例形成四种不同范围的设置"] --> F["部署代码智能体在四种设置中尝试完成任务"]
    F["部署代码智能体在四种设置中尝试完成任务"] --> G["测量每个模型和任务类型组合的成功率"]

name: BFCL-v4
intro: BFCL-v4是一个用于评估大型语言模型函数调用能力的综合基准。它涵盖了多种编程语言中的串行和并行函数调用，并采用创新的抽象语法树（AST）评估方法。该基准通过专家策划和用户贡献的函数，全面测试模型在多样化、真实的工具使用场景中的表现。
build_method: 专家构建, 众包, 混合
metric: Accuracy, AST Match, Relevance, Irrelevance, Max Delta, SD, Mean
eval_feature: 多轮, 动态, 实时, 防污染
intro_en: BFCL-v4 is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating large language models' function calling capabilities. It covers serial and parallel function calls across multiple programming languages and employs an innovative abstract syntax tree (AST) evaluation method. The benchmark thoroughly tests models in diverse, real-world tool usage scenarios using expert-curated and user-contributed functions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Function Specifications & Code Examples) --> B{{Expert Design & Scenario Generation}}
    C(Programming Language Grammars) --> B
    B --> D[Initial Function Call Scenarios]
    D --> E{{Crowdsourcing for Diversity}}
    E --> F[Refined Function Call Scenarios]
    F --> G[AST Generation & Validation]
    G --> H{AST Consistency Check}
    H -->|Pass| I[Final BFCL-v4 Dataset]
    H -->|Fail| J[Scenario Revision]
    J --> F
    I --> K[LLM Function Calling Evaluation]
    K --> L{{AST-based Evaluation Method}}
    L --> M(Evaluation Results & Metrics)
metric_en: Accuracy, AST Match, Relevance, Irrelevance, Max Delta, SD, Mean

flowchart LR
    A["Curate expert-designed functions and prompts for single-turn function-calling scenarios."] --> B["Collect over 67,000 community-contributed real-life function-calling datapoints from users."]

    C["Curate 2,251 crowdsourced datapoints from the community contributions for the benchmark."] --> D["Design eight curated API suites with 1,000 queries for multi-turn context management."]
    D["Design eight curated API suites with 1,000 queries for multi-turn context management."] --> E["Construct agentic evaluation tasks spanning applications, database queries, and chatbot context management."]
    E["Construct agentic evaluation tasks spanning applications, database queries, and chatbot context management."] --> F["Implement Abstract Syntax Tree sub-string matching as a proxy for function execution."]
    F["Implement Abstract Syntax Tree sub-string matching as a proxy for function execution."] --> G["Validate AST evaluation by comparing it with execution-based metrics on a dataset subset."]
    G["Validate AST evaluation by comparing it with execution-based metrics on a dataset subset."] --> H["Evaluate models on serial and parallel function calls across multiple programming languages."]

    A["策划专家设计的函数和提示用于单轮调用场景"] --> B["收集超过67000个社区贡献的真实函数调用数据点"]
    B["收集超过67000个社区贡献的真实函数调用数据点"] --> C["从社区贡献中策划2251个众包数据点"]

    D["设计八个API套件和1000个查询用于多轮上下文管理"] --> E["构建涵盖应用、数据库查询和聊天机器人的智能体评估任务"]
    E["构建涵盖应用、数据库查询和聊天机器人的智能体评估任务"] --> F["实现抽象语法树子串匹配作为函数执行的代理"]
    F["实现抽象语法树子串匹配作为函数执行的代理"] --> G["在数据子集上对比执行指标以验证AST评估方法"]
    G["在数据子集上对比执行指标以验证AST评估方法"] --> H["在多种编程语言中评估模型的串行和并行函数调用"]

name: BIG-Bench Hard
intro: BIG-Bench Extra Hard (BBEH) 是一个为推动大型语言模型（LLM）推理能力评估极限而设计的新基准。它通过引入比BIG-Bench Hard (BBH) 更具挑战性的新任务，解决了现有基准测试饱和的问题。该基准的评估结果表明，即便是最先进的模型在通用推理能力上仍有巨大的提升空间。
metric: Accuracy, Exact Match, Harmonic Average Accuracy
eval_feature: 思维链, 零样本, 少样本
build_method_en: Hybrid (Expert Construction, Adaptation of Existing Datasets)
intro_en: BIG-Bench Extra Hard (BBEH) is a new benchmark designed to push the limits of large language models' (LLM) reasoning capabilities. By introducing tasks more challenging than those in BIG-Bench Hard (BBH), it addresses the saturation issue of existing benchmarks. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models have significant room for improvement in general reasoning ability.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Existing Datasets
(e.g., BIG-Bench Hard)) --> B[Task Adaptation]
    C[Expert Knowledge] --> D[New Task Creation]
    B --> E{Increase Difficulty?}
    D --> E
    E -- Yes --> F[Task Refinement]
    E -- No --> G[Discard/Revise]
    F --> H[Expert Validation]
    H --> I(BIG-Bench Extra Hard
(BBEH) Dataset)
    I --> J[LLM Reasoning Evaluation]
    J --> K[Performance Analysis]
metric_en: Accuracy, Exact Match, Harmonic Average Accuracy

name: BigCodeBench
intro: BigCodeBench 是一个评测大型语言模型（LLMs）处理复杂实用编程任务能力的基准。它要求模型调用多种库函数，超越简单算法题。该基准包含自然语言指令变体，显示当前模型在复杂指令和精确函数使用上仍有不足，指明未来研究方向。
build_method: LLM生成, 人工标注, 专家构建
eval_feature: 领域特定
build_method_en: LLM Generation, Human Annotation, Expert Curation
intro_en: BigCodeBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' (LLMs) ability to handle complex, practical programming tasks. It requires models to invoke various library functions, going beyond simple algorithm problems. The benchmark includes natural language instruction variants, highlighting current models' limitations in handling complex instructions and precise function usage, and indicating directions for future research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Programming Task Repository) --> B{{LLM Generation}}
    B --> C[Initial Task Generation]
    C --> D[Manual Annotation]
    D --> E[Expert Construction]
    E --> F{Quality Review}
    F -->|Pass| G(Curated BigCodeBench Dataset)
    F -->|Fail| H[Refinement Loop]
    H --> D
    G --> I[LLM Evaluation]
    I --> J(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source seed examples from ODEX containing Stack Overflow code skeletons with brief intents"] --> B["Use GPT-4 with 2-shot demonstration to synthesize enriched programming tasks using diverse libraries"]
    B["Use GPT-4 with 2-shot demonstration to synthesize enriched programming tasks using diverse libraries"] --> C["Obfuscate function names and back-translate docstrings to mitigate model bias, then validate syntax"]

    F["Manually examine tasks to ensure at least two libraries used, add test cases, and resolve flaky tests"] --> G["Validate each task with unittest framework achieving average 99% branch coverage across test cases"]

name: BigOBench
intro: BigOBench 是一个新颖的编程基准，用于评估生成式语言模型理解和生成满足时间与空间复杂度约束代码的能力。它弥补了现有评测忽视计算复杂度理解的空白。该基准提供工具，通过性能分析推断任意Python函数的算法复杂度，包括人类或模型生成的代码。
intro_en: BigOBench is a novel programming benchmark designed to evaluate generative language models' ability to understand and generate code that meets time and space complexity constraints. It addresses the gap in existing evaluations that overlook computational complexity understanding. The benchmark provides tools to infer the algorithmic complexity of any Python function through performance analysis, applicable to both human- and model-generated code.

flowchart LR
    A[Existing Codebases/Problems] --> B(Problem Collection)
    B --> C[Code Parsing & Problem Extraction]
    C --> D{{Complexity Analysis Tool/Expert}}
    D --> E{Complexity Constraint Generation}
    E --> F[Hybrid Data Integration]
    F --> G{Quality Control & Verification}
    G -->|Pass| H(BigOBench Dataset
Code, Constraints)
    G -->|Fail| I[Refinement/Discard]
    H --> J[Model Evaluation Platform]
    J --> K[Performance Metrics
Time/Space Complexity]

flowchart LR
    A["Collect 3,105 coding problems and 1,190,250 solutions from Code Contests dataset"] --> B["Expand function inputs using multiple strategies and queue executions in isolated sandboxes"]
    B["Expand function inputs using multiple strategies and queue executions in isolated sandboxes"] --> C["Measure runtime and memory footprint across varying input sizes for each solution"]
    C["Measure runtime and memory footprint across varying input sizes for each solution"] --> D["Apply curve fitting to model time and space dependencies and infer complexity labels"]
    D["Apply curve fitting to model time and space dependencies and infer complexity labels"] --> E["Validate framework by comparing inferred labels against human-annotated theoretical complexity on test sets"]
    E["Validate framework by comparing inferred labels against human-annotated theoretical complexity on test sets"] --> F["Prompt models to predict complexity of existing solutions using runtime distributions and coefficients"]
    F["Prompt models to predict complexity of existing solutions using runtime distributions and coefficients"] --> G["Prompt models to generate code meeting specified feasible time and space complexity constraints"]
    G["Prompt models to generate code meeting specified feasible time and space complexity constraints"] --> H["Evaluate generated solutions against human solutions of same complexity using All@1 metric"]

name: BioASQ
intro: BioASQ是国际生物医学语义索引和问答挑战赛系列，涵盖多语言临床总结、命名实体链接、心脏病临床编码及肠脑相互作用信息提取等多项任务，是生物医学NLP领域最重要的评测赛事之一。
org: CLEF, National Center for Scientific Research (Greece)
task_type: 问答, 文本摘要, 命名实体识别, 信息抽取
eval_feature: 大规模生物医学语义索引和问答，年度挑战赛形式
task_type_en: Question Answering, Text Summarization, Named Entity Recognition, Information Extraction
eval_feature_en: Large-scale Biomedical Semantic Indexing and QA, Annual Challenge Format
intro_en: BioASQ is an international series of biomedical semantic indexing and question answering challenges, covering multiple tasks such as multilingual clinical summarization, named entity linking, cardiac clinical coding, and gut-brain interaction information extraction. It is one of the most important benchmarks in the biomedical NLP field.

name: BioMysteryBench
intro: BioMysteryBench旨在评估AI科学家在组学数据驱动的生物发现方面的能力。该基准测试要求模型处理未经处理的原始数据，并回答诸如“哪个基因被敲除了”或“样本感染了什么病毒”等难题，从而评估其解决复杂分析挑战的能力。
intro_en: BioMysteryBench aims to evaluate AI scientists' ability in omics data-driven biological discovery. This benchmark requires models to process raw, unprocessed data and answer challenging questions such as "Which gene was knocked out?" or "What virus infected the sample?" to assess their capability in tackling complex analytical challenges.

name: BIRD-SQL
intro: BIRD-SQL是一个大规模、跨领域的文本到SQL基准测试，包含超过12,751个文本-SQL对和95个数据库，覆盖37个专业领域。该基准测试的重点是处理真实世界中的挑战，例如不干净的数据库内容、需要外部知识才能回答的自然语言问题，以及在大规模数据库中SQL查询的效率。
org: The University of Hong Kong, DAMO Academy, Alibaba Group, Tsinghua University, Shanghai AI Laborator
build_method: 混合, 人工标注, 网络爬取
metric: Execution Accuracy (EX), Valid Accuracy (VA), Reward-based Valid Efficiency Score (R-VES)
modality: 文本, 代码, 表格, SQL
intro_en: BIRD-SQL is a large-scale, cross-domain text-to-SQL benchmark containing over 12,751 text-SQL pairs and 95 databases across 37 professional fields. It focuses on real-world challenges such as noisy database content, natural language questions requiring external knowledge, and the efficiency of SQL queries on large-scale databases.

name: BLINK
intro: BLINK是一个针对多模态大语言模型（LLMs）的新基准，专注于其他评估中未发现的核心视觉感知能力。它将14个经典的计算机视觉任务重新格式化为3,807个多项选择题，并配有单张或多张图像和视觉提示。BLINK旨在刺激社区帮助多模态LLMs赶上人类水平的视觉感知。
org: Princeton University, Meta, University of Washington
eval_feature: 零样本
intro_en: BLINK is a new benchmark for multimodal large language models (LLMs) that focuses on core visual perception abilities not captured by other evaluations. It reformats 14 classic computer vision tasks into 3,807 multiple-choice questions, accompanied by single or multiple images and visual prompts. BLINK aims to encourage the community to help multimodal LLMs reach human-level visual perception.

name: BoolQ
intro: BoolQ是一个自然语言是非问答数据集。其问题是在无提示、无约束的自然场景下产生的，因此具有相当的挑战性。这些问题通常涉及复杂的非事实信息，需要模型具备强大的推理能力才能正确解答。
intro_en: BoolQ is a natural language yes/no question answering dataset. Its questions are generated in unconstrained, natural scenarios without prompts, making it quite challenging. These questions often involve complex non-factual information, requiring models to have strong reasoning abilities to answer correctly.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR

name: BrowseComp
intro: BrowseComp是一个用于衡量AI代理浏览网页能力的基准。它包含1266个具有挑战性的问题，需要代理在互联网上持续导航以寻找难以发现的信息。尽管问题困难，但答案简短且易于验证，使其成为一个简单易用的评测工具。
intro_en: BrowseComp is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents' web browsing capabilities. It includes 1,266 challenging questions that require agents to continuously navigate the internet to find hard-to-discover information. Despite the difficulty, the answers are brief and easy to verify, making it a straightforward and user-friendly evaluation tool.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Internet Information) --> B[Human Experts]
    B --> C{{Manual Construction}}
    C --> D[Identify Hard-to-Discover Information]
    D --> E[Formulate Challenging Questions]
    E --> F[Design Brief & Verifiable Answers]
    F --> G{Answer Verification}
    G -- Pass --> H(BrowseComp Dataset\n1,266 Questions)
    G -- Fail --> E
    H --> I[AI Agent Evaluation]
    I --> J(Agent Performance Reports)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Trainers create inverted questions from seed facts with large search spaces"] --> B["Verify GPT-4o, o1, and early Deep Research cannot solve the question"]
    B["Verify GPT-4o, o1, and early Deep Research cannot solve the question"] --> C["Perform five Google searches confirming answer not on first result pages"]
    C["Perform five Google searches confirming answer not on first result pages"] --> D["Second trainer attempts question; revise if solved over 40% of time"]
    D["Second trainer attempts question; revise if solved over 40% of time"] --> E["Human trainers attempt solving questions without AI assistants within two hours"]
    E["Human trainers attempt solving questions without AI assistants within two hours"] --> F["Evaluate models including GPT-4o, o1, browsing-enabled GPT-4o, and Deep Research"]
    F["Evaluate models including GPT-4o, o1, browsing-enabled GPT-4o, and Deep Research"] --> G["Grade predicted answers using AI model comparing semantic equivalence to reference"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["训练员从种子事实创建具有大搜索空间的反向问题"] --> B["验证GPT-4o、o1和早期深度研究无法解答问题"]
    B["验证GPT-4o、o1和早期深度研究无法解答问题"] --> C["执行五次谷歌搜索确认答案不在首页结果中"]
    C["执行五次谷歌搜索确认答案不在首页结果中"] --> D["第二训练员尝试问题；若解决率超40%则修订"]
    D["第二训练员尝试问题；若解决率超40%则修订"] --> E["人类训练员在两小时内不使用AI助手尝试解答问题"]
    E["人类训练员在两小时内不使用AI助手尝试解答问题"] --> F["评估包括GPT-4o、o1、启用浏览的GPT-4o和深度研究的模型"]
    F["评估包括GPT-4o、o1、启用浏览的GPT-4o和深度研究的模型"] --> G["使用AI模型比较语义等价性对预测答案评分"]

name: BrowseComp-Plus
intro: BrowseComp-Plus是BrowseComp的衍生基准，专为深度研究代理设计，采用固定且精心筛选的语料库。每个查询都包含人工验证的支持文档和挖掘出的挑战性负样本，以实现可控的实验。该基准能够对深度研究代理和检索方法进行全面的评估和解耦分析，从而促进对检索有效性、引用准确性和上下文工程的深入理解。
task_type: Agent任务, 开放式问答, 事实验证
task_type_en: Agent Task, Open-ended QA, Fact Verification
intro_en: BrowseComp-Plus is a derivative benchmark of BrowseComp, designed specifically for in-depth agent research, using a fixed and carefully curated corpus. Each query includes manually verified supporting documents and mined challenging negative samples for controlled experiments. This benchmark enables comprehensive evaluation and decoupled analysis of advanced agents and retrieval methods, promoting a deeper understanding of retrieval effectiveness, citation accuracy, and context engineering.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Original BrowseComp Data) --> B[Corpus Curation]
    B --> C(Curated Corpus)
    C --> D[Query Collection]
    C --> E[Supporting Document Collection]
    C --> F[Negative Sample Mining]
    D --> G{{Manual Annotation}}
    E --> G
    F --> G
    G --> H{{Expert Construction}}
    H --> I{Manual Verification}
    I -->|Pass| J(Verified Queries & Docs)
    I -->|Fail| K[Discard Invalid]
    J --> L(BrowseComp-Plus Dataset)
    K --> L
    L --> M[Agent Research & Evaluation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Use OpenAI o3 with web search to retrieve candidate evidence URLs for each BrowseComp question-answer pair"] --> B["Instruct o3 to output clues, URLs, and evidence snippets in structured table format"]
    B["Instruct o3 to output clues, URLs, and evidence snippets in structured table format"] --> C["Perform human verification to ensure corpus provides complete evidence for reasoning chains"]
    C["Perform human verification to ensure corpus provides complete evidence for reasoning chains"] --> D["Mine hard negatives via web search to attach challenging distracting documents to each query"]
    D["Mine hard negatives via web search to attach challenging distracting documents to each query"] --> E["Curate a fixed 100k-document corpus balancing coverage, retrieval difficulty, and practical size"]
    E["Curate a fixed 100k-document corpus balancing coverage, retrieval difficulty, and practical size"] --> F["Pair each query with human-verified supporting documents and mined challenging negatives for controlled experiments"]
    F["Pair each query with human-verified supporting documents and mined challenging negatives for controlled experiments"] --> G["Evaluate deep research agents and retrieval methods using answer matching on the fixed corpus"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用OpenAI o3网络搜索为每个问题答案对检索候选证据URL"] --> B["指示o3以表格格式输出线索、URL和证据片段"]
    B["指示o3以表格格式输出线索、URL和证据片段"] --> C["人工验证语料库为推理链提供完整证据"]
    C["人工验证语料库为推理链提供完整证据"] --> D["通过网络搜索挖掘困难负样本作为干扰文档"]
    D["通过网络搜索挖掘困难负样本作为干扰文档"] --> E["构建10万文档固定语料库平衡覆盖度、检索难度和实用规模"]
    E["构建10万文档固定语料库平衡覆盖度、检索难度和实用规模"] --> F["为每个查询配对人工验证的支持文档和挖掘的挑战性负样本"]
    F["为每个查询配对人工验证的支持文档和挖掘的挑战性负样本"] --> G["在固定语料库上用答案匹配评估深度研究代理和检索方法"]

name: C-Eval
intro: C-Eval是一个全面的中文评测套件，用于评估基础模型在中文环境下的高级知识和推理能力。它包含13948道覆盖52个学科和四个难度等级的多项选择题。C-Eval Hard是其子集，专注于需要高级推理能力的挑战性学科。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Tsinghua University, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technolo
build_method: 考试题, 专家构建
eval_feature: 零样本, 少样本, 思维链
intro_en: C-Eval is a comprehensive Chinese evaluation suite designed to assess foundational models' advanced knowledge and reasoning abilities in Chinese contexts. It includes 13,948 multiple-choice questions across 52 subjects and four difficulty levels. C-Eval Hard is a subset focusing on challenging subjects that require advanced reasoning skills.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Exam Questions) --> B[Question Collection]
    B --> C[Subject & Difficulty Categorization]
    C --> D[Multiple-Choice Question Formatting]
    D --> E{{Expert Construction & Review}}
    E --> F{Quality Assurance Check}
    F -- Pass --> G(C-Eval Dataset\n13,948 MCQs, 52 Subjects, 4 Difficulties)
    F -- Fail --> B
    G --> H(C-Eval Hard Subset)
    G --> I[Model Evaluation]
    H --> I
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect multiple-choice questions from middle school, high school, college, and professional exams"] --> B["Organize questions into 52 disciplines spanning humanities, science, and engineering"]
    B["Organize questions into 52 disciplines spanning humanities, science, and engineering"] --> C["Label questions by four difficulty levels based on their source examination tier"]
    C["Label questions by four difficulty levels based on their source examination tier"] --> D["Create C-Eval Hard subset by selecting very challenging subjects requiring advanced reasoning"]
    D["Create C-Eval Hard subset by selecting very challenging subjects requiring advanced reasoning"] --> E["Evaluate English-oriented and Chinese-oriented LLMs on the multiple-choice questions"]
    E["Evaluate English-oriented and Chinese-oriented LLMs on the multiple-choice questions"] --> F["Calculate average accuracy across all subjects for each evaluated model"]
    F["Calculate average accuracy across all subjects for each evaluated model"] --> G["Analyze model strengths and shortcomings across disciplines and difficulty levels"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从初中、高中、大学和职业考试收集选择题"] --> B["将题目组织为52个学科，涵盖人文、科学和工程"]
    B["将题目组织为52个学科，涵盖人文、科学和工程"] --> C["根据来源考试层级标注四个难度等级"]
    C["根据来源考试层级标注四个难度等级"] --> D["选取需要高级推理的挑战性学科创建C-Eval Hard子集"]
    D["选取需要高级推理的挑战性学科创建C-Eval Hard子集"] --> E["在选择题上评估英语和中文导向的大语言模型"]
    E["在选择题上评估英语和中文导向的大语言模型"] --> F["计算每个模型在所有学科上的平均准确率"]
    F["计算每个模型在所有学科上的平均准确率"] --> G["分析模型在各学科和难度级别的优势与不足"]

name: C^3-Benchmark
intro: C3-Bench是一个开源基准，用于评估基于大型语言模型的智能体在多任务场景中的鲁棒性。它涵盖复杂工具关系导航、关键信息隐藏处理和动态决策路径管理，旨在揭示模型漏洞并推动智能体性能可解释性研究。
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成
eval_feature: 对抗性, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: C3-Bench is an open-source benchmark designed to evaluate the robustness of large language model-based agents in multi-task scenarios. It covers complex tool relationship navigation, key information hiding, and dynamic decision path management, aiming to expose model vulnerabilities and advance research on agent performance interpretability.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world Agent Scenarios) --> B[Expert Task Design]
    B --> C{{LLM-based Scenario Generation}}
    C --> D{Scenario Complexity Check}
    D -->|Pass| E[Integrate Tool Relationships]
    D -->|Fail| F[Refine Task Parameters]
    F --> B
    E --> G[Hide Key Information]
    G --> H[Dynamic Decision Path Management]
    H --> I[Expert Review & Validation]
    I --> J(C^3-Benchmark Dataset)
    J --> K[Agent Robustness Evaluation]
    K --> L[Performance Analysis]
    L --> M(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample desired decision trajectories and specify policy types for multi-task data generation"] --> B["Use HunYuan-Series LLMs with few-shot examples to generate user questions across policy types"]
    B["Use HunYuan-Series LLMs with few-shot examples to generate user questions across policy types"] --> C["Generate execution processes using HunYuan-TurboS with multi-role framework controlling tool dependencies"]
    C["Generate execution processes using HunYuan-TurboS with multi-role framework controlling tool dependencies"] --> D["Randomly assign information hiding strategies: omitted, referential, or long-context for subsequent tasks"]
    D["Randomly assign information hiding strategies: omitted, referential, or long-context for subsequent tasks"] --> E["Collect all policy type switch combinations to ensure uniform distribution across challenges"]
    E["Collect all policy type switch combinations to ensure uniform distribution across challenges"] --> F["Evaluate 49 agents on tool dependency navigation with fine-grained trajectory correctness metrics"]
    F["Evaluate 49 agents on tool dependency navigation with fine-grained trajectory correctness metrics"] --> G["Measure robustness by comparing accuracy across information hiding strategies and task numbers"]
    G["Measure robustness by comparing accuracy across information hiding strategies and task numbers"] --> H["Inject correct execution history to assess impact of variable decision trajectories on agents"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["采样决策轨迹并指定策略类型生成多任务数据"] --> B["用混元系列模型和少样本示例生成用户问题"]
    B["用混元系列模型和少样本示例生成用户问题"] --> C["用混元TurboS和多角色框架生成含工具依赖的执行过程"]
    C["用混元TurboS和多角色框架生成含工具依赖的执行过程"] --> D["为后续任务随机分配信息隐藏策略：省略、指代或长上下文"]
    D["为后续任务随机分配信息隐藏策略：省略、指代或长上下文"] --> E["收集所有策略类型切换组合确保挑战均匀分布"]
    E["收集所有策略类型切换组合确保挑战均匀分布"] --> F["用细粒度轨迹正确性指标评估49个智能体的工具依赖导航"]
    F["用细粒度轨迹正确性指标评估49个智能体的工具依赖导航"] --> G["通过比较信息隐藏策略和任务数的准确率衡量鲁棒性"]
    G["通过比较信息隐藏策略和任务数的准确率衡量鲁棒性"] --> H["注入正确执行历史评估可变决策轨迹对智能体的影响"]

name: CC-OCR
intro: CC-OCR基准旨在全面评估大型多模态模型在光学字符识别（OCR）方面的能力。它涵盖了多场景文本阅读、多语言文本阅读、文档解析和关键信息提取四个核心OCR任务。该基准包含39个子集，共7,058张完全标注的图像，其中41%来源于真实应用场景并首次发布。CC-OCR通过多样化的场景、任务和挑战，旨在推动LMM在OCR中心任务上的持续进步。
org: Alibaba Group, South China University of Technology
task_type: 图像问答, 文本识别, 信息抽取
task_type_en: Visual Question Answering, Text Recognition, Information Extraction
intro_en: The CC-OCR benchmark aims to comprehensively evaluate large multimodal models' capabilities in optical character recognition (OCR). It covers four core OCR tasks: multi-scene text reading, multilingual text reading, document parsing, and key information extraction. The benchmark includes 39 subsets with a total of 7,058 fully annotated images, 41% of which come from real-world applications and are newly released. By offering diverse scenarios, tasks, and challenges, CC-OCR seeks to drive continuous progress of LMMs in core OCR tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Raw Data
(Public Datasets, Web Sources)) --> B[Data Collection & Aggregation]
    B --> C[Initial Data Preprocessing
(Filtering, Cleaning)]
    C --> D{{OCR Annotation Tools}}
    D --> E[OCR-specific Annotation
(Text Detection, Recognition, KIE)]
    E --> F{{Data Augmentation Techniques}}
    F --> G{Quality Control & Validation}
    G -->|Pass| H[Dataset Splitting
(39 Subsets)]
    G -->|Fail| I[Data Refinement]
    I --> E
    H --> J(Final CC-OCR Benchmark Dataset)
    J --> K[Model Evaluation
(Performance Metrics)]
    K --> L[Benchmark Results & Leaderboard]

flowchart LR
    A["Collect existing benchmark datasets with qualified annotations for multi-scene and multilingual OCR tasks"] --> B["Gather newly-collected real-shot documents, natural scenes, and handwritten images from in-house sources"]
    B["Gather newly-collected real-shot documents, natural scenes, and handwritten images from in-house sources"] --> C["Re-annotate selected datasets like MTVQA and LAION-5B to meet LMM evaluation standards"]
    C["Re-annotate selected datasets like MTVQA and LAION-5B to meet LMM evaluation standards"] --> D["Generate pre-annotations using models, then cross-validate with different models for consistency"]
    D["Generate pre-annotations using models, then cross-validate with different models for consistency"] --> E["Manually correct annotations in LaTeX, HTML, and JSON formats for documents, tables, and KIE"]
    E["Manually correct annotations in LaTeX, HTML, and JSON formats for documents, tables, and KIE"] --> F["Review and verify final annotations using both OCR experts and large models"]
    F["Review and verify final annotations using both OCR experts and large models"] --> G["Evaluate five generalist and four specialist LMMs across 39 subsets with 7,058 annotated images"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集已有合格标注的基准数据集用于多场景和多语言OCR任务"] --> B["从内部来源收集新的实拍文档、自然场景和手写图像"]
    B["从内部来源收集新的实拍文档、自然场景和手写图像"] --> C["重新标注MTVQA和LAION-5B等数据集以符合LMM评估标准"]
    C["重新标注MTVQA和LAION-5B等数据集以符合LMM评估标准"] --> D["使用模型生成预标注后用不同模型交叉验证一致性"]
    D["使用模型生成预标注后用不同模型交叉验证一致性"] --> E["人工修正文档、表格和KIE的LaTeX、HTML和JSON格式标注"]
    E["人工修正文档、表格和KIE的LaTeX、HTML和JSON格式标注"] --> F["使用OCR专家和大模型审核验证最终标注"]
    F["使用OCR专家和大模型审核验证最终标注"] --> G["在39个子集7058张标注图像上评估五个通用和四个专用LMM"]

name: CCBench
intro: CCBench是一个用于评估AI编程代理在真实世界任务中表现的基准测试，这些任务基于小型代码库（<10k LoC），且不属于大型语言模型训练数据的一部分。所有任务均来源于CodeCrafters用户的私有提交，CodeCrafters是一个工程师通过从零开始实现流行软件来参与挑战的平台。
intro_en: CCBench is a benchmark for evaluating AI programming agents on real-world tasks based on small codebases (<10k LoC) that are not part of large language model training data. All tasks come from private submissions by CodeCrafters users, a platform where engineers participate in challenges by implementing popular software from scratch.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(CodeCrafters Users) --> B[Private Task Submissions]
    B --> C[Expert Construction]
    C --> D[Manual Annotation]
    D --> E{Annotation Review}
    E -- Pass --> F[Refined Tasks]
    E -- Fail --> G[Task Revision]
    G --> D
    F --> H(CCBench Dataset)
    H --> I(Small Codebases <10k LoC)
    H --> J[AI Agent Evaluation]
    J --> K(Real-world Tasks)
    J --> L(Performance Metrics)

name: CF-Div2-Stepfun
intro: CF-Div2-Stepfun 是一个评测大型语言模型竞赛编程能力的基准，选取2024年9月至2025年2月的CodeForces Division 2比赛题目以防止数据泄露。基准采用严格的离线沙箱评分，包含大量边界和压力测试，全面检验模型表现。
build_method: 考试题, 专家构建
intro_en: CF-Div2-Stepfun is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' coding abilities, using CodeForces Division 2 problems from September 2024 to February 2025 to prevent data leakage. It employs strict offline sandbox scoring and includes extensive boundary and stress tests to comprehensively assess model performance.

    E --> F{Quality Assurance Check}
    F -->|Pass| G(CF-Div2-Stepfun Benchmark
(Coding Problems & Tests))
    F -->|Fail| C
    G --> H[Offline Sandbox Scoring]
    H --> I[LLM Coding Ability Evaluation]

    F["Execute generated code in sandbox against all test cases"] --> G["Score submissions based on correctness across boundary and stress tests"]

    F["在沙箱中对所有测试用例执行生成的代码"] --> G["根据边界和压力测试的正确性对提交评分"]

name: CFBench
intro: CFBench是一个针对大型语言模型（LLMs）的综合性约束遵循基准测试。它旨在评估LLMs理解和遵循自然语言指令中复杂约束的能力，弥补了现有评估在约束全面性和真实性方面的不足。该基准包含1,000个精心策划的样本，涵盖200多个真实场景和50多个NLP任务，并提出了一个创新的约束类型系统框架和多维度评估方法。
intro_en: CFBench is a comprehensive constraint-following benchmark for large language models (LLMs). It aims to evaluate LLMs' ability to understand and adhere to complex constraints in natural language instructions, addressing the limitations of existing evaluations in constraint comprehensiveness and realism. The benchmark includes 1,000 carefully curated samples covering over 200 real-world scenarios and more than 50 NLP tasks, and introduces an innovative constraint type system framework along with a multidimensional evaluation approach.

    F --> G(CFBench Dataset
Complex NL Instructions & Constraints)
    G --> H[LLM Evaluation]
    H --> I[Constraint Following Score]

    C["Domain experts filter meaningless constraints and synthesize into 10 primary and 25 subcategories framework"] --> D["Assess instructions for constraint types and quantities, balance scenarios to select 2,000 refined instructions"]
    D["Assess instructions for constraint types and quantities, balance scenarios to select 2,000 refined instructions"] --> E["Professional annotators iteratively review and refine constraints, gold answers, and evaluation criteria until satisfactory"]
    E["Professional annotators iteratively review and refine constraints, gold answers, and evaluation criteria until satisfactory"] --> F["Generate checklist breaking requirements into independent checkpoints with constraint types and priority annotations"]
    F["Generate checklist breaking requirements into independent checkpoints with constraint types and priority annotations"] --> G["Split 1,000 curated samples into easy and hard sets based on constraint count and complexity"]

    C["领域专家过滤无意义约束并合成为10大类25子类框架"] --> D["评估指令的约束类型和数量，平衡场景选出2000条精炼指令"]
    D["评估指令的约束类型和数量，平衡场景选出2000条精炼指令"] --> E["专业标注员迭代审查完善约束、黄金答案和评估标准直至满意"]

name: CG-Bench
intro: CG-Bench是一个针对长视频理解中线索溯源问答的新型基准测试。它旨在解决现有基准主要关注短视频或依赖多项选择题的局限性，这些局限性可能导致模型在没有真正理解视频内容的情况下给出答案。CG-Bench强调模型检索相关线索的能力，包含1,219个手动策划的视频和12,129个问答对，涵盖感知、推理和幻觉三种主要问题类型。该基准还引入了线索溯源的白盒和黑盒评估方法，以全面评估模型对长视频的理解能力。
org: Nanjing University, Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, Fudan University, Zhejiang Universi
build_method: 人工标注
intro_en: CG-Bench is a novel benchmark for clue tracing question answering in long video understanding. It addresses the limitations of existing benchmarks that mainly focus on short videos or rely on multiple-choice questions, which may lead models to answer without truly understanding the video content. CG-Bench emphasizes models' ability to retrieve relevant clues and includes 1,219 manually curated videos and 12,129 QA pairs, covering three main question types: perception, reasoning, and hallucination. The benchmark also introduces white-box and black-box clue tracing evaluation methods to comprehensively assess models' understanding of long videos.

flowchart LR
    A[Raw Long Videos] --> B(Video Collection)
    B --> C[Video Content Analysis]
    C --> D[Manual Question Generation]

    E --> F[Manual Answer Formulation]
    F --> G{Annotation Quality Check}
    G -->|Pass| H[Data Integration]
    G -->|Fail| E
    H --> I(CG-Bench Dataset
Long Video QA)
    I --> J[Model Evaluation
Clue Tracing QA]

    C["Establish question taxonomy with Perception, Reasoning, and Hallucination types and subcategories"] --> D["Annotate 6-15 question-answer-clue triplets per video with temporal intervals in native language"]
    D["Annotate 6-15 question-answer-clue triplets per video with temporal intervals in native language"] --> E["Create multiple-choice options with 4-7 negative samples for each question"]
    E["Create multiple-choice options with 4-7 negative samples for each question"] --> F["Evaluate Long-Video MCQ accuracy using entire video as model input"]
    F["Evaluate Long-Video MCQ accuracy using entire video as model input"] --> G["Conduct white-box evaluation measuring tIoU for predicted clue intervals against ground truth"]
    G["Conduct white-box evaluation measuring tIoU for predicted clue intervals against ground truth"] --> H["Conduct black-box evaluation computing clue retrieval rate from model-generated frame indices"]

    D["用母语为每个视频标注6-15个问答线索三元组及时间区间"] --> E["为每个问题创建包含4-7个负样本的多项选择选项"]

    F["使用完整视频作为输入评估长视频多选题准确率"] --> G["进行白盒评估测量预测线索区间与真值的tIoU"]

name: CharacterEval
intro: CharacterEval 是一个中文角色扮演对话智能体评测基准，包含 77 个来自中文小说和剧本的角色、1785 个多轮对话和 11376 个样本，用于系统评估角色一致性、对话能力与角色扮演吸引力。
org: Renmin University of China, Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tianjin University, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, KAUST
build_method: GPT-4初始对话提取, 人工质量控制, 百度百科角色档案补全
task_type: 角色扮演对话智能体评测
eval_feature: 多轮对话, 角色一致性, 情感价值
intro_en: CharacterEval is a Chinese benchmark for role-playing conversational agent assessment, covering 77 characters, 1,785 multi-turn dialogues, and 11,376 examples.
build_method_en: GPT-4 initial dialogue extraction, human-led quality control, Baidu Baike character-profile enrichment
eval_feature_en: Multi-turn Dialogue, Character Consistency, Emotional Engagement

    E["Retrieve and integrate in-depth character profiles from Baidu Baike"] --> F["Collect human annotations to train CharacterRM role-playing reward model"]
    F["Collect human annotations to train CharacterRM role-playing reward model"] --> G["Evaluate agents using thirteen metrics across four dimensions with CharacterRM"]

name: ChartMimic
intro: ChartMimic是一个旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMM）视觉接地代码生成能力的基准。它利用信息丰富的可视化图表和文本指令作为输入，要求LMM生成相应的图表渲染代码。ChartMimic包含4,800个人工整理的三元组（图表、指令、代码），代表了科学论文中真实的图表使用案例，涵盖18种常规类型和4种高级类型，细分为201个子类别。该基准强调评估LMM协调视觉理解、代码生成和跨模态推理等多种认知能力的能力。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of General Artificial Intelligence (BIGAI), Beijing Academy o
intro_en: ChartMimic is a benchmark designed to evaluate the visual grounding code generation capabilities of large multimodal models (LMMs). It uses information-rich visual charts and textual instructions as input, requiring LMMs to generate corresponding chart rendering code. ChartMimic contains 4,800 manually curated triplets (chart, instruction, code) representing real chart use cases from scientific papers, covering 18 common types and 4 advanced types, subdivided into 201 subcategories. This benchmark emphasizes assessing LMMs' abilities to coordinate visual understanding, code generation, and cross-modal reasoning.

(Chart, Text, Code))

    G --> D
    H --> I(ChartMimic Dataset
(4,800 Samples))
    I --> J[LMM Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)

name: ChartQA
intro: ChartQA是一个大规模基准测试，旨在评估模型对图表进行视觉和逻辑推理的能力。它包含9.6K个人工编写的问题以及23.1K个从人工编写的图表摘要中生成的问题。该基准测试通过结合视觉特征和图表数据表来回答问题，以解决视觉和逻辑推理的独特挑战。
org: York University, Nanyang Technological University, Salesforce Research
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
task_type: 开放式问答, 图像问答
eval_feature: 视觉推理, 逻辑推理
intro_en: ChartQA is a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate models' abilities in visual and logical reasoning over charts. It includes 9.6K human-written questions and 23.1K questions generated from human-written chart summaries. This benchmark addresses unique challenges in visual and logical reasoning by combining visual features with chart data tables to answer questions.

    J --> K(ChartQA Dataset\n32.7K Questions)
    K --> L[Model Reasoning Evaluation]

    F["Extract visual features from chart images using neural models"] --> G["Combine visual features and extracted data tables in transformer-based models to answer questions"]

name: CharXiv
intro: 图表理解在多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）应用于分析科学论文或财务报告等实际任务中扮演着关键角色。现有数据集常侧重于过度简化和同质化的图表，导致对模型进展的评估过于乐观。CharXiv是一个全面的评估套件，包含2,323个来自arXiv论文的自然、具有挑战性和多样化的图表。它包括描述性问题和推理问题，所有图表和问题均由人类专家精心挑选、整理和验证。
org: Princeton Language and Intelligence (PLI), Princeton University, University of Wisconsin, Madison, T
build_method: 专家构建
intro_en: Chart understanding plays a crucial role in applying multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to real-world tasks such as analyzing scientific papers or financial reports. Existing datasets often focus on overly simplified and homogeneous charts, leading to overly optimistic assessments of model progress. CharXiv is a comprehensive evaluation suite containing 2,323 natural, challenging, and diverse charts sourced from arXiv papers. It includes both descriptive and reasoning questions, with all charts and questions carefully selected, curated, and validated by human experts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR

    B --> C{Chart Complexity Filter}

    D --> F{{Annotation Guidelines & Tools}}
    F --> G[Expert Review & Validation]
    G --> H(CharXiv Dataset\nComplex Charts for MLLMs)
    H --> I[MLLM Evaluation on Chart Understanding]

    E["Evaluate 13 open-source and 11 proprietary MLLMs on the benchmark"] --> F["Measure accuracy on descriptive and reasoning questions separately"]
    F["Measure accuracy on descriptive and reasoning questions separately"] --> G["Compare model performance against human expert baseline of 80.5%"]

    F["分别测量描述性和推理问题的准确率"] --> G["将模型表现与80.5%的人类专家基线对比"]

name: CheXGenBench
intro: CheXGenBench是一个统一的评估框架，旨在全面评估合成胸部X光图像的保真度、隐私性和下游实用性，通过20多种定量指标标准化评估文本到图像生成模型。
org: The University of Edinburgh, Samsung AI Center
eval_feature: 评估合成胸部X光图像的保真度, 隐私性和下游实用性
build_method_en: based on existing datasets and manual annotation
eval_feature_en: evaluate fidelity, privacy, and downstream utility of synthetic chest X-ray images
intro_en: CheXGenBench is a unified evaluation framework designed to comprehensively assess the fidelity, privacy, and downstream utility of synthetic chest X-ray images, standardizing the evaluation of text-to-image generation models through over 20 quantitative metrics.

    I --> J[Model Evaluation Framework]
    J --> K[Assess Image Quality]
    J --> L[Assess Clinical Relevance]
    K --> M(Evaluation Metrics)
    L --> M
    M --> N[Benchmark Results]

name: Chinese SimpleQA
intro: Chinese SimpleQA是首个全面的中文基准，旨在评估大型语言模型回答简短问题的能力。该基准涵盖6个主要主题和99个子主题，并通过严格的质量控制流程确保问题和答案的高质量。其特点包括中文、多样性、高质量、静态和易于评估，可用于指导开发者理解模型在中文事实性方面的表现。
org: LivingFutureLab, Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of Technology, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
eval_feature_en: Dynamic Update, Contamination-free, Adversarial, Chain-of-Thought, Zero-shot
intro_en: Chinese SimpleQA is the first comprehensive Chinese benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' ability to answer short questions. It covers 6 main topics and 99 subtopics, with strict quality control ensuring high-quality questions and answers. Features include Chinese language, diversity, high quality, static nature, and ease of evaluation, making it useful for developers to understand model performance on Chinese factuality.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A((Knowledge Sources)) --> B[Topic & Subtopic Structuring]
    B --> C[Manual Question Creation]
    C --> D[Manual Answer Creation]
    D --> E{Initial QA Pair Validation}
    E -- Valid --> F[Quality Control & Refinement]
    E -- Invalid --> G[Discard/Revise]
    F --> H{{Hybrid Annotation Method}}
    H --> I(Chinese SimpleQA Dataset)
    I --> J[LLM Evaluation]
    J --> K[Performance Analysis]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract knowledge content from Wikipedia and filter using quality assessment model"] --> B["Prompt LLM to generate question-answer pairs from filtered knowledge content"]
    B["Prompt LLM to generate question-answer pairs from filtered knowledge content"] --> C["Use LLM to verify pairs against criteria: objective, unique answers, answerable by 2023"]
    C["Use LLM to verify pairs against criteria: objective, unique answers, answerable by 2023"] --> D["Perform RAG verification using LlamaIndex with Google and Bing search results"]
    D["Perform RAG verification using LlamaIndex with Google and Bing search results"] --> E["Filter simple questions answered correctly by all four powerful baseline models"]
    E["Filter simple questions answered correctly by all four powerful baseline models"] --> F["Two annotators independently verify criteria and answer using authoritative sources with URLs"]
    F["Two annotators independently verify criteria and answer using authoritative sources with URLs"] --> G["Third annotator resolves inconsistencies and determines final annotation"]
    G["Third annotator resolves inconsistencies and determines final annotation"] --> H["Retain only pairs where human annotation fully matches LLM-generated answers"]

flowchart LR
    A["从维基百科提取知识内容并用质量评估模型过滤"] --> B["提示LLM从过滤后的知识内容生成问答对"]
    B["提示LLM从过滤后的知识内容生成问答对"] --> C["用LLM验证问答对符合标准:客观唯一答案且2023年可答"]
    C["用LLM验证问答对符合标准:客观唯一答案且2023年可答"] --> D["用LlamaIndex结合谷歌和必应搜索结果进行RAG验证"]
    D["用LlamaIndex结合谷歌和必应搜索结果进行RAG验证"] --> E["过滤被四个强大基线模型全部答对的简单问题"]
    E["过滤被四个强大基线模型全部答对的简单问题"] --> F["两名标注员独立验证标准并用权威来源和网址作答"]
    F["两名标注员独立验证标准并用权威来源和网址作答"] --> G["第三名标注员解决不一致并确定最终标注"]
    G["第三名标注员解决不一致并确定最终标注"] --> H["仅保留人工标注与LLM生成答案完全一致的问答对"]

name: CiteBench
intro: CiteBench是一个用于科学引文文本生成的基准测试，旨在系统地研究从多个来源聚合和综合文本知识。该基准统一了多个不同的数据集，支持在不同的任务设计和领域之间对引文生成模型进行标准化评估。CiteBench的发布为引文生成领域的未来研究提供了新的见解和评估方法。
org: Ubiquitous Knowledge Processing (UKP) Lab, Technical University of Darmstadt
intro_en: CiteBench is a benchmark for scientific citation text generation, designed to systematically study the aggregation and synthesis of textual knowledge from multiple sources. It unifies various datasets to enable standardized evaluation of citation generation models across different task designs and domains. The release of CiteBench offers new insights and evaluation methods for future research in citation generation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Multiple Existing Scientific Datasets) --> B[Aggregate Datasets]
    B --> C[Unify & Standardize Data]
    C --> D[Extract Citation Text]
    D --> E[Clean & Filter Data]
    E --> F{Data Quality Check}
    F -- Pass --> G[Expert Review]
    F -- Fail --> E
    G --> H(Unified CiteBench Dataset)
    H --> I[Train Citation Generation Models]
    I --> J[Standardized Model Evaluation]
    J --> K[Performance Analysis & Reporting]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect four existing citation text generation datasets with diverging task definitions"] --> B["Cast the diverse datasets into a single general task definition"]
    B["Cast the diverse datasets into a single general task definition"] --> C["Unify the datasets to enable standardized evaluation across task designs and domains"]
    C["Unify the datasets to enable standardized evaluation across task designs and domains"] --> D["Implement multiple strong baseline models for citation text generation"]
    D["Implement multiple strong baseline models for citation text generation"] --> E["Develop standardized evaluation kit with diagnostic modules for intent and discourse analysis"]
    E["Develop standardized evaluation kit with diagnostic modules for intent and discourse analysis"] --> F["Test baseline model transferability between the unified datasets"]
    F["Test baseline model transferability between the unified datasets"] --> G["Evaluate models using both quantitative metrics and qualitative citation intent analysis"]

flowchart LR
    A["收集四个任务定义不同的引文生成数据集"] --> B["将多样化数据集统一为单一通用任务定义"]
    B["将多样化数据集统一为单一通用任务定义"] --> C["统一数据集以支持跨任务设计和领域的标准化评估"]
    C["统一数据集以支持跨任务设计和领域的标准化评估"] --> D["实现多个强基线引文生成模型"]
    D["实现多个强基线引文生成模型"] --> E["开发含意图和话语分析诊断模块的标准化评估工具"]
    E["开发含意图和话语分析诊断模块的标准化评估工具"] --> F["测试基线模型在统一数据集间的迁移能力"]
    F["测试基线模型在统一数据集间的迁移能力"] --> G["使用定量指标和定性意图分析评估模型"]

name: CiteEval
intro: CiteEval是一个基于原则的引用评估框架，旨在对生成文本中的引用质量进行细粒度评估。该框架不仅考虑被引用的来源，还涵盖了检索上下文、用户查询和生成的文本。基于此框架，研究人员构建了CiteBench，一个带有人工高质量标注的多领域基准。为了实现高效评估，还开发了与人类判断高度相关的模型指标套件CiteEval-Auto。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
metric: Context Attribution, Citation Editing, Citation Rating, Correlation with human judgment
intro_en: CiteEval is a principle-based citation evaluation framework designed for fine-grained assessment of citation quality in generated text. The framework considers not only the cited sources but also the retrieval context, user queries, and the generated text. Based on this framework, researchers developed CiteBench, a multi-domain benchmark with high-quality human annotations. To enable efficient evaluation, they also created CiteEval-Auto, a suite of model metrics highly correlated with human judgments.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A((Generated Text)) --> E[Data Collection]
    B((Cited Sources)) --> E
    C((Retrieval Context)) --> E
    D((User Queries)) --> E
    E --> F{{CiteEval Framework Principles}}
    F --> G[Manual Annotation]
    G --> H[Expert Construction]
    H --> I{Annotation Quality Check}
    I -- Pass --> J(Fine-grained Citation Assessments)
    I -- Fail --> G
    J --> K[CiteEval Dataset]
    K --> L[Model Evaluation]
    L --> M[Citation Quality Assessment Results]
metric_en: Context Attribution, Citation Editing, Citation Rating, Correlation with human judgment
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define citation evaluation principles considering full retrieval sources, user query, and response context"] --> B["Identify statements attributable to user, response reasoning, or parametric knowledge as not applicable"]
    B["Identify statements attributable to user, response reasoning, or parametric knowledge as not applicable"] --> C["Construct CiteBench with multi-domain examples and collect high-quality human annotations on citation quality"]
    C["Construct CiteBench with multi-domain examples and collect high-quality human annotations on citation quality"] --> D["Develop CiteEval-Auto model-based metrics suite to estimate fine-grained citation ratings"]
    D["Develop CiteEval-Auto model-based metrics suite to estimate fine-grained citation ratings"] --> E["Validate CiteEval-Auto metrics by measuring correlation with human judgments on CiteBench"]
    E["Validate CiteEval-Auto metrics by measuring correlation with human judgments on CiteBench"] --> F["Evaluate diverse RAG systems using CiteEval-Auto to assess multifaceted citation quality"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义引用评估原则，考虑全部检索源、用户查询和响应上下文"] --> B["识别归因于用户、响应推理或参数知识的陈述为不适用"]
    B["识别归因于用户、响应推理或参数知识的陈述为不适用"] --> C["构建多领域样本的CiteBench并收集高质量人工标注"]
    C["构建多领域样本的CiteBench并收集高质量人工标注"] --> D["开发CiteEval-Auto模型指标套件以估计细粒度引用评分"]
    D["开发CiteEval-Auto模型指标套件以估计细粒度引用评分"] --> E["通过测量与CiteBench人工判断的相关性验证CiteEval-Auto指标"]
    E["通过测量与CiteBench人工判断的相关性验证CiteEval-Auto指标"] --> F["使用CiteEval-Auto评估多样RAG系统的多方面引用质量"]

name: CL-bench
intro: CL-bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型上下文学习能力的基准。该基准包含500个复杂上下文和1899个任务，要求模型从特定上下文中学习新知识并进行推理，而非简单地依赖预训练知识。CL-bench旨在推动模型发展超越简单检索或阅读理解的复杂推理能力，以应对现实世界中复杂的、依赖上下文的任务。
build_method: 专家构建
eval_feature: 长文本, 防污染, 领域特定
intro_en: CL-bench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' in-context learning abilities. It includes 500 complex contexts and 1899 tasks, requiring models to learn new knowledge and perform reasoning from specific contexts rather than relying solely on pre-trained knowledge. CL-bench aims to advance models beyond simple retrieval or reading comprehension toward complex reasoning needed for real-world, context-dependent tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Knowledge Base/Real-world Scenarios] --> B(Expert Selection of Relevant Information)
    B --> C[Context Design: Crafting 500 Complex Contexts]
    C --> D[Task Generation: Creating 1899 In-Context Learning Tasks]
    D --> E[Instruction Formulation: Defining Model Prompts]
    E --> F{Expert Review & Validation}
    F -->|Pass| G(Pilot Testing with Sample Models)
    F -->|Fail| C
    G --> H{Refinement Based on Pilot Results}
    H -->|Needs Refinement| C
    H -->|Approved| I(Final CL-bench Dataset
500 Contexts, 1899 Tasks)
    I --> J[Model Evaluation: In-Context Learning Abilities]
    J --> K[Performance Analysis & Reporting]

flowchart LR
    A["Domain experts craft 500 complex contexts from real-world sources like manuals and experimental data"] --> B["Design 1,899 tasks where required knowledge is contained only within corresponding contexts"]
    B["Design 1,899 tasks where required knowledge is contained only within corresponding contexts"] --> C["Organize tasks into multi-turn sequences with reference solutions for each task"]
    C["Organize tasks into multi-turn sequences with reference solutions for each task"] --> D["Domain experts create 31,607 verification rubrics specifying solution steps and key assumptions"]
    D["Domain experts create 31,607 verification rubrics specifying solution steps and key assumptions"] --> E["Provide system prompts and contexts to language models for task solving"]
    E["Provide system prompts and contexts to language models for task solving"] --> F["Collect model solutions across multi-turn task sequences"]
    F["Collect model solutions across multi-turn task sequences"] --> G["Apply verification rubrics to model solutions with pass/fail criteria for each rubric"]
    G["Apply verification rubrics to model solutions with pass/fail criteria for each rubric"] --> H["Calculate overall task scores based on rubric verification results"]

    B["设计1899个任务，所需知识仅包含在对应上下文中"] --> C["将任务组织为多轮序列并提供参考解答"]
    C["将任务组织为多轮序列并提供参考解答"] --> D["专家创建31607条评分标准，明确解题步骤和关键假设"]
    D["专家创建31607条评分标准，明确解题步骤和关键假设"] --> E["向语言模型提供系统提示和上下文以解决任务"]

    F["收集模型在多轮任务序列中的解答"] --> G["用评分标准对模型解答进行通过/失败判定"]
    G["用评分标准对模型解答进行通过/失败判定"] --> H["根据评分标准验证结果计算任务总分"]

name: ClemBench
intro: ClemBench是一个基于大型语言模型自我对弈对话游戏的基准，用于评估模型的指令遵循、策略目标和语言理解能力。该框架能够适应新的发展，避免数据污染，且测试尚未饱和，为研究提示语言对性能的影响等问题提供了平台。
org: University of Potsdam, Heinrich Heine University Düsseldorf, MBZUAI
eval_feature: 多轮, 结果导向
intro_en: ClemBench is a benchmark based on self-play dialogue games using large language models, designed to evaluate models' instruction following, strategic goals, and language understanding abilities. The framework adapts to new developments, prevents data contamination, and remains unsaturated, providing a platform for studying the impact of prompt language on performance.

    G -->|Fail| I[Discard & Regenerate]
    H --> J[Model Evaluation: Instruction Following, Strategy, Language Understanding]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results & Metrics)

name: ClinicalBench
intro: ClinicalBench是基于MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV真实临床数据的预测建模评测基准，全面比较通用和医疗大型语言模型与传统机器学习模型在临床预测任务上的表现，涵盖死亡率预测、再入院预测等关键任务。
org: Illinois Institute of Technology, Harvard Medical School, Weill Cornell Medicine
build_method: 基于真实临床数据（MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV）
eval_feature: LLM与传统ML模型头对头比较，基于真实临床数据
build_method_en: Based on real clinical data (MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV)
eval_feature_en: Head-to-head comparison between LLM and traditional ML models, based on real clinical data
intro_en: ClinicalBench is a predictive modeling benchmark based on real clinical data from MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV. It comprehensively compares the performance of general and medical large language models with traditional machine learning models on clinical prediction tasks, including key tasks such as mortality prediction and readmission prediction.

name: ClinicBench
intro: ClinicBench是牛津大学和哈佛大学联合发布的临床场景大模型评测基准，涵盖临床语言生成、理解和推理等11个任务，引入了六个新数据集和复杂临床任务，全面评估LLM的临床能力。
org: University of Oxford, Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health
task_type: 多选题, 问答, 摘要, 实体识别, 关系抽取, 分类
eval_feature: 评估LLM在复杂临床问题解决, 临床语言理解, 生成和推理方面的能力
task_type_en: Multiple choice, Q&A, Summarization, Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction, Classification
build_method_en: Combining existing datasets and constructing six new datasets, GPT-4 generated and expert reviewed
eval_feature_en: Evaluating LLM capabilities in complex clinical problem solving, clinical language understanding, generation, and reasoning
intro_en: ClinicBench, jointly released by Oxford University and Harvard University, is a clinical scenario large model evaluation benchmark covering 11 tasks including clinical language generation, understanding, and reasoning. It introduces six new datasets and complex clinical tasks to comprehensively assess the clinical capabilities of LLMs.

    E --> F{Expert Review & Validation}
    F -->|Approved| G(ClinicBench Dataset\nClinical Scenarios)

    G --> H[LLM Evaluation]
    H --> I[Performance Analysis]
    I --> J(Benchmark Leaderboard)

    F["Apply automatic metrics including Micro F1, ROUGE-L, and Accuracy for task-specific evaluation"] --> G["Invite medical experts to evaluate clinical usefulness using Faithfulness and Comprehensiveness criteria"]

flowchart LR
    A["收集11个现有数据集涵盖临床语言生成理解推理任务"] --> B["构建6个新数据集涵盖转诊问答和治疗推荐等复杂任务"]

name: CMATH
intro: CMATH是一个包含1.7k小学数学应用题的数据集，题目来源于真实的中文练习册和考试。该数据集旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）的小学数学能力，并发现只有GPT-4在所有年级中表现良好。此外，CMATH还评估了LLMs对干扰信息的鲁棒性，发现GPT-4能保持鲁棒性。
intro_en: CMATH is a dataset containing 1.7k elementary school math word problems sourced from real Chinese workbooks and exams. It aims to evaluate the elementary math abilities of large language models (LLMs), with only GPT-4 performing well across all grade levels. Additionally, CMATH assesses LLMs' robustness to distracting information, finding that GPT-4 maintains robustness.

    F --> G{Expert Quality Review}
    G -- Pass --> H[Problem Refinement]
    G -- Fail --> I[Discard/Revisit]
    H --> J(CMATH Dataset\n1.7k Math Problems)
    J --> K[LLM Evaluation Setup]
    K --> L[Model Performance Testing]
    L --> M[Result Analysis & Reporting]

    C["Discard problems with graphic content and apply deduplication and cleaning"] --> D["Conduct several rounds of human validation by the authors"]

name: CMB
intro: CMB (A Comprehensive Medical Benchmark in Chinese) 是一个完全基于中文语言文化背景设计的综合性、多层次的医学基准。它旨在解决直接翻译英文医学评测所带来的文化和语境不符问题，全面评估大型语言模型在中文医疗环境下的知识水平和临床咨询能力。该基准不仅包含中医，还覆盖了所有临床医学专业和不同专业级别。
build_method: 考试题, 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 领域特定, 零样本, 少样本, 思维链
scale: 280,839道选择题和74个复杂病例咨询问题
build_method_en: Exam questions, Expert Curation, Human Annotation
intro_en: CMB (A Comprehensive Medical Benchmark in Chinese) is a comprehensive, multi-level medical benchmark designed entirely based on Chinese language and cultural context. It aims to address the cultural and contextual mismatches caused by directly translating English medical evaluations, providing a thorough assessment of large language models' knowledge and clinical consultation abilities in the Chinese medical environment. This benchmark includes traditional Chinese medicine and covers all clinical medical specialties and various professional levels.

    E --> F[Multi-level Structure Design]
    F --> G[Expert Review & Validation]
    G --> H(CMB Comprehensive Medical Benchmark)
    H --> I[Model Evaluation]
    I --> K(Medical Model Performance)
scale_en: 280,839 multiple choice questions and 74 items complex case consultation questions

    B["从医题库收集四类职业六大类别的公开资格考试题"] --> C["去重清洗、人工校准OCR错误并删除评论标记的问题项"]
    C["去重清洗、人工校准OCR错误并删除评论标记的问题项"] --> D["每子类随机抽取400题作测试集10题作开发集"]

name: CMExam
intro: CMExam是一个来源于中国国家执业医师资格考试的综合性数据集，旨在评估大型语言模型在医学领域的表现。它包含6万多个选择题，用于标准化和客观评估，并提供解决方案解释以进行开放式推理评估。该数据集还包含由医学专业人士标注的疾病组、临床科室、医学学科、能力领域和问题难度级别等五种额外的问答注释。CMExam是第一个提供全面医学注释的中文医学考试数据集。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Nankai University, Harvard Business School, Massachusetts Institute o
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: CMExam is a comprehensive dataset derived from the National Medical Licensing Examination of China, designed to evaluate the performance of large language models in the medical field. It contains over 60,000 multiple-choice questions for standardized and objective assessment, along with solution explanations for open-ended reasoning evaluation. The dataset also includes five additional QA annotations labeled by medical professionals: disease groups, clinical departments, medical disciplines, competency areas, and question difficulty levels. CMExam is the first Chinese medical exam dataset to provide comprehensive medical annotations.

flowchart LR
    A((National Medical Licensing Examination of China)) --> B[Extract Raw Exam Content]
    B --> C[Parse & Structure Questions]

    F --> G{Review & Validate Content}
    G -->|Pass| H[Refine & Finalize Dataset]
    G -->|Fail| B

    I --> J[LLM Evaluation Setup]
    J --> K[Model Answering Questions]
    K --> L[Compare Answers with Solutions]
    L --> M[Assess LLM Medical Performance]

    C["Invite medical professionals to annotate disease groups for each question"] --> D["Label clinical departments, medical disciplines, competency areas, and difficulty levels per question"]
    D["Label clinical departments, medical disciplines, competency areas, and difficulty levels per question"] --> E["Evaluate representative LLMs using multiple-choice accuracy and weighted F1 score"]
    E["Evaluate representative LLMs using multiple-choice accuracy and weighted F1 score"] --> F["Compare LLM performance against human accuracy baseline of 71.6%"]
    F["Compare LLM performance against human accuracy baseline of 71.6%"] --> G["Assess explanation generation quality before and after model finetuning"]

name: CMMLU
intro: CMMLU是一个综合性的中文评估基准，专门用于评估语言模型在中文语境下的知识和推理能力。它涵盖了从基础学科到高级专业水平的67个主题，包含自然科学、社会科学、工程、人文以及中国特定的文化内容。该基准旨在全面衡量模型在中文环境下的高级能力。
org: MBZUAI, LibrAI, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Microsoft Research Asia, The University of Melbourne
eval_feature: 零样本, 少样本, 思维链
build_method_en: Collected from exam questions and other sources, manually curated
intro_en: CMMLU is a comprehensive Chinese evaluation benchmark designed to assess language models' knowledge and reasoning abilities in Chinese contexts. It covers 67 subjects ranging from basic disciplines to advanced professional levels, including natural sciences, social sciences, engineering, humanities, and China-specific cultural content. The benchmark aims to thoroughly measure models' advanced capabilities in Chinese environments.

    B --> C[Manual Organization & Filtering]
    C --> D[Data Cleaning & Formatting]

    E --> F{Expert Review & Validation}
    F -->|Pass| G(CMMLU Final Dataset)
    G --> H[Language Model Evaluation]
    H --> I[Knowledge & Reasoning Assessment]

flowchart LR

    F["Split each subject into 5-question development set and 100+ question test set"] --> G["Evaluate over 20 multilingual and Chinese LLMs using few-shot prompting on test sets"]

    E["每科目随机抽取5%题目，通过在线资源验证答案"] --> F["每科目分为5题开发集和100+题测试集"]
    F["每科目分为5题开发集和100+题测试集"] --> G["用少样本提示在测试集上评估20多个多语言和中文大模型"]

name: CMMMU
intro: CMMMU是面向中文环境的大规模多学科多模态理解基准，评估大型多模态模型在需要大学水平学科知识和推理的任务表现。包含来自六大核心学科、30个专业和39种图像类型的12000个手工收集多模态问题，旨在推动下一代专家级多模态AI发展。
org: 01.AI, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 领域特定, 思维链
intro_en: CMMMU is a large-scale multidisciplinary multimodal understanding benchmark for the Chinese context, evaluating the performance of large multimodal models on tasks requiring university-level disciplinary knowledge and reasoning. It includes 12,000 manually collected multimodal questions from six core disciplines, 30 specialties, and 39 image types, aiming to advance the development of next-generation expert-level multimodal AI.

name: CodeElo
intro: CodeElo 是基于CodeForces平台的标准化竞赛级代码生成基准，旨在解决现有基准在私有测试用例、特殊裁判支持和执行环境方面的不足。该基准汇集了CodeForces上最近六个月的竞赛题目，并包含详细的比赛分区、题目难度评级和算法标签。它采用独特的Elo评分系统，通过直接向平台提交代码进行评判，从而实现与人类选手表现相当且方差更低的可靠评估。
intro_en: CodeElo is a standardized competition-level code generation benchmark based on the CodeForces platform, designed to address limitations of existing benchmarks in private test cases, special judge support, and execution environments. It aggregates contest problems from CodeForces over the past six months, including detailed contest divisions, problem difficulty ratings, and algorithm tags. Using a unique Elo rating system, it evaluates submissions by directly submitting code to the platform, achieving reliable assessments comparable to human performance with lower variance.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[CodeForces Platform] --> B{{Web Scraping}}
    B --> C(Raw Contest Problems)
    C --> D[Problem Standardization]
    D --> E[Private Test Case Creation]
    E --> F[Special Judge Support Integration]
    F --> G{{Expert Construction}}
    G --> H{Quality Assurance Check}
    H -- Pass --> I(CodeElo Benchmark Dataset)
    H -- Fail --> D
    I --> J[Code Generation Model Evaluation]
    J --> K[Execution Environment Testing]
    K --> L[Performance Metrics Calculation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape all problems from rated CodeForces contests held since platform inception"] --> B["Parse raw HTML problems into sections: description, input/output format, examples, and notes"]
    B["Parse raw HTML problems into sections: description, input/output format, examples, and notes"] --> C["Collect contest divisions, problem difficulty ratings, and algorithm tags from CodeForces platform"]
    C["Collect contest divisions, problem difficulty ratings, and algorithm tags from CodeForces platform"] --> D["Select recent contest problems for testing to avoid data contamination"]
    D["Select recent contest problems for testing to avoid data contamination"] --> E["Display problems in original HTML format to preserve structure and formula clarity"]
    E["Display problems in original HTML format to preserve structure and formula clarity"] --> F["Parse solution code blocks from model outputs after generation"]
    F["Parse solution code blocks from model outputs after generation"] --> G["Submit parsed code directly to CodeForces platform for official judgment"]
    G["Submit parsed code directly to CodeForces platform for official judgment"] --> H["Calculate Elo ratings aligned with platform to provide human-comparable scores with lower variance"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["抓取CodeForces平台自创建以来所有评级竞赛的题目"] --> B["解析HTML格式题目为描述、输入输出格式、样例和注释等部分"]
