name: CodeSimpleQA
intro: CodeSimpleQA是一个全面的双语基准测试，旨在评估代码大型语言模型在回答代码相关问题时的事实准确性。它包含精心策划的英文和中文问答对，涵盖多种编程语言和主要计算机科学领域。该基准测试旨在解决现有代码相关基准侧重于代码执行正确性，而忽略编程知识事实准确性的问题。研究还创建了CodeSimpleQA-Instruct，一个包含66M样本的大规模指令语料库，并开发了一个结合监督微调和强化学习的后训练框架。
org: Jian Yang, Wei Zhang, Yizhi Li, Shawn Guo, Haowen Wang, Aishan Liu, Ge Zhang, Zili Wang, Zhoujun Li,
build_method: 人工标注
eval_feature: 双语
intro_en: CodeSimpleQA is a comprehensive bilingual benchmark designed to evaluate the factual accuracy of large code language models in answering code-related questions. It contains carefully curated English and Chinese QA pairs covering multiple programming languages and key computer science domains. This benchmark addresses the issue that existing code-related benchmarks focus on code execution correctness while neglecting the factual accuracy of programming knowledge. The study also created CodeSimpleQA-Instruct, a large-scale instruction corpus with 66M samples, and developed a post-training framework combining supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Code-related Knowledge Bases & Programming Resources) --> B[Manual QA Pair Creation]
    B --> C[Bilingual QA Pair Formulation]
    C --> D[Domain-specific Content Curation]
    D --> E{Factual Accuracy & Quality Check}
    E -->|Pass| F[Refined QA Pairs]
    E -->|Fail| G[Re-annotation/Correction]
    G --> B
    F --> H(CodeSimpleQA Dataset\nBilingual QA Pairs)
    H --> I[Model Evaluation\nFactual Accuracy]
    I --> J(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Identify code-related documents from Common Crawl using fastText classifier and multi-dimensional filtering"] --> B["Score domain reliability, assess content quality via LLM, and verify code-text ratios"]
    B["Score domain reliability, assess content quality via LLM, and verify code-text ratios"] --> C["Extract clean content with rule-based filtering, removing advertisements and HTML artifacts"]
    C["Extract clean content with rule-based filtering, removing advertisements and HTML artifacts"] --> D["Generate semantic embeddings using code-text BERT and cluster documents with DBSCAN algorithm"]
    D["Generate semantic embeddings using code-text BERT and cluster documents with DBSCAN algorithm"] --> E["Uniformly sample from clusters and generate QA pairs using Deepseek-V3.1 at temperature 0.1"]
    E["Uniformly sample from clusters and generate QA pairs using Deepseek-V3.1 at temperature 0.1"] --> F["Verify QA correctness using LLM-as-a-Judge against original documentation, keeping only CORRECT labels"]
    F["Verify QA correctness using LLM-as-a-Judge against original documentation, keeping only CORRECT labels"] --> G["Collect statements from Stack Overflow and GitHub, converting to QA pairs for test set"]
    G["Collect statements from Stack Overflow and GitHub, converting to QA pairs for test set"] --> H["8 annotators and 3 engineers verify, retaining 312 from 1.5K candidates after 3+ reviews"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用fastText从Common Crawl识别代码文档并多维过滤"] --> B["评估域名可靠性、LLM评估内容质量并验证代码文本比"]
    B["评估域名可靠性、LLM评估内容质量并验证代码文本比"] --> C["基于规则过滤提取干净内容并移除广告和HTML伪影"]
    C["基于规则过滤提取干净内容并移除广告和HTML伪影"] --> D["用代码文本BERT生成语义嵌入并用DBSCAN聚类文档"]
    D["用代码文本BERT生成语义嵌入并用DBSCAN聚类文档"] --> E["从聚类均匀采样并用Deepseek-V3.1在0.1温度生成问答对"]
    E["从聚类均匀采样并用Deepseek-V3.1在0.1温度生成问答对"] --> F["用LLM评判员对照原始文档验证问答正确性仅保留正确标签"]
    F["用LLM评判员对照原始文档验证问答正确性仅保留正确标签"] --> G["从Stack Overflow和GitHub收集语句转换为测试集问答对"]
    G["从Stack Overflow和GitHub收集语句转换为测试集问答对"] --> H["8名标注员和3名工程师验证经3轮审核从1.5K保留312样本"]

name: ComplexFuncBench
intro: ComplexFuncBench针对复杂函数调用设计，涵盖五个真实场景，涉及多步调用和参数约束。要求模型进行长参数填写、参数值推理和处理128k长上下文。基准还提出了自动评估框架ComplexEval，用于量化复杂函数调用任务表现。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Zhipu AI, Tsinghua University, Federal Reserve B
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成
eval_feature: 多轮, 长文本, 领域特定
intro_en: ComplexFuncBench is designed for complex function calls, covering five real-world scenarios involving multi-step calls and parameter constraints. It requires models to handle long parameter filling, parameter value reasoning, and processing 128k-length contexts. The benchmark also introduces an automatic evaluation framework, ComplexEval, to quantify performance on complex function call tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world Scenarios) --> B[Expert Definition]
    B --> C(Initial Complex Function Calls)
    C --> D{{LLM Generation}}
    D --> E[Parameter Filling & Reasoning]
    E --> F(Generated Complex Scenarios)
    F --> G{Expert Review & Validation}
    G --"Pass"--> H(Validated ComplexFuncBench Dataset)
    G --"Fail"--> I[Refinement]
    I --> D
    H --> J[Model Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 43 real-time APIs from Booking.com and manually correct function descriptions"] --> B["Use GPT-4o to generate 1,000 preliminary complex function calling samples across domains"]
    B["Use GPT-4o to generate 1,000 preliminary complex function calling samples across domains"] --> C["Select 100 samples with complete calling paths for human fine-grained annotation"]
    C["Select 100 samples with complete calling paths for human fine-grained annotation"] --> D["Rewrite queries, correct function call order, and fix parameter errors manually"]
    D["Rewrite queries, correct function call order, and fix parameter errors manually"] --> E["Disambiguate by removing overlapping functions and deleting ambiguous API responses"]
    E["Disambiguate by removing overlapping functions and deleting ambiguous API responses"] --> F["Generalize to 1,000 samples with 600 single-domain and 400 cross-domain cases"]
    F["Generalize to 1,000 samples with 600 single-domain and 400 cross-domain cases"] --> G["Apply ComplexEval with format checking, Hungarian mapping, and multi-dimensional matching"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集43个实时API并手动修正函数描述"] --> B["用GPT-4o生成1000个初步复杂函数调用样本"]
    B["用GPT-4o生成1000个初步复杂函数调用样本"] --> C["选择100个完整路径样本进行人工精细标注"]
    C["选择100个完整路径样本进行人工精细标注"] --> D["重写查询、修正调用顺序并修复参数错误"]
    D["重写查询、修正调用顺序并修复参数错误"] --> E["消除重叠函数并删除歧义API响应"]
    E["消除重叠函数并删除歧义API响应"] --> F["扩展至1000个样本含600单域和400跨域"]
    F["扩展至1000个样本含600单域和400跨域"] --> G["应用ComplexEval进行格式检查、匈牙利映射和多维匹配"]

name: ComputeEval
intro: ComputeEval是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）生成CUDA代码能力的基准测试。它包含一系列手工制作的CUDA编程挑战，旨在测试模型在并行编程、内存管理和线程同步等方面的能力。该框架通过在沙箱环境中对生成的代码进行功能正确性测试来评估模型性能。
intro_en: ComputeEval is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' (LLM) ability to generate CUDA code. It consists of a series of handcrafted CUDA programming challenges designed to test the model's skills in parallel programming, memory management, and thread synchronization. The framework assesses model performance by testing the functional correctness of the generated code in a sandbox environment.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Expert Knowledge] --> B[Challenge Design Principles]
    B --> C[Handcrafted CUDA Challenges Creation]
    C --> D(Initial CUDA Challenges)
    D --> E{{Manual Annotation & Review}}
    E --> F{Challenge Quality Check}
    F -- Fail --> G[Refinement & Iteration]
    G --> C
    F -- Pass --> H(Validated CUDA Challenges)
    H --> I(ComputeEval Benchmark Dataset)
    I --> J[LLM CUDA Code Generation Evaluation]
    J --> K(Model Performance Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Route natural-language task description through lightweight router to select top-K code-generation experts"] --> B["Synthesize initial CUDA kernel via Mixture-of-Thoughts with latent-space collaboration among selected experts"]
    B["Synthesize initial CUDA kernel via Mixture-of-Thoughts with latent-space collaboration among selected experts"] --> C["Scan CUDA source to discover and extract all __global__ kernel functions for optimization"]
    C["Scan CUDA source to discover and extract all __global__ kernel functions for optimization"] --> D["Infer execution contract including argument types and workload parameters from kernel signature"]
    D["Infer execution contract including argument types and workload parameters from kernel signature"] --> E["Explore program transformations using Monte Carlo Tree Search with LLM-as-a-Judge proposing candidate edits"]
    E["Explore program transformations using Monte Carlo Tree Search with LLM-as-a-Judge proposing candidate edits"] --> F["Compile, verify correctness, and profile each candidate transformation with Nsight Compute"]
    F["Compile, verify correctness, and profile each candidate transformation with Nsight Compute"] --> G["Evaluate candidates using composite objective combining runtime with hardware bottleneck proxies and guardrails"]
    G["Evaluate candidates using composite objective combining runtime with hardware bottleneck proxies and guardrails"] --> H["Select optimized kernel variant and generate interpretable report explaining performance improvements via utilization proxies"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将自然语言任务描述通过轻量路由器选择top-K代码生成专家"] --> B["通过思维混合框架和专家潜空间协作合成初始CUDA内核"]
    B["通过思维混合框架和专家潜空间协作合成初始CUDA内核"] --> C["扫描CUDA源码发现并提取所有__global__内核函数"]
    C["扫描CUDA源码发现并提取所有__global__内核函数"] --> D["从内核签名推断执行契约包括参数类型和工作负载参数"]
    D["从内核签名推断执行契约包括参数类型和工作负载参数"] --> E["使用蒙特卡洛树搜索和LLM评判器探索程序变换并提出候选编辑"]
    E["使用蒙特卡洛树搜索和LLM评判器探索程序变换并提出候选编辑"] --> F["编译、验证正确性并用Nsight Compute分析每个候选变换"]
    F["编译、验证正确性并用Nsight Compute分析每个候选变换"] --> G["用运行时、硬件瓶颈代理和护栏组合目标评估候选方案"]
    G["用运行时、硬件瓶颈代理和护栏组合目标评估候选方案"] --> H["选择优化内核变体并生成可解释报告说明性能改进"]

name: CountBench
intro: CountBench是一个用于评估视觉语言模型（VLM）对象计数能力的新型图像-文本计数基准。它通过自动创建反事实示例来改进VLM的定量理解，并鼓励模型区分正确和不正确的计数描述。该基准旨在评估模型对图像中对象数量的理解。
eval_feature: 防污染, 零样本
intro_en: CountBench is a novel image-text counting benchmark designed to evaluate the object counting ability of vision-language models (VLMs). It improves VLMs' quantitative understanding by automatically generating counterfactual examples and encourages models to distinguish between correct and incorrect counting descriptions. This benchmark aims to assess models' comprehension of object quantities in images.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Existing Image-Text Data) --> B[Identify Objects & Counts]
    B --> C{{Automatic Generation Algorithm}}
    C --> D[Generate Counterfactual Examples]
    D --> E{Counterfactual Quality Check}
    E -- Fail --> F[Discard Invalid Examples]
    E -- Pass --> G[Manual Annotation for Validation]
    G --> H(Validated Counterfactual Examples)
    H --> I[Combine Original & Counterfactuals]
    I --> J(CountBench Dataset)
    J --> K[VLM Inference on CountBench]
    K --> L[Compare VLM Predictions to Ground Truth]
    L --> M[Evaluate Object Counting Ability]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 540 diverse, high-quality image-text pairs for object counting evaluation"] --> B["Format captions using template 'a photo of [number] [objects]' with accurate counts"]
    B["Format captions using template 'a photo of [number] [objects]' with accurate counts"] --> C["Cross-validate object counts in images using off-the-shelf computer vision tools"]
    C["Cross-validate object counts in images using off-the-shelf computer vision tools"] --> D["Create counterfactual captions by swapping correct numbers with randomly selected incorrect numbers"]
    D["Create counterfactual captions by swapping correct numbers with randomly selected incorrect numbers"] --> E["Evaluate VLMs on zero-shot count classification using correct versus counterfactual caption discrimination"]
    E["Evaluate VLMs on zero-shot count classification using correct versus counterfactual caption discrimination"] --> F["Measure accuracy improvement over baseline CLIP and BASIC models on counting task"]
    F["Measure accuracy improvement over baseline CLIP and BASIC models on counting task"] --> G["Validate maintained performance on standard zero-shot downstream tasks and common benchmarks"]

flowchart LR
    A["策划540个多样化高质量图像文本对用于计数评估"] --> B["使用模板格式化标题并确保数量准确"]
    B["使用模板格式化标题并确保数量准确"] --> C["用现成视觉工具交叉验证图像中对象数量"]
    C["用现成视觉工具交叉验证图像中对象数量"] --> D["将正确数字替换为随机错误数字创建反事实标题"]
    D["将正确数字替换为随机错误数字创建反事实标题"] --> E["评估模型区分正确与反事实标题的零样本计数分类"]
    E["评估模型区分正确与反事实标题的零样本计数分类"] --> F["测量相对基线模型在计数任务上的准确率提升"]
    F["测量相对基线模型在计数任务上的准确率提升"] --> G["验证在标准零样本任务和通用基准上的性能保持"]

name: CritPt
intro: CritPt是一个用于评估大型语言模型在科学领域中识别和分析临界点能力的基准测试。该基准涵盖物理、化学和生物学等多个科学领域的临界现象问题。
org: Argonne National Laboratory, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
build_method: 50多位活跃物理研究者新建题目, 人工精编
eval_feature: 科学推理
build_method_en: newly created by 50+ active physics researchers, hand-curated
intro_en: CritPt is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' ability to identify and analyze critical points in scientific domains. It covers critical phenomena problems across multiple fields, including physics, chemistry, and biology.

    F -->|Fail| C
    G --> H(CritPt Benchmark Dataset)
    H --> I[LLM Evaluation on Critical Points]
    I --> J[Performance Metrics Calculation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)

    D["专家与协调员进行三轮或更多迭代修订"] --> E["相关领域研究员同行评审并验证推导"]
    E["相关领域研究员同行评审并验证推导"] --> F["科学写作专家编辑最终文本确保清晰"]
    F["科学写作专家编辑最终文本确保清晰"] --> G["用定制自动评分管道评估物理输出格式"]

name: CruxEval
intro: CruxEval是一个用于评估代码语言模型推理、理解和执行能力的基准。它包含800个Python函数，每个函数都配有输入输出对，并设计了输入预测和输出预测两个任务。该基准旨在衡量模型在简单代码片段上的执行预测和代码推理能力。
task_type: 代码推理, 输入, 输出预测
eval_feature: 代码推理, 执行跟踪
intro_en: CruxEval is a benchmark for evaluating code language models' reasoning, understanding, and execution abilities. It includes 800 Python functions, each paired with input-output examples, and features two tasks: input prediction and output prediction. The benchmark aims to assess models' execution prediction and code reasoning skills on simple code snippets.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A((Raw Python Code Sources)) --> C[Collect Python Functions]
    B{{LLM Generation}} --> C
    C --> D[Pair with Input-Output Examples]
    D --> E{Manual Screening}
    E -- Pass --> F[Refine & Validate]
    E -- Fail --> D
    F --> G((CruxEval Dataset\n800 Python Functions\nI/O Pairs))
    G --> H[Model Evaluation Tasks\n(Input/Output Prediction)]
    H --> I((Evaluation Metrics\nReasoning, Understanding, Execution))

flowchart LR

    C["Apply compile-time filters: argument usage, 75-300 chars, syntax validity, proper assertions"] --> D["Apply runtime filters: no floats, operations with args ≤3, 2-second limit, deterministic execution"]
    D["Apply runtime filters: no floats, operations with args ≤3, 2-second limit, deterministic execution"] --> E["Bootstrap sample to measure noise and select 800 examples ensuring model ranking stability"]
    E["Bootstrap sample to measure noise and select 800 examples ensuring model ranking stability"] --> F["Evaluate models on output prediction and input prediction using execution-based correctness metrics"]
    F["Evaluate models on output prediction and input prediction using execution-based correctness metrics"] --> G["Report pass@1 and pass@5 scores with bootstrap confidence intervals from 10,000 resamples"]

flowchart LR
    A["用69个标准库函数名提示Code Llama 34B生成函数和测试输入"] --> B["生成10.2万个候选函数和48.9万个输入输出对"]
    B["生成10.2万个候选函数和48.9万个输入输出对"] --> C["应用编译时过滤器检查参数使用、长度和语法"]
    C["应用编译时过滤器检查参数使用、长度和语法"] --> D["应用运行时过滤器限制运算复杂度和执行时间"]
    D["应用运行时过滤器限制运算复杂度和执行时间"] --> E["自举采样测量噪声并选择800个样本确保排序稳定"]
    E["自举采样测量噪声并选择800个样本确保排序稳定"] --> F["用基于执行的正确性指标评估输出预测和输入预测"]
    F["用基于执行的正确性指标评估输出预测和输入预测"] --> G["报告pass@1和pass@5分数及自举置信区间"]

name: CSR-Bench
intro: CSR-Bench是一个针对计算机科学研究项目的基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在处理复杂代码开发任务时的能力。该基准从准确性、效率和部署脚本质量等多个方面对LLM进行评估，探索其在自主进行计算机科学研究方面的潜力。
org: Amazon, University of California, Los Angeles
intro_en: CSR-Bench is a benchmark for computer science research projects designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) in handling complex code development tasks. It assesses LLMs across accuracy, efficiency, and deployment script quality, exploring their potential for autonomous computer science research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Web Data) --> C{{Web Crawling}}
    B(CS Project Repositories) --> D[Expert Task Identification]
    C --> E[Raw Data Filtering]

    F --> G
    G --> H{Expert Validation}
    H --> I(CSR-Bench Dataset\nComplex Code Tasks)
    I --> J[LLM Execution]
    J --> K[Accuracy Metric]
    J --> L[Efficiency Metric]
    J --> M[Deployment Script Quality]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR

    B["Categorize repositories into five areas and sort by GitHub star count"] --> C["Manually check README sufficiency, deployable code presence, and verify permissive licenses"]
    C["Manually check README sufficiency, deployable code presence, and verify permissive licenses"] --> D["Select 100 high-quality repositories ensuring topic diversity and self-containment"]
    D["Select 100 high-quality repositories ensuring topic diversity and self-containment"] --> E["Build standardized Docker image with essential tools for isolated deployment environment"]
    E["Build standardized Docker image with essential tools for isolated deployment environment"] --> F["Prompt LLMs to generate bash commands using README and repository structure for deployment tasks"]
    F["Prompt LLMs to generate bash commands using README and repository structure for deployment tasks"] --> G["Execute generated commands for environment setup, data preparation, training, inference, and evaluation"]
    G["Execute generated commands for environment setup, data preparation, training, inference, and evaluation"] --> H["Calculate completion rate as ratio of successfully executed commands to total commands"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用会议和类别标签从GitHub收集1500多个计算机科学研究仓库"] --> B["将仓库分为五个领域并按GitHub星数排序"]
    B["将仓库分为五个领域并按GitHub星数排序"] --> C["人工检查README充分性、可部署代码及许可证"]
    C["人工检查README充分性、可部署代码及许可证"] --> D["选择100个高质量仓库确保主题多样性和自包含性"]

    G["执行生成的命令完成环境配置、数据准备、训练、推理和评估"] --> H["计算成功执行命令数与总命令数的比率作为完成率"]

name: CURIE
intro: CURIE是一个科学长上下文理解、推理和信息提取基准，用于评估大型语言模型在辅助真实科学工作流程中的能力。包含10个挑战性任务，共580个问题与解答，涵盖六个科学领域。评估模型的领域专业知识、长上下文理解及多步推理能力。
build_method: 专家构建
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 开放式问答, 抽取, 摘要
eval_feature: 长文本, 领域特定, 多轮
intro_en: CURIE is a scientific long-context understanding, reasoning, and information extraction benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' capabilities in supporting real scientific workflows. It includes 10 challenging tasks with a total of 580 questions and answers across six scientific domains. The benchmark assesses models' domain expertise, long-context comprehension, and multi-step reasoning abilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Scientific Literature) --> B[Expert Document Selection]
    B --> C[Document Analysis & Understanding]
    C --> D[Information Extraction & Reasoning]
    D --> E[Question & Answer Formulation]
    E --> F{Expert Review & Refinement}
    F -->|Pass| G[Validation & Annotation]
    F -->|Fail| E
    G --> H(CURIE Dataset\n10 Tasks, 580 Q&A)
    H --> I[LLM Evaluation]
    I --> J(Model Performance Metrics)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select six scientific domains requiring deep expertise and identify 1-3 experts per domain"] --> B["Experts define ten tasks representing realistic workflows across seven assessment categories"]
    B["Experts define ten tasks representing realistic workflows across seven assessment categories"] --> C["Experts source 429 representative research papers and create 580 accurate ground truth answer pairs"]
    C["Experts source 429 representative research papers and create 580 accurate ground truth answer pairs"] --> D["Experts identify evaluation metrics capturing salient features and rate difficulty of each example"]
    D["Experts identify evaluation metrics capturing salient features and rate difficulty of each example"] --> E["Prompt models zero-shot with task description, output format, and full paper text as context"]
    E["Prompt models zero-shot with task description, output format, and full paper text as context"] --> F["Score responses using ROUGE-L, BERTScore, IoU, identity ratio, or model-based F1 per task"]
    F["Score responses using ROUGE-L, BERTScore, IoU, identity ratio, or model-based F1 per task"] --> G["Experts manually rate 10-12% of responses per task and measure precision-recall for extraction"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择六个需要深度专业知识的科学领域并为每个领域确定1-3名专家"] --> B["专家定义代表真实工作流程的十个任务涵盖七个评估类别"]
    B["专家定义代表真实工作流程的十个任务涵盖七个评估类别"] --> C["专家收集429篇代表性研究论文并创建580个准确的真值答案对"]
    C["专家收集429篇代表性研究论文并创建580个准确的真值答案对"] --> D["专家确定捕捉显著特征的评估指标并评定每个样本的难度"]
    D["专家确定捕捉显著特征的评估指标并评定每个样本的难度"] --> E["用任务描述、输出格式和完整论文文本作为上下文零样本提示模型"]
    E["用任务描述、输出格式和完整论文文本作为上下文零样本提示模型"] --> F["根据任务使用ROUGE-L、BERTScore、IoU、同一性比率或基于模型的F1评分"]
    F["根据任务使用ROUGE-L、BERTScore、IoU、同一性比率或基于模型的F1评分"] --> G["专家手动评定每个任务10-12%的响应并测量提取的精确率和召回率"]

name: CValues
intro: CValues是首个中文人类价值观评测基准，评估LLM在安全性和责任感方面的对齐能力。包含专家收集的10个场景下的对抗安全提示及8个领域的责任提示，支持人工和自动评估，全面衡量中文LLM的价值观对齐。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
task_type: 开放式问答, 安全测试, 排序
eval_feature: 对抗性, 领域特定
intro_en: CValues is the first Chinese human values evaluation benchmark that assesses LLMs' alignment in safety and responsibility. It includes adversarial safety prompts across 10 expert-curated scenarios and responsibility prompts in 8 domains, supporting both manual and automated evaluation to comprehensively measure value alignment in Chinese LLMs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Expert Knowledge & Human Values) --> B[Expert-Curated Scenarios]
    B --> C[Prompt Development]
    C --> D{{Manual Annotation}}
    D --> E[Categorization & Refinement]
    E --> F{Quality Check}
    F -- Pass --> G[Adversarial Prompt Generation]
    F -- Fail --> D
    G --> H(CValues Benchmark Dataset)
    H --> I[Manual Evaluation]
    H --> J[Automated Evaluation]
    I --> K[LLM Alignment Assessment]
    J --> K
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Professional experts manually collect adversarial safety prompts across 10 scenarios"] --> B["Professional experts induce responsibility prompts from 8 domains"]
    B["Professional experts induce responsibility prompts from 8 domains"] --> C["Apply two expert-in-the-loop methods to collect representative prompts susceptible to value issues"]
    C["Apply two expert-in-the-loop methods to collect representative prompts susceptible to value issues"] --> D["Construct 4312 multi-choice prompts for automatic evaluation"]
    D["Construct 4312 multi-choice prompts for automatic evaluation"] --> E["Assemble 2100 adversarial prompts for human evaluation"]
    E["Assemble 2100 adversarial prompts for human evaluation"] --> F["Conduct automatic evaluation using multi-choice prompts to measure safety and responsibility alignment"]
    F["Conduct automatic evaluation using multi-choice prompts to measure safety and responsibility alignment"] --> G["Conduct human evaluation for reliable comparison of LLM value alignment"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["专业专家手动收集10个场景的对抗性安全提示"] --> B["专业专家从8个领域归纳责任提示"]
    B["专业专家从8个领域归纳责任提示"] --> C["应用两种专家在环方法收集易受价值问题影响的代表性提示"]
    C["应用两种专家在环方法收集易受价值问题影响的代表性提示"] --> D["构建4312个多选题提示用于自动评估"]
    D["构建4312个多选题提示用于自动评估"] --> E["组装2100个对抗性提示用于人工评估"]
    E["组装2100个对抗性提示用于人工评估"] --> F["使用多选题提示进行自动评估以衡量安全性和责任感对齐"]
    F["使用多选题提示进行自动评估以衡量安全性和责任感对齐"] --> G["进行人工评估以可靠比较LLM价值观对齐"]

name: CVBench
intro: CVBench是首个旨在严格评估跨视频关系推理能力的诊断基准。它包含1000个问答对，涵盖跨视频对象关联、跨视频事件关联和跨视频复杂推理三个层次。该基准挑战模型分析和整合来自动态视觉流的时空模式，并揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在跨视频理解方面的瓶颈。
org: Sun Yat-sen University, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Tencent AI Lab, Universi
intro_en: CVBench is the first diagnostic benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate cross-video relational reasoning abilities. It contains 1,000 QA pairs covering three levels: cross-video object association, cross-video event association, and cross-video complex reasoning. The benchmark challenges models to analyze and integrate spatiotemporal patterns from dynamic visual streams, revealing current multimodal large language models' bottlenecks in cross-video understanding.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Raw Video Sources] --> B[Video Selection]
    B --> C[Initial Data Processing]
    C --> D{{Hybrid Annotation Method}}
    D --> E[Object Association Annotation]
    D --> F[Event Association Annotation]
    D --> G[Complex Reasoning Annotation]
    E & F & G --> H[QA Pair Generation]
    H --> I{Annotation & QA Verification}
    I -->|Pass| J[Dataset Structuring]
    I -->|Fail| K[Re-annotation]
    K --> D
    J --> L(CVBench Dataset\n1,000 QA Pairs)
    L --> M[Model Evaluation\n(Cross-Video Reasoning)]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample video groups from YouTube using task-driven sampling across five diverse domains"] --> B["Filter videos by multi-domain coverage, inter-video relationships, duration, and visual quality criteria"]
    B["Filter videos by multi-domain coverage, inter-video relationships, duration, and visual quality criteria"] --> C["Generate captions for video segments to capture spatiotemporal content"]
    C["Generate captions for video segments to capture spatiotemporal content"] --> D["Annotate relational summaries modeling entities, events, and cross-video relationships by experts"]
    D["Annotate relational summaries modeling entities, events, and cross-video relationships by experts"] --> E["Generate multi-choice QA pairs for 15 subtasks across three reasoning tiers"]
    E["Generate multi-choice QA pairs for 15 subtasks across three reasoning tiers"] --> F["Apply quality control to remove ambiguous or trivial entries from annotations"]
    F["Apply quality control to remove ambiguous or trivial entries from annotations"] --> G["Evaluate MLLMs using zero-shot and chain-of-thought prompting on 1,000 QA pairs"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从YouTube按任务驱动采样五个领域的视频组"] --> B["按多领域覆盖、视频间关系、时长和画质标准筛选"]
    B["按多领域覆盖、视频间关系、时长和画质标准筛选"] --> C["为视频片段生成字幕以捕获时空内容"]
    C["为视频片段生成字幕以捕获时空内容"] --> D["专家标注实体、事件和跨视频关系摘要"]
    D["专家标注实体、事件和跨视频关系摘要"] --> E["为三层推理的15个子任务生成多选问答对"]
    E["为三层推理的15个子任务生成多选问答对"] --> F["质量控制移除模糊或琐碎的标注条目"]
    F["质量控制移除模糊或琐碎的标注条目"] --> G["用零样本和思维链提示在1000个问答对上评估模型"]

name: CVE-Bench
intro: CVE-Bench是一个评估AI智能体利用真实世界网络应用漏洞能力的基准。它通过一个沙盒框架，模拟真实世界的网络攻击场景，旨在解决现有基准在覆盖范围和真实性方面的不足。该基准基于严重级别的常见漏洞和暴露（CVE），并提供有效的漏洞利用评估。初步评估显示，最先进的智能体框架可以解决高达13%的漏洞。
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 对抗性, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Dynamic Update, Contamination-free, Adversarial, Process Evaluation
intro_en: CVE-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents' ability to exploit real-world network application vulnerabilities. It uses a sandbox framework to simulate real-world network attack scenarios, addressing the limitations of existing benchmarks in coverage and realism. The benchmark is based on high-severity Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) and provides effective vulnerability exploitation assessment. Preliminary evaluations show that state-of-the-art agent frameworks can exploit up to 13% of the vulnerabilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world CVEs) --> B[Vulnerability Identification]
    B --> C[Expert Analysis of Exploits]
    C --> D[Design Attack Scenarios]
    D --> E{{Sandbox Framework Setup}}
    E --> F[Integrate Vulnerabilities]
    F --> G[Automated Scenario Generation]
    G --> H{Scenario Realism Check}
    H -->|Pass| I[Expert Validation]
    H -->|Fail| D
    I --> J(Simulated Attack Scenarios)
    J --> K[AI Agent Evaluation]
    K --> L[Performance Metrics]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select web-related CVEs from NVD with CVSS 9.0+ severity published May–June 2024."] --> B["Filter CVEs to include only open-source, platform-independent, and reproducible vulnerabilities."]
    B["Filter CVEs to include only open-source, platform-independent, and reproducible vulnerabilities."] --> C["Containerize each vulnerable web application with database and auxiliary services as needed."]
    C["Containerize each vulnerable web application with database and auxiliary services as needed."] --> D["Reproduce reference exploits from published PoCs or vulnerability descriptions to verify correctness."]
    D["Reproduce reference exploits from published PoCs or vulnerability descriptions to verify correctness."] --> E["Align each reproduced exploit with one of eight standard attack types."]
    E["Align each reproduced exploit with one of eight standard attack types."] --> F["Specify task goal, required information, and vulnerability lifecycle context for each CVE."]
    F["Specify task goal, required information, and vulnerability lifecycle context for each CVE."] --> G["Deploy evaluation server to automatically verify if LLM agent successfully exploited the vulnerability."]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从NVD选取CVSS 9.0以上的Web相关CVE"] --> B["筛选开源、跨平台且可复现的CVE"]
    B["筛选开源、跨平台且可复现的CVE"] --> C["将每个漏洞应用容器化并配置数据库"]
    C["将每个漏洞应用容器化并配置数据库"] --> D["根据PoC或描述复现漏洞利用验证正确性"]
    D["根据PoC或描述复现漏洞利用验证正确性"] --> E["将每个漏洞利用对齐到八种标准攻击类型"]
    E["将每个漏洞利用对齐到八种标准攻击类型"] --> F["为每个CVE指定攻击目标和生命周期上下文"]
    F["为每个CVE指定攻击目标和生命周期上下文"] --> G["部署评估服务器自动验证智能体攻击成功与否"]

name: Cybench
intro: Cybench是一个用于评估语言模型在网络安全任务中能力和风险的框架。它包含40个专业级别的夺旗（CTF）任务，这些任务来源于4个不同的CTF竞赛，涵盖了广泛的难度。每个任务都包含描述、起始文件，并在一个代理可以执行命令和观察输出的环境中初始化。为了更详细的评估，每个任务还引入了子任务。
intro_en: Cybench is a framework for evaluating language models' capabilities and risks in cybersecurity tasks. It includes 40 professional-level CTF tasks sourced from 4 different CTF competitions, covering a wide range of difficulties. Each task contains a description, starter files, and is initialized in an environment where an agent can execute commands and observe outputs. For more detailed evaluation, each task also includes subtasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(CTF Competitions) --> B[Task Identification]
    B --> C[Task Extraction]
    C --> D{Initial Task Filtering}
    D -- Pass --> E[Task Refinement & Initialization]
    D -- Fail --> K[Discard Task]
    E --> F{{Hybrid Construction Method}}
    F --> G{Professional Level Vetting}
    G -- Approved --> H(Cybench Dataset: 40 CTF Tasks)
    G -- Rejected --> K
    H --> I[Language Model Evaluation]
    I --> J(Evaluation Results: Capabilities & Risks)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 40 professional-level CTF tasks from 4 distinct competitions spanning wide difficulty range"] --> B["Specify each task with description, starter files, and answer evaluator program"]
    B["Specify each task with description, starter files, and answer evaluator program"] --> C["Initialize tasks in Kali Linux containers with local files and remote task servers"]
    C["Initialize tasks in Kali Linux containers with local files and remote task servers"] --> D["Break down each task into subtasks with intermediary goals and evaluation steps"]
    D["Break down each task into subtasks with intermediary goals and evaluation steps"] --> E["Construct cybersecurity agent that executes commands and observes outputs in environment"]
    E["Construct cybersecurity agent that executes commands and observes outputs in environment"] --> F["Evaluate 8 language models on tasks with and without subtask guidance"]
    F["Evaluate 8 language models on tasks with and without subtask guidance"] --> G["Test top models across 4 agent scaffolds: structured bash, action-only, pseudoterminal, web search"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从4个竞赛中选择40个专业级CTF任务，涵盖广泛难度"] --> B["为每个任务指定描述、起始文件和答案评估程序"]
    B["为每个任务指定描述、起始文件和答案评估程序"] --> C["在Kali Linux容器中初始化任务及服务器"]
    C["在Kali Linux容器中初始化任务及服务器"] --> D["将每个任务分解为带中间目标的子任务"]
    D["将每个任务分解为带中间目标的子任务"] --> E["构建在环境中执行命令并观察输出的网络安全代理"]
    E["构建在环境中执行命令并观察输出的网络安全代理"] --> F["在有无子任务指导下评估8个语言模型"]
    F["在有无子任务指导下评估8个语言模型"] --> G["在4种代理架构下测试顶级模型性能"]

name: CyberGym
intro: CyberGym是一个大规模基准测试，旨在评估AI智能体在真实世界网络安全方面的能力。它包含1,507个真实漏洞，涵盖188个软件项目。该基准主要任务是让智能体根据文本描述和代码库生成漏洞复现的概念验证测试。CyberGym不仅能有效区分AI智能体的网络安全能力，还促成了35个零日漏洞的发现。
build_method: 混合
intro_en: CyberGym is a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' capabilities in real-world cybersecurity. It includes 1,507 real vulnerabilities across 188 software projects. The main task is for agents to generate proof-of-concept tests reproducing vulnerabilities based on textual descriptions and codebases. CyberGym effectively differentiates AI agents' cybersecurity skills and has contributed to the discovery of 35 zero-day vulnerabilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR

    C(Vulnerability Databases) --> B
    B --> D[Extract Relevant Data]
    D --> E[Generate Textual Descriptions]
    E --> F{{PoC Generation Engine}}
    F --> G[Generate Proof-of-Concept Tests]
    G --> H{Review & Validate PoC}
    H -->|Pass| I[Integrate into Dataset]
    H -->|Fail| J[Refine & Re-generate]
    I --> K(CyberGym Dataset
1507 Vulns, 188 Projects)
    K --> L[AI Agent Evaluation]
    L --> M(Evaluation Results)

    A["Source 1,507 real-world vulnerabilities from OSS-Fuzz across 188 diverse software projects"] --> B["Apply systematic automated filters to ensure benchmark instance quality and timeliness"]
    B["Apply systematic automated filters to ensure benchmark instance quality and timeliness"] --> C["Manually validate filtered vulnerability instances to confirm benchmark suitability"]
    C["Manually validate filtered vulnerability instances to confirm benchmark suitability"] --> D["Provide agents with vulnerability text descriptions and pre-patch codebases as inputs"]
    D["Provide agents with vulnerability text descriptions and pre-patch codebases as inputs"] --> E["Task agents to generate proof-of-concept tests that reproduce the target vulnerabilities"]
    E["Task agents to generate proof-of-concept tests that reproduce the target vulnerabilities"] --> F["Execute generated PoCs on pre-patch versions to verify vulnerability reproduction success"]
    F["Execute generated PoCs on pre-patch versions to verify vulnerability reproduction success"] --> G["Execute generated PoCs on post-patch versions to confirm proper vulnerability patching"]
    G["Execute generated PoCs on post-patch versions to confirm proper vulnerability patching"] --> H["Deploy agents for open-ended discovery on latest versions, identifying zero-day vulnerabilities"]

flowchart LR
    A["从OSS-Fuzz获取188个项目的1507个真实漏洞"] --> B["应用自动化过滤器确保基准实例质量和时效性"]
    B["应用自动化过滤器确保基准实例质量和时效性"] --> C["人工验证过滤后的漏洞实例以确认适用性"]
    C["人工验证过滤后的漏洞实例以确认适用性"] --> D["向智能体提供漏洞文本描述和补丁前代码库"]
    D["向智能体提供漏洞文本描述和补丁前代码库"] --> E["要求智能体生成复现目标漏洞的概念验证测试"]
    E["要求智能体生成复现目标漏洞的概念验证测试"] --> F["在补丁前版本上执行PoC验证漏洞复现成功"]
    F["在补丁前版本上执行PoC验证漏洞复现成功"] --> G["在补丁后版本上执行PoC确认漏洞已正确修补"]
    G["在补丁后版本上执行PoC确认漏洞已正确修补"] --> H["在最新版本上部署智能体发现零日漏洞"]

name: DAComp
intro: DAComp包含210个任务，模拟复杂企业数据智能工作流，涵盖工业级架构的数据工程和开放式业务问题的数据分析。该基准用于评估自主数据智能体在企业环境中的能力。
org: Institute of Automation, CAS, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, ByteDance Seed, TikTok, UC
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成
modality: 文本, 代码, 表格, SQL
task_type: Agent任务, 代码生成, SQL Generation, 开放式问答
task_type_en: Agent Task, Code Generation, SQL Generation, Open-ended QA
intro_en: DAComp includes 210 tasks simulating complex enterprise data intelligence workflows, covering industrial-scale data engineering architectures and open-ended business data analysis. This benchmark is used to evaluate the capabilities of autonomous data agents in enterprise environments.

    H --> I(Evaluation Results)

name: DARE-bench
intro: DARE-bench 是一个面向数据科学与机器学习建模任务的基准，用于评估大模型在复杂多步数据科学任务中的建模能力与指令忠实度，并提供可验证真值以支持客观评测。
build_method: Kaggle衍生任务, 可验证真值

eval_feature: 可验证真值, 指令遵循, 过程评估
intro_en: DARE-bench is a benchmark for data science and machine learning modeling tasks. It evaluates LLM agents on complex multi-step data science workflows, instruction fidelity, and objectively verifiable outcomes.
task_type_en: Code Generation, Data Science Modeling, Time Series Forecasting
eval_feature_en: Verifiable Ground Truth, Instruction Following, Process Evaluation

name: DeepPlanning
intro: DeepPlanning 是一个旨在解决现有LLM规划评估局限性的基准测试。它引入了复杂的、真实世界的任务，需要主动信息获取、局部约束推理和全局约束优化。该基准测试的特点是多日旅行规划和多产品购物任务，即使是前沿的Agentic LLM也难以应对。
eval_feature: 可验证约束, 主动信息获取, 局部约束推理, 全局约束优化, 显式推理模式, 并行工具使用
eval_feature_en: Verifiable Constraints, Active Information Acquisition, Local Constraint Reasoning, Global Constraint Optimization, Explicit Reasoning Mode, Parallel Tool Usage
intro_en: DeepPlanning is a benchmark designed to address the limitations of existing LLM planning evaluations. It introduces complex, real-world tasks requiring active information gathering, local constraint reasoning, and global constraint optimization. The benchmark features multi-day travel planning and multi-product shopping tasks, which are challenging even for state-of-the-art Agentic LLMs.

name: DeepResearchEval
intro: DeepResearchEval是一个针对深度研究系统的自动化评测框架。它采用角色驱动的流程来生成复杂的真实研究任务，这些任务需要整合多个来源的证据并进行外部检索。该框架包含一个自适应的单点质量评估机制，能根据每个任务动态调整评估维度、标准和权重，同时还具备主动事实核查功能，即使在没有引文的情况下也能通过网络搜索自主验证报告内容的准确性。
metric: Factual Accuracy, Comprehensiveness, Redundancy, Compliance, Privacy, Objectivity
intro_en: DeepResearchEval is an automated evaluation framework for deep research systems. It uses a role-driven process to generate complex, real-world research tasks that require integrating evidence from multiple sources and performing external retrieval. The framework includes an adaptive single-point quality assessment mechanism that dynamically adjusts evaluation dimensions, criteria, and weights for each task. It also features proactive fact-checking, enabling autonomous verification of report accuracy via web search even without citations.

flowchart LR

    F --> G{Task Complexity Validation}
    G -- Valid --> H[Automated Quality Check]
    G -- Invalid --> I[Task Refinement]
    I --> E
    H --> J(DeepResearchEval Task Set)
    J --> K[Model Performance Measurement]
    K --> L[Adaptive Single-Point Evaluation]
metric_en: Factual Accuracy, Comprehensiveness, Redundancy, Compliance, Privacy, Objectivity

    E["Curate 100 high-quality tasks from filtered candidates based on human ranking for final benchmark"] --> F["Derive task-specific evaluation dimensions, criteria, and weights alongside general dimensions for each report"]

name: DeepSearchQA
intro: DeepSearchQA是一个包含900个提示的基准测试，旨在评估智能体在17个不同领域中执行复杂多步信息检索任务的能力。该基准通过精心设计的手工任务，测试智能体系统性整理碎片信息、去重与实体解析以及在开放式搜索空间中判断停止标准的能力。所有任务均基于开放网络，并具有客观可验证的答案集。对现有智能体架构的评估显示，即使是最先进的模型也难以在高召回率和精确度之间取得平衡，揭示了当前智能体设计在深度研究能力方面的显著局限性。
intro_en: DeepSearchQA is a benchmark consisting of 900 prompts designed to evaluate agents' ability to perform complex multi-step information retrieval tasks across 17 different domains. The benchmark uses carefully crafted manual tasks to test agents' capabilities in systematically organizing fragmented information, deduplication and entity resolution, as well as determining stopping criteria in an open search space. All tasks are based on the open web and have objectively verifiable answer sets. Evaluations of existing agent architectures show that even state-of-the-art models struggle to balance high recall and precision, revealing significant limitations in current agent designs for deep research capabilities.

name: DefenderBench
intro: DefenderBench是一个实用开源工具包，用于评估语言智能体在攻防和网络安全知识任务中的表现。涵盖网络入侵、恶意内容检测、代码漏洞分析及安全知识评估，支持多种主流大型语言模型的公平严格测试。

intro_en: DefenderBench is a practical open-source toolkit for evaluating language agents' performance in offensive and defensive tasks and cybersecurity knowledge. It covers network intrusion, malicious content detection, code vulnerability analysis, and security knowledge assessment, supporting fair and rigorous testing of various mainstream large language models.

name: DeR^2
intro: DeR2是一个受控的深度研究沙盒，旨在隔离文档基础推理，同时保留深度搜索的核心难点，如多步合成、去噪和基于证据的结论制定。它通过四种机制将证据访问与推理解耦，从而量化检索损失和推理损失，并实现细粒度的错误归因。为防止参数泄露，DeR2采用两阶段验证，确保在没有证据的情况下参数失败，同时保证预言概念的可解性。每个实例都提供了一个冻结的文档库，其中包含专家标注的概念和验证的理由。
org: M-A-P, ByteDance Seed, Taizhou University, Hangzhou Normal University, Johns Hopkins University, Sou
eval_feature: 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: DeR2 is a controlled deep research sandbox designed to isolate document-based reasoning while retaining core challenges of deep search, such as multi-step synthesis, denoising, and evidence-based conclusion formulation. It decouples evidence access from reasoning through four mechanisms, enabling quantification of retrieval loss and reasoning loss, as well as fine-grained error attribution. To prevent parameter leakage, DeR2 employs two-stage validation to ensure parameter failure without evidence while guaranteeing the solvability of predicted concepts. Each instance provides a frozen document corpus containing expert-annotated concepts and verified rationales.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Large-scale Document Corpus] --> B[Deep Search & Retrieval]
    B --> C[Document Preprocessing]
    C --> D{{Evidence-Reasoning Decoupling Mechanisms}}
    D --> E[Expert Task Definition]
    E --> F[Manual Annotation]
    F --> G{Quality Review & Validation}
    G -->|Pass| H(DeR2 Controlled Sandbox Dataset)
    G -->|Fail| E
    H --> I[Model Evaluation on Document Reasoning]

flowchart LR

    B["Annotators construct instruction, answer, concepts, and chain-of-thought from each source paper"] --> C["Apply two-phase validation: offline models must fail without concepts, succeed with oracle concepts"]
    C["Apply two-phase validation: offline models must fail without concepts, succeed with oracle concepts"] --> D["Retrieve related documents and add topically similar distractors to form frozen document library"]
    D["Retrieve related documents and add topically similar distractors to form frozen document library"] --> E["Reviewers audit annotated items in shared workspace with iterative feedback loop"]
    E["Reviewers audit annotated items in shared workspace with iterative feedback loop"] --> F["Evaluate models under Instruction-only to measure parametric knowledge baseline"]
    F["Evaluate models under Instruction-only to measure parametric knowledge baseline"] --> G["Evaluate under Concepts-only, Related-only, and Full-set to decouple retrieval from reasoning"]
    G["Evaluate under Concepts-only, Related-only, and Full-set to decouple retrieval from reasoning"] --> H["Attribute errors to concept extraction, composition, or mode-switch failures using controlled comparisons"]

    C["应用两阶段验证:无概念失败,有概念可解"] --> D["检索相关文档并添加干扰文档形成冻结文档库"]
    D["检索相关文档并添加干扰文档形成冻结文档库"] --> E["审核员在共享工作区审核并迭代反馈"]

name: Design2Code
intro: Design2Code是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）将视觉设计（如网页截图）转换为前端代码能力的基准测试。它手动收集了484个真实世界的网页作为测试用例，并开发了一套自动评估指标来衡量模型生成代码的质量。该基准还通过全面的人工评估来验证性能排名，并测试了多种多模态提示方法，以揭示模型在召回视觉元素和生成正确布局设计方面的不足。
org: Stanford University, Georgia Institute of Technology
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
modality: 图像, 文本, 代码
intro_en: Design2Code is a benchmark for evaluating the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to convert visual designs (such as webpage screenshots) into front-end code. It manually collects 484 real-world webpages as test cases and develops a set of automatic evaluation metrics to measure the quality of the generated code. The benchmark also validates performance rankings through comprehensive human evaluation and tests various multimodal prompting methods to reveal models' shortcomings in recalling visual elements and generating correct layout designs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world Webpages) --> B[Manual Collection]
    B --> C(Collected Webpages)
    C --> D[Extract Visual Designs]
    C --> E[Manual Annotation of Front-end Code]
    D --> F(Visual Design Data)
    E --> G(Annotated Front-end Code)
    F & G --> H[Pairing & Alignment]
    H --> I(Design-Code Pairs)
    I --> J{{Dataset Validation/Review}}
    J --> K(Final Design2Code Dataset\n(484 Test Cases))
    K --> L[MLLM Evaluation]
    L --> M{{Automatic Evaluation Metrics}}
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape webpages from the C4 validation set as initial candidates"] --> B["Manually curate 484 diverse real-world webpages representing various complexities and domains"]
    B["Manually curate 484 diverse real-world webpages representing various complexities and domains"] --> C["Capture screenshots of curated webpages as visual input for models"]
    C["Capture screenshots of curated webpages as visual input for models"] --> D["Test frontier MLLMs using various multimodal prompting methods to generate code implementations"]
    D["Test frontier MLLMs using various multimodal prompting methods to generate code implementations"] --> E["Develop automatic metrics measuring visual similarity between generated and reference webpage screenshots"]
    E["Develop automatic metrics measuring visual similarity between generated and reference webpage screenshots"] --> F["Conduct comprehensive human evaluations to validate automatic metric performance rankings"]
    F["Conduct comprehensive human evaluations to validate automatic metric performance rankings"] --> G["Analyze fine-grained breakdown metrics for visual element recall and layout generation accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从C4验证集中抓取网页作为初始候选"] --> B["人工筛选484个多样化真实网页代表不同复杂度和领域"]
    B["人工筛选484个多样化真实网页代表不同复杂度和领域"] --> C["捕获筛选网页的截图作为模型视觉输入"]
    C["捕获筛选网页的截图作为模型视觉输入"] --> D["用多种多模态提示方法测试前沿模型生成代码实现"]
    D["用多种多模态提示方法测试前沿模型生成代码实现"] --> E["开发自动指标衡量生成网页与参考网页截图的视觉相似度"]
    E["开发自动指标衡量生成网页与参考网页截图的视觉相似度"] --> F["进行全面人工评估以验证自动指标的性能排名"]
    F["进行全面人工评估以验证自动指标的性能排名"] --> G["分析细粒度指标评估视觉元素召回和布局生成准确性"]

name: DiagnosisArena
intro: DiagnosisArena是一个全面且具有挑战性的基准，用于严格评估专业级诊断能力。它包含1113对分段患者病例及对应诊断，涵盖28个医学专科，数据来源于10个顶级医学期刊的临床病例报告。该基准旨在推动AI诊断推理能力的提升，以应对真实临床诊断挑战。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, SPIRAL Lab, Generative AI Research Lab (GAIR), Shanghai Chest Hospita
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 开放式问答, 生成, 选择题
intro_en: DiagnosisArena is a comprehensive and challenging benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate professional-level diagnostic capabilities. It includes 1,113 paired segmented patient cases and corresponding diagnoses across 28 medical specialties, sourced from clinical case reports in 10 top medical journals. This benchmark aims to advance AI diagnostic reasoning to address real-world clinical diagnostic challenges.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Clinical Case Reports) --> B[Sourcing from Medical Journals]
    B --> C(Raw Patient Cases)
    C --> D{{Expert Construction}}
    D --> E[Segmentation & Pairing]
    E --> F{{Manual Annotation}}
    F --> G[Expert Review]
    G --> H{Quality Check}
    H -->|Pass| I(Curated Dataset\n1,113 Cases, 28 Specialties)
    H -->|Fail| C
    I --> J[Model Evaluation]
    J --> K(Diagnostic Capabilities)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 4,175 case reports from 10 top-tier medical journals across multiple specialties"] --> B["Segment raw cases to remove treatment details and follow-up information that imply diagnosis"]
    B["Segment raw cases to remove treatment details and follow-up information that imply diagnosis"] --> C["Apply iterative filtering to exclude cases solvable by memorized knowledge alone"]
    C["Apply iterative filtering to exclude cases solvable by memorized knowledge alone"] --> D["Conduct expert-AI collaborative verification with thorough data leakage checks"]
    D["Conduct expert-AI collaborative verification with thorough data leakage checks"] --> E["Finalize 1,113 challenging diagnostic cases spanning 28 medical specialties"]
    E["Finalize 1,113 challenging diagnostic cases spanning 28 medical specialties"] --> F["Evaluate models using unified prompts in both open-ended and multiple-choice formats"]
    F["Evaluate models using unified prompts in both open-ended and multiple-choice formats"] --> G["Measure performance with Top-k metrics ranking predictions by confidence scores"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从10个顶级医学期刊收集4175份病例报告"] --> B["分段原始病例去除暗示诊断的治疗和随访信息"]
    B["分段原始病例去除暗示诊断的治疗和随访信息"] --> C["迭代过滤排除仅靠记忆知识可解决的病例"]
    C["迭代过滤排除仅靠记忆知识可解决的病例"] --> D["进行专家与AI协作验证并彻底检查数据泄露"]
    D["进行专家与AI协作验证并彻底检查数据泄露"] --> E["最终确定涵盖28个专科的1113个挑战性诊断病例"]
    E["最终确定涵盖28个专科的1113个挑战性诊断病例"] --> F["使用统一提示词以开放式和选择题格式评估模型"]
    F["使用统一提示词以开放式和选择题格式评估模型"] --> G["用Top-k指标按置信度排序预测结果衡量性能"]

name: Disco-X
intro: DiscoX是一个针对专家领域语篇级翻译的新基准，旨在解决现有评估方法主要关注片段级准确性和流畅性的不足。它包含200篇来自7个领域的专业文本，平均长度超过1700个词元。同时，该基准还开发了Metric-S，一个无参考的自动评估系统，用于评估翻译的准确性、流畅性和适当性。实验表明，即使是最先进的LLM在这些任务上的表现仍落后于人类专家，验证了DiscoX的难度。
build_method: 专家构建
eval_feature: 无参考评估, 细粒度评估
intro_en: DiscoX is a new benchmark for expert-domain discourse-level translation, designed to address the limitations of existing evaluations that mainly focus on segment-level accuracy and fluency. It includes 200 professional texts from 7 domains, with an average length of over 1700 tokens. The benchmark also introduces Metric-S, a reference-free automatic evaluation system for assessing translation accuracy, fluency, and appropriateness. Experiments show that even state-of-the-art LLMs still lag behind human experts on these tasks, confirming the difficulty of DiscoX.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Professional Text Sources) --> B[Expert Curation & Selection]
    B --> C{Domain & Quality Filtering}
    C -- Pass --> D[Text Preprocessing]
    C -- Fail --> L[Discard]
    D --> E{{Discourse Unit Identification}}
    E --> F[Translation Pair Alignment]
    F --> G{Expert Validation of Alignment}
    G -- Valid --> H(Disco-X Dataset\n200 Texts, 7 Domains)
    G -- Invalid --> B
    H --> I[Discourse-level Translation Evaluation]
    I --> J(Evaluation Metrics & Scores)
    J --> K[Model Performance Analysis]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 200 professional texts from 7 domains with average length exceeding 1700 tokens"] --> B["Conduct multi-stage expert curation process to ensure authentic professional demands"]
    B["Conduct multi-stage expert curation process to ensure authentic professional demands"] --> C["Systematically collect key challenges and organize into expert-authored rubrics per case"]
    C["Systematically collect key challenges and organize into expert-authored rubrics per case"] --> D["Generate translations using LLMs and human experts for benchmark evaluation"]
    D["Generate translations using LLMs and human experts for benchmark evaluation"] --> E["Apply Metric-S with multiple LLM agents for pre-checking and quality estimation"]
    E["Apply Metric-S with multiple LLM agents for pre-checking and quality estimation"] --> F["Perform error deduplication, attribution, and severity weighting across accuracy, fluency, appropriateness"]
    F["Perform error deduplication, attribution, and severity weighting across accuracy, fluency, appropriateness"] --> G["Compare LLM performance against human expert baseline across three dimensions"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从7个领域精选200篇专业文本，平均长度超1700词元"] --> B["执行多阶段专家策展流程，确保真实专业需求"]
    B["执行多阶段专家策展流程，确保真实专业需求"] --> C["系统收集关键挑战并为每个案例编制专家评分标准"]
    C["系统收集关键挑战并为每个案例编制专家评分标准"] --> D["使用大语言模型和人类专家生成翻译供基准评估"]
    D["使用大语言模型和人类专家生成翻译供基准评估"] --> E["应用Metric-S多智能体进行预检和质量评估"]
    E["应用Metric-S多智能体进行预检和质量评估"] --> F["执行错误去重、归因及严重性加权评估准确性流畅性适当性"]
    F["执行错误去重、归因及严重性加权评估准确性流畅性适当性"] --> G["对比大语言模型与人类专家基线的三维度表现"]

name: DLC-Bench
intro: DLC-Bench是一个用于评估详细局部描述（DLC）模型的基准，旨在为图像和视频中的特定区域生成详细、准确的描述。该基准与“描述一切模型”（DAM）一同发布，其评估过程不依赖于人工标注的参考描述，而是采用创新的评估方法。DLC-Bench的数据集构建始于现有的分割数据集，并利用半监督学习（SSL）技术扩展到大量的网络图像。
build_method: 半监督学习, 迁移学习
modality: 文本, 图像, 视频, 多模态
scale: 包含7个不同粒度的子任务
intro_en: DLC-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating Detailed Local Captioning (DLC) models, designed to generate detailed and accurate descriptions of specific regions in images and videos. Released alongside the Description Anything Model (DAM), its evaluation process does not rely on manually annotated reference captions but uses an innovative assessment method. The DLC-Bench dataset is built upon existing segmentation datasets and expanded to a large number of web images using semi-supervised learning (SSL) techniques.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Large-scale Image/Video Data] --> B{{Description Anything Model (DAM)}}
    B --> C[Transfer Learning]
    C --> D[Semi-supervised Learning]
    D --> E[Generate Pseudo-Labels]
    E --> F{Quality Filtering}
    F -->|High Confidence| G(DLC-Bench Dataset)
    F -->|Low Confidence| H[Discard]
    G --> I[DLC Model Evaluation]
    I --> J[Automated Metrics]
    J --> K[Benchmark Results]
scale_en: Contains 7 items of sub-tasks with different granularity
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect masks and keywords from human-annotated segmentation datasets"] --> B["Query a VLM to expand each keyword into detailed captions for mask-referred regions"]
    B["Query a VLM to expand each keyword into detailed captions for mask-referred regions"] --> C["Apply semi-supervised learning to expand dataset to unlabeled web images"]
    C["Apply semi-supervised learning to expand dataset to unlabeled web images"] --> D["Train DAM with focal prompts and localized vision backbone on generated data"]
    D["Train DAM with focal prompts and localized vision backbone on generated data"] --> E["Generate detailed localized captions for test regions without reference captions"]
    E["Generate detailed localized captions for test regions without reference captions"] --> F["Evaluate generated captions on DLC-Bench using reference-free evaluation methods"]
    F["Evaluate generated captions on DLC-Bench using reference-free evaluation methods"] --> G["Benchmark on seven tasks spanning keyword, phrase, and multi-sentence localized captioning"]

flowchart LR
    A["从人工标注的分割数据集收集掩码和关键词"] --> B["查询VLM将关键词扩展为掩码区域的详细描述"]
    B["查询VLM将关键词扩展为掩码区域的详细描述"] --> C["应用半监督学习将数据集扩展到未标注网络图像"]
    C["应用半监督学习将数据集扩展到未标注网络图像"] --> D["用焦点提示和局部视觉主干在生成数据上训练DAM"]
    D["用焦点提示和局部视觉主干在生成数据上训练DAM"] --> E["为测试区域生成详细局部描述而不依赖参考描述"]
    E["为测试区域生成详细局部描述而不依赖参考描述"] --> F["在DLC-Bench上用无参考评估方法评估生成描述"]
    F["在DLC-Bench上用无参考评估方法评估生成描述"] --> G["在涵盖关键词、短语和多句局部描述的七个任务上评测"]

name: DUDE
intro: DUDE（Document Understanding Dataset and Evaluation）旨在重新评估文档AI领域当前的方法论，并推动创建更具实践导向的基准。该基准通过引入基于多行业、多领域、多页视觉丰富文档（VRDs）的新型问题、答案和文档布局，以解决视觉丰富文档理解研究进展停滞的问题。DUDE致力于通过多任务和多领域评估设置来更准确地模拟现实世界情况，以促进在低资源设置下的强大泛化和适应能力。
eval_feature: 多行业, 多领域, 多页, 多任务, 泛化能力, 适应性
eval_feature_en: Multi-industry, multi-domain, multi-page, multi-task, generalization ability, adaptability
intro_en: DUDE (Document Understanding Dataset and Evaluation) aims to reassess current methodologies in the document AI field and promote the creation of more practical benchmarks. It addresses the stagnation in visual-rich document (VRD) understanding research by introducing new questions, answers, and document layouts based on multi-industry, multi-domain, multi-page VRDs. DUDE strives to more accurately simulate real-world scenarios through multi-task and multi-domain evaluation settings, fostering robust generalization and adaptability in low-resource environments.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Existing VRD Datasets) --> C[Data Collection]
    B(Real-world Document Sources) --> C
    C --> D[Document Parsing & Structuring]
    D --> E{{Hybrid Processing Methods}}
    E --> F[Question & Answer Generation]
    F --> G[Document Content Augmentation]
    G --> H{Quality Assurance Check}
    H -->|Pass| I(DUDE Dataset
New Q&A, VRD)
    H -->|Fail| J[Data Refinement]
    J --> E
    I --> K[Model Training & Evaluation]
    K --> L[Performance Analysis]
    L --> M(Benchmark Results)

flowchart LR

    B["Create diverse question-answer pairs regarding document elements, properties, and compositions for each VRD"] --> C["Process documents with three OCR engines: Amazon, Azure, and Tesseract"]
    C["Process documents with three OCR engines: Amazon, Azure, and Tesseract"] --> D["Format OCR outputs in both original and standardized DUE formats"]
    D["Format OCR outputs in both original and standardized DUE formats"] --> E["Design multi-task and multi-domain evaluation splits to test generalization under low-resource settings"]
    E["Design multi-task and multi-domain evaluation splits to test generalization under low-resource settings"] --> F["Evaluate models on their ability to navigate, reason over layouts, and transfer subtasks across domains"]
    F["Evaluate models on their ability to navigate, reason over layouts, and transfer subtasks across domains"] --> G["Submit test predictions to DUDE competition leaderboard for benchmark comparison"]

flowchart LR

    B["为文档元素属性和组成创建问答对"] --> C["用三种OCR引擎处理文档"]
    C["用三种OCR引擎处理文档"] --> D["将OCR输出格式化为原始和标准格式"]
    D["将OCR输出格式化为原始和标准格式"] --> E["设计多任务多领域评估划分测试泛化"]
    E["设计多任务多领域评估划分测试泛化"] --> F["评估模型布局推理和跨域迁移能力"]
    F["评估模型布局推理和跨域迁移能力"] --> G["提交测试预测至竞赛排行榜比较"]

name: DynaMath
intro: DynaMath是一个动态视觉数学基准，旨在深入评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）的数学推理鲁棒性。该基准包含501个高质量、多主题的种子问题，每个问题都以Python程序表示，通过精心设计和标注，可以自动生成大量具体的变体问题。DynaMath通过评估VLM在不同输入条件下的表现，来衡量其泛化能力，揭示了当前VLM在数学推理方面的局限性。
intro_en: DynaMath is a dynamic visual math benchmark designed to thoroughly evaluate the mathematical reasoning robustness of visual language models (VLMs). It contains 501 high-quality, multi-topic seed problems, each represented as a Python program. Through careful design and annotation, a large number of specific variant problems can be automatically generated. DynaMath measures VLMs' generalization ability by assessing their performance under different input conditions, revealing current limitations in VLMs' mathematical reasoning.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Seed Problems\n501 Python Programs) --> B[Careful Design & Annotation]
    B --> C{{Automatic Generation Engine}}
    C --> D[Generate Diverse Problem Instances]
    D --> E[Generate Visual Representations]
    E --> F{Automated Quality Checks}
    F --|Pass| --> G[Human Review & Validation]
    F --|Fail| --> K[Discard Low-Quality]
    G --> H(DynaMath Benchmark Dataset)
    H --> I[VLM Mathematical Reasoning Evaluation]
    I --> J[Robustness Assessment]
scale_en: 501 items seed questions, 5010 items specific questions
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 501 seed questions from MathVista, MATH-V, MMMU, public resources, and self-developed problems"] --> B["Review and eliminate seed questions with excessively complex images unsuitable for programmatic generation"]
    B["Review and eliminate seed questions with excessively complex images unsuitable for programmatic generation"] --> C["Transform each seed question into a carefully designed and annotated Python program prototype"]
    C["Transform each seed question into a carefully designed and annotated Python program prototype"] --> D["Run Python programs to automatically generate concrete question instances with random condition variations"]
    D["Run Python programs to automatically generate concrete question instances with random condition variations"] --> E["Generate 10 concrete question variants per seed question, producing 5,010 total evaluation questions"]
    E["Generate 10 concrete question variants per seed question, producing 5,010 total evaluation questions"] --> F["Evaluate 14 state-of-the-art VLMs on generated questions to assess mathematical reasoning robustness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从MathVista、MATH-V、MMMU、公开资源及自研问题中收集501个种子问题"] --> B["审查并剔除图像过于复杂不适合程序化生成的种子问题"]
    B["审查并剔除图像过于复杂不适合程序化生成的种子问题"] --> C["将每个种子问题转换为精心设计和标注的Python程序原型"]
    C["将每个种子问题转换为精心设计和标注的Python程序原型"] --> D["运行Python程序自动生成带随机条件变化的具体问题实例"]
    D["运行Python程序自动生成带随机条件变化的具体问题实例"] --> E["每个种子问题生成10个具体变体，共产生5010个评估问题"]
    E["每个种子问题生成10个具体变体，共产生5010个评估问题"] --> F["在生成的问题上评估14个先进VLM以衡量数学推理鲁棒性"]

name: EgoTempo
intro: EgoTempo是一个专门为评估多模态大模型在自我中心视频中时间理解能力而设计的数据集。它通过整合整个视频的信息来强调任务，确保模型需要依赖时间模式而非静态线索或预先存在的知识。实验表明，当前的多模态大模型在自我中心视频的时间推理方面仍有不足。
modality: 视频, 文本, 多模态
eval_feature: 过程评估
intro_en: EgoTempo is a dataset specifically designed to evaluate the temporal understanding ability of multimodal large models in egocentric videos. It emphasizes the task by integrating information from the entire video, ensuring models rely on temporal patterns rather than static cues or prior knowledge. Experiments show that current multimodal large models still have limitations in temporal reasoning for egocentric videos.

    B --> C[Temporal Event Annotation]

    E -->|Fail| G[Re-annotation/Filtering]
    G --> C
    F --> H(EgoTempo Dataset)
    H --> I[Model Training/Fine-tuning]
    I --> J[Temporal Understanding Evaluation]
    J --> K[Performance Analysis]

    F["Evaluate MLLMs using LLM-based grading with Gemini Flash and MultiQA accuracy"] --> G["Measure performance across frame sampling rates to quantify temporal reasoning improvement"]

    C["按分类体系生成需要完整视频信息的问答对"] --> D["过滤纯文本或单帧可答问题以确保时间依赖性"]
    D["过滤纯文本或单帧可答问题以确保时间依赖性"] --> E["整理500个测试样本作为自由形式开放式视频问答对"]

    F["使用Gemini Flash的LLM评分和MultiQA准确率评估多模态模型"] --> G["测量不同帧采样率下的性能以量化时间推理提升"]

name: EHRSQL
intro: EHRSQL是针对电子健康记录的实用文本到SQL基准，通过收集222名医院工作人员的提问并关联MIMIC-III和eICU数据库，评估QA模型在结构化EHR数据上的SQL生成和时间表达式理解能力。
scale: 基于222名医院工作人员提问
build_method_en: Manual annotation, questions from hospital staff
eval_feature_en: Generate SQL queries reflecting the broad needs of hospitals, understand time expressions, distinguish question answerability
intro_en: EHRSQL is a practical text-to-SQL benchmark for electronic health records. It collects questions from 222 hospital staff and links them to the MIMIC-III and eICU databases to evaluate QA models' SQL generation and temporal expression understanding on structured EHR data.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR

    B --> C[Data Structuring & Schema Mapping]
    C --> D[Natural Language Question Generation]
    D --> E[Corresponding SQL Query Generation]
    E --> F{{Expert Construction Method}}
    F --> G{Expert Review & Validation}
    G -- Validated --> H(High-Quality NL-SQL Pairs)
    G -- Rejected --> I[Refinement/Discard]
    H --> J(EHRSQL Benchmark Dataset)
    J --> K[Model Evaluation]
    K -- using --> L{{NL-to-SQL Models}}
scale_en: Based on questions from 222 hospital staff
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR

    F["Include unanswerable questions from poll requiring external knowledge or incompatible with database schema"] --> G["Evaluate models on SQL generation, time expression understanding, and answerable versus unanswerable question distinction"]

    B["过滤并模板化问卷回复创建种子问题模板"] --> C["将种子问题手动关联到MIMIC-III和eICU数据库模式"]

    D["系统化分类时间表达类型、单位和区间类型"] --> E["将时间表达与问题模板结合模拟时间敏感问题"]
    E["将时间表达与问题模板结合模拟时间敏感问题"] --> F["纳入需外部知识或与数据库模式不兼容的无法回答问题"]

name: EmbSpatial-Bench
intro: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的快速发展预示了其在具身智能方面的潜力，然而，具身环境中空间理解的关键能力尚未得到充分评估。EmbSpatial-Bench旨在评估LVLMs的具身空间理解能力。该基准测试从具身场景中自动生成，涵盖了六种以自我为中心的空间关系，揭示了当前LVLMs（包括GPT-4V）在空间理解方面的不足。同时，该研究还提出了EmbSpatial-SFT，一个旨在提升LVLMs具身空间理解能力的指令微调数据集。
eval_feature: 具身空间理解, 自我中心视角, 指令微调数据集
eval_feature_en: Embodied Spatial Understanding, Egocentric Perspective, Instruction Fine-tuning Dataset
intro_en: The rapid development of large vision-language models (LVLMs) highlights their potential in embodied intelligence; however, key spatial understanding abilities in embodied environments remain under-evaluated. EmbSpatial-Bench is designed to assess the embodied spatial understanding capabilities of LVLMs. This benchmark is automatically generated from embodied scenarios and covers six types of egocentric spatial relationships, revealing current shortcomings in spatial understanding among LVLMs, including GPT-4V. Additionally, the study introduces EmbSpatial-SFT, an instruction fine-tuning dataset aimed at enhancing LVLMs' embodied spatial understanding.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect RGB-D images from MP3D, ScanNet, and AI2-THOR by randomly selecting viewpoints in 3D scenes"] --> B["Extract 2D bounding boxes from 3D coordinates using camera parameters for each object in images"]
    B["Extract 2D bounding boxes from 3D coordinates using camera parameters for each object in images"] --> C["Extract spatial relation triples with non-overlapping boxes for six egocentric relationships: above, below, left, right, close, far"]
    C["Extract spatial relation triples with non-overlapping boxes for six egocentric relationships: above, below, left, right, close, far"] --> D["Generate multiple-choice questions using templates for directional relations and aggregated questions for distance relations"]
    D["Generate multiple-choice questions using templates for directional relations and aggregated questions for distance relations"] --> E["Filter out QA pairs with overly large or small bounding boxes while maintaining balanced spatial relation distribution"]
    E["Filter out QA pairs with overly large or small bounding boxes while maintaining balanced spatial relation distribution"] --> F["Manually verify each sample to remove questions with unclear objects or incorrect spatial relationships"]
    F["Manually verify each sample to remove questions with unclear objects or incorrect spatial relationships"] --> G["Evaluate LVLMs using generation-based and likelihood strategies with accuracy as the metric"]

flowchart LR

    B["利用相机参数将3D坐标转换为2D边界框标注每个物体"] --> C["提取无重叠边界框的空间关系三元组涵盖六种自我中心关系"]
    C["提取无重叠边界框的空间关系三元组涵盖六种自我中心关系"] --> D["用模板生成方向关系的多选题并聚合生成距离关系问题"]
    D["用模板生成方向关系的多选题并聚合生成距离关系问题"] --> E["过滤边界框过大或过小的问答对并保持空间关系分布平衡"]
    E["过滤边界框过大或过小的问答对并保持空间关系分布平衡"] --> F["人工验证每个样本移除物体不清晰或空间关系错误的问题"]
    F["人工验证每个样本移除物体不清晰或空间关系错误的问题"] --> G["用生成式和似然策略评估大模型并以准确率为指标"]

name: EMMA
intro: EMMA（Enhanced MultiModal reAsoning）是一个旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）有机多模态推理能力的基准测试。它涵盖数学、物理、化学和编程等领域，任务需要跨模态推理，不能仅通过单一模态独立解决。对现有MLLMs的评估显示，在处理复杂多模态和多步推理任务方面存在显著局限性，突显了改进多模态架构和训练范式的必要性。
org: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Sun Yat-sen University, University of Wash
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: EMMA (Enhanced MultiModal reAsoning) is a benchmark designed to evaluate the organic multimodal reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It covers fields such as mathematics, physics, chemistry, and programming, requiring cross-modal reasoning that cannot be solved by a single modality alone. Evaluations of existing MLLMs reveal significant limitations in handling complex multimodal and multi-step reasoning tasks, highlighting the need to improve multimodal architectures and training paradigms.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Raw Data\n(Text, Images, Code)) --> B[Automated Data Extraction]
    A --> C[Manual Curation & Annotation]
    B --> D(Intermediate Multimodal Data)
    C --> D
    D --> E[Cross-Modal Alignment & Integration]
    E --> F[Problem Formulation & Solution Generation]
    F --> G{Expert Review & Validation}
    G -->|Pass| H(EMMA Benchmark Dataset\n(Multimodal Reasoning Tasks))
    G -->|Fail| I[Refinement & Iteration]
    I --> F
    H --> J[MLLM Inference & Response Generation]
    J --> K[Automated Answer Comparison]
    K --> L[Performance Metrics Calculation]
    L --> M(Evaluation Results & Leaderboard)

    B["Filter out questions answerable by text-only reasoning by providing only text to LLMs."] --> C["Caption images using GPT-4o and filter questions answerable with text plus captions."]
    C["Caption images using GPT-4o and filter questions answerable with text plus captions."] --> D["Categorize retained questions into fine-grained multimodal reasoning skill taxonomies per subject."]
    D["Categorize retained questions into fine-grained multimodal reasoning skill taxonomies per subject."] --> E["Manually construct new questions aligned with taxonomies in collaboration with domain experts."]
    E["Manually construct new questions aligned with taxonomies in collaboration with domain experts."] --> F["Assign skill labels to each problem via domain experts or GPT-4o with expert verification."]
    F["Assign skill labels to each problem via domain experts or GPT-4o with expert verification."] --> G["Format all questions as multiple-choice or short-answer with ground truth for easy evaluation."]

    A["从现有基准中收集数学、物理、化学和编程领域的多模态推理问题。"] --> B["通过仅向LLM提供文本，过滤掉仅靠文本推理可解答的问题。"]
    B["通过仅向LLM提供文本，过滤掉仅靠文本推理可解答的问题。"] --> C["用GPT-4o生成图像描述，过滤掉文本加描述可解答的问题。"]
    C["用GPT-4o生成图像描述，过滤掉文本加描述可解答的问题。"] --> D["将保留问题按学科分类为细粒度多模态推理技能分类体系。"]
    D["将保留问题按学科分类为细粒度多模态推理技能分类体系。"] --> E["与领域专家合作，手动构建与分类体系对齐的新问题。"]

name: Encyclo-K
intro: Encyclo-K是一个基于语句的基准测试，它重新思考了基准测试的构建方式。其核心思想是知识语句而非问题可以作为策展单位，并可以从中构建问题。该基准测试通过从权威教科书中提取独立的知识语句，并在测试时通过随机抽样动态组合成评估问题，以解决数据污染、单知识点评估和昂贵领域专家标注的局限性。
org: Institute of Automation of the Chinese Academy Sciences, University of Manchester, Peking University
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 思维链
intro_en: Encyclo-K is a statement-based benchmark that rethinks benchmark construction. Its core idea is that knowledge statements, rather than questions, serve as the curation units from which questions can be generated. This benchmark extracts independent knowledge statements from authoritative textbooks and dynamically assembles evaluation questions through random sampling during testing, addressing limitations such as data contamination, single-knowledge-point evaluation, and costly domain expert annotation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Authoritative Textbooks) --> B[Web Crawling]
    B --> C[Extract Knowledge Statements]
    C --> D{Statement Filtering}
    D -->|Pass| E[Generate Questions]
    D -->|Fail| C
    E --> F[Expert Validation]
    F --> G{Quality Check Passed?}
    G -->|Yes| H(Encyclo-K Dataset)
    G -->|No| E
    H --> I[Model Evaluation]

flowchart LR

    B["Manually extract knowledge statements via screenshot capture, masking irrelevant content with mosaics"] --> C["Use doubao-1.5-vision-pro to extract statements from images and generate corresponding titles"]
    C["Use doubao-1.5-vision-pro to extract statements from images and generate corresponding titles"] --> D["Validate correct statements for independence, completeness, semantic clarity, and information conciseness"]

    E["Use DeepSeek-R1 to transform correct statements into plausible incorrect counterparts maintaining professional tone"] --> F["Randomly sample and combine 8–10 statements into evaluation questions at test time"]
    F["Randomly sample and combine 8–10 statements into evaluation questions at test time"] --> G["Evaluate over 50 LLMs on dynamically composed questions measuring comprehensive multi-statement understanding"]

name: EvalPlus
intro: EvalPlus是一个代码合成评估框架，旨在严格评估大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的代码的功能正确性。它通过LLM和基于变异的策略自动生成大量新的测试用例来增强现有评估数据集。EvalPlus能够发现LLM合成代码中大量未被检测到的错误，并揭示了测试不足可能导致的错误排名。
org: University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Nanjing University
intro_en: EvalPlus is a code synthesis evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess the functional correctness of code generated by large language models (LLMs). It enhances existing evaluation datasets by automatically generating numerous new test cases through LLMs and mutation-based strategies. EvalPlus can detect many previously undetected errors in LLM-synthesized code and reveals error rankings that may result from insufficient testing.

flowchart LR

    A --> C{{Mutation-based Test Case Generation}}
    B --> D(Generated Test Cases)
    C --> D
    D --> E[Integrate & Expand]
    E --> F{Test Case Validity Check}
    F -- Invalid --> G[Refine Test Cases]
    G --> D
    F -- Valid --> H(Enhanced EvalPlus Dataset)
    H --> I[Assess LLM Code Functionality]
    I --> J(Functional Correctness Report)

    F["Execute LLM-generated code against both original and augmented test-cases"] --> G["Calculate pass@k metrics to measure functional correctness of synthesized code"]

    B["使用LLM策略自动生成新测试输入"] --> C["使用变异策略生成额外测试输入"]

    F["对原始和增强测试用例执行LLM代码"] --> G["计算pass@k指标评估代码功能正确性"]

name: EVMbench
intro: EVMbench是一个用于评估AI智能体在智能合约安全领域能力的基准。它通过检测、修补和利用智能合约漏洞来衡量智能体的能力。该基准包含来自40个代码库的120个精选漏洞，并在真实的以太坊执行环境中进行程序化评分。
build_method: 真实审计漏洞整理, 预言机补丁与利用脚本构造, 本地以太坊环境程序化评分
metric: Vulnerability Recall, Patch Success Rate, Exploit Success Rate
task_type: 检测, 修补, 利用智能合约漏洞
eval_feature: 程序化评分, 本地以太坊执行环境
task_type_en: Detect, Patch, and Exploit Smart Contract Vulnerabilities
build_method_en: Real-audit vulnerability curation, oracle patch and exploit construction, programmatic scoring in local Ethereum environments
eval_feature_en: Programmatic Grading, Local Ethereum Execution Environment
intro_en: EVMbench evaluates AI agents on smart contract security by testing end-to-end vulnerability detection, patching, and exploitation in real Ethereum execution environments.

120 Vulnerabilities)
