    G["Create summarization tasks from ∞Bench and Multi-LexSum with extended context lengths"] --> H["Evaluate using SubEM for RAG, NDCG@10 for re-ranking, and model-based scoring for QA and summarization"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择问答数据集并用gte模型从维基百科检索k-1个干扰段落"] --> B["将金标准段落插入六个位置或打乱以创建RAG任务"]
    B["将金标准段落插入六个位置或打乱以创建RAG任务"] --> C["准备ALCE引用任务用前k个检索段落生成带引用的答案"]
    C["准备ALCE引用任务用前k个检索段落生成带引用的答案"] --> D["用BM25检索段落和相关性标签构建MS MARCO重排序任务"]
    D["用BM25检索段落和相关性标签构建MS MARCO重排序任务"] --> E["用TREC和意图分类数据集构建多样本上下文学习任务"]
    E["用TREC和意图分类数据集构建多样本上下文学习任务"] --> F["从NarrativeQA和∞Bench组装长文档问答任务支持128K长度"]
    F["从NarrativeQA和∞Bench组装长文档问答任务支持128K长度"] --> G["从∞Bench和Multi-LexSum创建扩展长度的摘要任务"]
    G["从∞Bench和Multi-LexSum创建扩展长度的摘要任务"] --> H["用SubEM评估RAG、NDCG@10评估重排序、模型评分评估问答和摘要"]

name: HiPhO
intro: HiPhO基准测试通过高中物理奥林匹克竞赛题目评估(M)LLM的物理能力。它包含13套最新的奥林匹克竞赛试题，涵盖从纯文本到图表题的混合模态。该基准测试采用官方评分方案进行答案和步骤级别的细粒度评分，并根据官方奖牌阈值向模型授予金、银、铜牌，以便与人类参赛者进行直接比较。
org: Shanghai AI Lab, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen
metric: Exam score, Gold, Silver, Bronze medals
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
eval_feature: 过程评估, 人机对比, 多模态
intro_en: The HiPhO benchmark evaluates (M)LLMs' physics abilities using high school physics Olympiad problems. It includes 13 sets of the latest Olympiad questions, covering mixed modalities from pure text to graphical problems. The benchmark applies the official scoring scheme for fine-grained evaluation at both answer and solution step levels, awarding gold, silver, and bronze medals to models based on official medal thresholds for direct comparison with human participants.
metric_en: Exam score, Gold, Silver, Bronze medals
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 13 Olympiad exam PDFs from 2024–2025 international and regional competitions"] --> B["Convert PDFs to markdown using OCR, preserving LaTeX formatting for physical expressions"]
    B["Convert PDFs to markdown using OCR, preserving LaTeX formatting for physical expressions"] --> C["Align problems with answers using question indices, then manually verify all QA pairs"]
    C["Align problems with answers using question indices, then manually verify all QA pairs"] --> D["Categorize each problem by physics field and modality type spanning text to diagrams"]
    D["Categorize each problem by physics field and modality type spanning text to diagrams"] --> E["Apply rule-based math-verifier for answer-level scoring; invoke strong model if verification fails"]
    E["Apply rule-based math-verifier for answer-level scoring; invoke strong model if verification fails"] --> F["Compare model solutions with official marking schemes using strong model for step-level scoring"]
    F["Compare model solutions with official marking schemes using strong model for step-level scoring"] --> G["Compute final problem score as maximum of answer-level and step-level scores"]
    G["Compute final problem score as maximum of answer-level and step-level scores"] --> H["Sum problem scores to obtain exam score and assign medals using official thresholds"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集2024-2025年13场国际和区域奥赛试卷PDF"] --> B["用OCR将PDF转为markdown并保留物理表达式LaTeX格式"]
    B["用OCR将PDF转为markdown并保留物理表达式LaTeX格式"] --> C["用题号匹配问题和答案后人工验证所有QA对"]
    C["用题号匹配问题和答案后人工验证所有QA对"] --> D["按物理领域和模态类型对每题分类涵盖文本到图表"]
    D["按物理领域和模态类型对每题分类涵盖文本到图表"] --> E["用规则数学验证器评分答案层级失败时调用强模型"]
    E["用规则数学验证器评分答案层级失败时调用强模型"] --> F["用强模型比对官方评分方案对模型解答进行步骤评分"]
    F["用强模型比对官方评分方案对模型解答进行步骤评分"] --> G["取答案层级和步骤层级评分的最大值作为最终得分"]
    G["取答案层级和步骤层级评分的最大值作为最终得分"] --> H["汇总题目得分获得考试分数并用官方阈值授予奖牌"]

name: HLE
intro: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) 是一个前沿的多模态基准，旨在评估高级AI系统在人类知识前沿的表现。该基准包含2500个由全球主题专家创建的选择题和简答题，覆盖数学、人文学科和自然科学等多个领域。HLE的设计目标是成为同类中最后一个封闭式学术基准，其问题无法通过简单的网络搜索快速解答，从而对当前最先进的LLM构成重大挑战。
org: Center for AI Safety and collaborating institutions
task_type_en: Multiple choice and short answer questions
build_method_en: Constructed by experts from various global fields
intro_en: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) is a cutting-edge multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate advanced AI systems' performance at the forefront of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 multiple-choice and short-answer questions created by global subject experts, covering fields such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences. HLE aims to be the last closed-book academic benchmark of its kind, with questions that cannot be quickly answered through simple web searches, posing a significant challenge to state-of-the-art LLMs.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Subject-matter experts globally submit questions across mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences"] --> B["Graduate-level reviewers provide initial feedback on submitted questions"]
    B["Graduate-level reviewers provide initial feedback on submitted questions"] --> C["Organizers and expert reviewers approve questions ensuring difficulty and quality criteria"]
    C["Organizers and expert reviewers approve questions ensuring difficulty and quality criteria"] --> D["Format questions as multiple-choice or exact-match with text or image modalities"]
    D["Format questions as multiple-choice or exact-match with text or image modalities"] --> E["Verify each question has unambiguous solution not quickly answerable via internet retrieval"]
    E["Verify each question has unambiguous solution not quickly answerable via internet retrieval"] --> F["Release benchmark publicly and conduct community review period for feedback"]
    F["Release benchmark publicly and conduct community review period for feedback"] --> G["Evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs using automated grading on the 2,500-question benchmark"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["全球主题专家提交数学、人文和自然科学问题"] --> B["研究生级审稿人对提交问题提供初步反馈"]
    B["研究生级审稿人对提交问题提供初步反馈"] --> C["组织者和专家审稿人批准问题确保难度和质量"]
    C["组织者和专家审稿人批准问题确保难度和质量"] --> D["将问题格式化为选择题或精确匹配含文本或图像"]
    D["将问题格式化为选择题或精确匹配含文本或图像"] --> E["验证每个问题有明确解且无法快速网络检索"]
    E["验证每个问题有明确解且无法快速网络检索"] --> F["公开发布基准并进行社区审查期收集反馈"]
    F["公开发布基准并进行社区审查期收集反馈"] --> G["使用自动评分在2500题基准上评估最先进LLM"]

name: HLE-Verified
intro: HLE-Verified是“人类最后考试”（HLE）基准的修订和验证版本。它通过实施透明的验证协议，解决了原始HLE中存在噪声项目的问题。该过程涉及专家审查和基于模型的交叉检查，以验证并在必要时修复有缺陷的问题和答案，最终提高基准在评估大型语言模型方面的可靠性。
build_method: 专家审查, 模型交叉检查和独立专家修复
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
eval_feature: Verified
build_method_en: Expert review, model cross-checking, and independent expert correction
intro_en: HLE-Verified is a revised and validated version of the "Human Last Exam" (HLE) benchmark. It addresses the noisy items in the original HLE by implementing a transparent verification protocol. This process involves expert review and model-based cross-checking to validate and, when necessary, correct flawed questions and answers, ultimately enhancing the benchmark's reliability in evaluating large language models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Decompose each HLE item into problem statement, final answer, and rationale components"] --> B["Perform Stage I binary validation on problem and answer using expert review and model cross-checks"]
    B["Perform Stage I binary validation on problem and answer using expert review and model cross-checks"] --> C["Label items as verified gold subset or flag as flawed but potentially repairable"]
    C["Label items as verified gold subset or flag as flawed but potentially repairable"] --> D["Conduct Stage II dual independent expert repairs on flawed items under evaluation-intent preservation constraints"]
    D["Conduct Stage II dual independent expert repairs on flawed items under evaluation-intent preservation constraints"] --> E["Apply model-assisted consistency auditing to verify repair coherence across components"]
    E["Apply model-assisted consistency auditing to verify repair coherence across components"] --> F["Perform final expert adjudication to certify revised items or mark as uncertain"]
    F["Perform final expert adjudication to certify revised items or mark as uncertain"] --> G["Record component-wise validity labels, error types, revision traces, and uncertainty descriptors for each item"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将每个HLE项目分解为问题陈述、最终答案和推理过程"] --> B["执行第一阶段二元验证，专家审查和模型交叉检查问题与答案"]
    B["执行第一阶段二元验证，专家审查和模型交叉检查问题与答案"] --> C["标记项目为已验证黄金子集或标记为有缺陷但可修复"]
    C["标记项目为已验证黄金子集或标记为有缺陷但可修复"] --> D["对有缺陷项目执行第二阶段双独立专家修复并保留评估意图"]
    D["对有缺陷项目执行第二阶段双独立专家修复并保留评估意图"] --> E["应用模型辅助一致性审计验证修复后各组件的连贯性"]
    E["应用模型辅助一致性审计验证修复后各组件的连贯性"] --> F["执行最终专家裁决以认证修订项目或标记为不确定"]
    F["执行最终专家裁决以认证修订项目或标记为不确定"] --> G["记录每个项目的组件有效性标签、错误类型、修订轨迹和不确定性描述"]

name: HR-Bench
intro: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在处理高分辨率（HR）图像的复杂细节方面仍面临挑战。HR-Bench是首个专门设计用于严格评估MLLM在4K和8K图像上性能的基准。该研究提出了一种名为Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC^2)的无训练框架，旨在增强MLLM对HR图像的感知能力。实验表明，DC^2显著提升了MLLM在HR图像基准上的表现。
org: Wuhan University, The University of Sydney, Jiangsu University, Sun Yat-Sen University, Nanyang Tech
intro_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still face challenges in handling complex details of high-resolution (HR) images. HR-Bench is the first benchmark specifically designed to rigorously evaluate MLLM performance on 4K and 8K images. This study proposes a training-free framework called Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC²) to enhance MLLM perception of HR images. Experiments show that DC² significantly improves MLLM performance on the HR image benchmark.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source 200 8K resolution images from DIV8K dataset and Internet"] --> B["Human annotators select images and craft questions for FSP and FCP tasks"]
    B["Human annotators select images and craft questions for FSP and FCP tasks"] --> C["Design 100 FSP samples testing object attribute identification like color and material"]
    C["Design 100 FSP samples testing object attribute identification like color and material"] --> D["Design 100 FCP samples testing relative position determination between objects"]
    D["Design 100 FCP samples testing relative position determination between objects"] --> E["Crop 8K images around question-relevant objects to produce 4K resolution images"]
    E["Crop 8K images around question-relevant objects to produce 4K resolution images"] --> F["Create multiple choice options for each question in the benchmark"]
    F["Create multiple choice options for each question in the benchmark"] --> G["Evaluate MLLMs using Cyclic Permutation with N rotated option orders per question"]
    G["Evaluate MLLMs using Cyclic Permutation with N rotated option orders per question"] --> H["Calculate and report average accuracy across all permutation passes"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从DIV8K数据集和互联网获取200张8K分辨率图像"] --> B["人工标注员为FSP和FCP任务选择图像并编写问题"]
    B["人工标注员为FSP和FCP任务选择图像并编写问题"] --> C["设计100个FSP样本测试颜色和材质等物体属性识别"]
    C["设计100个FSP样本测试颜色和材质等物体属性识别"] --> D["设计100个FCP样本测试物体间相对位置判断"]
    D["设计100个FCP样本测试物体间相对位置判断"] --> E["围绕问题相关物体裁剪8K图像生成4K分辨率图像"]
    E["围绕问题相关物体裁剪8K图像生成4K分辨率图像"] --> F["为基准中每个问题创建多项选择选项"]
    F["为基准中每个问题创建多项选择选项"] --> G["使用循环排列对每个问题进行N次选项顺序轮换评估MLLM"]
    G["使用循环排列对每个问题进行N次选项顺序轮换评估MLLM"] --> H["计算并报告所有排列轮次的平均准确率"]

name: HumanEval
intro: HumanEval 是由OpenAI开发的一个评测基准，旨在衡量大型语言模型（LLM）在代码生成方面的能力。该基准包含了164个手写的编程问题，每个问题都提供了函数签名、文档字符串和单元测试，用以检验生成代码的函数正确性。
intro_en: HumanEval, developed by OpenAI, is a benchmark designed to evaluate the code generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It consists of 164 handcrafted programming problems, each providing a function signature, docstring, and unit tests to verify the correctness of the generated code.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Hand-write 164 original Python programming problems with varying difficulty levels"] --> B["Create function signature and docstring for each problem describing the task"]
    B["Create function signature and docstring for each problem describing the task"] --> C["Write unit tests for each problem to verify functional correctness"]
    C["Write unit tests for each problem to verify functional correctness"] --> D["Generate multiple code samples from the language model for each problem"]
    D["Generate multiple code samples from the language model for each problem"] --> E["Execute unit tests automatically on each generated sample"]
    E["Execute unit tests automatically on each generated sample"] --> F["Check if any sample passes all unit tests for the problem"]
    F["Check if any sample passes all unit tests for the problem"] --> G["Calculate pass@k metric across problems with k samples per problem"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["手写164个不同难度的原创Python编程问题"] --> B["为每个问题创建函数签名和描述任务的文档字符串"]
    B["为每个问题创建函数签名和描述任务的文档字符串"] --> C["为每个问题编写单元测试以验证功能正确性"]
    C["为每个问题编写单元测试以验证功能正确性"] --> D["为每个问题从语言模型生成多个代码样本"]
    D["为每个问题从语言模型生成多个代码样本"] --> E["对每个生成样本自动执行单元测试"]
    E["对每个生成样本自动执行单元测试"] --> F["检查是否有样本通过该问题的所有单元测试"]
    F["检查是否有样本通过该问题的所有单元测试"] --> G["计算每个问题k个样本的pass@k指标"]

name: Humanity’s Last Code Exam
intro: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) 是一个极具挑战性的代码生成基准，收录了2010年至2024年间ICPC世界总决赛和IOI的235道最难题。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型的高级推理和代码生成能力，并提供了一个可复现的沙箱环境用于评测。此外，它还引入了“自我认知”任务来衡量模型对其自身能力的认知水平。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Huawei Noah's Ark Lab
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) is a highly challenging code generation benchmark featuring 235 of the toughest problems from the ICPC World Finals and IOI between 2010 and 2024. It aims to evaluate large language models' advanced reasoning and code generation abilities and provides a reproducible sandbox environment for testing. Additionally, it introduces a "self-awareness" task to measure models' understanding of their own capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract ICPC problem statements from PDFs manually and refine formatting using ChatGPT"] --> B["Collect official ICPC test cases and filter out problems with corrupted or incompatible formats"]
    B["Collect official ICPC test cases and filter out problems with corrupted or incompatible formats"] --> C["Scrape IOI problems from Codeforces dump and clean content with ChatGPT"]
    C["Scrape IOI problems from Codeforces dump and clean content with ChatGPT"] --> D["Gather IOI official test cases and exclude output-only problems from the dataset"]
    D["Gather IOI official test cases and exclude output-only problems from the dataset"] --> E["Evaluate ICPC solutions using Python framework with standard input/output test cases"]
    E["Evaluate ICPC solutions using Python framework with standard input/output test cases"] --> F["Submit IOI solutions to Codeforces via automated bot for interactive function-based judging"]
    F["Submit IOI solutions to Codeforces via automated bot for interactive function-based judging"] --> G["Assess self-recognition task where LLMs judge correctness of their own generated code"]
    G["Assess self-recognition task where LLMs judge correctness of their own generated code"] --> H["Calculate pass@1 and pass@5 metrics from 5 responses per problem across 12 LLMs"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从PDF手动提取ICPC题目并用ChatGPT优化格式"] --> B["收集ICPC官方测试用例并过滤损坏或不兼容问题"]
    B["收集ICPC官方测试用例并过滤损坏或不兼容问题"] --> C["从Codeforces抓取IOI题目并用ChatGPT清理内容"]
    C["从Codeforces抓取IOI题目并用ChatGPT清理内容"] --> D["收集IOI官方测试用例并排除仅输出类问题"]
    D["收集IOI官方测试用例并排除仅输出类问题"] --> E["用Python框架和标准输入输出测试ICPC解答"]
    E["用Python框架和标准输入输出测试ICPC解答"] --> F["通过自动机器人向Codeforces提交IOI解答进行交互评测"]
    F["通过自动机器人向Codeforces提交IOI解答进行交互评测"] --> G["评估模型判断自身生成代码正确性的自我认知任务"]
    G["评估模型判断自身生成代码正确性的自我认知任务"] --> H["从每题5次响应中计算12个模型的pass@1和pass@5指标"]

name: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE)
intro: 人类的终极考试 (HLE) 是一个多模态基准测试，旨在衡量大型语言模型 (LLM) 在人类知识前沿的能力。该基准包含2500道跨数学、人文和自然科学等数十个科目的问题，由全球主题专家开发。HLE的问题设计独特，具有明确且易于验证的已知答案，但无法通过互联网快速检索。目前最先进的LLM在该基准上表现出较低的准确性和校准度，这突显了当前LLM能力与人类专家水平之间的显著差距。
build_method: 专家构建
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE) is a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate large language models’ (LLM) capabilities at the frontier of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 questions across dozens of subjects such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences, developed by global domain experts. HLE’s questions are uniquely designed with clear, verifiable known answers that cannot be quickly retrieved from the internet. State-of-the-art LLMs currently show low accuracy and calibration on this benchmark, highlighting a significant gap between their abilities and human expert levels.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 2,500 frontier questions across math, humanities, and sciences from global subject experts"] --> B["Ensure questions have unambiguous verifiable answers not quickly retrievable via internet"]
    B["Ensure questions have unambiguous verifiable answers not quickly retrievable via internet"] --> C["Format questions as multi-modal text-only or image-accompanied multiple-choice or exact-match items"]
    C["Format questions as multi-modal text-only or image-accompanied multiple-choice or exact-match items"] --> D["Conduct initial feedback round with multiple graduate-level reviewers for each submission"]
    D["Conduct initial feedback round with multiple graduate-level reviewers for each submission"] --> E["Obtain organizer and expert reviewer approval ensuring quality and adherence to criteria"]
    E["Obtain organizer and expert reviewer approval ensuring quality and adherence to criteria"] --> F["Release benchmark and conduct public review period to collect community feedback"]
    F["Release benchmark and conduct public review period to collect community feedback"] --> G["Correct points of concern in dataset based on community input"]
    G["Correct points of concern in dataset based on community input"] --> H["Evaluate LLMs using automated answer verification on multiple-choice and exact-match questions"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从全球学科专家收集2500道数学、人文和科学前沿问题"] --> B["确保问题答案明确可验证且无法快速网络检索"]
    B["确保问题答案明确可验证且无法快速网络检索"] --> C["将问题格式化为纯文本或含图像的选择题或精确匹配题"]
    C["将问题格式化为纯文本或含图像的选择题或精确匹配题"] --> D["由多名研究生级审稿人对每份提交进行初步反馈"]
    D["由多名研究生级审稿人对每份提交进行初步反馈"] --> E["获得组织者和专家审稿人批准以确保质量和标准符合"]
    E["获得组织者和专家审稿人批准以确保质量和标准符合"] --> F["发布基准并进行公开审查期以收集社区反馈"]
    F["发布基准并进行公开审查期以收集社区反馈"] --> G["根据社区意见修正数据集中的问题点"]
    G["根据社区意见修正数据集中的问题点"] --> H["使用自动答案验证评估大模型的选择题和精确匹配题表现"]

name: IFBench
intro: IFBench评估语言模型遵循精确指令的泛化能力，特别是面对陌生输出约束。包含58个新颖且难度较高的可验证域外约束，并提出基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法提升指令执行。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
scale: 58个约束，约300个单轮提示，约1300个多轮样本
intro_en: IFBench evaluates language models' ability to generalize in following precise instructions, especially when facing unfamiliar output constraints. It includes 58 novel and challenging verifiable out-of-domain constraints and proposes a reinforcement learning method based on verifiable rewards to improve instruction execution.
scale_en: 58 items constraints, about 300 items single-turn prompts, about 1300 items multi-turn samples
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Manually curate 58 new verifiable constraint templates from user feedback and manual writing"] --> B["Instantiate constraints and combine with held-out WildChat prompts to create 300 test instances"]
    B["Instantiate constraints and combine with held-out WildChat prompts to create 300 test instances"] --> C["Human annotators verify prompt-constraint compatibility for each instance"]
    C["Human annotators verify prompt-constraint compatibility for each instance"] --> D["Create 29 training constraints with verification functions as IFTrain"]
    D["Create 29 training constraints with verification functions as IFTrain"] --> E["Generate 60k-100k RLVR training prompts by appending IFTrain and IFEval constraints to Tülu-3-SFT instructions"]
    E["Generate 60k-100k RLVR training prompts by appending IFTrain and IFEval constraints to Tülu-3-SFT instructions"] --> F["Train policy with GRPO using verifiable rewards calculated from constraint verification functions"]
    F["Train policy with GRPO using verifiable rewards calculated from constraint verification functions"] --> G["Evaluate models on single-turn and multi-turn settings using prompt-level loose and strict accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从用户反馈和手动编写中策划58个新可验证约束模板"] --> B["实例化约束并与保留的WildChat提示组合生成300个测试实例"]
    B["实例化约束并与保留的WildChat提示组合生成300个测试实例"] --> C["人工标注员验证每个实例的提示与约束兼容性"]
    C["人工标注员验证每个实例的提示与约束兼容性"] --> D["创建29个带验证函数的训练约束作为IFTrain"]
    D["创建29个带验证函数的训练约束作为IFTrain"] --> E["将IFTrain和IFEval约束附加到Tülu-3-SFT指令生成6-10万RLVR训练提示"]
    E["将IFTrain和IFEval约束附加到Tülu-3-SFT指令生成6-10万RLVR训练提示"] --> F["使用约束验证函数计算的可验证奖励通过GRPO训练策略"]
    F["使用约束验证函数计算的可验证奖励通过GRPO训练策略"] --> G["在单轮和多轮设置中用提示级宽松和严格准确率评估模型"]

name: IFEval
intro: IFEval是一个评估大型语言模型遵循自然语言指令能力的基准，解决了人工评测成本高和自动评测偏差问题。包含约500个带有可验证指令（如字数或关键词要求）的提示，实现客观评估。
eval_feature: 可验证指令
intro_en: IFEval is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to follow natural language instructions, addressing high costs of human evaluation and biases in automatic evaluation. It includes about 500 prompts with verifiable instructions (e.g., word count or keyword requirements) to enable objective assessment.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Identify 25 types of verifiable instructions amenable to objective compliance verification"] --> B["Construct around 500 prompts embedding one or more verifiable instructions per prompt"]
    B["Construct around 500 prompts embedding one or more verifiable instructions per prompt"] --> C["Feed prompts with verifiable instructions to target large language models"]
    C["Feed prompts with verifiable instructions to target large language models"] --> D["Collect model responses to prompts containing verifiable instructions"]
    D["Collect model responses to prompts containing verifiable instructions"] --> E["Automatically verify each response against verifiable instruction criteria using deterministic rules"]
    E["Automatically verify each response against verifiable instruction criteria using deterministic rules"] --> F["Calculate instruction-following compliance metrics across all prompts and instruction types"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["识别25类可客观验证合规性的可验证指令"] --> B["构建约500个提示词，每个包含一个或多个可验证指令"]
    B["构建约500个提示词，每个包含一个或多个可验证指令"] --> C["将含可验证指令的提示词输入目标大语言模型"]
    C["将含可验证指令的提示词输入目标大语言模型"] --> D["收集模型对含可验证指令提示词的响应"]
    D["收集模型对含可验证指令提示词的响应"] --> E["用确定性规则自动验证响应是否符合可验证指令标准"]
    E["用确定性规则自动验证响应是否符合可验证指令标准"] --> F["计算所有提示词和指令类型的指令遵循合规率指标"]

name: IMO-Bench
intro: IMO-AnswerBench是一个高级数学推理基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在国际数学奥林匹克竞赛级别问题上的表现。它包含400个多样化的奥林匹克问题，这些问题具有可验证的简短答案。该基准测试在推动模型数学推理能力方面发挥了关键作用。
build_method: 专家构建
eval_feature: 过程评估
intro_en: IMO-AnswerBench is an advanced mathematical reasoning benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on International Mathematical Olympiad-level problems. It contains 400 diverse Olympiad questions with verifiable short answers. This benchmark plays a key role in advancing models' mathematical reasoning abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Handpick 400 Olympiad problems across four categories and four difficulty levels with verifiable short answers"] --> B["Reformulate problems to ensure clear and nontrivial short answers for proof-heavy Olympiad problems"]
    B["Reformulate problems to ensure clear and nontrivial short answers for proof-heavy Olympiad problems"] --> C["Robustify problems via paraphrasing, renaming objects, modifying values, or adding distractors to avoid memorization"]
    C["Robustify problems via paraphrasing, renaming objects, modifying values, or adding distractors to avoid memorization"] --> D["Vet all problems through a panel of IMO medalists and mathematicians"]
    D["Vet all problems through a panel of IMO medalists and mathematicians"] --> E["Build AnswerAutoGrader by prompting Gemini 2.5 Pro to extract and verify answers against ground truths"]
    E["Build AnswerAutoGrader by prompting Gemini 2.5 Pro to extract and verify answers against ground truths"] --> F["Curate 60 proof problems split into basic and advanced sets, including 18 novel problems by IMO medalists"]
    F["Curate 60 proof problems split into basic and advanced sets, including 18 novel problems by IMO medalists"] --> G["Design grading guideline with four ratings; allow human experts to assign integer scores from 0 to 7"]
    G["Design grading guideline with four ratings; allow human experts to assign integer scores from 0 to 7"] --> H["Build ProofAutoGrader using Gemini 2.5 Pro with problem, solution, reference, and grading guidelines as input"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从四类四难度级别中精选400道有可验证短答案的奥赛题"] --> B["重新表述证明型问题以确保清晰且非平凡的短答案"]
    B["重新表述证明型问题以确保清晰且非平凡的短答案"] --> C["通过改写、重命名对象、修改数值或添加干扰项来强化问题"]
    C["通过改写、重命名对象、修改数值或添加干扰项来强化问题"] --> D["由IMO奖牌得主和数学家组成的专家组审核所有问题"]
    D["由IMO奖牌得主和数学家组成的专家组审核所有问题"] --> E["用Gemini 2.5 Pro构建答案自动评分器以提取和验证答案"]
    E["用Gemini 2.5 Pro构建答案自动评分器以提取和验证答案"] --> F["策划60道证明题分为基础和高级集，含18道IMO专家原创题"]
    F["策划60道证明题分为基础和高级集，含18道IMO专家原创题"] --> G["设计四级评分指南，允许专家评分员给出0到7的整数分"]
    G["设计四级评分指南，允许专家评分员给出0到7的整数分"] --> H["用Gemini 2.5 Pro构建证明自动评分器，输入题目、解答、参考和评分指南"]

name: INCLUDE
intro: Include是一个综合性的、以知识和推理为中心的基准测试，旨在评估多语言大型语言模型在不同区域和文化背景下的表现。该基准测试包含197,243个问答对，来源于44种书面语言的本地考试资源，以解决现有评估资源不足和翻译偏差的问题。它通过收集特定国家的教育、专业和职业执照考试，确保了对区域知识和文化细微差别的准确反映，从而促进了多语言LLM在实际语言环境中的有效部署。
org: EPFL, Cohere For AI, Cohere For AI Community, ETH Zurich, Swiss AI Initiative
eval_feature: 防污染, 零样本
intro_en: Include is a comprehensive, knowledge- and reasoning-centered benchmark designed to evaluate multilingual large language models across different regions and cultural contexts. It contains 197,243 QA pairs sourced from native exam materials in 44 written languages, addressing the limitations of existing evaluation resources and translation biases. By collecting education, professional, and licensing exams specific to each country, it ensures accurate representation of regional knowledge and cultural nuances, promoting effective deployment of multilingual LLMs in real-world language settings.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect multiple-choice exams from local academic, professional, and regional license sources with native speakers"] --> B["Extract questions, options, and answers from diverse formats using automated pipelines"]
    B["Extract questions, options, and answers from diverse formats using automated pipelines"] --> C["Native speakers verify extraction accuracy and manually correct parsing errors using source documents"]
    C["Native speakers verify extraction accuracy and manually correct parsing errors using source documents"] --> D["Filter out samples referencing images or tables; ensure context-dependent questions include reference text"]
    D["Filter out samples referencing images or tables; ensure context-dependent questions include reference text"] --> E["Annotate each question with language, topic, academic level, and country metadata"]
    E["Annotate each question with language, topic, academic level, and country metadata"] --> F["Consolidate existing multilingual datasets to expand domain and language coverage"]
    F["Consolidate existing multilingual datasets to expand domain and language coverage"] --> G["Manually categorize exam sources by academic domain using two-level taxonomy"]
    G["Manually categorize exam sources by academic domain using two-level taxonomy"] --> H["Label exam sources for regionality: region-agnostic, explicitly regional, or cultural knowledge"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["与母语者合作收集本地学术、专业和地区执照考试"] --> B["用自动化流程从多种格式中提取问题、选项和答案"]
    B["用自动化流程从多种格式中提取问题、选项和答案"] --> C["母语者验证提取准确性并根据原文档手动纠正错误"]
    C["母语者验证提取准确性并根据原文档手动纠正错误"] --> D["过滤涉及图像或表格的样本并确保上下文题包含参考文本"]
    D["过滤涉及图像或表格的样本并确保上下文题包含参考文本"] --> E["为每个问题标注语言、主题、学术级别和国家元数据"]
    E["为每个问题标注语言、主题、学术级别和国家元数据"] --> F["整合现有多语言数据集以扩展领域和语言覆盖"]
    F["整合现有多语言数据集以扩展领域和语言覆盖"] --> G["用两级分类法按学术领域手动分类考试来源"]
    G["用两级分类法按学术领域手动分类考试来源"] --> H["为考试来源标注区域性：区域无关、明确区域或文化知识"]

name: InfiniteBench
intro: InfiniteBench是首个平均数据长度超过10万标记的大语言模型（LLM）基准。它涵盖了合成与真实世界的任务，涉及多个领域，并同时支持英文和中文。该基准测试中的任务旨在要求模型对上下文中的长距离依赖关系有深入的理解，仅仅从上下文中检索有限的段落不足以完成这些任务。
build_method: 混合, 自动生成, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 代码生成, 数学问题, 文本摘要
eval_feature: 长文本, 双语
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Code Generation, Math Problems, Text Summarization
intro_en: InfiniteBench is the first large language model (LLM) benchmark with an average data length exceeding 100,000 tokens. It covers both synthetic and real-world tasks across multiple domains and supports both English and Chinese. The tasks in this benchmark require models to deeply understand long-range dependencies in the context; retrieving only limited paragraphs from the context is insufficient to complete these tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source novels from websites and manually filter for quality"] --> B["Replace key entities like character names to create fake novels"]
    B["Replace key entities like character names to create fake novels"] --> C["Design summarization, QA, and multiple-choice tasks using modified novels"]
    C["Design summarization, QA, and multiple-choice tasks using modified novels"] --> D["Source gold summaries from web and filter non-summarization content"]
    D["Source gold summaries from web and filter non-summarization content"] --> E["Annotate QA requiring aggregation or filtering reasoning across novel"]
    E["Annotate QA requiring aggregation or filtering reasoning across novel"] --> F["Auto-generate synthetic retrieval, code, and math tasks"]
    F["Auto-generate synthetic retrieval, code, and math tasks"] --> G["Evaluate models on 12 tasks using ROUGE-L-Sum and task-specific metrics"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从网站获取小说并人工筛选质量"] --> B["替换角色名等关键实体创建虚构小说"]
    B["替换角色名等关键实体创建虚构小说"] --> C["用修改后小说设计摘要、问答和选择题任务"]
    C["用修改后小说设计摘要、问答和选择题任务"] --> D["从网络获取标准摘要并过滤非摘要内容"]
    D["从网络获取标准摘要并过滤非摘要内容"] --> E["标注需要聚合或筛选推理的问答题"]
    E["标注需要聚合或筛选推理的问答题"] --> F["自动生成合成检索、代码和数学任务"]
    F["自动生成合成检索、代码和数学任务"] --> G["用ROUGE-L-Sum等指标评估12项任务"]

name: InfoVQA
intro: InfographicVQA是一个用于信息图表视觉问答的新数据集。它包含多样化的信息图表、自然语言问题和答案标注。该数据集旨在评估模型对文档布局、文本内容、图形元素和数据可视化进行联合推理的能力，并侧重于需要基本推理和算术技能的问题。
eval_feature: 无
intro_en: InfographicVQA is a new dataset for visual question answering on infographics. It includes diverse infographics, natural language questions, and annotated answers. The dataset aims to evaluate models' ability to jointly reason over document layout, textual content, graphical elements, and data visualization, focusing on questions requiring basic reasoning and arithmetic skills.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Download infographic images from the Internet using the search query 'infographics'"] --> B["Clean downloaded images by removing duplicates before adding to annotation tool"]
    B["Clean downloaded images by removing duplicates before adding to annotation tool"] --> C["Annotators add question-answer pairs requiring reasoning over layout, text, graphics, and visualizations"]
    C["Annotators add question-answer pairs requiring reasoning over layout, text, graphics, and visualizations"] --> D["Curate questions emphasizing elementary reasoning and basic arithmetic operations like counting and sorting"]
    D["Curate questions emphasizing elementary reasoning and basic arithmetic operations like counting and sorting"] --> E["Collect additional answer for each question to make evaluation more robust"]
    E["Collect additional answer for each question to make evaluation more robust"] --> F["Adapt M4C multimodal Transformer model for scene text VQA on the dataset"]
    F["Adapt M4C multimodal Transformer model for scene text VQA on the dataset"] --> G["Adapt LayoutLM layout-aware BERT-style extractive QA model for VQA evaluation"]
    G["Adapt LayoutLM layout-aware BERT-style extractive QA model for VQA evaluation"] --> H["Evaluate baseline models and compare performance to near perfect human performance"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用\"信息图表\"搜索词从互联网下载信息图表图像"] --> B["清理下载图像去除重复项后添加到标注工具"]
    B["清理下载图像去除重复项后添加到标注工具"] --> C["标注员添加需推理布局文本图形和可视化的问答对"]
    C["标注员添加需推理布局文本图形和可视化的问答对"] --> D["策划强调基本推理和计数排序等算术运算的问题"]
    D["策划强调基本推理和计数排序等算术运算的问题"] --> E["为每个问题收集额外答案以增强评估鲁棒性"]
    E["为每个问题收集额外答案以增强评估鲁棒性"] --> F["改编M4C多模态Transformer模型用于场景文本问答"]
    F["改编M4C多模态Transformer模型用于场景文本问答"] --> G["改编LayoutLM布局感知BERT式抽取问答模型评估"]
    G["改编LayoutLM布局感知BERT式抽取问答模型评估"] --> H["评估基线模型并与近乎完美的人类表现比较"]

name: InteractiveBench
intro: InteractiveBench 是一个统一的交互式评测框架，在预算约束下评估模型主动获取信息并逐步推理的能力，覆盖交互式证明与交互式博弈两类场景。
build_method: 预算约束交互评测框架, 交互式证明, 交互式博弈
task_type: 交互式证明, 交互式博弈
eval_feature: 主动信息获取, 预算约束, 策略性推理
scale: 46个Situation Puzzle实例 + 数学与博弈环境
intro_en: InteractiveBench is a unified framework for evaluating active information acquisition and reasoning under interaction budgets.
build_method_en: Budget-constrained interactive evaluation framework, Interactive Proofs, Interactive Games
eval_feature_en: Active Information Acquisition, Budget Constraints, Strategic Reasoning
scale_en: 46 Situation Puzzle instances plus math and game environments
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define hidden ground truth held by Judge in logic or mathematics domain"] --> B["Position evaluated model as Player with budget-limited access to Judge"]
    B["Position evaluated model as Player with budget-limited access to Judge"] --> C["Player queries Judge to validate intermediate steps or deduce hidden constraints"]
    C["Player queries Judge to validate intermediate steps or deduce hidden constraints"] --> D["Judge provides binary feedback to help Player converge on objective truth"]
    D["Judge provides binary feedback to help Player converge on objective truth"] --> E["Measure Player's ability to minimize uncertainty under interaction budget"]
    E["Measure Player's ability to minimize uncertainty under interaction budget"] --> F["In game settings, evaluate Player's strategic reasoning to maximize long-term utility"]
    F["In game settings, evaluate Player's strategic reasoning to maximize long-term utility"] --> G["Assess model intelligence through active information acquisition and reasoning efficiency"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义评判者在逻辑或数学领域持有的隐藏真值"] --> B["将待评估模型定位为预算受限的玩家"]
    B["将待评估模型定位为预算受限的玩家"] --> C["玩家向评判者查询以验证中间步骤或推断隐藏约束"]
    C["玩家向评判者查询以验证中间步骤或推断隐藏约束"] --> D["评判者提供二元反馈帮助玩家收敛到客观真相"]
    D["评判者提供二元反馈帮助玩家收敛到客观真相"] --> E["测量玩家在交互预算下最小化不确定性的能力"]
    E["测量玩家在交互预算下最小化不确定性的能力"] --> F["在博弈场景中评估玩家最大化长期效用的策略推理"]
    F["在博弈场景中评估玩家最大化长期效用的策略推理"] --> G["通过主动信息获取和推理效率评估模型智能"]

name: Inverse IFEval
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理与训练范式冲突的指令时表现出认知惯性。Inverse IFEval基准旨在评估LLMs克服训练偏见并遵循对抗性指令的能力。该基准包含八种挑战类型，涵盖23个领域，通过人机协作流程构建了1012个高质量的中英文问题，并采用LLM-as-a-Judge框架进行评估。
org: ByteDance Seed, Nanjing University, Peking University, Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunica
eval_feature: 对抗性, 思维链
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit cognitive inertia when handling instructions that conflict with their training paradigms. The Inverse IFEval benchmark aims to assess LLMs' ability to overcome training biases and follow adversarial instructions. It includes eight challenge types across 23 domains, featuring 1,012 high-quality Chinese and English questions created through a human-AI collaborative process, and is evaluated using the LLM-as-a-Judge framework.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Analyze SFT datasets and invert canonical response paradigms into eight counterintuitive instruction types"] --> B["Domain experts manually craft seed questions for each counterintuitive type with cross-functional review"]
    B["Domain experts manually craft seed questions for each counterintuitive type with cross-functional review"] --> C["Design prompt engineering templates for each instruction type across predefined disciplinary taxonomy"]
    C["Design prompt engineering templates for each instruction type across predefined disciplinary taxonomy"] --> D["Generate large-scale questions using leading LLMs across 23 domains with 20 candidates per combination"]
    D["Generate large-scale questions using leading LLMs across 23 domains with 20 candidates per combination"] --> E["Apply automatic filtering for length constraints and semantic similarity detection"]
    E["Apply automatic filtering for length constraints and semantic similarity detection"] --> F["Experts review for type consistency, instruction clarity, and eliminate ambiguities"]
    F["Experts review for type consistency, instruction clarity, and eliminate ambiguities"] --> G["Perform Chinese-English translation and annotate with metadata including type and domain labels"]
    G["Perform Chinese-English translation and annotate with metadata including type and domain labels"] --> H["Evaluate model responses using optimized LLM-as-a-Judge framework with standardized rubrics"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["分析SFT数据集并将标准范式反转为八种反直觉指令类型"] --> B["领域专家为每种类型手工编写种子问题并跨职能审核"]
    B["领域专家为每种类型手工编写种子问题并跨职能审核"] --> C["为每种指令类型设计提示工程模板覆盖预定义学科分类"]
    C["为每种指令类型设计提示工程模板覆盖预定义学科分类"] --> D["用领先LLM在23个领域生成大规模问题每组合20个候选"]
    D["用领先LLM在23个领域生成大规模问题每组合20个候选"] --> E["应用自动过滤进行长度约束和语义相似度检测"]
    E["应用自动过滤进行长度约束和语义相似度检测"] --> F["专家审核类型一致性指令清晰度并消除歧义"]
    F["专家审核类型一致性指令清晰度并消除歧义"] --> G["执行中英翻译并标注元数据包括类型和领域标签"]
    G["执行中英翻译并标注元数据包括类型和领域标签"] --> H["用优化的LLM评判框架和标准化规则评估模型响应"]

name: JailBench
intro: JailBench是首个针对中文环境设计的LLM深层安全漏洞评测基准，采用细化的分层安全分类体系和创新的自动越狱提示工程框架（AJPE）构建。该基准面向《网络安全技术 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求》的训练数据及生成内容的主要安全风险标准分类设计，是目前公开发布的题库规模最大、越狱攻击手段覆盖最为广泛的中文评测数据集。
build_method: 网络资源搜集, 人工整理编写, 大模型辅助生成
eval_feature: 对抗性, 领域特定
build_method_en: Web Resource Collection, Manual Curation and Writing, Large Model Assisted Generation
intro_en: JailBench is the first LLM deep security vulnerability benchmark designed for the Chinese environment. It is built using a refined hierarchical security classification system and an innovative Automatic Jailbreak Prompt Engineering framework (AJPE). This benchmark is designed based on the main security risk classification standards for training data and generated content outlined in the "Cybersecurity Technology Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services." It is currently the largest publicly released Chinese evaluation dataset in terms of question bank size and the most comprehensive in coverage of jailbreak attack methods.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Develop two-level hierarchical taxonomy with 5 domains and 40 categories from Chinese AI security standards"] --> B["Aggregate harmful queries from public datasets, translate to Chinese, and manually correct"]
    B["Aggregate harmful queries from public datasets, translate to Chinese, and manually correct"] --> C["Map labeled data to taxonomy categories and use ChatGPT to categorize unlabeled data"]
    C["Map labeled data to taxonomy categories and use ChatGPT to categorize unlabeled data"] --> D["Generate additional unsafe questions via ChatGPT few-shot learning for underrepresented categories"]
    D["Generate additional unsafe questions via ChatGPT few-shot learning for underrepresented categories"] --> E["Apply AJPE framework with jailbreak techniques to enhance prompt harmfulness and bypass safeguards"]
    E["Apply AJPE framework with jailbreak techniques to enhance prompt harmfulness and bypass safeguards"] --> F["Evaluate 13 mainstream LLMs using Attack Success Rate as effectiveness metric"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["基于中国AI安全标准制定5域40类的两级分层安全分类体系"] --> B["从公开数据集收集有害查询并翻译为中文后人工校正"]
    B["从公开数据集收集有害查询并翻译为中文后人工校正"] --> C["将已标注数据映射到分类体系并用ChatGPT对未标注数据分类"]
    C["将已标注数据映射到分类体系并用ChatGPT对未标注数据分类"] --> D["通过ChatGPT少样本学习为数据稀缺类别生成额外不安全问题"]
    D["通过ChatGPT少样本学习为数据稀缺类别生成额外不安全问题"] --> E["应用AJPE框架和越狱技术增强提示有害性并绕过安全防护"]
    E["应用AJPE框架和越狱技术增强提示有害性并绕过安全防护"] --> F["用攻击成功率作为有效性指标评估13个主流大语言模型"]

name: JailJudge
intro: JailJudge是一个用于全面评估大型语言模型（LLM）抵御越狱攻击能力的基准。它包含了合成、对抗性、真实世界和多语言等多种风险场景，并配备了高质量的人工标注数据集。该基准还引入了一个多智能体框架，以提供可解释的细粒度评分，并推出了一个端到端的评判模型JAILJUDGE Guard。
org: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
metric: Accuracy, Attack Success Rate (ASR), F1 Score
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
eval_feature: 对抗性, 多轮
intro_en: JailJudge is a benchmark for comprehensively evaluating large language models' (LLM) resistance to jailbreak attacks. It includes various risk scenarios such as synthetic, adversarial, real-world, and multilingual, accompanied by a high-quality human-annotated dataset. The benchmark also introduces a multi-agent framework for interpretable fine-grained scoring and launches an end-to-end evaluation model, JAILJUDGE Guard.
metric_en: Accuracy, Attack Success Rate (ASR), F1 Score
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect prompts from six sources: vanilla, synthetic, adversarial, multilingual, in-the-wild, and deceptive harmful scenarios"] --> B["Generate diverse target response pairs from different LLMs for each collected prompt"]
    B["Generate diverse target response pairs from different LLMs for each collected prompt"] --> C["Apply multi-agent framework to produce reasoning explanations and fine-grained jailbreak scores from 1 to 10"]
    C["Apply multi-agent framework to produce reasoning explanations and fine-grained jailbreak scores from 1 to 10"] --> D["Construct 35k+ instruction-tuning training data with reasoning explainability from multi-agent outputs"]
    D["Construct 35k+ instruction-tuning training data with reasoning explainability from multi-agent outputs"] --> E["Create human-annotated test sets: 4.5k+ broad risk scenarios and 6k+ multilingual scenarios in ten languages"]
    E["Create human-annotated test sets: 4.5k+ broad risk scenarios and 6k+ multilingual scenarios in ten languages"] --> F["Instruction-tune JAILJUDGE Guard model on training data to provide explainability and fine-grained evaluations"]
    F["Instruction-tune JAILJUDGE Guard model on training data to provide explainability and fine-grained evaluations"] --> G["Evaluate judge methods on test sets using threshold-based judgment and compare with baseline approaches"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从六个来源收集提示词：原始、合成、对抗、多语言、真实和欺骗性有害场景"] --> B["为每个提示词从不同大模型生成多样化的目标响应对"]
    B["为每个提示词从不同大模型生成多样化的目标响应对"] --> C["应用多智能体框架生成推理解释和1到10的细粒度越狱评分"]
    C["应用多智能体框架生成推理解释和1到10的细粒度越狱评分"] --> D["从多智能体输出构建35k+条带推理解释的指令调优训练数据"]
    D["从多智能体输出构建35k+条带推理解释的指令调优训练数据"] --> E["创建人工标注测试集：4.5k+广泛风险场景和6k+十种语言多语言场景"]
    E["创建人工标注测试集：4.5k+广泛风险场景和6k+十种语言多语言场景"] --> F["在训练数据上指令调优JAILJUDGE Guard模型以提供可解释性和细粒度评估"]
    F["在训练数据上指令调优JAILJUDGE Guard模型以提供可解释性和细粒度评估"] --> G["在测试集上使用阈值判断评估评判方法并与基线方法比较"]

name: K-QA
intro: K-QA是一个真实世界的医疗问答基准，旨在解决大型语言模型在临床环境中提供准确回复的关键挑战。该数据集包含1,212个源自K Health（一个AI驱动的临床平台）真实对话的患者问题。通过内部医生团队对问题进行回答和手动分解，并提出了两种基于NLI的评估指标：全面性和幻觉率，用于评估生成答案的准确性。K-QA可用于促进医学NLP应用的研究。
intro_en: K-QA is a real-world medical question answering benchmark designed to address the key challenge of providing accurate responses by large language models in clinical settings. The dataset contains 1,212 patient questions sourced from real conversations on K Health, an AI-driven clinical platform. An internal team of physicians answered and manually decomposed the questions, and two NLI-based evaluation metrics—comprehensiveness and hallucination rate—were proposed to assess the accuracy of generated answers. K-QA can be used to advance research in medical NLP applications.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract questions from deidentified K Health conversations using BERT classifier and regex filters"] --> B["Medical professionals manually assess 26K candidates to identify 1,212 stand-alone medical questions"]
    B["Medical professionals manually assess 26K candidates to identify 1,212 stand-alone medical questions"] --> C["Twelve in-house physicians answer 201 questions consulting UpToDate and PubMed without using LLMs"]
    C["Twelve in-house physicians answer 201 questions consulting UpToDate and PubMed without using LLMs"] --> D["Overseeing physician reviews all answers and tests for inter-annotator agreement"]
    D["Overseeing physician reviews all answers and tests for inter-annotator agreement"] --> E["Doctors decompose each answer into minimal semantic content units averaging eight statements per answer"]
    E["Doctors decompose each answer into minimal semantic content units averaging eight statements per answer"] --> F["Annotators manually label each statement as Must Have or Nice to Have importance level"]
    F["Annotators manually label each statement as Must Have or Nice to Have importance level"] --> G["Apply NLI-based metrics to measure comprehensiveness and hallucination rate of generated answers"]
    G["Apply NLI-based metrics to measure comprehensiveness and hallucination rate of generated answers"] --> H["Evaluate state-of-the-art models with in-context learning and medically-oriented augmented retrieval schemes"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用BERT分类器和正则表达式从K Health对话中提取问题"] --> B["医学专业人员手动评估26K候选问题筛选出1212个独立医疗问题"]
    B["医学专业人员手动评估26K候选问题筛选出1212个独立医疗问题"] --> C["12名内部医生参考UpToDate和PubMed回答201个问题不使用LLM"]
    C["12名内部医生参考UpToDate和PubMed回答201个问题不使用LLM"] --> D["监督医生审查所有答案并测试标注者间一致性"]
    D["监督医生审查所有答案并测试标注者间一致性"] --> E["医生将每个答案分解为最小语义单元平均每答案8个陈述"]
    E["医生将每个答案分解为最小语义单元平均每答案8个陈述"] --> F["标注者手动将每个陈述标记为必需或补充重要性级别"]
    F["标注者手动将每个陈述标记为必需或补充重要性级别"] --> G["应用基于NLI的指标测量生成答案的全面性和幻觉率"]
    G["应用基于NLI的指标测量生成答案的全面性和幻觉率"] --> H["用上下文学习和医学增强检索方案评估最先进模型"]

name: KORBench
intro: KOR-Bench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在知识正交推理任务上表现的基准测试。它通过最小化对领域特定知识的依赖，更准确地评估模型在分布外设置中的推理能力。该基准测试包含操作、逻辑、密码、谜题和反事实五种任务类别，强调模型应用新规则描述来解决新规则驱动问题的有效性。KOR-Bench旨在增强推理评估并支持该领域的进一步研究。
org: Multimodal Art Projection Research Community, ByteDance.Inc, 01.AI, 2077.AI, Tongji University, Écol
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 防污染, 零样本
intro_en: KOR-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' performance on knowledge-orthogonal reasoning tasks. By minimizing reliance on domain-specific knowledge, it more accurately assesses models' reasoning abilities in out-of-distribution settings. The benchmark includes five task categories: operations, logic, cryptography, puzzles, and counterfactuals, emphasizing the models' effectiveness in applying new rule descriptions to solve rule-driven problems. KOR-Bench aims to enhance reasoning evaluation and support further research in this field.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Design five task categories minimizing domain knowledge: Operation, Logic, Cipher, Puzzle, Counterfactual"] --> B["Construct tasks pairing new rule descriptions with novel rule-driven questions"]
    B["Construct tasks pairing new rule descriptions with novel rule-driven questions"] --> C["Evaluate models on zero-shot and three-shot settings with only questions"]
    C["Evaluate models on zero-shot and three-shot settings with only questions"] --> D["Apply Stepwise Prompting with two rounds of Self-Correction on Cipher tasks"]
    D["Apply Stepwise Prompting with two rounds of Self-Correction on Cipher tasks"] --> E["Test performance across three integrated tasks and explore Tricks impact on Puzzle"]
    E["Test performance across three integrated tasks and explore Tricks impact on Puzzle"] --> F["Visualize rule-focused attention patterns in model responses"]
    F["Visualize rule-focused attention patterns in model responses"] --> G["Conduct ablation studies on dataset size and benchmark correlations"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["设计五类最小化领域知识的任务:操作、逻辑、密码、谜题、反事实"] --> B["构建新规则描述与新规则驱动问题配对的任务"]
    B["构建新规则描述与新规则驱动问题配对的任务"] --> C["在零样本和三样本仅问题设置下评估模型"]
    C["在零样本和三样本仅问题设置下评估模型"] --> D["在密码任务上应用两轮自我纠正的逐步提示"]
    D["在密码任务上应用两轮自我纠正的逐步提示"] --> E["测试三个集成任务的性能并探索技巧对谜题的影响"]
    E["测试三个集成任务的性能并探索技巧对谜题的影响"] --> F["可视化模型响应中的规则聚焦注意力模式"]
    F["可视化模型响应中的规则聚焦注意力模式"] --> G["对数据集规模和基准相关性进行消融研究"]

name: L-V-Eval
intro: L-V-Eval是一个具有五个长度等级（16k至256k词）的长上下文基准。包含单跳和多跳问答两大任务，涉及11个双语数据集。通过插入混淆事实和关键词替换等技术，更客观地评估大型语言模型的长上下文处理能力。
org: Infinigence AI, Tsinghua University, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Jiao Tong Univers
eval_feature: 长文本, Multi-hop
intro_en: L-V-Eval is a long-context benchmark with five length levels (16k to 256k tokens). It includes single-hop and multi-hop QA tasks across 11 bilingual datasets. Techniques like inserting distracting facts and keyword replacement are used to more objectively evaluate large language models' long-context processing abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select QA pairs from public datasets or write manually for factrecall tasks"] --> B["Mix supporting documents with distracting documents to create five length-level contexts per QA pair"]
    B["Mix supporting documents with distracting documents to create five length-level contexts per QA pair"] --> C["Prompt GPT-4 to generate confusing facts close to original facts"]
    C["Prompt GPT-4 to generate confusing facts close to original facts"] --> D["Human annotators resolve conflicts in generated confusing facts and insert them randomly"]
    D["Human annotators resolve conflicts in generated confusing facts and insert them randomly"] --> E["Apply keyword and phrase replacement to mitigate knowledge leakage"]
    E["Apply keyword and phrase replacement to mitigate knowledge leakage"] --> F["Human annotators mark answer keywords and create non-informative word blacklist"]
    F["Human annotators mark answer keywords and create non-informative word blacklist"] --> G["Evaluate LLMs using two-stage metric focusing on answer keywords"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从公开数据集选择问答对或为事实召回任务手动编写"] --> B["将支撑文档与干扰文档混合生成五个长度级别的上下文"]
    B["将支撑文档与干扰文档混合生成五个长度级别的上下文"] --> C["提示GPT-4生成与原始事实相近的混淆事实"]
    C["提示GPT-4生成与原始事实相近的混淆事实"] --> D["人工标注员解决混淆事实冲突并随机插入上下文"]
    D["人工标注员解决混淆事实冲突并随机插入上下文"] --> E["应用关键词和短语替换以减轻知识泄漏"]
    E["应用关键词和短语替换以减轻知识泄漏"] --> F["人工标注员标记答案关键词并创建非信息词黑名单"]
    F["人工标注员标记答案关键词并创建非信息词黑名单"] --> G["使用关注答案关键词的两阶段指标评估大语言模型"]

name: LAB-Bench
intro: LAB-Bench是一个用于评估AI系统在生物学研究中实际能力的大型基准测试。它包含2400多个多项选择题，涵盖了文献回顾、图表解读、数据库访问和DNA/蛋白质序列操作等任务。该基准旨在评估语言模型在科学研究工作流中的表现，并作为开发自动化研究系统的有用工具。
build_method: 混合
intro_en: LAB-Bench is a large benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems' practical capabilities in biological research. It includes over 2,400 multiple-choice questions covering tasks such as literature review, chart interpretation, database access, and DNA/protein sequence manipulation. The benchmark aims to assess language models' performance in scientific research workflows and serves as a useful tool for developing automated research systems.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate prototype questions using models to identify reasoning capability null space"] --> B["Authors and contracted biology experts manually create LitQA2, SuppQA, FigQA, TableQA, ProtocolQA, and CloningScenarios questions"]
    B["Authors and contracted biology experts manually create LitQA2, SuppQA, FigQA, TableQA, ProtocolQA, and CloningScenarios questions"] --> C["Programmatically generate SeqQA and DbQA subtasks for scalable question creation"]
    C["Programmatically generate SeqQA and DbQA subtasks for scalable question creation"] --> D["Evaluate frontier models using 0-shot chain-of-thought prompting without tool augmentation"]
    D["Evaluate frontier models using 0-shot chain-of-thought prompting without tool augmentation"] --> E["Parse answers from text completions and allow models to decline answering"]
    E["Parse answers from text completions and allow models to decline answering"] --> F["Recruit PhD-level biology experts to answer questions using internet and research tools"]
    F["Recruit PhD-level biology experts to answer questions using internet and research tools"] --> G["Calculate accuracy, precision, and coverage metrics for both models and human experts"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用模型生成原型问题以识别推理能力盲区"] --> B["作者和生物学专家手动创建文献、图表、方案和克隆场景问题"]
    B["作者和生物学专家手动创建文献、图表、方案和克隆场景问题"] --> C["程序化生成序列和数据库子任务以扩展问题规模"]
    C["程序化生成序列和数据库子任务以扩展问题规模"] --> D["用零样本思维链提示评估前沿模型且不使用工具"]
    D["用零样本思维链提示评估前沿模型且不使用工具"] --> E["从文本补全中解析答案并允许模型拒答"]
    E["从文本补全中解析答案并允许模型拒答"] --> F["招募博士级生物学专家用互联网和研究工具答题"]
    F["招募博士级生物学专家用互联网和研究工具答题"] --> G["计算模型和人类专家的准确率、精确率和覆盖率"]

name: LifeBench
intro: LifeBench 是一个面向长时程多源记忆的代理评测基准，要求模型在长期事件轨迹中综合陈述性与非陈述性记忆，并基于真实世界先验完成跨来源、跨时间的检索与推理。
build_method: 真实世界先验注入, 认知科学启发的长时程事件模拟, 部分层次事件组织
task_type: Agent任务, 长文本推理, 记忆检索
eval_feature: 长期记忆, 多源信息整合, 时序演化
scale: 2003个问题, 平均上下文深度3.66M tokens
intro_en: LifeBench evaluates long-horizon multi-source memory for agents by combining declarative and non-declarative memory reasoning over dense life-event simulations.
build_method_en: Real-world priors, cognitive-science-inspired long-horizon event simulation, partonomic event structuring
task_type_en: Agent Task, Long-context Reasoning, Memory Retrieval
eval_feature_en: Long-horizon Memory, Multi-source Integration, Temporal Evolution
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample persona attributes from anonymized surveys and PersonaHub, then LLM refines demographics and lifestyle"] --> B["Generate social networks and assign real urban anchor locations using map API"]
    B["Generate social networks and assign real urban anchor locations using map API"] --> C["LLM generates month-by-month thematic events guided by plot outline and holiday-integrated calendar"]
    C["LLM generates month-by-month thematic events guided by plot outline and holiday-integrated calendar"] --> D["Decompose thematic events into nested atomic events via partonomic hierarchy until sub-day granularity"]
    D["Decompose thematic events into nested atomic events via partonomic hierarchy until sub-day granularity"] --> E["Optimize atomic events in two-week windows using persona habits and non-declarative memory context"]
    E["Optimize atomic events in two-week windows using persona habits and non-declarative memory context"] --> F["Generate phone artifacts from events: chats, SMS, calendar, notes, health records, photos, push notifications"]
    F["Generate phone artifacts from events: chats, SMS, calendar, notes, health records, photos, push notifications"] --> G["Create QA pairs targeting declarative and non-declarative memory reasoning over fragmented multi-source artifacts"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从匿名调查和PersonaHub采样角色属性，LLM细化人口统计和生活方式"] --> B["生成社交网络并用地图API分配真实城市锚点位置"]
    B["生成社交网络并用地图API分配真实城市锚点位置"] --> C["LLM按月生成主题事件，由情节大纲和节假日日历引导"]
    C["LLM按月生成主题事件，由情节大纲和节假日日历引导"] --> D["通过部分层次将主题事件分解为嵌套原子事件至日内粒度"]
    D["通过部分层次将主题事件分解为嵌套原子事件至日内粒度"] --> E["在两周窗口内用角色习惯和非陈述性记忆优化原子事件"]
    E["在两周窗口内用角色习惯和非陈述性记忆优化原子事件"] --> F["从事件生成手机数据：聊天、短信、日历、笔记、健康记录、照片、推送"]
    F["从事件生成手机数据：聊天、短信、日历、笔记、健康记录、照片、推送"] --> G["创建针对碎片化多源数据的陈述性和非陈述性记忆推理问答对"]

name: LifelongAgentBench
intro: LifelongAgentBench是首个统一基准，系统评估大型语言模型智能体的终身学习能力。涵盖数据库、操作系统和知识图谱三大交互环境，支持自动标签验证、可复现性和模块化扩展。
org: South China University of Technology, MBZUAI, Chinese Academy of Sciences, East China Normal Univers
eval_feature: Lifelong-learning, Interdependent Tasks
scale: 22 SQL skills, 29 Bash skills, and SPARQL tasks
intro_en: LifelongAgentBench is the first unified benchmark that systematically evaluates the lifelong learning ability of large language model agents. It covers three interactive environments: databases, operating systems, and knowledge graphs, supporting automatic label verification, reproducibility, and modular extensibility.
scale_en: 22 SQL skills, 29 Bash skills, and SPARQL tasks
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Design skill-grounded, interdependent tasks across Database, Operating System, and Knowledge Graph environments"] --> B["Establish inter-task dependencies to enable knowledge transfer and catastrophic forgetting analysis"]
    B["Establish inter-task dependencies to enable knowledge transfer and catastrophic forgetting analysis"] --> C["Implement automatic label verification using SQL validation, OS state hashing, and SPARQL output checks"]
    C["Implement automatic label verification using SQL validation, OS state hashing, and SPARQL output checks"] --> D["Package environments in containerized infrastructure to ensure reproducibility and modular extensibility"]
    D["Package environments in containerized infrastructure to ensure reproducibility and modular extensibility"] --> E["Configure serial task execution with fixed order to preserve historical dependency retention"]
    E["Configure serial task execution with fixed order to preserve historical dependency retention"] --> F["Deploy benchmark supporting both single machine and distributed execution modes"]
    F["Deploy benchmark supporting both single machine and distributed execution modes"] --> G["Evaluate agents on atomic skill acquisition, cross-task transfer, and long-sequence performance stability"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["设计数据库、操作系统和知识图谱环境中基于技能的相互依赖任务"] --> B["建立任务间依赖关系以支持知识迁移和灾难性遗忘分析"]
    B["建立任务间依赖关系以支持知识迁移和灾难性遗忘分析"] --> C["通过SQL验证、操作系统状态哈希和SPARQL输出检查实现自动标签验证"]
    C["通过SQL验证、操作系统状态哈希和SPARQL输出检查实现自动标签验证"] --> D["将环境打包为容器化基础设施以确保可复现性和模块化扩展"]
    D["将环境打包为容器化基础设施以确保可复现性和模块化扩展"] --> E["配置固定顺序的串行任务执行以保留历史依赖关系"]
    E["配置固定顺序的串行任务执行以保留历史依赖关系"] --> F["部署支持单机和分布式执行模式的基准测试"]
    F["部署支持单机和分布式执行模式的基准测试"] --> G["评估智能体的原子技能获取、跨任务迁移和长序列性能稳定性"]

name: LingoQA
intro: LingoQA是一个针对自动驾驶领域视觉问答的新型数据集和基准。该数据集包含2.8万个独特的短视频场景和41.9万个标注。对最先进的视觉语言模型进行评估表明，它们的性能仍低于人类水平。LingoQA引入了一个名为Lingo-Judge的真实性分类器，其与人类评估的Spearman相关系数达到0.95，超越了现有技术。该基准旨在作为自动驾驶视觉语言模型的评估平台。
intro_en: LingoQA is a novel dataset and benchmark for visual question answering in the autonomous driving domain. It contains 28,000 unique short video scenes and 419,000 annotations. Evaluations of state-of-the-art vision-language models show their performance still lags behind human level. LingoQA introduces Lingo-Judge, a fidelity classifier with a Spearman correlation of 0.95 against human evaluations, surpassing existing methods. This benchmark aims to serve as an evaluation platform for autonomous driving vision-language models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 28k unique short video scenes from autonomous driving scenarios"] --> B["Generate 419.9k free-form QA pairs covering description, action, justification, and attention"]
    B["Generate 419.9k free-form QA pairs covering description, action, justification, and attention"] --> C["Curate 1,000 evaluation examples spanning reasoning areas like counting, localization, and anticipation"]
    C["Curate 1,000 evaluation examples spanning reasoning areas like counting, localization, and anticipation"] --> D["Collect human correctness ratings on evaluation examples for correlation analysis"]
    D["Collect human correctness ratings on evaluation examples for correlation analysis"] --> E["Train Lingo-Judge text classifier to predict answer truthfulness against ground truth"]
    E["Train Lingo-Judge text classifier to predict answer truthfulness against ground truth"] --> F["Validate Lingo-Judge achieves 0.950 Spearman correlation and 95% accuracy with human ratings"]
    F["Validate Lingo-Judge achieves 0.950 Spearman correlation and 95% accuracy with human ratings"] --> G["Evaluate vision-language models using Lingo-Judge on the 1,000-example test suite"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集2.8万个自动驾驶场景的短视频片段"] --> B["生成41.9万个涵盖描述、动作、理由和注意力的自由问答对"]
    B["生成41.9万个涵盖描述、动作、理由和注意力的自由问答对"] --> C["筛选1000个评估样本涵盖计数、定位和预测等推理领域"]
    C["筛选1000个评估样本涵盖计数、定位和预测等推理领域"] --> D["收集人类对评估样本的正确性评分用于相关性分析"]
    D["收集人类对评估样本的正确性评分用于相关性分析"] --> E["训练Lingo-Judge文本分类器预测答案相对真值的真实性"]
    E["训练Lingo-Judge文本分类器预测答案相对真值的真实性"] --> F["验证Lingo-Judge达到0.950斯皮尔曼相关性和95%准确率"]
    F["验证Lingo-Judge达到0.950斯皮尔曼相关性和95%准确率"] --> G["使用Lingo-Judge在1000样本测试集上评估视觉语言模型"]

name: LitBench
intro: LitBench 是首个面向创意写作验证的标准化基准与配套数据集，用于可靠评估 LLM 生成故事的质量偏好判断。它包含去偏的人类标注故事对测试集与大规模训练语料，可用于评测零样本评审模型和训练奖励模型。
build_method: Reddit写作样本收集, 人类偏好标注
task_type: 创意写作质量评估, 成对比较
eval_feature: 零样本LLM评审, 奖励模型训练, 在线人工研究
scale: 测试集2480对, 训练集43827对
intro_en: LitBench is the first standardized benchmark for creative writing verification, pairing a held-out human-labeled comparison test set with a large preference-training corpus.
build_method_en: Collected writing samples from Reddit's r/WritingPrompts and constructed pairwise comparisons with human preference labels
eval_feature_en: Zero-shot LLM Judges, Reward Model Training, Online Human Study
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect pairwise story samples from Reddit's r/WritingPrompts subreddit"] --> B["Gather human preference labels for 43,827 story pairs as training corpus"]
    B["Gather human preference labels for 43,827 story pairs as training corpus"] --> C["Curate held-out test set of 2,480 debiased human-labeled story comparisons"]
    C["Curate held-out test set of 2,480 debiased human-labeled story comparisons"] --> D["Benchmark zero-shot off-the-shelf LLM judges against human preferences on test set"]
    D["Benchmark zero-shot off-the-shelf LLM judges against human preferences on test set"] --> E["Train Bradley-Terry and generative reward models on the training corpus"]
    E["Train Bradley-Terry and generative reward models on the training corpus"] --> F["Evaluate trained reward models on test set for accuracy against human labels"]
    F["Evaluate trained reward models on test set for accuracy against human labels"] --> G["Conduct online human study validating reward model rankings on new LLM-generated stories"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从Reddit的r/WritingPrompts子版块收集成对故事样本"] --> B["为43827对故事收集人类偏好标注作为训练语料"]
    B["为43827对故事收集人类偏好标注作为训练语料"] --> C["构建2480对去偏的人类标注故事对比测试集"]
    C["构建2480对去偏的人类标注故事对比测试集"] --> D["在测试集上评测零样本现成LLM评审与人类偏好的一致性"]
    D["在测试集上评测零样本现成LLM评审与人类偏好的一致性"] --> E["在训练语料上训练Bradley-Terry和生成式奖励模型"]
    E["在训练语料上训练Bradley-Terry和生成式奖励模型"] --> F["在测试集上评估训练后奖励模型与人类标注的准确率"]
    F["在测试集上评估训练后奖励模型与人类标注的准确率"] --> G["开展在线人类研究验证奖励模型对新生成故事的排序"]

name: LiveBench
intro: LiveBench是一个为大型语言模型设计的基准测试，旨在抵抗测试集污染和評審偏見。它包含来自最新信息源并频繁更新的问题，能够自动评分，涵盖数学、编程、推理、语言理解、指令遵循和数据分析等多种具有挑战性的任务。
org: Abacus.AI, New York University, NVIDIA, University of Maryland, USC, Columbia University, xAI
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 代码生成, 补全
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 零样本
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Code Generation, Completion
build_method_en: Hybrid, Automated Generation, Web Crawling, Expert Curation
intro_en: LiveBench is a benchmark designed for large language models to resist test set contamination and reviewer bias. It includes frequently updated questions from the latest information sources, supports automatic scoring, and covers a range of challenging tasks such as mathematics, programming, reasoning, language understanding, instruction following, and data analysis.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source questions from recent math competitions, arXiv papers, news articles, and datasets"] --> B["Create harder versions of tasks from Big-Bench Hard, AMPS, and IFEval"]
    B["Create harder versions of tasks from Big-Bench Hard, AMPS, and IFEval"] --> C["Organize questions into six categories: math, coding, reasoning, language, instruction following, data analysis"]
    C["Organize questions into six categories: math, coding, reasoning, language, instruction following, data analysis"] --> D["Establish objective ground-truth values for automatic scoring without LLM judges"]
    D["Establish objective ground-truth values for automatic scoring without LLM judges"] --> E["Evaluate closed-source and open-source models ranging from 0.5B to 405B parameters"]
    E["Evaluate closed-source and open-source models ranging from 0.5B to 405B parameters"] --> F["Update questions monthly and release new tasks over time"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从近期数学竞赛、arXiv论文、新闻和数据集获取问题"] --> B["基于Big-Bench Hard、AMPS和IFEval创建更难版本"]
    B["基于Big-Bench Hard、AMPS和IFEval创建更难版本"] --> C["将问题分为数学、编程、推理、语言、指令遵循和数据分析六类"]
    C["将问题分为数学、编程、推理、语言、指令遵循和数据分析六类"] --> D["建立客观真值以实现自动评分而不使用LLM评判"]
    D["建立客观真值以实现自动评分而不使用LLM评判"] --> E["评估0.5B到405B参数的闭源和开源模型"]
    E["评估0.5B到405B参数的闭源和开源模型"] --> F["每月更新问题并持续发布新任务"]

name: LiveCodeBench
intro: LiveCodeBench是一个针对大型语言模型代码相关任务的基准，通过持续收集LeetCode、AtCoder和CodeForces等竞赛平台的新题目，避免训练数据污染。评测范围广泛，涵盖代码生成、自我修复、代码执行和测试输出预测等能力。
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 思维链
intro_en: LiveCodeBench is a benchmark for code-related tasks in large language models. It continuously collects new problems from competitive platforms like LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces to avoid training data contamination. The evaluation covers a wide range of abilities, including code generation, self-repair, code execution, and test output prediction.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape problems from LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces weekly contests with metadata"] --> B["Parse formulas and exclude problems with images or multiple valid answers"]
    B["Parse formulas and exclude problems with images or multiple valid answers"] --> C["Collect problem statement, test cases, ground truth solution, and contest date"]
    C["Collect problem statement, test cases, ground truth solution, and contest date"] --> D["Generate test inputs using GPT-4-Turbo generators when platform tests unavailable"]
    D["Generate test inputs using GPT-4-Turbo generators when platform tests unavailable"] --> E["Tag problems with difficulty labels and apply platform-specific rating filters"]
    E["Tag problems with difficulty labels and apply platform-specific rating filters"] --> F["Construct four scenarios: code generation, self-repair, code execution, test output prediction"]
    F["Construct four scenarios: code generation, self-repair, code execution, test output prediction"] --> G["Filter problems by release date after model cutoff to prevent contamination"]
    G["Filter problems by release date after model cutoff to prevent contamination"] --> H["Evaluate model outputs against collected or generated test cases for correctness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从三个竞赛平台抓取题目及元数据"] --> B["解析公式并排除含图片或多解题目"]
    B["解析公式并排除含图片或多解题目"] --> C["收集题面、测试用例、标准解和发布日期"]
    C["收集题面、测试用例、标准解和发布日期"] --> D["平台测试缺失时用GPT-4生成测试输入"]
    D["平台测试缺失时用GPT-4生成测试输入"] --> E["标注难度并应用平台特定评级过滤"]
    E["标注难度并应用平台特定评级过滤"] --> F["构建四类场景：代码生成、自修复、执行和输出预测"]
    F["构建四类场景：代码生成、自修复、执行和输出预测"] --> G["按发布日期过滤避免模型训练污染"]
    G["按发布日期过滤避免模型训练污染"] --> H["用测试用例评估模型输出正确性"]

name: LiveCodeBench Pro
intro: LiveCodeBench Pro 包含来自Codeforces、ICPC和IOI的持续更新题目，减少数据污染风险。由奥林匹克奖牌得主团队对每题进行算法分类和失败提交逐行分析。评测显示前沿模型在细致算法推理和复杂案例分析上仍存在显著不足，距离人类顶尖水平有较大差距。
org: New York University, Princeton University, University of California San Diego, University of Washing
build_method: 专家构建, 网络爬取
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 领域特定
intro_en: LiveCodeBench Pro includes continuously updated problems from Codeforces, ICPC, and IOI, minimizing data contamination risk. Each problem is algorithm-classified and analyzed line-by-line for failed submissions by a team of Olympic medalists. Evaluations show that state-of-the-art models still have significant shortcomings in detailed algorithmic reasoning and complex case analysis, falling far short of top human performance.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 584 problems from Codeforces, ICPC, and IOI contests before April 25, 2025"] --> B["Olympiad medalists annotate each problem with required algorithmic categories and key skills"]
    B["Olympiad medalists annotate each problem with required algorithmic categories and key skills"] --> C["Classify problems by cognitive-focus taxonomy: knowledge-heavy, observation-heavy, or logic-heavy"]
    C["Classify problems by cognitive-focus taxonomy: knowledge-heavy, observation-heavy, or logic-heavy"] --> D["Generate model submissions and evaluate using automated pass-fail grading on hidden test suites"]
    D["Generate model submissions and evaluate using automated pass-fail grading on hidden test suites"] --> E["Olympiad medalists conduct line-by-line analysis of each failed model-generated submission"]
    E["Olympiad medalists conduct line-by-line analysis of each failed model-generated submission"] --> F["Calculate pass@1 accuracy across easy, medium, and hard difficulty levels"]
    F["Calculate pass@1 accuracy across easy, medium, and hard difficulty levels"] --> G["Compute Elo ratings and cost metrics for each evaluated model"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集2025年4月25日前Codeforces、ICPC和IOI的584道题目"] --> B["奥赛奖牌得主为每题标注算法类别和所需关键技能"]
    B["奥赛奖牌得主为每题标注算法类别和所需关键技能"] --> C["按认知重点分类题目为知识型、观察型或逻辑型"]
    C["按认知重点分类题目为知识型、观察型或逻辑型"] --> D["生成模型提交并用隐藏测试集自动判定通过或失败"]
    D["生成模型提交并用隐藏测试集自动判定通过或失败"] --> E["奥赛奖牌得主对每个失败提交进行逐行分析"]
    E["奥赛奖牌得主对每个失败提交进行逐行分析"] --> F["计算简单、中等和困难级别的pass@1准确率"]
    F["计算简单、中等和困难级别的pass@1准确率"] --> G["计算每个评测模型的Elo评分和成本指标"]

name: LiveDRBench
intro: LiveDRBench是一个评估深度研究（Deep Research）系统的基准，它不只关注最终报告，更强调搜索过程的广度和推理强度。该基准包含100个科学及公共领域的挑战性任务，并采用关键论点的中间表示来进行客观的性能衡量。
build_method: 专家构建
task_type: Agent任务, 事实验证, 生成
intro_en: LiveDRBench is a benchmark for evaluating Deep Research systems, focusing not only on the final report but also on the breadth of the search process and the strength of reasoning. It includes 100 challenging tasks from scientific and public domains and uses intermediate representations of key arguments for objective performance measurement.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select scientific and public interest domains requiring multi-source synthesis and non-trivial reasoning"] --> B["Invert standard long-context reasoning problems to create tasks requiring web-wide search"]
    B["Invert standard long-context reasoning problems to create tasks requiring web-wide search"] --> C["Formulate 100 tasks ensuring no single webpage contains the complete answer"]
    C["Formulate 100 tasks ensuring no single webpage contains the complete answer"] --> D["Define ground-truth as structured claims and subclaims for each task"]
    D["Define ground-truth as structured claims and subclaims for each task"] --> E["Run DR systems to generate claims from web corpus for each query"]
    E["Run DR systems to generate claims from web corpus for each query"] --> F["Score claim agreement between system output and ground truth using binary matching"]
    F["Score claim agreement between system output and ground truth using binary matching"] --> G["Calculate precision and recall incorporating claim and subclaim structure"]
    G["Calculate precision and recall incorporating claim and subclaim structure"] --> H["Report F1 scores across eight task categories and overall benchmark performance"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择需要多源综合和复杂推理的科学及公共领域"] --> B["反转标准长文本推理问题以创建需全网搜索的任务"]
    B["反转标准长文本推理问题以创建需全网搜索的任务"] --> C["制定100个任务确保无单一网页包含完整答案"]
    C["制定100个任务确保无单一网页包含完整答案"] --> D["为每个任务定义结构化论点和子论点作为真值"]
    D["为每个任务定义结构化论点和子论点作为真值"] --> E["运行深度研究系统从网络语料为每个查询生成论点"]
    E["运行深度研究系统从网络语料为每个查询生成论点"] --> F["用二元匹配对系统输出与真值的论点一致性评分"]
    F["用二元匹配对系统输出与真值的论点一致性评分"] --> G["计算包含论点和子论点结构的精确率和召回率"]
    G["计算包含论点和子论点结构的精确率和召回率"] --> H["报告八个任务类别及整体基准的F1分数"]

name: LiveMathBench
intro: LiveMathBench是一个由多项竞赛和考试题目组成的双语数学基准，旨在减少数据污染并评估大型语言模型的推理能力。该基准持续更新，并提出G-Pass@k指标，用于衡量模型在复杂推理任务中的性能潜力和稳定性。
org: Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, Monash University
build_method: 考试题, 网络爬取, LLM生成, 混合
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 双语
build_method_en: Exam Questions, Web Crawling, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: LiveMathBench is a bilingual math benchmark composed of multiple competition and exam questions, designed to reduce data contamination and evaluate the reasoning ability of large language models. The benchmark is continuously updated and introduces the G-Pass@k metric to measure model performance potential and stability on complex reasoning tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect bilingual math problems from multiple competitions and examinations"] --> B["Assemble problems into LiveMathBench to resist data contamination"]
    B["Assemble problems into LiveMathBench to resist data contamination"] --> C["Continuously update benchmark with new Olympiad-level problems"]
    C["Continuously update benchmark with new Olympiad-level problems"] --> D["Generate multiple sampling attempts per problem using various LLMs"]
    D["Generate multiple sampling attempts per problem using various LLMs"] --> E["Apply G-Pass@k metric to quantify performance potential and stability"]
    E["Apply G-Pass@k metric to quantify performance potential and stability"] --> F["Compare G-Pass@k results with traditional metrics like Greedy Accuracy and Pass@k"]
    F["Compare G-Pass@k results with traditional metrics like Greedy Accuracy and Pass@k"] --> G["Analyze performance degradation patterns across increasing G-Pass@k thresholds"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从多项竞赛和考试中收集双语数学题目"] --> B["将题目组装为LiveMathBench以抵抗数据污染"]
    B["将题目组装为LiveMathBench以抵抗数据污染"] --> C["持续更新奥林匹克级别的新题目"]
    C["持续更新奥林匹克级别的新题目"] --> D["使用多个大模型对每道题生成多次采样"]
    D["使用多个大模型对每道题生成多次采样"] --> E["应用G-Pass@k指标量化性能潜力和稳定性"]
    E["应用G-Pass@k指标量化性能潜力和稳定性"] --> F["将G-Pass@k结果与贪婪准确率等传统指标对比"]
    F["将G-Pass@k结果与贪婪准确率等传统指标对比"] --> G["分析G-Pass@k阈值提高时的性能下降模式"]

name: LLM Creative Story-Writing Benchmark
intro: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4评估大型语言模型在遵循创意简报的同时创作引人入胜故事的能力。每个故事需包含十个必备元素，并由多个独立评分模型基于18项指标进行评分，确保文学质量和约束满足度可比。
intro_en: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4 evaluates large language models' ability to craft engaging stories while adhering to creative briefs. Each story must include ten required elements and is scored by multiple independent evaluation models based on 18 metrics, ensuring comparable literary quality and constraint satisfaction.

name: LogicGame
intro: LogicGame是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）基于规则的推理能力的基准。它通过提供多样化的游戏场景，要求模型理解并应用预定义的规则来解决问题，从而将其逻辑推理能力与先验知识分离开来。该基准不仅评估最终结果，也关注中间步骤，并涵盖了从简单到复杂的不同难度级别。
task_type: Agent任务, 规划, 生成
intro_en: LogicGame is a benchmark designed to evaluate the rule-based reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). It presents diverse game scenarios that require models to understand and apply predefined rules to solve problems, thereby separating their logical reasoning from prior knowledge. The benchmark assesses not only the final outcomes but also intermediate steps, covering a range of difficulty levels from simple to complex.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect real-world scenarios through research and crowdsourcing, adopting gamification approach for rule-following tasks"] --> B["Structure problems into Execution and Planning domains with sub-categories for string manipulation and logic puzzles"]
    B["Structure problems into Execution and Planning domains with sub-categories for string manipulation and logic puzzles"] --> C["Expert annotators design novel problems ensuring deterministic steps and no natural language inference required"]
    C["Expert annotators design novel problems ensuring deterministic steps and no natural language inference required"] --> D["Develop JSON format constraints for standardized output capturing both answers and intermediate reasoning processes"]
    D["Develop JSON format constraints for standardized output capturing both answers and intermediate reasoning processes"] --> E["Implement difficulty levels from simple rule applications to complex reasoning chains with exemplars"]
    E["Implement difficulty levels from simple rule applications to complex reasoning chains with exemplars"] --> F["Create bilingual versions through meticulous translation while ensuring problems remain unavailable online"]
    F["Create bilingual versions through meticulous translation while ensuring problems remain unavailable online"] --> G["Evaluate models using three metrics: Answer Accuracy, Process Accuracy, and process-reference alignment scoring"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["通过研究和众包收集真实场景，采用游戏化方法设计规则遵循任务"] --> B["将问题分为执行和规划两个领域，包含字符串操作和逻辑谜题等子类"]
    B["将问题分为执行和规划两个领域，包含字符串操作和逻辑谜题等子类"] --> C["专家标注员设计新颖问题，确保步骤确定性且无需自然语言推理"]
    C["专家标注员设计新颖问题，确保步骤确定性且无需自然语言推理"] --> D["开发JSON格式约束，标准化输出答案和中间推理过程"]
    D["开发JSON格式约束，标准化输出答案和中间推理过程"] --> E["实现从简单规则应用到复杂推理链的难度级别并加入示例"]
    E["实现从简单规则应用到复杂推理链的难度级别并加入示例"] --> F["精心翻译创建双语版本，同时确保问题在互联网上不可获取"]
    F["精心翻译创建双语版本，同时确保问题在互联网上不可获取"] --> G["使用三个指标评估模型：答案准确率、过程准确率和过程对齐评分"]

name: LogicVista
intro: LogicVista是一个评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉情境下综合逻辑推理能力的基准测试。它通过5项逻辑推理任务和9种不同能力，使用448道多项选择题来评估MLLM的通用逻辑认知能力。每道题目都附有正确答案和人工编写的推理过程，支持开放式和多项选择评估。
build_method: 人工标注
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: LogicVista is a benchmark for evaluating the comprehensive logical reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in visual contexts. It assesses the general logical cognition of MLLMs through 5 logical reasoning tasks and 9 different capabilities, using 448 multiple-choice questions. Each question includes the correct answer and a human-written reasoning process, supporting both open-ended and multiple-choice evaluations.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source 448 questions from licensed, registered, or paid intelligence test sources to prevent data leakage"] --> B["Five annotators manually extract images, correct answers, and explanations over three months"]
    B["Five annotators manually extract images, correct answers, and explanations over three months"] --> C["Annotators write and cross-validate reasoning explanations for answer choices through multiple quality check rounds"]
    C["Annotators write and cross-validate reasoning explanations for answer choices through multiple quality check rounds"] --> D["Structure annotated data in JSON format with questions, answers, and reasoning for evaluation pipeline"]
    D["Structure annotated data in JSON format with questions, answers, and reasoning for evaluation pipeline"] --> E["Generate open-ended responses from MLLMs using the 448 multiple-choice questions with images"]
    E["Generate open-ended responses from MLLMs using the 448 multiple-choice questions with images"] --> F["Feed MLLM outputs to LLM-based extractor to isolate letter answer choices from full-sentence responses"]
    F["Feed MLLM outputs to LLM-based extractor to isolate letter answer choices from full-sentence responses"] --> G["Repeatedly validate extracted answers with feedback until extraction meets correctness criteria"]
    G["Repeatedly validate extracted answers with feedback until extraction meets correctness criteria"] --> H["Compare extracted answer choices to ground truth and calculate overall logical reasoning accuracy score"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从需授权、注册或付费的智力测试源采集448道题目以防数据泄露"] --> B["五名标注员历时三个月手动提取图像、正确答案和解释"]
    B["五名标注员历时三个月手动提取图像、正确答案和解释"] --> C["标注员编写并交叉验证答案推理解释，经多轮质量检查"]
    C["标注员编写并交叉验证答案推理解释，经多轮质量检查"] --> D["将标注数据以JSON格式组织，包含问题、答案和推理供评估使用"]
    D["将标注数据以JSON格式组织，包含问题、答案和推理供评估使用"] --> E["使用448道带图像的多选题让多模态模型生成开放式回答"]
    E["使用448道带图像的多选题让多模态模型生成开放式回答"] --> F["将模型输出送入LLM提取器从完整句子中分离出字母答案"]
    F["将模型输出送入LLM提取器从完整句子中分离出字母答案"] --> G["反复验证提取答案并提供反馈直至满足正确性标准"]
    G["反复验证提取答案并提供反馈直至满足正确性标准"] --> H["将提取的答案与标准答案比对并计算总体逻辑推理准确率"]

name: LongBench v2
intro: LongBench v2是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在处理长上下文问题时进行深度理解和推理能力的基准。它包含503个具有挑战性的多项选择题，上下文长度从8千到200万词不等，覆盖了单文档问答、多文档问答、长上下文学习等六个任务类别。该基准通过自动化和人工审核流程确保了高质量和高难度，人类专家的准确率也仅为53.7%。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 问答, 分类, 摘要, 代码生成
eval_feature: 长文本, 多轮, 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, QA, Classification, Summarization, Code Generation
intro_en: LongBench v2 is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' deep understanding and reasoning abilities when handling long-context problems. It includes 503 challenging multiple-choice questions with context lengths ranging from 8,000 to 2 million words, covering six task categories such as single-document QA, multi-document QA, and long-context learning. The benchmark ensures high quality and difficulty through automated and manual review processes, with human experts achieving an accuracy of only 53.7%.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Recruit 97 annotators from top universities with diverse academic backgrounds and select 24 reviewers from them"] --> B["Annotators provide long documents, questions, multiple-choice options, answers, and supporting evidence"]
    B["Annotators provide long documents, questions, multiple-choice options, answers, and supporting evidence"] --> C["Run automated review using three long-context LLMs; reject questions if all three models answer correctly"]
    C["Run automated review using three long-context LLMs; reject questions if all three models answer correctly"] --> D["Assign data passing automated review to human reviewers for manual answering and appropriateness verification"]
