    D["Assign data passing automated review to human reviewers for manual answering and appropriateness verification"] --> E["Verify data meets criteria: objective answer, all three LLMs fail, reviewer cannot answer within 3 minutes"]
    E["Verify data meets criteria: objective answer, all three LLMs fail, reviewer cannot answer within 3 minutes"] --> F["Request annotator modifications for data not meeting quality and difficulty criteria"]
    F["Request annotator modifications for data not meeting quality and difficulty criteria"] --> G["Compile 503 multiple-choice questions across six task categories with contexts from 8k to 2M words"]
    G["Compile 503 multiple-choice questions across six task categories with contexts from 8k to 2M words"] --> H["Evaluate models using accuracy metric; establish human baseline at 53.7% under 15-minute time constraint"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从顶尖大学招募97名不同学术背景的标注员并选出24名审核员"] --> B["标注员提供长文档、问题、选项、答案和支持证据"]
    B["标注员提供长文档、问题、选项、答案和支持证据"] --> C["用三个长上下文模型自动审核，若全部答对则拒绝该问题"]
    C["用三个长上下文模型自动审核，若全部答对则拒绝该问题"] --> D["将通过自动审核的数据分配给人工审核员验证"]
    D["将通过自动审核的数据分配给人工审核员验证"] --> E["验证数据符合标准：答案客观、三模型均失败、审核员3分钟内无法作答"]
    E["验证数据符合标准：答案客观、三模型均失败、审核员3分钟内无法作答"] --> F["要求标注员修改未达质量和难度标准的数据"]
    F["要求标注员修改未达质量和难度标准的数据"] --> G["汇编503道多选题，涵盖六类任务，上下文长度8千至200万词"]
    G["汇编503道多选题，涵盖六类任务，上下文长度8千至200万词"] --> H["用准确率评估模型，建立15分钟限时下53.7%的人类基线"]

name: LongDocURL
intro: LongDocURL是一个综合性的多模态长文档基准测试，旨在评估大型视觉语言模型在长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位方面的能力。现有基准测试在处理页数和布局元素定位分析方面存在局限。该基准测试定义了长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位三个主要任务类别，并包含20个子任务。它通过半自动化构建流程收集了2,325个高质量问答对，覆盖超过33,000页文档，显著优于现有基准。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), Institute of Automation Chin
build_method: 混合
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
eval_feature: 过程评估
intro_en: LongDocURL is a comprehensive multimodal long document benchmark designed to evaluate large vision-language models' abilities in long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization. Existing benchmarks have limitations in handling page counts and layout element localization analysis. This benchmark defines three main task categories: long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization, comprising 20 sub-tasks. It collects 2,325 high-quality QA pairs through a semi-automated construction process, covering over 33,000 pages, significantly surpassing existing benchmarks.
scale_en: 2325 QA pairs, over 33000 pages of documents
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Crawl 200k PDFs from CommonCrawl, filter by 50–150 pages and English to yield ~3,000 candidates"] --> B["Prompt GPT-4o to classify document types from 5–10 random pages, retaining 396 documents"]
    B["Prompt GPT-4o to classify document types from 5–10 random pages, retaining 396 documents"] --> C["Parse PDFs with PyMuPDF and Docmind to extract text-type-bbox triples at region level"]
    C["Parse PDFs with PyMuPDF and Docmind to extract text-type-bbox triples at region level"] --> D["Generate QA pairs via two-stage pipeline using symbolic representation and GPT-4o prompting"]
    D["Generate QA pairs via two-stage pipeline using symbolic representation and GPT-4o prompting"] --> E["Categorize 2,325 QA pairs into 20 sub-tasks by primary task and evidence type"]
    E["Categorize 2,325 QA pairs into 20 sub-tasks by primary task and evidence type"] --> F["Apply automated verification module to check generated QA pair quality"]
    F["Apply automated verification module to check generated QA pair quality"] --> G["Conduct human verification to validate final QA pair correctness"]
    G["Conduct human verification to validate final QA pair correctness"] --> H["Evaluate 26 open-source and closed-source model configurations on the benchmark"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从CommonCrawl爬取20万PDF，按50-150页和英文筛选得约3000份候选"] --> B["用GPT-4o对随机5-10页分类文档类型，保留396份文档"]
    B["用GPT-4o对随机5-10页分类文档类型，保留396份文档"] --> C["用PyMuPDF和Docmind解析PDF提取区域级文本-类型-框三元组"]
    C["用PyMuPDF和Docmind解析PDF提取区域级文本-类型-框三元组"] --> D["通过符号表示和GPT-4o提示的两阶段流程生成问答对"]
    D["通过符号表示和GPT-4o提示的两阶段流程生成问答对"] --> E["将2325个问答对按主任务和证据类型分为20个子任务"]
    E["将2325个问答对按主任务和证据类型分为20个子任务"] --> F["应用自动验证模块检查生成问答对的质量"]
    F["应用自动验证模块检查生成问答对的质量"] --> G["进行人工验证以确认最终问答对的正确性"]
    G["进行人工验证以确认最终问答对的正确性"] --> H["在基准上评估26种开源和闭源模型配置"]

name: LongVideoBench
intro: LongVideoBench是一个以长达一小时的视频-语言交错输入为特色的问答基准。它包含3763个不同长度的网络视频及其字幕，旨在全面评估大型多模态模型（LMM）的长期多模态理解能力。该基准测试引入了一种新的视频问答任务，称为“引用推理”，要求模型根据问题中引用的视频上下文来推理相关的视频细节。LongVideoBench包含6678个人工标注的多项选择题，涵盖17个细分领域，为长视频理解提供了一个全面的评估框架。
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注
intro_en: LongVideoBench is a QA benchmark featuring video-language inputs up to one hour long. It includes 3,763 web videos of varying lengths with subtitles, designed to comprehensively evaluate the long-term multimodal understanding ability of large multimodal models (LMMs). The benchmark introduces a new video QA task called "reference reasoning," which requires models to infer relevant video details based on referenced video context in the questions. LongVideoBench contains 6,678 human-annotated multiple-choice questions across 17 subdomains, providing a comprehensive evaluation framework for long video understanding.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Download 720P+ videos from 119 channels across 10 categories in four duration groups"] --> B["Filter videos for English subtitles or transcribe using Whisper-V3-Large for missing subtitles"]
    B["Filter videos for English subtitles or transcribe using Whisper-V3-Large for missing subtitles"] --> C["Sample videos uniformly across topics and filter low-quality videos using Q-Align"]
    C["Sample videos uniformly across topics and filter low-quality videos using Q-Align"] --> D["Design referring reasoning questions with referring queries pinpointing specific video moments as referred context"]
    D["Design referring reasoning questions with referring queries pinpointing specific video moments as referred context"] --> E["Annotate questions in two levels: Perception for single context and Relation for multiple contexts"]
    E["Annotate questions in two levels: Perception for single context and Relation for multiple contexts"] --> F["Collect 6,678 human-annotated multiple-choice questions across 17 fine-grained categories on 3,763 videos"]
    F["Collect 6,678 human-annotated multiple-choice questions across 17 fine-grained categories on 3,763 videos"] --> G["Evaluate LMMs by measuring performance improvement as models process increasing numbers of frames"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从119个频道下载720P以上视频，覆盖10类内容和4个时长组"] --> B["筛选英文字幕视频或用Whisper-V3-Large转录缺失字幕"]
    B["筛选英文字幕视频或用Whisper-V3-Large转录缺失字幕"] --> C["按主题均匀采样视频并用Q-Align过滤低质量视频"]
    C["按主题均匀采样视频并用Q-Align过滤低质量视频"] --> D["设计引用推理问题，用引用查询定位特定视频时刻作为引用上下文"]
    D["设计引用推理问题，用引用查询定位特定视频时刻作为引用上下文"] --> E["标注两级问题：感知级针对单一上下文，关系级针对多个上下文"]
    E["标注两级问题：感知级针对单一上下文，关系级针对多个上下文"] --> F["在3763个视频上收集6678个人工标注的多选题，涵盖17个细分类别"]
    F["在3763个视频上收集6678个人工标注的多选题，涵盖17个细分类别"] --> G["通过测量模型处理更多帧时的性能提升来评估大型多模态模型"]

name: LoraxBench
intro: LoraxBench是一个综合性的多语言基准测试，专注于印度尼西亚语和19种印度尼西亚本地方言，涵盖了6种不同的自然语言处理任务。该基准测试包含了特定语言的多种语域，强调了正式和非正式语音对模型性能的影响。LoraxBench由母语者进行专业翻译和验证，数据来源于印度尼西亚语的原创内容，因此比以英语为中心的数据更能捕捉到当地的细微差别。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 自然语言推理, 翻译, 分类
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Natural Language Inference, Translation, Classification
intro_en: LoraxBench is a comprehensive multilingual benchmark focusing on Indonesian and 19 regional Indonesian dialects, covering six different natural language processing tasks. The benchmark includes multiple language domains, emphasizing the impact of formal and informal speech on model performance. LoraxBench is professionally translated and validated by native speakers, with data sourced from original Indonesian content, making it better at capturing local nuances than English-centric datasets.
metric_en: Accuracy, F1, Exact Match, BLEU, LLM-as-a-Judge
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select existing Indonesian-language datasets covering six NLP tasks for adaptation"] --> B["Translate datasets into 19 Indonesian local languages through expert native-speaker translation"]
    B["Translate datasets into 19 Indonesian local languages through expert native-speaker translation"] --> C["Create formal and casual register variations for Javanese, Sundanese, and Madurese"]
    C["Create formal and casual register variations for Javanese, Sundanese, and Madurese"] --> D["Validate translations by native speakers to ensure cultural relevance and linguistic accuracy"]
    D["Validate translations by native speakers to ensure cultural relevance and linguistic accuracy"] --> E["Assemble 23 distinct language subsets covering Indonesian, 19 local languages, and 3 register variants"]
    E["Assemble 23 distinct language subsets covering Indonesian, 19 local languages, and 3 register variants"] --> F["Evaluate multilingual, Southeast Asian, and Indonesian-focused LLMs on all tasks and languages"]
    F["Evaluate multilingual, Southeast Asian, and Indonesian-focused LLMs on all tasks and languages"] --> G["Analyze performance disparities across languages and registers, especially for low-resource languages"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择现有印尼语数据集涵盖六项NLP任务进行改编"] --> B["通过母语专家翻译将数据集译为19种印尼本地语言"]
    B["通过母语专家翻译将数据集译为19种印尼本地语言"] --> C["为爪哇语、巽他语和马都拉语创建正式和非正式语域变体"]
    C["为爪哇语、巽他语和马都拉语创建正式和非正式语域变体"] --> D["由母语者验证译文确保文化相关性和语言准确性"]
    D["由母语者验证译文确保文化相关性和语言准确性"] --> E["组装23个语言子集涵盖印尼语、19种本地语言和3个语域变体"]
    E["组装23个语言子集涵盖印尼语、19种本地语言和3个语域变体"] --> F["在所有任务和语言上评估多语言、东南亚和印尼专用大模型"]
    F["在所有任务和语言上评估多语言、东南亚和印尼专用大模型"] --> G["分析跨语言和语域的性能差异，特别是低资源语言"]

name: LVBench
intro: LVBench是一个旨在评估和提升多模态模型理解长视频能力的基准。它包含来自公共来源的视频，涵盖了长视频理解和信息提取的各种任务。LVBench旨在挑战多模态模型展示长期记忆和扩展理解能力，其广泛评估表明当前多模态模型在这些要求苛刻的长视频理解任务上表现仍然不佳。
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
eval_feature: 长时记忆, 多样化任务, 人工标注
eval_feature_en: Long-term Memory, Diverse Tasks, Human Annotation
intro_en: LVBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate and enhance the ability of multimodal models to understand long videos. It includes videos from public sources and covers various tasks related to long video understanding and information extraction. LVBench aims to challenge multimodal models to demonstrate long-term memory and extended comprehension capabilities. Its extensive evaluation shows that current multimodal models still perform poorly on these demanding long video understanding tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Gather 500 YouTube videos using keywords across six categories"] --> B["Screen videos by five criteria: protagonist presence, coherence, event density, visual clarity, modality independence"]
    B["Screen videos by five criteria: protagonist presence, coherence, event density, visual clarity, modality independence"] --> C["Select long videos with minimum 30 minutes duration and multiple scene transitions"]
    C["Select long videos with minimum 30 minutes duration and multiple scene transitions"] --> D["Define six core temporal understanding capabilities as evaluation framework"]
    D["Define six core temporal understanding capabilities as evaluation framework"] --> E["Expert annotators create question-answer pairs targeting temporal grounding and summarization tasks"]
    E["Expert annotators create question-answer pairs targeting temporal grounding and summarization tasks"] --> F["Apply quality control processes to ensure high-quality ground truth annotations"]
    F["Apply quality control processes to ensure high-quality ground truth annotations"] --> G["Evaluate multimodal models on 1,549 QA pairs with average video duration of 4,101 seconds"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用关键词从六类别收集500个YouTube视频"] --> B["用五标准筛选视频:主角、连贯性、事件密度、清晰度、模态独立"]
    B["用五标准筛选视频:主角、连贯性、事件密度、清晰度、模态独立"] --> C["选择最少30分钟且多场景转换的长视频"]
    C["选择最少30分钟且多场景转换的长视频"] --> D["定义六种核心时序理解能力作为评估框架"]
    D["定义六种核心时序理解能力作为评估框架"] --> E["专家标注员创建针对时序定位和摘要任务的问答对"]
    E["专家标注员创建针对时序定位和摘要任务的问答对"] --> F["应用质量控制流程确保高质量真值标注"]
    F["应用质量控制流程确保高质量真值标注"] --> G["在平均4101秒视频的1549个问答对上评估多模态模型"]

name: MARS-Bench
intro: MARS-Bench 是首个面向火星科学任务的标准化评测基准，覆盖轨道和地表影像上的分类、分割与目标检测任务，用于系统评估基础模型在火星地质与遥感场景中的表现。
org: Arizona State University, Jet Propulsion Laboratory, California Institute of Technology
eval_feature: 领域特定
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used in real-world conversational applications, but their robustness in handling long and complex dialogue sessions—including frequent shifts in intent and complex cross-turn dependencies—has been criticized. MARS-Bench is a multi-turn competitive real-world scenario dialogue benchmark designed to address this gap. It is constructed through detailed textual annotations per session and aims to evaluate three key aspects of multi-turn dialogue: ultra-long turns, interactive multi-turns, and cross-turn tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect play-by-play text commentary from real-world athletic games as source data"] --> B["Structure commentary into multi-turn dialogue contexts with timestamped play sequences"]
    B["Structure commentary into multi-turn dialogue contexts with timestamped play sequences"] --> C["Design Ultra Multi-turn questions requiring retrieval across dozens of distant turns"]
    C["Design Ultra Multi-turn questions requiring retrieval across dozens of distant turns"] --> D["Create Cross-turn reasoning tasks involving counterfactual analysis and score calculations"]
    D["Create Cross-turn reasoning tasks involving counterfactual analysis and score calculations"] --> E["Construct Interactive Multi-turn scenarios with task switches between information-seeking and reasoning"]
    E["Construct Interactive Multi-turn scenarios with task switches between information-seeking and reasoning"] --> F["Add instruction-following requirements like summary generation after specific turn counts"]
    F["Add instruction-following requirements like summary generation after specific turn counts"] --> G["Evaluate LLMs on context retrieval, reasoning accuracy, and task adaptation robustness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集真实体育比赛的逐场文字解说作为源数据"] --> B["将解说结构化为带时间戳的多轮对话上下文"]
    B["将解说结构化为带时间戳的多轮对话上下文"] --> C["设计需跨数十轮检索的超多轮问题"]
    C["设计需跨数十轮检索的超多轮问题"] --> D["创建涉及反事实分析和得分计算的跨轮推理任务"]
    D["创建涉及反事实分析和得分计算的跨轮推理任务"] --> E["构建信息查询与推理间任务切换的交互多轮场景"]
    E["构建信息查询与推理间任务切换的交互多轮场景"] --> F["添加特定轮次后生成摘要等指令遵循要求"]
    F["添加特定轮次后生成摘要等指令遵循要求"] --> G["评估模型的上下文检索、推理准确性和任务适应鲁棒性"]

name: MATH
intro: MATH数据集包含12500道具有完整步骤解答的竞赛数学题，旨在衡量机器学习模型的数学问题解决能力。完整解答可用于训练模型生成答案推导和解释，促进数学推理相关研究和准确率提升。
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
intro_en: The MATH dataset contains 12,500 competition-level math problems with full step-by-step solutions, designed to evaluate the mathematical problem-solving ability of machine learning models. The complete solutions can be used to train models to generate answer derivations and explanations, promoting research in mathematical reasoning and improving accuracy.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 12,500 problems from high school math competitions across seven subjects"] --> B["Write full step-by-step solutions in LATEX and natural language for each problem"]
    B["Write full step-by-step solutions in LATEX and natural language for each problem"] --> C["Tag each problem by difficulty level from 1 to 5"]
    C["Tag each problem by difficulty level from 1 to 5"] --> D["Normalize final answers to enable exact match scoring"]
    D["Normalize final answers to enable exact match scoring"] --> E["Evaluate models by generating the boxed final answer sequence"]
    E["Evaluate models by generating the boxed final answer sequence"] --> F["Score model outputs using exact match against normalized ground truth answers"]
    F["Score model outputs using exact match against normalized ground truth answers"] --> G["Benchmark human performance with CS PhD student and IMO gold medalist"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从高中数学竞赛收集12500道题目，涵盖七个学科"] --> B["为每道题目编写LATEX和自然语言的完整分步解答"]
    B["为每道题目编写LATEX和自然语言的完整分步解答"] --> C["为每道题目标注1到5的难度等级"]
    C["为每道题目标注1到5的难度等级"] --> D["规范化最终答案以支持精确匹配评分"]
    D["规范化最终答案以支持精确匹配评分"] --> E["通过生成框选的最终答案序列评估模型"]
    E["通过生成框选的最终答案序列评估模型"] --> F["使用精确匹配对比规范化标准答案评分"]
    F["使用精确匹配对比规范化标准答案评分"] --> G["用计算机博士生和IMO金牌得主测试人类表现"]

name: Math-VR
intro: 近期大型语言模型和视觉语言模型在数学推理方面取得了显著进展，但在需要视觉辅助的问题上仍面临瓶颈。CodePlot-CoT是一种代码驱动的思维链范式，用于在数学中“通过图像思考”。Math-VR是首个大规模、双语数据集和基准，用于评估数学视觉推理问题，包含17.8万个样本。该工作为多模态数学推理开辟了新方向。
eval_feature: 思维链
intro_en: Recent large language models and vision-language models have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning but still face bottlenecks in visually assisted problems. CodePlot-CoT is a code-driven chain-of-thought paradigm designed for "thinking through images" in mathematics. Math-VR is the first large-scale, bilingual dataset and benchmark for evaluating mathematical visual reasoning problems, containing 178,000 samples. This work opens a new direction for multimodal mathematical reasoning.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 900k secondary-school math problems with solutions from public websites containing images in explanations"] --> B["Filter samples using Qwen2.5-VL-72B to retain only those requiring mathematical figures for reasoning"]
    B["Filter samples using Qwen2.5-VL-72B to retain only those requiring mathematical figures for reasoning"] --> C["Convert textual images to readable text using GPT-4.1 and standardize questions into Markdown format"]
    C["Convert textual images to readable text using GPT-4.1 and standardize questions into Markdown format"] --> D["Conduct quality checks with GPT-4.1 to discard incomplete or incoherent questions"]
    D["Conduct quality checks with GPT-4.1 to discard incomplete or incoherent questions"] --> E["Develop specialized image-to-code converter for parsing complex mathematical figures into executable plotting code"]
    E["Develop specialized image-to-code converter for parsing complex mathematical figures into executable plotting code"] --> F["Construct final Math-VR benchmark comprising 178K bilingual samples requiring visual reasoning"]
    F["Construct final Math-VR benchmark comprising 178K bilingual samples requiring visual reasoning"] --> G["Evaluate models by having them generate plotting code that renders into visual thoughts for reasoning"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从公开网站收集90万个含图像解释的中学数学题"] --> B["用Qwen2.5-VL-72B筛选需数学图形推理的样本"]
    B["用Qwen2.5-VL-72B筛选需数学图形推理的样本"] --> C["用GPT-4.1将文本图像转为可读文本并标准化为Markdown"]
    C["用GPT-4.1将文本图像转为可读文本并标准化为Markdown"] --> D["用GPT-4.1质检并丢弃不完整或不连贯的问题"]
    D["用GPT-4.1质检并丢弃不完整或不连贯的问题"] --> E["开发专用图像转代码工具解析数学图形为可执行代码"]
    E["开发专用图像转代码工具解析数学图形为可执行代码"] --> F["构建包含17.8万双语样本的Math-VR基准"]
    F["构建包含17.8万双语样本的Math-VR基准"] --> G["评估模型生成绘图代码并渲染为视觉思维进行推理"]

name: MATH500
intro: MATH500是MATH数据集的一个子集，包含500个具有挑战性的竞赛数学问题。这些问题涵盖了代数、几何、数论和微积分等多个方面，每个问题都附有详细的步骤解答。该基准旨在评估模型在复杂数学推理和问题解决方面的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MATH500 is a subset of the MATH dataset, containing 500 challenging competition-level math problems. These problems cover algebra, geometry, number theory, and calculus, each accompanied by detailed step-by-step solutions. This benchmark aims to evaluate models' abilities in complex mathematical reasoning and problem-solving.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 12,500 problems from high school math competitions"] --> B["Write full step-by-step solutions in LaTeX and natural language for each problem"]
    B["Write full step-by-step solutions in LaTeX and natural language for each problem"] --> C["Tag problems by difficulty level from 1 to 5 across seven subjects"]
    C["Tag problems by difficulty level from 1 to 5 across seven subjects"] --> D["Select 500 challenging problems as the MATH500 subset"]
    D["Select 500 challenging problems as the MATH500 subset"] --> E["Normalize final answers to enable exact match scoring"]
    E["Normalize final answers to enable exact match scoring"] --> F["Evaluate models by generating sequences encoding the boxed final answer"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从高中数学竞赛收集12500道题目"] --> B["为每道题编写LaTeX和自然语言的完整分步解答"]
    B["为每道题编写LaTeX和自然语言的完整分步解答"] --> C["按难度1到5级标注题目并分为七个学科"]
    C["按难度1到5级标注题目并分为七个学科"] --> D["选取500道有挑战性的题目作为MATH500子集"]
    D["选取500道有挑战性的题目作为MATH500子集"] --> E["规范化最终答案以支持精确匹配评分"]
    E["规范化最终答案以支持精确匹配评分"] --> F["通过生成编码框选最终答案的序列来评估模型"]

name: MathBench
intro: MathBench是一个用于严格评估大型语言模型数学能力的综合性基准。它覆盖了从基础算术到大学数学的五个难度级别，包含中英文双语问题，旨在全面考察模型的理论知识和实际应用能力。该基准不仅包含应用题，还设有理论题，以检验模型对基本概念的掌握程度。其独特的循环评估（Circular Evaluation）方法能更真实地反映模型的数学推理水平。
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
task_type: 数学问题, 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 思维链, 领域特定, Bilingual Gradient Evaluation, Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
task_type_en: Math problems, Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA
eval_feature_en: Chain-of-Thought, Domain-specific, Bilingual Gradient Evaluation, Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
intro_en: MathBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the mathematical abilities of large language models. It covers five difficulty levels ranging from basic arithmetic to university-level mathematics and includes bilingual problems in both Chinese and English. The benchmark aims to thoroughly assess models' theoretical knowledge and practical application skills. It features not only applied problems but also theoretical questions to test models' grasp of fundamental concepts. Its unique Circular Evaluation method provides a more authentic reflection of models' mathematical reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define five-stage framework mapped to education levels with Subject Area and Topic taxonomy"] --> B["Collect theoretical knowledge from textbooks and Internet, transform into multi-choice questions with annotations"]
    B["Collect theoretical knowledge from textbooks and Internet, transform into multi-choice questions with annotations"] --> C["Collect application questions from stage-based exams and open-source datasets covering the knowledge taxonomy"]
    C["Collect application questions from stage-based exams and open-source datasets covering the knowledge taxonomy"] --> D["Reformulate complex-answer questions into four-option multiple-choice with unique answers and confusing distractors"]
    D["Reformulate complex-answer questions into four-option multiple-choice with unique answers and confusing distractors"] --> E["Apply semi-automated filtering using GPT-4 to remove errors and verify educational stage alignment"]
    E["Apply semi-automated filtering using GPT-4 to remove errors and verify educational stage alignment"] --> F["Curate 3709 bilingual questions into MathBench-T (theoretical) and MathBench-A (application) subsets"]
    F["Curate 3709 bilingual questions into MathBench-T (theoretical) and MathBench-A (application) subsets"] --> G["Evaluate Chat models using CircularEval by permuting options N times per N-option question"]
    G["Evaluate Chat models using CircularEval by permuting options N times per N-option question"] --> H["Apply zero-shot CoT for multiple-choice, few-shot CoT for open-ended, and PPL for Base models"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义五阶段框架映射教育级别并建立学科和主题分类"] --> B["从教材和网络收集理论知识并转换为多选题"]
    B["从教材和网络收集理论知识并转换为多选题"] --> C["从分级考试和开源数据集收集应用题覆盖知识体系"]
    C["从分级考试和开源数据集收集应用题覆盖知识体系"] --> D["将复杂答案题改写为四选项多选题确保唯一答案"]
    D["将复杂答案题改写为四选项多选题确保唯一答案"] --> E["使用GPT-4半自动过滤错误并验证教育阶段匹配"]
    E["使用GPT-4半自动过滤错误并验证教育阶段匹配"] --> F["整理3709道双语题目分为理论和应用子集"]
    F["整理3709道双语题目分为理论和应用子集"] --> G["用循环评估法对聊天模型每题排列N次选项"]
    G["用循环评估法对聊天模型每题排列N次选项"] --> H["多选题用零样本CoT开放题用少样本CoT基座模型用困惑度"]

name: MathCanvas-Bench
intro: MathCanvas是一个旨在为大型多模态模型（LMMs）提供内在视觉思维链（VCoT）能力的综合框架，以解决其在几何等数学领域中对视觉辅助的依赖。该框架通过两个阶段训练模型：首先是视觉操作阶段，利用15.2M对语料库进行图表生成和编辑的预训练；其次是战略性视觉辅助推理阶段，通过219K示例数据集进行微调，教授模型何时以及如何利用视觉辅助。为严格评估，引入了MathCanvas-Bench，一个包含3K问题的挑战性基准，要求模型生成交错的视觉-文本解决方案。
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: MathCanvas is a comprehensive framework designed to equip large multimodal models (LMMs) with intrinsic visual chain-of-thought (VCoT) capabilities, addressing their reliance on visual aids in mathematical domains like geometry. The framework trains models in two stages: first, a visual operation stage with pretraining on a 15.2M corpus for chart generation and editing; second, a strategic visual-aided reasoning stage fine-tuned on a 219K example dataset to teach models when and how to use visual assistance. To rigorously evaluate performance, MathCanvas-Bench is introduced, a challenging benchmark with 3K problems requiring models to generate interleaved visual-text solutions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MathCanvas Framework] --> B[Visual Manipulation Stage]
    A --> C[Strategic Visual-Aided Reasoning Stage]

    B --> D[MathCanvas-Imagen Corpus]
    B --> E[MathCanvas-Edit Corpus]

    D --> D1[Data Sources & Collection]
    D1 --> D2[Re-purposing from MathCanvas-Edit (5.4M pairs)]
    D1 --> D3[Augmenting with Code-derived Captions (ImgCode-8.6M)]
    D1 --> D4[Sample Public Datasets (612K pairs)]
    D2 & D3 & D4 --> D[MathCanvas-Imagen (10M caption-to-diagram pairs)]

    E --> E1[Hybrid Pipeline]
    E1 --> E2[Competition-Level Geometry Problems]
    E1 --> E3[Systematically Generated Simple Geometric Figures]
    E3 --> E4[Automated Algorithm: Add Geometric Primitives/Relations]
    E4 --> E5{Quality Filter: Geometric Constraint Checking}
    E5 -- Invalid/Degenerate --> E4
    E5 -- Valid --> E6[Synthetic Generation Process (1M trajectories)]
    E2 & E6 --> E[MathCanvas-Edit (5.2M step-by-step editing trajectories)]

    C --> F[MathCanvas-Instruct Dataset]
    F --> F1[Curate Interleaved Visual-Textual Reasoning Paths]
    F1 --> F2[219K Training Examples]

    C --> G[MathCanvas-Bench Benchmark]
    G --> G1[3K Carefully Curated Problems]
    G1 --> G2[Require Interleaved Reasoning & Visual Outputs]
    G2 --> G3[Benchmark 20 Leading LMMs]

    B -- Pre-train Model --> H[Unified LMMs with Intrinsic VCoT]
    C -- Fine-tune Model --> H
    G -- Evaluate Model --> H
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Mine 128 competition geometry problems as seeds for realistic diagram configurations"] --> B["Apply AlphaGeometry LLM with beam search to generate auxiliary line drawing methods per problem"]
    B["Apply AlphaGeometry LLM with beam search to generate auxiliary line drawing methods per problem"] --> C["Filter geometrically invalid constructions and render diagram sequences as edit operations yielding 4.2M trajectories"]
    C["Filter geometrically invalid constructions and render diagram sequences as edit operations yielding 4.2M trajectories"] --> D["Generate simple geometric figures programmatically using primitives and relations to produce 1M additional edit trajectories"]
    D["Generate simple geometric figures programmatically using primitives and relations to produce 1M additional edit trajectories"] --> E["Construct 10M caption-to-diagram pairs for MathCanvas-Imagen pretraining corpus"]
    E["Construct 10M caption-to-diagram pairs for MathCanvas-Imagen pretraining corpus"] --> F["Curate 219K interleaved visual-textual reasoning examples for MathCanvas-Instruct fine-tuning dataset"]
    F["Curate 219K interleaved visual-textual reasoning examples for MathCanvas-Instruct fine-tuning dataset"] --> G["Assemble 3K challenging problems requiring interleaved visual-textual solutions into MathCanvas-Bench"]
    G["Assemble 3K challenging problems requiring interleaved visual-textual solutions into MathCanvas-Bench"] --> H["Benchmark 20 leading LMMs on MathCanvas-Bench to evaluate visual-textual reasoning capabilities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["挖掘128道竞赛几何题作为真实图表配置种子"] --> B["对每题用AlphaGeometry和束搜索生成辅助线绘制方法"]
    B["对每题用AlphaGeometry和束搜索生成辅助线绘制方法"] --> C["过滤无效构造并渲染图表序列为编辑操作得到420万轨迹"]
    C["过滤无效构造并渲染图表序列为编辑操作得到420万轨迹"] --> D["用基元和关系程序化生成简单几何图形产生100万编辑轨迹"]
    D["用基元和关系程序化生成简单几何图形产生100万编辑轨迹"] --> E["构建1000万标题到图表对作为预训练语料库"]
    E["构建1000万标题到图表对作为预训练语料库"] --> F["整理21.9万交错视觉文本推理样本作为微调数据集"]
    F["整理21.9万交错视觉文本推理样本作为微调数据集"] --> G["汇集3000道需交错视觉文本解答的难题为基准测试集"]
    G["汇集3000道需交错视觉文本解答的难题为基准测试集"] --> H["在基准上测试20个领先模型评估视觉文本推理能力"]

name: MathVision
intro: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) 是一个精心策划的数据集，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）在视觉背景下的数学推理能力。它包含3,040个高质量的数学问题，这些问题来源于真实的数学竞赛，涵盖16个不同的数学学科和5个难度级别。该数据集揭示了当前LMMs与人类在MATH-V上的显著性能差距，并提供了详细的分类以指导未来的研究和开发。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
task_type: 图像问答, 数学问题解决
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估, 细致分类
intro_en: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) is a carefully curated dataset designed to evaluate the mathematical reasoning abilities of large multimodal models (LMMs) in visual contexts. It contains 3,040 high-quality math problems sourced from real math competitions, covering 16 different mathematical subjects and 5 difficulty levels. The dataset highlights the significant performance gap between current LMMs and humans on MATH-V and provides detailed categorizations to guide future research and development.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Identify Math Competitions]
    B --> C{Visual Inputs & Categorizable Levels?}
    C -- Yes --> D[Select 19 Competitions]
    C -- No --> B
    D --> E[Filter Online Resources for Image Problems]
    E --> F[Adhere to Copyright & Licensing]
    F --> G[Initial Data Pool (9000 questions, 3500 with images)]
    G --> H[Data Curation (4 Stages, 10 Annotators)]

name: MaXIFE
intro: MaXIFE是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在23种不同语言中的指令遵循能力。它包含1667个可验证的指令任务，并结合了基于规则和基于模型的评估方法，以平衡效率和准确性。该基准旨在推动自然语言处理领域多语言指令遵循评估的研究和发展。
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 多语言, 跨语言, 可验证
intro_en: MaXIFE is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess large language models' instruction-following ability across 23 different languages. It includes 1,667 verifiable instruction tasks and combines rule-based and model-based evaluation methods to balance efficiency and accuracy. This benchmark aims to advance research and development in multilingual instruction-following evaluation within natural language processing.

name: MCP-Atlas
intro: MCP-Atlas是一个用于评估大型语言模型使用外部工具能力的大规模基准。它包含36个真实的MCP服务器和220个工具，涵盖了1000个需要通过3-6步工具调用来完成的复杂任务。该基准通过基于声明的评分规则来评估模型表现，并已公开发布部分任务集以促进社区研究。
eval_feature: 多轮, 结果导向, 动态, 实时
intro_en: MCP-Atlas is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to use external tools. It includes 36 real MCP servers and 220 tools, covering 1,000 complex tasks that require 3-6 steps of tool calls to complete. The benchmark assesses model performance based on rule-based scoring and has publicly released part of the task set to promote community research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Benchmark Construction
        A[Task Design & Goal Setting] --> B(1000 Tasks, 3-6 Tool Calls, Multi-Server, Conditional Logic)
        B --> C[Environment Setup: 36 Real MCP Servers, 220 Tools]
    end

    subgraph Task Schema Definition
        C --> D[1. Tool Set Configuration: 10-25 Tools/Task, 3-7 Target, 5-10 Distractors]
        D --> E[2. Prompt Creation: Natural Language, Multi-Hop Reasoning, No Explicit Tool Names]
        E --> F[3. Reference Trajectory: Minimal Tool Call Sequence, Diagnostic Use Only]
        F --> G[4. Claims List: Atomic, Verifiable Claims from Tool Outputs]
    end

    subgraph Quality Assurance
        G --> H[Human Review Layer 1: Domain Expert Review (Correctness, Solvability)]
        H --> I[Human Review Layer 2: Prompt Naturalness Validation (No Tool Name Leakage)]
        I --> J[Automated LLM Verification: Claims List Completeness, Trajectory Consistency]
        J --> K[Quality Control Samples: Random Manual Review for Systematic Issues]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Methodology
        K --> L[Claim Verification: Agent Answer vs. Claims List (Fulfilled, Partially, Not)]
        L --> M[Coverage Scoring: Average Claim Scores (1, 0.5, 0)]
        M --> N{Pass/Fail Determination: Coverage Score >= 0.75 Threshold}
    end

    N -- Pass --> O[Benchmark Dataset Release (500-Task Public Subset)]
    N -- Fail --> P[Diagnostic Analysis & Iteration]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 36 real production MCP servers covering 220 tools across search, analytics, productivity, finance, and coding domains"] --> B["Design 1,000 single-turn prompts requiring 3-6 tool calls, avoiding explicit tool names and requiring cross-server orchestration"]
    B["Design 1,000 single-turn prompts requiring 3-6 tool calls, avoiding explicit tool names and requiring cross-server orchestration"] --> C["Configure each task with 10-25 exposed tools: 3-7 target tools from 2+ servers plus 5-10 plausible distractors"]
    C["Configure each task with 10-25 exposed tools: 3-7 target tools from 2+ servers plus 5-10 plausible distractors"] --> D["Author reference trajectory documenting minimal tool call sequence, dependencies, arguments, and conditional branch points per task"]
    D["Author reference trajectory documenting minimal tool call sequence, dependencies, arguments, and conditional branch points per task"] --> E["Define atomic factual claims list for each task, grounded exclusively in tool outputs, enabling partial-credit scoring"]
    E["Define atomic factual claims list for each task, grounded exclusively in tool outputs, enabling partial-credit scoring"] --> F["Deploy servers in isolated containers with sandboxed file systems and allow-listed network egress mirroring production constraints"]
    F["Deploy servers in isolated containers with sandboxed file systems and allow-listed network egress mirroring production constraints"] --> G["Evaluate agent final answers against claims-based rubric, awarding partial credit for satisfied factual claims"]
    G["Evaluate agent final answers against claims-based rubric, awarding partial credit for satisfied factual claims"] --> H["Generate diagnostics on tool discovery, parameterization, syntax, error recovery, and efficiency using reference trajectories"]

name: MCP-Bench
intro: MCP-Bench是一个基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的评测基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实多步任务中的工具使用能力。它连接了28个MCP服务器和250个工具，涵盖金融、旅行、科学计算等领域，测试模型在工具检索、多步规划和跨域协作方面的表现。
build_method: 专家构建, 混合
metric: Tool-level schema understanding and usage, Trajectory-level planning, Task completion
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: MCP-Bench is an evaluation benchmark based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), designed to assess large language models' ability to use tools in real multi-step tasks. It connects 28 MCP servers and 250 tools across domains such as finance, travel, and scientific computing, testing models on tool retrieval, multi-step planning, and cross-domain collaboration.

name: MCP-Universe
intro: 模型上下文协议（MCP）已成为连接大型语言模型到外部数据源和工具的变革性标准。现有基准过于简单，未能捕捉真实应用挑战。MCP-Universe是首个全面基准，旨在通过与真实世界MCP服务器交互，评估LLM在现实和困难任务中的表现。它涵盖6个核心领域，涉及11个不同的MCP服务器，包括位置导航、仓库管理、金融分析、3D设计、浏览器自动化和网页搜索。
eval_feature: 长文本, 零样本, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Long Context, Zero-shot, Process evaluation, Tool invocation
intro_en: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a transformative standard connecting large language models to external data sources and tools. Existing benchmarks are overly simplistic and fail to capture real-world challenges. MCP-Universe is the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate LLM performance on realistic and difficult tasks through interaction with real-world MCP servers. It covers six core domains across 11 different MCP servers, including location navigation, warehouse management, financial analysis, 3D design, browser automation, and web search.

flowchart TD

    D --> D2(Repository Management)

    D --> D4(3D Design)
    D --> D5(Browser Automation)
    D --> D6(Web Searching)
    D --> E[Evaluation Implementation: Execution-based Evaluators]
    E --> E1[Format Evaluators: Agent Compliance]
    E --> E2[Static Evaluators: Time-Invariant Content]
    E --> E3[Dynamic Evaluators: Real-Time Ground Truth]
    E --> F[Evaluation Process: LLM Interaction with MCP Servers]
    F --> G{Evaluation Results: SOTA Model Limitations}
    G --> H[Challenges: Long-Context & Unknown-Tools]
    H --> I[Open-Source Framework Release: UI Support]
scale_en: 6 items core domains, 11 items MCP servers

name: MCPMark
intro: MCPMark是一个旨在评估大语言模型（LLMs）与外部系统交互能力的基准测试。它由127个高质量任务组成，这些任务由领域专家和AI智能体共同创建，每个任务都包含一个初始状态和自动验证脚本。MCPMark通过模拟真实世界的工作流程，要求LLMs进行更丰富和多样化的环境交互，涉及广泛的创建、读取、更新和删除（CRUD）操作，以全面评估LLMs作为通用智能体的能力。
org: EVAL SYS, NUS TRAIL, LobeHub, University of British Columbia, National University of Singapore, West
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MCPMark is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to interact with external systems. It consists of 127 high-quality tasks co-created by domain experts and AI agents, each featuring an initial state and an automated verification script. By simulating real-world workflows, MCPMark requires LLMs to perform richer and more diverse environment interactions, covering a wide range of create, read, update, and delete (CRUD) operations, to comprehensively assess LLMs' capabilities as general-purpose agents.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD

    F -- Update --> I[环境交互: 更新]
    F -- Delete --> J[环境交互: 删除]
    G --> K[任务Validation]
    H --> K
    I --> K
    J --> K
    K --> L[Evaluation框架: 最小代理框架]
    L --> M[代理框架: 工具调用循环]
    M --> N[LLMEvaluation: 尖端模型]
    N --> O[性能指标: pass@1, pass^4]
    O --> P[行为指标: 执行回合, 工具调用]
    P --> Q[结果分析]
    Q --> R[基准发布]

    G["Reset environment to original initial state to prevent side effects and enable repeated evaluation"] --> H["Compute pass@1, pass@4, and pass^4 metrics across independent runs to measure success and consistency"]

    B["领域专家与AI智能体通过协作流程迭代共同设计任务指令和验证脚本"] --> C["应用专家交叉审查和社区级验证以确保任务清晰性、真实性和质量"]
    C["应用专家交叉审查和社区级验证以确保任务清晰性、真实性和质量"] --> D["在沙盒环境中从精心设计的初始状态初始化每个任务并进行显式状态跟踪"]
    D["在沙盒环境中从精心设计的初始状态初始化每个任务并进行显式状态跟踪"] --> E["在工具调用循环中执行智能体调用MCP工具并解释响应直到无工具调用的最终响应"]
    E["在工具调用循环中执行智能体调用MCP工具并解释响应直到无工具调用的最终响应"] --> F["运行程序化验证脚本检查最终环境是否满足所有任务要求"]
    F["运行程序化验证脚本检查最终环境是否满足所有任务要求"] --> G["将环境重置为原始初始状态以防止副作用并支持重复评估"]
    G["将环境重置为原始初始状态以防止副作用并支持重复评估"] --> H["在独立运行中计算pass@1、pass@4和pass^4指标以衡量成功率和一致性"]

name: Med-HALT
intro: Med-HALT是专门用于评估大型语言模型在医疗领域幻觉问题的基准数据集，提供来自不同国家医疗检查的多样化数据，包含多种创新测试模式，涵盖推理和记忆幻觉两大类别。
build_method_en: Built based on medical examination data
eval_feature_en: Evaluates hallucination issues of large models in the medical field, multiple innovative testing modes
intro_en: Med-HALT is a benchmark dataset specifically designed to evaluate hallucination issues of large language models in the medical field. It provides diverse data from medical examinations across different countries and includes various innovative testing modes, covering both reasoning and memory hallucination categories.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Examination Data) --> B[Data Collection from Diverse Countries]
    B --> C[Data Preprocessing & Standardization]
    C --> D[Hallucination Test Pattern Generation]
    D --> E[Medical Expert Review]
    E --> F{Data Validation}
    F -->|Pass| G(Med-HALT Dataset)
    F -->|Fail| H[Refine Data]
    H --> E
    G --> I[LLM Hallucination Evaluation]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
    J --> K(Hallucination Reduction Insights)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect MCQs from medical exams in Spain, India, U.S., and Taiwan spanning multiple subdisciplines"] --> B["Curate 18,866 samples for reasoning hallucination tests across seven medical examination datasets"]
    B["Curate 18,866 samples for reasoning hallucination tests across seven medical examination datasets"] --> C["Gather 4,916 PubMed samples with abstracts, PMIDs, titles, and links for memory tests"]
    C["Gather 4,916 PubMed samples with abstracts, PMIDs, titles, and links for memory tests"] --> D["Design three reasoning tests: False Confidence Test, None of the Above, and Fake Questions"]
    D["Design three reasoning tests: False Confidence Test, None of the Above, and Fake Questions"] --> E["Design four memory-based tests to evaluate biomedical information retrieval from encoded training data"]
    E["Design four memory-based tests to evaluate biomedical information retrieval from encoded training data"] --> F["Evaluate Text Davinci, GPT-3.5, LlaMa-2, MPT, and Falcon on all hallucination test modalities"]
    F["Evaluate Text Davinci, GPT-3.5, LlaMa-2, MPT, and Falcon on all hallucination test modalities"] --> G["Measure binary correctness for reasoning and retrieval tasks to assess hallucination tendencies"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集西班牙、印度、美国和台湾医学考试的多学科选择题"] --> B["整理七个医学考试数据集共18866个推理幻觉测试样本"]
    B["整理七个医学考试数据集共18866个推理幻觉测试样本"] --> C["收集4916个含摘要、PMID、标题和链接的PubMed样本"]
    C["收集4916个含摘要、PMID、标题和链接的PubMed样本"] --> D["设计三种推理测试:错误置信度、无正确答案和虚假问题"]
    D["设计三种推理测试:错误置信度、无正确答案和虚假问题"] --> E["设计四种记忆测试评估从编码训练数据检索生物医学信息"]
    E["设计四种记忆测试评估从编码训练数据检索生物医学信息"] --> F["在所有幻觉测试模式上评估五个大语言模型"]
    F["在所有幻觉测试模式上评估五个大语言模型"] --> G["测量推理和检索任务的二元正确性以评估幻觉倾向"]

name: MedAgentBench
intro: MedAgentBench是一个广泛的评估套件，旨在评测大型语言模型在医疗记录环境中的智能体能力。它包含300个由医生编写的临床任务和100名患者的真实数据，在一个符合FHIR标准的交互式环境中进行，以推动模型在复杂医疗任务中的规划和工具利用能力。
scale: 300个任务, 100个患者, 70万个数据元素
intro_en: MedAgentBench is a comprehensive evaluation suite designed to assess large language models' agent capabilities in medical record environments. It includes 300 clinician-written clinical tasks and real data from 100 patients, conducted within an interactive environment compliant with FHIR standards, aiming to advance models' planning and tool-use abilities in complex medical tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real Patient Records) --> B[Collect Patient Data]
    C(Human Medical Expertise) --> D[Design Clinical Tasks]
    B --> E[Structure Patient Records]
    D --> F[Formulate & Refine Tasks]
    E --> G{{FHIR Standard Compliance}}
    F --> H{{Human Doctor Annotation}}
    G --> I[Integrate into FHIR Environment]
    H --> I
    I --> J(MedAgentBench Dataset)
    J --> K[LLM Agent Evaluation]
    K --> L[Assess Agent Capabilities]
scale_en: 300 tasks, 100 items patients, 700,000 items data elements
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Two physicians submit 300 clinically derived tasks across 10 categories for inpatient and outpatient scenarios"] --> B["Sample 100 patients with sodium lab tests from deidentified STARR clinical data warehouse"]
    B["Sample 100 patients with sodium lab tests from deidentified STARR clinical data warehouse"] --> C["Extract five years of lab results, vital signs, procedures, diagnoses, and medications per patient"]
    C["Extract five years of lab results, vital signs, procedures, diagnoses, and medications per patient"] --> D["Generate fake MRNs, names, phone numbers, and addresses using Faker library for deidentification"]
    D["Generate fake MRNs, names, phone numbers, and addresses using Faker library for deidentification"] --> E["Build FHIR-compliant interactive environment using HAPI FHIR JPA and upload patient profiles via POST"]
    E["Build FHIR-compliant interactive environment using HAPI FHIR JPA and upload patient profiles via POST"] --> F["Deploy agent orchestrator with nine FHIR functions using AgentBench framework for baseline testing"]
    F["Deploy agent orchestrator with nine FHIR functions using AgentBench framework for baseline testing"] --> G["Manually curate graders and reference solutions for each task category with rule-based sanity checks"]
    G["Manually curate graders and reference solutions for each task category with rule-based sanity checks"] --> H["Evaluate LLMs using pass@1 task success rate comparing agent responses to reference solutions"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["两名医生提交300个临床任务涵盖10类住院和门诊场景"] --> B["从STARR数据仓库抽取100名有钠检测的患者"]
    B["从STARR数据仓库抽取100名有钠检测的患者"] --> C["提取每位患者五年的检验、体征、诊断和用药数据"]
    C["提取每位患者五年的检验、体征、诊断和用药数据"] --> D["用Faker库生成虚拟病历号、姓名、电话和地址"]
    D["用Faker库生成虚拟病历号、姓名、电话和地址"] --> E["用HAPI FHIR JPA构建符合FHIR标准的交互环境并上传数据"]
    E["用HAPI FHIR JPA构建符合FHIR标准的交互环境并上传数据"] --> F["基于AgentBench框架部署含九个FHIR函数的智能体编排器"]
    F["基于AgentBench框架部署含九个FHIR函数的智能体编排器"] --> G["为各任务类别人工编写评分器和参考解决方案及规则检查"]
    G["为各任务类别人工编写评分器和参考解决方案及规则检查"] --> H["用pass@1任务成功率评估模型并对比参考答案"]

name: MedAlign
intro: MedAlign是由临床医生生成的电子病历指令遵循评测数据集，包含983条临床指令和303条人工参考回复，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实医疗场景中的指令遵循和EHR处理能力。
metric: 临床医生评分（准确性, 质量）
task_type: 指令遵循, 文本生成
scale: 983条指令, 303条人工参考回复, 276份电子病历
build_method_en: Manual annotation, generated by clinical doctors
eval_feature_en: Evaluates LLM's instruction following and electronic medical record processing capabilities in the medical field
intro_en: MedAlign is an electronic health record instruction-following evaluation dataset generated by clinicians, containing 983 clinical instructions and 303 human reference responses. It aims to assess large language models' instruction-following and EHR processing capabilities in real medical scenarios.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Knowledge Bases) --> B[Expert Identification of Scenarios]
    B --> C[Instruction Formulation by Experts]
    C --> D[Expected Response Generation]
    D --> E{Expert Review & Validation}
    E -->|Pass| F(MedAlign Benchmark Dataset)
    E -->|Fail| G[Refinement & Correction]
    G --> C
    F --> H[LLM Evaluation]
    H --> I(Evaluation Metrics)
    I --> J[Benchmark Results]
scale_en: 983 entries instructions, 303 entries human reference responses, 276 electronic medical records
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Recruit 15 clinicians from 7 specialties to submit instructions via online form"] --> B["Convert 276 longitudinal EHRs from OMOP CDM format into XML markup documents"]
    B["Convert 276 longitudinal EHRs from OMOP CDM format into XML markup documents"] --> C["Match instructions to patient EHRs using BM25 retrieval with metadata queries"]
    C["Match instructions to patient EHRs using BM25 retrieval with metadata queries"] --> D["Manually review instruction-EHR pairs to assess binary relevance of pairings"]
    D["Manually review instruction-EHR pairs to assess binary relevance of pairings"] --> E["Assign 303 instruction-EHR pairs to clinicians to write gold reference responses"]
    E["Assign 303 instruction-EHR pairs to clinicians to write gold reference responses"] --> F["Generate responses from 6 general domain LLMs for instruction-EHR pairs"]
    F["Generate responses from 6 general domain LLMs for instruction-EHR pairs"] --> G["Have clinicians rank LLM response accuracy and quality against gold responses"]
    G["Have clinicians rank LLM response accuracy and quality against gold responses"] --> H["Compute correlations between clinician rankings and automated NLG metrics"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["招募15名临床医生通过在线表单提交指令"] --> B["将276份纵向病历转换为XML标记文档"]
    B["将276份纵向病历转换为XML标记文档"] --> C["使用BM25检索将指令匹配到患者病历"]
    C["使用BM25检索将指令匹配到患者病历"] --> D["人工审查指令-病历配对的相关性"]
    D["人工审查指令-病历配对的相关性"] --> E["分配303对指令-病历给临床医生撰写参考答案"]
    E["分配303对指令-病历给临床医生撰写参考答案"] --> F["用6个通用大模型生成指令-病历对的回复"]
    F["用6个通用大模型生成指令-病历对的回复"] --> G["由临床医生对模型回复准确性和质量排序"]
    G["由临床医生对模型回复准确性和质量排序"] --> H["计算临床医生排序与自动化指标的相关性"]

name: MedBench
intro: MedBench是清华大学发布的全面、标准化的中文医疗大模型评测基准，涵盖43个临床专业，包含30万道题目，采用动态评估机制防止捷径学习，确保医疗大模型在实际部署前的有效性。
eval_feature: 全面标准化评测，43个临床专业，动态评估防止捷径学习
eval_feature_en: Comprehensive standardized evaluation, 43 clinical specialties, dynamic evaluation to prevent shortcut learning
intro_en: MedBench, released by Tsinghua University, is a comprehensive and standardized Chinese medical large model benchmark covering 43 clinical specialties with 300,000 questions. It employs a dynamic evaluation mechanism to prevent shortcut learning, ensuring the effectiveness of medical large models before deployment.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Medical Knowledge Bases) --> C[Data Collection & Extraction]
    B(Clinical Guidelines & Literature) --> C
    C --> D[Data Integration & Standardization]
    D --> E[Question Generation/Formulation]
    E --> F{Medical Expert Review}
    F -->|Approved| G[Automated Quality Checks]
    F -->|Rejected| E
    G --> H(MedBench Dataset\n300K Questions, 43 Specialties)
    H --> I{{Automated Evaluation System}}
    I --> J[Medical LLM Evaluation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Assemble 300,901 questions across 43 clinical specialties for comprehensive coverage"] --> B["Organize questions into five dimensions: understanding, generation, QA, reasoning, and safety/ethics"]
    B["Organize questions into five dimensions: understanding, generation, QA, reasoning, and safety/ethics"] --> C["Deploy cloud-based infrastructure with physical separation of questions and ground truth"]
    C["Deploy cloud-based infrastructure with physical separation of questions and ground truth"] --> D["Implement circular shuffling on answer choices to prevent shortcut learning"]
    D["Implement circular shuffling on answer choices to prevent shortcut learning"] --> E["Apply random prompt matching for dynamic evaluation mechanisms"]
    E["Apply random prompt matching for dynamic evaluation mechanisms"] --> F["Execute fully automatic evaluation on submitted medical LLMs"]
    F["Execute fully automatic evaluation on submitted medical LLMs"] --> G["Generate reproducible results and validate alignment with medical professionals' perspectives"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["汇集30万道题目覆盖43个临床专业"] --> B["将题目组织为理解、生成、问答、推理和安全伦理五个维度"]
    B["将题目组织为理解、生成、问答、推理和安全伦理五个维度"] --> C["部署云端基础设施物理隔离题目与标准答案"]
    C["部署云端基础设施物理隔离题目与标准答案"] --> D["实施选项循环打乱防止捷径学习"]
    D["实施选项循环打乱防止捷径学习"] --> E["应用随机提示匹配实现动态评估"]
    E["应用随机提示匹配实现动态评估"] --> F["对提交的医疗大模型执行全自动评估"]
    F["对提交的医疗大模型执行全自动评估"] --> G["生成可复现结果并验证与医学专家观点的一致性"]

name: MedBullets
intro: MedBullets数据集与JAMA临床挑战共同构建，旨在评测大型语言模型对需复杂推理的医学难题的能力，超越标准医学考试的考察范围。MedBullets包含模拟临床多项选择题，配有专家撰写的详尽解析，更好地评估模型在真实临床场景中的推理和决策能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
eval_feature: 领域特定
intro_en: The MedBullets dataset, developed alongside the JAMA Clinical Challenge, aims to evaluate large language models' ability to tackle complex medical reasoning tasks beyond standard medical exams. MedBullets includes simulated clinical multiple-choice questions with expert-written detailed explanations, better assessing models' reasoning and decision-making in real clinical scenarios.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MedbulletsDataset Construction] --> B(数据源: X平台公开推文)
    B --> C(Data Collection: 2022年4月-2023年12月)
    C --> D{筛选问题类型}
    D -- USMLE Step 2&3风格 --> E(问题选择: 308个问题)
    E --> F(内容排除: 排除图像，只保留文本)
    F --> G(答案和解释生成: Experts撰写)
    G --> H(数据集组成: 病例描述+问题+5个选项+解释)
    H --> I{Quality Control与Validation}
    I -- 经验研究 --> J(鲁棒性与无污染Validation)
    J --> K(数据集版本: Medbullets-5和Medbullets-4)
    K --> L[基准Evaluation: LLM模型Evaluation]
    L --> M(Evaluation方法: X→Y, X→RY, XY*→R提示策略)
    M --> N(Evaluation指标: 自动与人工Evaluation解释质量)
    N --> O(Final Dataset)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 1524 clinical cases from JAMA Clinical Challenge archive spanning 2013-2023 across 13 domains"] --> B["Exclude image-based cases to focus on text-only clinical questions with expert explanations"]
    B["Exclude image-based cases to focus on text-only clinical questions with expert explanations"] --> C["Collect 308 Medbullets Step 2/3 questions via X posts from April 2022 to December 2023"]
    C["Collect 308 Medbullets Step 2/3 questions via X posts from April 2022 to December 2023"] --> D["Structure each question as multiple-choice with case description, options, and reference explanation"]
    D["Structure each question as multiple-choice with case description, options, and reference explanation"] --> E["Create 4-option and 5-option versions of Medbullets for comparison with MedQA"]
    E["Create 4-option and 5-option versions of Medbullets for comparison with MedQA"] --> F["Evaluate seven LLMs using three prompting strategies: direct answer, two-stage CoT, and answer-then-explain"]
    F["Evaluate seven LLMs using three prompting strategies: direct answer, two-stage CoT, and answer-then-explain"] --> G["Conduct automatic and human evaluation of model-generated answers and explanations"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从JAMA临床挑战档案收集1524例跨13领域的2013-2023年病例"] --> B["排除图像病例，聚焦带专家解析的纯文本临床问题"]
    B["排除图像病例，聚焦带专家解析的纯文本临床问题"] --> C["通过X帖子收集308道2022年4月至2023年12月的Medbullets Step 2/3题目"]
    C["通过X帖子收集308道2022年4月至2023年12月的Medbullets Step 2/3题目"] --> D["将每题构建为含病例描述、选项和参考解析的多选题"]
    D["将每题构建为含病例描述、选项和参考解析的多选题"] --> E["创建Medbullets的4选项和5选项版本以对比MedQA"]
    E["创建Medbullets的4选项和5选项版本以对比MedQA"] --> F["用三种提示策略评估七个LLM：直接回答、两阶段CoT和先答后解释"]
    F["用三种提示策略评估七个LLM：直接回答、两阶段CoT和先答后解释"] --> G["对模型生成的答案和解释进行自动和人工评估"]

name: MedCalc-Bench
intro: MedCalc-Bench是首个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）医学计算能力的数据集。它包含来自55个不同医学计算任务的1100个人工审核实例，每个实例都包含一份患者记录、一个计算特定医疗数值的问题、一个标准答案以及详细的解题步骤说明。该研究旨在揭示LLM在医疗场景下进行定量知识和推理方面存在的不足，以期推动未来LLM在各种临床计算任务中的改进。
build_method: 混合, LLM生成, 专家构建
task_type: 开放式问答, 数学问题, 抽取
eval_feature: 领域特定, 思维链
intro_en: MedCalc-Bench is the first dataset designed to evaluate the medical calculation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It includes 1,100 manually reviewed instances from 55 different medical calculation tasks. Each instance contains a patient record, a question requiring the calculation of a specific medical value, a standard answer, and detailed solution steps. This study aims to identify the shortcomings of LLMs in quantitative knowledge and reasoning within medical contexts, with the goal of driving future improvements in LLM performance across various clinical calculation tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[选择55个医学计算任务] --> B{任务分类}
    B -- 基于规则 --> C[19个基于规则的计算器]
    B -- 基于方程 --> D[36个基于方程的计算器]
    C --> E[患者病历收集]
    D --> E
    E --> F[病历收集与属性提取]
    F -- 使用GPT-3.5-Turbo筛选 --> G[筛选合格病历]
    G -- 使用GPT-4提取属性 --> H[提取属性值]
    H --> I{数据Validation与丰富}
    I -- 医疗专业人员Validation --> J[Validation与纠正属性值]
    J -- 合成病历 (基于方程) --> K[为21个计算器生成20个合成病历]
    J -- 临床医生合成病历 (基于规则) --> L[为11个计算器生成20个临床病历]
    K --> M[答案与解释生成]
    L --> M
    M -- 使用模板生成 --> N[生成分步解释与最终答案]
    N --> O(MedCalc-Bench数据集)
    O --> P[LLM系统Evaluation]
    P -- 零样本直接提示 --> Q[EvaluationLLM性能]
    P -- 零样本思维链提示 --> Q
    P -- 单样本思维链提示 --> Q
    Q --> R{Evaluation结果}
    R -- 规则计算器 --> S[精确匹配]
    R -- 方程计算器 (实验室/物理/剂量) --> T[5%误差范围内]
    R -- 方程计算器 (日期) --> U[精确匹配]
    S --> V[最终Evaluation报告]
    T --> V
    U --> V
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 55 popular medical calculators from MDCalc, categorized as rule-based or equation-based"] --> B["Compile Open-Patients dataset with 180k public patient notes from multiple clinical sources"]
    B["Compile Open-Patients dataset with 180k public patient notes from multiple clinical sources"] --> C["Use GPT-3.5-Turbo to identify eligible notes and GPT-4 to extract required attribute values"]
    C["Use GPT-3.5-Turbo to identify eligible notes and GPT-4 to extract required attribute values"] --> D["Medical professionals verify extracted values and synthesize notes for 21 calculators lacking eligible data"]
    D["Medical professionals verify extracted values and synthesize notes for 21 calculators lacking eligible data"] --> E["Generate step-by-step explanations and final answers using calculator-specific templates"]
    E["Generate step-by-step explanations and final answers using calculator-specific templates"] --> F["Evaluate 8 LLMs using zero-shot direct, zero-shot CoT, and one-shot CoT prompting"]
    F["Evaluate 8 LLMs using zero-shot direct, zero-shot CoT, and one-shot CoT prompting"] --> G["Apply task-specific accuracy criteria: exact match for rule-based, 5% tolerance for equation-based"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从MDCalc选择55个常用医学计算器并分类"] --> B["汇编18万份公开患者记录构建数据集"]
    B["汇编18万份公开患者记录构建数据集"] --> C["用GPT-3.5筛选记录并用GPT-4提取属性"]
    C["用GPT-3.5筛选记录并用GPT-4提取属性"] --> D["医学专家验证数据并为21个计算器合成记录"]

    E["用模板生成逐步解释和最终答案"] --> F["用三种提示策略评估8个大语言模型"]
    F["用三种提示策略评估8个大语言模型"] --> G["应用任务特定准确率标准进行评分"]

name: MedHallu
intro: MedHallu是首个专门用于检测大型语言模型医疗幻觉的综合基准，包含10000个高质量问答对，评估模型在医疗领域生成看似合理但事实不准确输出的倾向。
eval_feature_en: The first benchmark focusing on medical hallucination detection, 10K high-quality QA pairs
intro_en: MedHallu is the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to detect medical hallucinations in large language models. It contains 10,000 high-quality QA pairs to evaluate models' tendencies to generate plausible but factually incorrect outputs in the medical domain.

    L --> N[Hallucination Rate Metrics]

name: MedHELM
intro: MedHELM提出了一个可扩展的医学任务评估框架，弥补了现有医学许可考试评测无法充分反映临床实践复杂性的不足。框架基于29名临床专家验证的分类体系，涵盖5大类、22子类和121项任务。包含35个基准套件（17个现有，18个新建），并通过LLM评审机制和成本效益分析系统地比较模型表现。
metric: LLM-as-Judge, Win Rate, Accuracy, Exact Match
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 分类, 生成, 对话
eval_feature: 多轮, 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Classification, Generation, Dialogue
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, LLM Generation
intro_en: MedHELM proposes a scalable medical task evaluation framework that addresses the limitations of existing medical licensing exam assessments in fully reflecting the complexity of clinical practice. The framework is based on a classification system validated by 29 clinical experts, covering 5 major categories, 22 subcategories, and 121 tasks. It includes 35 benchmark suites (17 existing, 18 newly created) and systematically compares model performance through an LLM review mechanism and cost-effectiveness analysis.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Medical Data Sources) --> B[Data Identification & Selection]
    B --> C[Data Extraction & Collection]
    C --> D[Data Preprocessing & Anonymization]
    D --> E[Scenario & Task Definition]
    E --> F[Task-Specific Data Adaptation]
    F --> G{Medical Expert Review}
    G -->|Validated| H[Clinical Relevance Assessment]
    G -->|Rejected| I[Data & Task Refinement]
    I --> F
    H --> J(MedHELM Curated Dataset)
    J --> K[LLM Inference & Response Generation]
    K --> L[Automated Metric Calculation]
    L --> M[Human Evaluation & Error Analysis]
    M --> N[Comprehensive Framework Evaluation]
metric_en: LLM-as-Judge, Win Rate, Accuracy, Exact Match
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Develop initial taxonomy with 5 categories, 21 subcategories, and 98 tasks"] --> B["29 clinicians review taxonomy, rate comprehensiveness, and provide 107 refinement comments"]
    B["29 clinicians review taxonomy, rate comprehensiveness, and provide 107 refinement comments"] --> C["Refine taxonomy to final form: 5 categories, 22 subcategories, 121 tasks"]
    C["Refine taxonomy to final form: 5 categories, 22 subcategories, 121 tasks"] --> D["Assemble 35 benchmarks: 17 existing, 5 re-formulated, 13 new EHR-based"]
    D["Assemble 35 benchmarks: 17 existing, 5 re-formulated, 13 new EHR-based"] --> E["Ensure complete coverage of all 22 subcategories across benchmark suite"]
    E["Ensure complete coverage of all 22 subcategories across benchmark suite"] --> F["Evaluate nine frontier LLMs using LLM-jury for open-ended and automated metrics for closed-ended tasks"]

    G["Validate LLM-jury against clinician ratings, achieving ICC 0.47 agreement"] --> H["Conduct cost-performance analysis using win-rate and macro-average across all benchmarks"]

    C["完善分类体系至5类22子类121任务"] --> D["组建35个基准含17个现有5个重构13个新EHR基准"]

name: MEDIQA-QA
intro: MEDIQA-QA是ACL BioNLP Workshop发布的医疗问答推理基准，旨在推动自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别在医疗问答领域的应用，要求参与者对提供的答案进行正确性判断和重新排序。
task_type: 答案验证, 答案排序
eval_feature: 医疗问答推理，自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别
eval_feature_en: Medical QA reasoning, natural language inference and question entailment recognition
intro_en: MEDIQA-QA is a medical question answering reasoning benchmark released by the ACL BioNLP Workshop. It aims to advance the application of natural language inference and question entailment recognition in the medical QA domain, requiring participants to assess the correctness of provided answers and reorder them accordingly.

name: MedMCQA
intro: MedMCQA是一个大规模多项选择题问答数据集，针对真实医学入学考试题目设计。包含来自AIIMS和NEET PG考试的19.4万道高质量题目，涵盖2400个医疗主题和21个医学科目。该数据集测试模型在广泛医学领域的推理能力。
build_method: 从在线资源和书籍中收集，这些资源和书籍汇集了由医学专业人士创建的多个模拟测试和在线测试系列。
build_method_en: Collected from online resources and books, which gather multiple simulated tests and online test series created by medical professionals.
intro_en: MedMCQA is a large-scale multiple-choice question answering dataset designed for real medical entrance exam questions. It contains 194,000 high-quality questions from AIIMS and NEET PG exams, covering 2,400 medical topics and 21 medical subjects. This dataset evaluates models' reasoning abilities across a wide range of medical fields.

194K MCQs, 2.4K Topics, 21 Subjects)

10+ Reasoning Abilities]

name: MedMT-Bench
intro: MedMT-Bench是一个针对长医疗对话的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在医疗场景中的长上下文记忆、理解、抗干扰性、自我纠正、安全防御、指令澄清以及多指令响应能力。该基准测试涵盖了诊断前、诊断中和诊断后阶段，数据通过场景合成并由专家进行精炼，共包含400个测试用例，平均22轮对话。它采用LLM作为评估协议，通过实例级评估标准和原子测试点来评估LLM在医疗对话场景中的长期记忆、安全性和指令遵循方面的表现。
build_method: 混合
metric: Accuracy, Human-LLM agreement, Consistency Rate, Overall Accuracy
task_type: 长多轮指令遵循, 医疗对话理解, 安全评估
eval_feature: 长上下文记忆, 安全防御, 指令澄清, 多指令响应, 合成数据生成, 专家精炼, 原子测试点
task_type_en: Long multi-turn instruction following, medical dialogue understanding, safety assessment
eval_feature_en: Long context memory, safety defense, instruction clarification, multi-instruction response, synthetic data generation, expert refinement, atomic test points
intro_en: MedMT-Bench is a challenging benchmark for long medical dialogues, designed to evaluate large language models' long-context memory, comprehension, robustness, self-correction, safety defense, instruction clarification, and multi-instruction response capabilities in medical scenarios. The benchmark covers pre-diagnosis, diagnosis, and post-diagnosis stages, with data synthesized from scenarios and refined by experts, comprising 400 test cases with an average of 22 dialogue turns each. It uses LLMs as the evaluation protocol, assessing their long-term memory, safety, and instruction adherence in medical dialogue contexts through instance-level evaluation criteria and atomic test points.

    G --> H

    H --> J(原子测试点)
    J --> K[原子测试点生成与Validation]
    K --> L(每个多轮样本配对测试点)
    I --> M[Expert Annotation]
    L --> M
    M --> N{人-LLM一致性Validation}
    N -- 91.94%一致 --> O[最终基准数据集]
    N -- 低于91.94% --> C

    E["Validate LLM-as-judge protocol against expert annotations to ensure evaluation reliability"] --> F["Evaluate model responses using instance-level rubrics and atomic test points"]
    F["Evaluate model responses using instance-level rubrics and atomic test points"] --> G["Calculate binary assessment scores for each capability across diagnosis stages"]

name: MedNLI
intro: MedNLI是一个面向临床领域的自然语言推理（NLI）数据集。该数据集由医生基于患者的真实病历进行标注，旨在推动模型在知识密集且数据有限的专业领域（如医疗）中的应用。研究者通过利用开放域数据的迁移学习和医学术语等领域知识，有效提升了模型的性能。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 自然语言推理, 分类
intro_en: MedNLI is a clinical domain natural language inference (NLI) dataset. It is annotated by doctors based on real patient records, aiming to advance model applications in knowledge-intensive and data-scarce specialized fields like medicine. Researchers have effectively improved model performance by leveraging transfer learning from open-domain data and incorporating domain knowledge such as medical terminology.

    H --> I{生成假设句}

    I -- 可能为真 --> K(中立)
    I -- 肯定为假 --> L(矛盾)
    H --> M[标注指南]
    M --> N{Quality Control}
    N -- 丢弃无效前提 --> O(有效前提)
    N -- 飞行研究与协议一致性计算 --> P(高一致性标注)
    P --> Q[数据集拆分]
    Q --> R(Training Set)
    Q --> S(开发集)
    Q --> T(Test Set)
    T --> U[Evaluation方法]
    U --> V[基于特征的系统]
    U --> W[神经网络模型]

    F["Evaluate models using transfer learning from open-domain datasets like SNLI"] --> G["Incorporate domain knowledge from medical terminologies and external lexical sources"]

    E["临床医生为蕴含、中立和矛盾类别撰写假设句"] --> F["使用从SNLI等开放域数据集的迁移学习评估模型"]
    F["使用从SNLI等开放域数据集的迁移学习评估模型"] --> G["整合来自医学术语和外部词汇源的领域知识"]

name: MedQA
intro: MedQA是首个自由格式多项选择开放领域医学问答数据集，来源于专业医学执业考试。它涵盖英语、简体中文和繁体中文三种语言，旨在对现有的开放领域问答系统构成挑战，并推动自然语言处理领域更强大模型的发展。
build_method: 考试题, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MedQA is the first free-format multiple-choice open-domain medical question answering dataset, derived from professional medical licensing exams. It covers English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese, aiming to challenge existing open-domain QA systems and promote the development of more powerful models in natural language processing.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Professional Physician Licensing Exams) -->|Source Data| B[Collect Exam Questions]
    B --> C(Raw Exam Questions)
    C --> D[Format to Multiple-Choice QA]
    D --> E[Translate & Align Languages]
    E --> F(Formatted & Multilingual QA Data)
    F --> G{Expert Review & Validation}
    G -->|Pass| I(MedQA Dataset\nLarge-scale, Multi-lingual)
    G -->|Fail| H[Refine Data]
    H --> G
    I --> J[Evaluate QA Models]
    J --> K(Medical QA Models)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect free-form multiple-choice questions from medical board exams in US, Mainland China, and Taiwan"] --> B["Organize questions into three language sets: English, traditional Chinese, and simplified Chinese"]
    B["Organize questions into three language sets: English, traditional Chinese, and simplified Chinese"] --> C["Assemble large-scale text materials from medical textbooks as knowledge bank for retrieval"]
    C["Assemble large-scale text materials from medical textbooks as knowledge bank for retrieval"] --> D["Implement document retriever to find relevant evidence from medical textbook collection"]
    D["Implement document retriever to find relevant evidence from medical textbook collection"] --> E["Apply machine comprehension model to read retrieved evidence and reason over information"]
    E["Apply machine comprehension model to read retrieved evidence and reason over information"] --> F["Combine retriever and reader sequentially using rule-based and neural methods"]
    F["Combine retriever and reader sequentially using rule-based and neural methods"] --> G["Evaluate test accuracy on English, traditional Chinese, and simplified Chinese question sets"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从美国、中国大陆和台湾医学执业考试中收集自由格式多项选择题"] --> B["将问题组织为英语、繁体中文和简体中文三个语言集"]
    B["将问题组织为英语、繁体中文和简体中文三个语言集"] --> C["从医学教科书中汇编大规模文本材料作为检索知识库"]
    C["从医学教科书中汇编大规模文本材料作为检索知识库"] --> D["实现文档检索器从医学教科书集合中查找相关证据"]
    D["实现文档检索器从医学教科书集合中查找相关证据"] --> E["应用机器阅读理解模型读取检索证据并进行推理"]
    E["应用机器阅读理解模型读取检索证据并进行推理"] --> F["使用基于规则和神经网络方法顺序组合检索器和阅读器"]
    F["使用基于规则和神经网络方法顺序组合检索器和阅读器"] --> G["在英语、繁体中文和简体中文问题集上评估测试准确率"]

name: MedS-Bench
intro: MedS-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在临床环境中表现的综合性基准。它涵盖了11个高级临床任务，如临床报告摘要、治疗建议和诊断等，旨在解决现有基准主要关注选择题的局限性。评测结果显示，即便是最先进的模型在处理这些复杂任务时也面临挑战。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 分类, 生成, 抽取, 摘要, 事实验证
eval_feature: 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Classification, Generation, Extraction, Summarization, Fact Verification
intro_en: MedS-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating large language models in clinical settings. It covers 11 advanced clinical tasks, such as clinical report summarization, treatment recommendations, and diagnosis, addressing the limitation of existing benchmarks that mainly focus on multiple-choice questions. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models face challenges in handling these complex tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Medical Data Sources) --> B[Data Collection & Aggregation]
    B --> C[Initial Data Cleaning & Preprocessing]
    C --> D[Medical Data Structuring & Anonymization]
    D --> E{Expert Review & Annotation}
    E -->|Pass| F{Quality Check & Refinement}
    E -->|Fail| C
    F -->|Refine| D
    F -->|Approved| G{{Task-Specific Formatting}}
    G --> H(MedS-Bench Final Dataset)
    H --> I[LLM Evaluation Framework]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis & Reporting]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 28 existing medical datasets covering 11 clinical task categories beyond multiple-choice questions"] --> B["Reformat each dataset into instruction-prompted question-answering structure with hand-crafted task definitions"]
    B["Reformat each dataset into instruction-prompted question-answering structure with hand-crafted task definitions"] --> C["Manually classify tasks by required skills: recalling facts from model or retrieving from context"]
    C["Manually classify tasks by required skills: recalling facts from model or retrieving from context"] --> D["Randomly sample approximately 1500 test cases per benchmark to manage evaluation costs"]
    D["Randomly sample approximately 1500 test cases per benchmark to manage evaluation costs"] --> E["Evaluate six mainstream medical LLMs using 3-shot prompting for clinical tasks"]
    E["Evaluate six mainstream medical LLMs using 3-shot prompting for clinical tasks"] --> F["Apply zero-shot prompting specifically for multiple-choice question answering tasks to align with prior studies"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集28个现有医学数据集涵盖11类临床任务"] --> B["将数据集重构为指令提示问答格式并手工编写任务定义"]
    B["将数据集重构为指令提示问答格式并手工编写任务定义"] --> C["按技能需求手动分类任务为模型回忆或上下文检索"]
    C["按技能需求手动分类任务为模型回忆或上下文检索"] --> D["每个基准随机抽样约1500个测试样例以控制成本"]
    D["每个基准随机抽样约1500个测试样例以控制成本"] --> E["用3样本提示评估六个主流医学大模型的临床任务表现"]
    E["用3样本提示评估六个主流医学大模型的临床任务表现"] --> F["对多选题任务采用零样本提示以对齐先前研究"]

name: MedSafetyBench
intro: MedSafetyBench是首个基于美国医学会医学伦理原则来评估大型语言模型医疗安全性的基准。它包含1800个有害医疗请求和相应的安全回应，旨在系统性地研究和提升大模型在医疗应用中的安全性。通过该基准的评估和微调，可以有效降低大模型在医疗领域应用的潜在风险。
build_method: LLM生成, 混合
task_type: 安全测试, 分类, 生成
eval_feature: 领域特定, 对抗性
intro_en: MedSafetyBench is the first benchmark for evaluating the medical safety of large language models based on the American Medical Association's medical ethics principles. It includes 1,800 harmful medical prompts and corresponding safe responses, aiming to systematically study and improve the safety of large models in medical applications. Evaluation and fine-tuning using this benchmark can effectively reduce potential risks of large models in the medical field.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Literature & Guidelines) --> B[Initial Data Collection]
    B --> C(Clinical Case Studies & Reports)
    C --> D{{Expert Annotation & Curation}}
    D --> E[Scenario Generation]
    E --> F{Safety Relevance Check}
    F -->|Relevant| G[Harmful Content Filtering]
    F -->|Irrelevant| H[Discard]
    G --> I[Expert Validation]
    I --> J(MedSafetyBench Final Dataset)
    J --> K[LLM Safety Evaluation]
    K --> L[Risk & Bias Assessment]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define medical safety based on AMA Principles of Medical Ethics"] --> B["Prompt GPT-4 to generate harmful medical requests violating each AMA principle"]
    B["Prompt GPT-4 to generate harmful medical requests violating each AMA principle"] --> C["Apply Greedy Coordinate Gradient jailbreaking to Llama-2-7b-chat for additional harmful requests"]
    C["Apply Greedy Coordinate Gradient jailbreaking to Llama-2-7b-chat for additional harmful requests"] --> D["Manually inspect and edit requests for quality, yielding 1,800 unique harmful medical requests"]
    D["Manually inspect and edit requests for quality, yielding 1,800 unique harmful medical requests"] --> E["Curate medical safety demonstrations pairing harmful requests with safe responses"]
    E["Curate medical safety demonstrations pairing harmful requests with safe responses"] --> F["Prompt LLMs with harmful requests from MedSafety-Eval and GenSafety-Eval datasets"]
    F["Prompt LLMs with harmful requests from MedSafety-Eval and GenSafety-Eval datasets"] --> G["Evaluate harmfulness of LLM responses to measure medical and general safety"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["基于AMA医学伦理原则定义医疗安全"] --> B["提示GPT-4生成违反各AMA原则的有害医疗请求"]
    B["提示GPT-4生成违反各AMA原则的有害医疗请求"] --> C["对Llama-2-7b-chat应用贪婪坐标梯度越狱技术"]
    C["对Llama-2-7b-chat应用贪婪坐标梯度越狱技术"] --> D["人工检查和编辑请求质量，生成1800个独特有害请求"]
    D["人工检查和编辑请求质量，生成1800个独特有害请求"] --> E["整理医疗安全示例，配对有害请求与安全回应"]
    E["整理医疗安全示例，配对有害请求与安全回应"] --> F["用数据集中的有害请求提示大语言模型"]
    F["用数据集中的有害请求提示大语言模型"] --> G["评估模型回应的有害性以衡量医疗和通用安全"]

name: MedXpertQA
intro: MedXpertQA是一个用于评估专家级医学知识和高级推理能力的基准。包含4460个问题，涵盖17个专业和11个身体系统，分为文本子集和多模态子集。多模态部分采用包含多样图像和丰富临床数据（如病历和检查结果）的专家级考试题目。
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MedXpertQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate expert-level medical knowledge and advanced reasoning abilities. It contains 4,460 questions covering 17 specialties and 11 body systems, divided into text and multimodal subsets. The multimodal subset features expert-level exam questions with diverse images and rich clinical data, such as medical records and test results.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[数据源收集] --> B[构建大规模题库]
    B --> C{题库来源: USMLE, COMLEX, 17个专业委员会考试, 3个图像丰富来源}
    C --> D[收集人类回答分布、解释和难度评级]
    D --> E[AIExpertsFiltering]
    E --> F{AIExperts尝试回答问题}
    F -- 全部正确 --> G[移除过简单问题]
    F -- 全部错误 --> H[保留有挑战性问题]
    H --> I[人类ExpertsFiltering]
    I --> J{使用Brier分数Evaluation问题难度}
    J --> K[根据医学Expert Annotation的难度进行分层抽样]
    K --> L[移除缺少标注的问题]
    L --> M[相似性Filtering]
    M --> N{使用MedCPT-Query-Encoder识别高相似度问题对}
    N -- 发现相似问题 --> O[移除较简单问题]
    O --> P[问题和选项增强]
    P --> Q{LLM重写问题 (gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet)}
    Q --> R[选项增强: 移除低质量干扰项, 增加选项数量]
    R --> S[数据合成以缓解数据泄露风险]
    S --> T[医学Experts审查]
    T --> U{医学Expert Review问题质量、事实准确性、选项有效性}
    U --> V[Final Dataset: MedXpertQA Text & MM]
    V --> W[Evaluation方法: 零样本CoT提示, 贪婪解码]
    W --> X[人类表现Evaluation基线]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Apply rigorous filtering to existing benchmarks like MedQA to increase difficulty"] --> B["Augment filtered questions to enhance challenge level and complexity"]
    B["Augment filtered questions to enhance challenge level and complexity"] --> C["Incorporate specialty board exam questions covering 17 specialties and 11 body systems"]
    C["Incorporate specialty board exam questions covering 17 specialties and 11 body systems"] --> D["Perform data synthesis to mitigate data leakage risk"]
    D["Perform data synthesis to mitigate data leakage risk"] --> E["Conduct multiple rounds of expert reviews to ensure accuracy and reliability"]
    E["Conduct multiple rounds of expert reviews to ensure accuracy and reliability"] --> F["Develop reasoning-oriented subset to assess o1-like models"]
    F["Develop reasoning-oriented subset to assess o1-like models"] --> G["Evaluate 18 leading text and multimodal models on both subsets"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["对MedQA等现有基准进行严格筛选以提高难度"] --> B["增强筛选后的题目以提升挑战性和复杂度"]
    B["增强筛选后的题目以提升挑战性和复杂度"] --> C["纳入涵盖17个专业和11个身体系统的专科考试题"]
    C["纳入涵盖17个专业和11个身体系统的专科考试题"] --> D["执行数据合成以降低数据泄露风险"]
    D["执行数据合成以降低数据泄露风险"] --> E["进行多轮专家审查以确保准确性和可靠性"]
    E["进行多轮专家审查以确保准确性和可靠性"] --> F["开发推理导向子集以评估o1类模型"]
    F["开发推理导向子集以评估o1类模型"] --> G["在两个子集上评估18个领先的文本和多模态模型"]

name: MemoryAgentBench
intro: MemoryAgentBench 是一个面向记忆型 LLM Agent 的多轮交互基准，围绕准确检索、测试时学习、长程理解和选择性遗忘四类核心记忆能力评估代理在增量信息环境中的表现。
build_method: 改造已有长文本数据集并纳入新构造数据集, 重组为多轮格式
eval_feature: 长文本, 多轮, 测试时学习
intro_en: MemoryAgentBench is a multi-turn benchmark for memory-enabled LLM agents. It evaluates agents in incremental information environments across accurate retrieval, test-time learning, long-range understanding, and selective forgetting.
build_method_en: Transforms existing long-context datasets and incorporates newly constructed datasets into a multi-turn format
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["划定四类记忆能力"] --> B["准确检索、测试时学习、长程理解、冲突 / 选择性遗忘"]
    B --> C["重构已有数据集并新增 EventQA 与 FactConsolidation"]
    C --> D["统一成 chunks、questions、answers 格式"]
    D --> E["把长内容切成顺序注入的记忆片段"]
    E --> F["采用 inject once, query multiple times 的交互设计"]
    F --> G["分别评测 long-context、RAG 与 agentic memory agents"]
    G --> H["统计各能力下的准确率、长度影响与延迟"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define four memory competencies"] --> B["Accurate retrieval, test-time learning, long-range understanding, and conflict / selective forgetting"]
    B --> C["Reconstruct existing datasets and add EventQA plus FactConsolidation"]
    C --> D["Standardize them into chunks, questions, and answers"]
    D --> E["Split long content into sequential memory injections"]
    E --> F["Use an inject-once, query-multiple-times interaction design"]
    F --> G["Evaluate long-context, RAG, and agentic-memory agents separately"]
    G --> H["Measure accuracy, length effects, and latency by competency"]

name: MIA-Bench
intro: MIA-Bench是一个新的基准，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）严格遵循复杂指令的能力。该基准包含400个图像-提示对，每个都旨在挑战模型在生成满足特定请求模式的准确响应时对分层指令的遵循。评估结果显示了最先进的MLLM在性能上存在显著差异，突出了指令遵循方面的改进空间。
org: Apple, NVIDIA, Roblox, New York University, Nanjing University, The Hong Kong University of Science
intro_en: MIA-Bench is a new benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to strictly follow complex instructions. It contains 400 image-prompt pairs, each intended to challenge models in generating accurate responses that meet specific request patterns while adhering to hierarchical instructions. Evaluation results reveal significant performance gaps among state-of-the-art MLLMs, highlighting room for improvement in instruction following.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[启动: MIA-BenchBenchmark Construction] --> B(图像数据源)
    B --> B1(COCO 2017Validation集)
    B --> B2(SBU数据集)
    B --> B3(TextVQA数据集)
    B --> B4(Flickr数据集)
    B1 & B2 & B3 --> C[随机采样图像]
    B4 --> D[Flickr图像主题多样性选择]
    C --> E[图像内容GPT-4v标注]
    D --> E
    E --> F[人工编写复杂指令]
    F --> F1{指令构建原则: 正确性}
    F1 -- 是 --> F2{指令构建原则: 无答案泄露}
    F2 -- 是 --> F3{指令构建原则: 图像依赖}
    F3 -- 是 --> G[指令分类: 描述, 长度限制, 提及, 类型, 语法, 数学, 视角, OCR]
    G --> H[指令复杂性分级: 基础, 中级, 高级, 创意, 复杂]
    H --> I(400个图像-指令对)
    I --> J[MLLM模型响应生成]
    J --> K[GPT-4o作为评判模型]
    K --> L[设计文本提示模板进行评分]
    L --> M[Evaluation每个子指令的依从性]
    M --> N[计算总分: 子指令权重总和为10]
    N --> O(MIA-Bench最终Evaluation结果)
    O --> P[完成: MIA-BenchBenchmark Construction与Evaluation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect images from COCO 2017 validation, SBU, TextVQA, and Flickr sources"] --> B["Manually write complex instructions with multiple sub-instructions for each image"]
    B["Manually write complex instructions with multiple sub-instructions for each image"] --> C["Ensure instructions are answerable, avoid answer leakage, and require image access"]
    C["Ensure instructions are answerable, avoid answer leakage, and require image access"] --> D["Categorize sub-instructions into eight types: description, length limit, mention, genre, grammar, math, perspective, OCR"]
    D["Categorize sub-instructions into eight types: description, length limit, mention, genre, grammar, math, perspective, OCR"] --> E["Assign weight from 1 to 10 points to each sub-instruction, totaling 10"]
    E["Assign weight from 1 to 10 points to each sub-instruction, totaling 10"] --> F["Generate responses from multiple MLLMs for each image-prompt pair"]
    F["Generate responses from multiple MLLMs for each image-prompt pair"] --> G["Use GPT-4o as judge to score each response against sub-instruction criteria"]
    G["Use GPT-4o as judge to score each response against sub-instruction criteria"] --> H["Aggregate sub-instruction scores to compute total score for each response"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从COCO 2017验证集、SBU、TextVQA和Flickr收集图像"] --> B["为每张图像手动编写包含多个子指令的复杂指令"]
    B["为每张图像手动编写包含多个子指令的复杂指令"] --> C["确保指令可回答、无答案泄露且依赖图像"]
    C["确保指令可回答、无答案泄露且依赖图像"] --> D["将子指令分为八类:描述、长度限制、提及、体裁、语法、数学、视角、OCR"]
    D["将子指令分为八类:描述、长度限制、提及、体裁、语法、数学、视角、OCR"] --> E["为每个子指令分配1到10分权重,总分为10"]
    E["为每个子指令分配1到10分权重,总分为10"] --> F["为每个图像-提示对生成多个MLLM的响应"]
    F["为每个图像-提示对生成多个MLLM的响应"] --> G["使用GPT-4o作为评判者对照子指令标准评分"]
