name: MixEval
intro: MixEval 提出了一种通过策略性地混合现有基准来建立高效、黄金标准的大型语言模型（LLM）评估的新范式。它通过将从网络中挖掘的真实世界用户查询与现有基准中的相似查询进行匹配，弥合了真实用户查询的全面性与基于标准答案的基准的高效性之间的差距。基于此，MixEval构建了更具挑战性的MixEval-Hard，为模型改进提供了更大空间。
org: National University of Singapore, Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, Carnegie
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 动态, 实时
intro_en: MixEval proposes a new paradigm for establishing efficient, gold-standard evaluations of large language models (LLMs) by strategically mixing existing benchmarks. It bridges the gap between the comprehensiveness of real-world user queries mined from the web and the efficiency of benchmark queries with standard answers by matching similar queries from existing benchmarks. Based on this, MixEval creates the more challenging MixEval-Hard, offering greater room for model improvement.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Web用户查询检测]
    B --> C{初始检测: Vicuna 33B + Prompt Engineering}
    C --> D[GPT-4精确标注正负样本]
    D --> E[训练Vicuna 33B模型]
    E --> F[从Common Crawl检测2M用户查询]
    F --> G[GPT-4 TurboFiltering分类查询]
    G --> H[提取文本Input-文本Output查询]
    H --> I[基准混合]
    I --> J{创建现有基准池 (B)}
    J --> K[为每个Web查询(q)找到最相似的基准查询(b)]
    K --> L[使用归一化句子嵌入的点积计算相似度]
    L --> M[MixEval基准数据集]
    M --> N{MixEval-Hard构建}
    N --> O[计算每个条目的难度分数(ξ)]
    O --> P[基于难度分数进行拒绝采样]
    P --> Q[MixEval-Hard基准数据集]
    Q --> R{动态基准测试}
    R --> S[批量Web查询更新]
    R --> T[源Web查询更新]
    R --> U[基准池更新]
    U --> V[End]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Mine comprehensive real-world user queries from the web"] --> B["Match mined queries with similar queries from existing off-the-shelf benchmarks"]
    B["Match mined queries with similar queries from existing off-the-shelf benchmarks"] --> C["Select matched benchmark queries to form the evaluation set with ground-truth answers"]
    C["Select matched benchmark queries to form the evaluation set with ground-truth answers"] --> D["Construct MixEval using the strategically mixed benchmark queries and ground-truth grading"]
    D["Construct MixEval using the strategically mixed benchmark queries and ground-truth grading"] --> E["Build MixEval-Hard from MixEval to provide more challenging evaluation"]
    E["Build MixEval-Hard from MixEval to provide more challenging evaluation"] --> F["Evaluate LLMs using ground-truth-based grading from the source benchmarks"]
    F["Evaluate LLMs using ground-truth-based grading from the source benchmarks"] --> G["Validate correlation with Chatbot Arena Elo rankings through meta-evaluation"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从网络中挖掘全面的真实用户查询"] --> B["将挖掘的查询与现有基准中的相似查询匹配"]
    B["将挖掘的查询与现有基准中的相似查询匹配"] --> C["选择匹配的基准查询构建带标准答案的评估集"]
    C["选择匹配的基准查询构建带标准答案的评估集"] --> D["使用策略性混合的基准查询和标准答案构建MixEval"]
    D["使用策略性混合的基准查询和标准答案构建MixEval"] --> E["基于MixEval构建更具挑战性的MixEval-Hard"]
    E["基于MixEval构建更具挑战性的MixEval-Hard"] --> F["使用源基准的标准答案评分来评估大语言模型"]
    F["使用源基准的标准答案评分来评估大语言模型"] --> G["通过元评估验证与Chatbot Arena排名的相关性"]

name: MixEval-Hard
intro: MixEval-Hard是MixEval的升级版，设计更具挑战性，旨在为模型改进提供更大空间。该基准通过混合多种现成评测，桥接真实用户查询与标准答案基准的差距。
build_method: 混合, LLM生成
task_type: 对话, 开放式问答, 排序
eval_feature: 多轮, 动态, 实时
intro_en: MixEval-Hard is an upgraded version of MixEval, designed to be more challenging and provide greater room for model improvement. This benchmark bridges the gap between real user queries and standard answer benchmarks by combining multiple existing evaluations.

        K --> L

name: MLE-Bench
intro: MLE-Bench是一个用于评估AI智能体在机器学习工程方面表现的基准。它收集了75个Kaggle机器学习工程竞赛，旨在测试AI智能体在模型训练、数据准备和实验运行等方面的真实世界技能。该基准通过开源智能体脚手架评估了前沿语言模型，并建立了人类基线。
org: OpenAI, University of California Berkeley, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Stanford Universit
intro_en: MLE-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents' performance in machine learning engineering. It compiles 75 Kaggle machine learning engineering competitions to test agents' real-world skills in model training, data preparation, and experiment execution. The benchmark assesses state-of-the-art language models using an open-source agent framework and establishes a human baseline.

    F["Grade submissions using competition-specific evaluation metrics and leaderboard scoring"] --> G["Measure medal achievement rates and investigate resource scaling effects"]

name: MLGym
intro: MLGym是首个面向机器学习任务的Gym环境，支持大型语言模型代理的评估与开发。它包含13个多样化且开放式的AI研究任务，涵盖计算机视觉、自然语言处理和强化学习等领域，旨在促进对AI研究型Agent的开发与评估。
modality: 文本, 图像, 代码, 多模态
intro_en: MLGym is the first Gym environment designed for machine learning tasks, supporting the evaluation and development of large language model agents. It includes 13 diverse and open-ended AI research tasks spanning computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning, aiming to advance the development and assessment of AI research agents.

name: MLVU
intro: MLVU是一个多任务长视频理解基准，旨在全面深入评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长视频理解（LVU）任务中的性能。它通过显著扩展视频长度、包含多样化的视频类型（如电影、监控录像、自我中心视频、卡通、游戏视频等）以及开发多样化的评估任务来解决现有基准的局限性。对23个最新MLLMs的实证研究表明，现有技术在处理长视频时仍有显著提升空间，且在大多数评估任务中表现不佳。MLVU有望通过对MLLMs的全面深入分析，推动长视频理解领域的研究进展。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence, Shan
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: MLVU is a multi-task long video understanding benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the performance of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on long video understanding (LVU) tasks. It addresses the limitations of existing benchmarks by significantly extending video length, including diverse video types (such as movies, surveillance footage, egocentric videos, cartoons, game videos, etc.), and developing a variety of evaluation tasks. An empirical study of 23 state-of-the-art MLLMs shows that current techniques still have substantial room for improvement in handling long videos and perform poorly on most evaluation tasks. MLVU aims to advance research in long video understanding through comprehensive and in-depth analysis of MLLMs.

    Q --> R

name: MM-BrowseComp
intro: MM-BrowseComp是一个全面的多模态深度研究基准，旨在评估智能体通过浏览和推理多模态网页内容来解决复杂问题的能力。该基准包含224个具有挑战性的多跳问题，每个问题的解决方案都特意设计为需要理解图像或视频模态中的内容。评估结果显示，即使是OpenAI o3等最强模型也未能超过30%的准确率，凸显了当前模型在多模态理解和推理方面的不足。该基准还提供了经过验证的清单，用于细粒度分析多模态依赖性和推理路径。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University, University of California, B
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
modality: 文本, 图像, 视频, 多模态
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MM-BrowseComp is a comprehensive multimodal deep research benchmark designed to evaluate agents' ability to solve complex problems by browsing and reasoning over multimodal web content. The benchmark includes 224 challenging multi-hop questions, each requiring understanding of content in image or video modalities. Evaluation results show that even top models like OpenAI o3 fail to exceed 30% accuracy, highlighting current limitations in multimodal understanding and reasoning. The benchmark also provides a validated checklist for fine-grained analysis of multimodal dependencies and reasoning paths.

name: MM-MTBench
intro: MM-MT-Bench是一个多轮LLM-as-a-judge评估基准，类似于文本MT-Bench，用于测试多模态指令调优模型。现有基准测试（如MMMU、MathVista、ChartQA等）侧重于封闭式问题和简短回答，无法评估模型在多轮对话中遵循用户指令和零样本回答开放式问题的能力。MM-MT-Bench旨在克服这一限制。
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
intro_en: MM-MT-Bench is a multi-turn LLM-as-a-judge evaluation benchmark, similar to the text-based MT-Bench, designed to test multimodal instruction-tuned models. Existing benchmarks (such as MMMU, MathVista, ChartQA, etc.) focus on closed-ended questions and short answers, and cannot assess a model's ability to follow user instructions and provide zero-shot answers to open-ended questions in multi-turn dialogues. MM-MT-Bench aims to overcome this limitation.

    I -- 3轮 --> L(4个对话)
    I -- 4轮 --> M(1个对话)
    J & K & L & M --> N[构建对话数据集]
    N --> O[模型并行查询]
    O --> P(提供历史参考答案)
    P --> Q[独立评分每个轮次]
    Q --> R{评判标准}
    R -- 正确性 --> S(信息提取是否正确)
    R -- 完整性 --> T(是否回答所有问题)
    S & T --> U[评判员1-10分评分]
    U --> V[生成MM-MT-Bench数据集]
    V --> W[Evaluation方法学]
    W --> X(与LMSys-Vision ELO排名相关性)
    X --> Y[0.91 Pearson相关系数]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Manually curate 92 multi-turn conversations across five image categories: charts, tables, PDFs, diagrams, miscellaneous"] --> B["Design conversations with varying turn counts: 69 single-turn, 18 two-turn, 4 three-turn, 1 four-turn"]
    B["Design conversations with varying turn counts: 69 single-turn, 18 two-turn, 4 three-turn, 1 four-turn"] --> C["Create reference answers for each conversation turn targeting extraction, summarization, and reasoning tasks"]
    C["Create reference answers for each conversation turn targeting extraction, summarization, and reasoning tasks"] --> D["Query candidate model in parallel across all turns, providing reference answers as history for past turns"]
    D["Query candidate model in parallel across all turns, providing reference answers as history for past turns"] --> E["Prompt LLM judge to rate each turn independently on 1-10 scale with full conversation history"]
    E["Prompt LLM judge to rate each turn independently on 1-10 scale with full conversation history"] --> F["Judge evaluates correctness of extracted information and completeness against all reference points"]
    F["Judge evaluates correctness of extracted information and completeness against all reference points"] --> G["Validate benchmark quality by computing Pearson correlation with LMSys-Vision ELO ratings"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["人工策划92个多轮对话，涵盖图表、表格、PDF、示意图、杂项五类图像"] --> B["设计不同轮次对话：69个单轮、18个双轮、4个三轮、1个四轮"]
    B["设计不同轮次对话：69个单轮、18个双轮、4个三轮、1个四轮"] --> C["为每轮对话创建参考答案，针对提取、摘要和推理任务"]
    C["为每轮对话创建参考答案，针对提取、摘要和推理任务"] --> D["并行查询候选模型所有轮次，将参考答案作为历史提供给过往轮次"]
    D["并行查询候选模型所有轮次，将参考答案作为历史提供给过往轮次"] --> E["提示LLM评判员根据完整对话历史独立评分每轮，分值1到10"]
    E["提示LLM评判员根据完整对话历史独立评分每轮，分值1到10"] --> F["评判员评估信息提取正确性及对参考要点的完整覆盖"]
    F["评判员评估信息提取正确性及对参考要点的完整覆盖"] --> G["通过计算与LMSys-Vision ELO评分的皮尔逊相关性验证基准质量"]

name: MMBench
intro: MMBench是一个旨在全面评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）多模态能力的双语基准测试。它通过精心策划的质量控制方案，提供了大量多样化的评估问题。MMBench引入了CircularEval策略，并利用大型语言模型将自由形式的预测转换为预定义选项，以确保评估结果的准确性。该基准测试包含中英文多项选择题，支持对VLMs性能进行公平比较。
org: OpenCompass Community, Shanghai AI Laboratory, The University of Hong Kong, SenseTime, Shanghai Jiao
eval_feature: 双语, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MMBench is a bilingual benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the multimodal capabilities of visual language models (VLMs). It offers a large and diverse set of evaluation questions through a carefully curated quality control scheme. MMBench introduces the CircularEval strategy and uses large language models to convert free-form predictions into predefined options, ensuring the accuracy of evaluation results. The benchmark includes multiple-choice questions in both Chinese and English, supporting fair comparisons of VLM performance.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义分层能力分类] --> B[L-1: 感知与推理]
    B --> C[L-2: 六个类别] --> D[L-3: 二十个细粒度技能]
    D --> E[问题收集: 手动收集多选视觉语言问答]
    E --> F{Data Sources: 多种来源, 志愿者}
    F --> G[问题集扩展: 志愿者扩展问题集]
    G --> H{Quality Control (初始): 确保样本正确性与有效性}
    H -- 通过 --> I[LLM辅助选择提取: GPT-4转换自由形式预测]
    I --> J{启发式匹配 (步骤1)}
    J -- 失败 --> K[LLM匹配 (步骤2)]
    J -- 成功 --> L[CircularEval策略: 多次Input问题, 循环移位选项]
    K --> L
    L --> M{VLM成功: 所有循环通过}
    M -- 否 --> N[VLM失败: 标记为错误]
    M -- 是 --> O[MMBench-CN转换: GPT-4翻译为中文, 人工Validation]
    O --> P[数据统计: 3217个样本, 20个L-3能力, 每个至少125个样本]
    P --> Q[数据划分: Training Set(40%)与Test Set(60%)]
    Q --> R[Evaluation方法: 零样本设置, 开放式生成, GPT-4-0125作为选择提取器]
    R --> S(最终MMBench基准测试)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define hierarchical taxonomy with Perception and Reasoning as L-1, six L-2, and twenty L-3 abilities"] --> B["Volunteers manually collect multiple-choice questions for each L-3 ability from Internet and public datasets"]
    B["Volunteers manually collect multiple-choice questions for each L-3 ability from Internet and public datasets"] --> C["Apply rigorous quality control schemes to validate correctness of collected samples"]
    C["Apply rigorous quality control schemes to validate correctness of collected samples"] --> D["Create bilingual versions with both English and Chinese questions and choices"]
    D["Create bilingual versions with both English and Chinese questions and choices"] --> E["Evaluate VLMs by feeding image-question pairs and collecting free-form predictions"]
    E["Evaluate VLMs by feeding image-question pairs and collecting free-form predictions"] --> F["Use large language models to convert free-form predictions into pre-defined choice options"]
    F["Use large language models to convert free-form predictions into pre-defined choice options"] --> G["Apply CircularEval strategy to ensure accurate evaluation results across ability dimensions"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义分层能力分类体系,包含感知和推理两个一级能力及二十个三级能力"] --> B["志愿者从互联网和公开数据集为每个三级能力人工收集多项选择题"]
    B["志愿者从互联网和公开数据集为每个三级能力人工收集多项选择题"] --> C["应用严格的质量控制方案验证收集样本的正确性"]
    C["应用严格的质量控制方案验证收集样本的正确性"] --> D["创建包含中英文问题和选项的双语版本"]
    D["创建包含中英文问题和选项的双语版本"] --> E["向视觉语言模型输入图像问题对并收集自由形式预测"]
    E["向视觉语言模型输入图像问题对并收集自由形式预测"] --> F["使用大语言模型将自由形式预测转换为预定义选项"]
    F["使用大语言模型将自由形式预测转换为预定义选项"] --> G["应用循环评估策略确保各能力维度的准确评估结果"]

name: MMBench-Video
intro: MMBench-Video是一个用于严格评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）视频理解能力的定量基准。该基准包含来自YouTube的长视频和自由形式的问题，更贴近实际应用场景，旨在严谨评估模型的视频理解水平。所有问题均由人工根据精心构建的能力分类法进行标注。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, SenseTime Research, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI
build_method: 人工标注
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MMBench-Video is a quantitative benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the video understanding capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). It includes long videos from YouTube and open-ended questions, reflecting real-world scenarios, and aims to provide a thorough assessment of models' video comprehension. All questions are manually annotated based on a carefully constructed taxonomy of abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Volunteers collect long-form YouTube videos across 16 categories, excluding videos under 30 seconds"] --> B["Develop a 3-level hierarchical capability taxonomy covering Perception and Reasoning with 26 leaf abilities"]
    B["Develop a 3-level hierarchical capability taxonomy covering Perception and Reasoning with 26 leaf abilities"] --> C["Extract video clips no longer than 6 minutes from collected videos for question generation"]
    C["Extract video clips no longer than 6 minutes from collected videos for question generation"] --> D["Human annotators create free-form question-answer pairs according to the capability taxonomy for each clip"]
    D["Human annotators create free-form question-answer pairs according to the capability taxonomy for each clip"] --> E["Validate temporal indispensability by comparing model performance on single-frame versus multi-frame inputs"]
    E["Validate temporal indispensability by comparing model performance on single-frame versus multi-frame inputs"] --> F["Evaluate LVLMs by feeding video clips and questions, collecting free-form generated answers"]
    F["Evaluate LVLMs by feeding video clips and questions, collecting free-form generated answers"] --> G["Use GPT-4 to automatically score open-ended answers against human-annotated ground truth"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["志愿者从YouTube收集16类长视频，排除30秒以下内容"] --> B["构建三层能力分类体系，涵盖感知和推理共26项叶能力"]
    B["构建三层能力分类体系，涵盖感知和推理共26项叶能力"] --> C["从收集视频中提取不超过6分钟的片段用于出题"]
    C["从收集视频中提取不超过6分钟的片段用于出题"] --> D["人工标注员依据能力分类为每个片段创建自由问答对"]
    D["人工标注员依据能力分类为每个片段创建自由问答对"] --> E["通过对比单帧与多帧输入性能验证时序不可或缺性"]
    E["通过对比单帧与多帧输入性能验证时序不可或缺性"] --> F["输入视频片段和问题评估模型，收集自由形式生成答案"]
    F["输入视频片段和问题评估模型，收集自由形式生成答案"] --> G["使用GPT-4自动评分开放式答案与人工标注真值"]

name: MME
intro: MME是一个针对多模态大型语言模型的综合性评估基准。它旨在衡量模型在14个子任务上的感知和认知能力，包括存在、计数、位置、颜色、海报、名人、场景、地标、艺术品、OCR、常识推理、数值计算、文本翻译和代码推理。为避免数据泄漏，所有指令-答案对均由人工设计。
org: Nanjing University, Tencent Youtu Lab, Xiamen University, Chinese Academy of Sciences
eval_feature: 无
intro_en: MME is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal large language models. It aims to assess models' perceptual and cognitive abilities across 14 subtasks, including existence, counting, location, color, posters, celebrities, scenes, landmarks, artworks, OCR, commonsense reasoning, numerical calculation, text translation, and code reasoning. To prevent data leakage, all instruction-answer pairs are manually designed.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MLLMEvaluation需求分析] --> B{避免数据泄露}
    B -- 是 --> C[手动设计指令-答案对]
    B -- 否 --> D[使用公共数据集图像]
    C --> E[指令设计: 简洁问答]
    D --> E
    E --> F[Data Collection: 感知任务]
    F --> G[Data Collection: 认知任务]
    F -- 粗粒度识别 --> F1(COCO图像)
    F -- 细粒度识别 --> F2(公开数据集图像)
    F -- OCR --> F3(OCR数据集图像)
    G -- 常识推理 --> G1(手动拍摄/生成图像)
    G -- 数值计算/文本翻译/代码推理 --> G2(手动拍摄图像)
    F1 & F2 & F3 & G1 & G2 --> H[图像数据]
    H & C --> I[指令-答案对数据集]
    I --> J[数据集组成: 14个子任务]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J1[粗粒度识别: 存在,计数,颜色,位置]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J2[细粒度识别: 海报,名人,场景,地标,艺术品]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J3[OCR]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J4[常识推理]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J5[数值计算]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J6[文本翻译]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J7[代码推理]
    J1 & J2 & J3 & J4 & J5 & J6 & J7 --> K[最终MME数据集]
    K --> L[模型Evaluation: 30个MLLM]
    L --> M{模型Output: 是/否}
    M --> N[Evaluation指标: 准确率]
    M --> O[Evaluation指标: 准确率+]
    N & O --> P[子任务得分计算]
    P --> Q[MMEEvaluation结果分析]
    Q --> R[总结问题与未来方向]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample images from public datasets for 14 subtasks covering perception and cognition abilities"] --> B["Manually design two yes/no instruction-answer pairs per image with opposite ground truth labels"]
    B["Manually design two yes/no instruction-answer pairs per image with opposite ground truth labels"] --> C["Format each instruction as a question followed by 'Please answer yes or no'"]
    C["Format each instruction as a question followed by 'Please answer yes or no'"] --> D["Collect 30 images for coarse-grained tasks and up to 200 for fine-grained tasks"]
    D["Collect 30 images for coarse-grained tasks and up to 200 for fine-grained tasks"] --> E["Evaluate MLLMs by feeding instruction-image pairs and extracting yes/no responses from model outputs"]
    E["Evaluate MLLMs by feeding instruction-image pairs and extracting yes/no responses from model outputs"] --> F["Calculate accuracy per question and accuracy+ requiring both questions per image correct"]
    F["Calculate accuracy per question and accuracy+ requiring both questions per image correct"] --> G["Compute subtask scores as sum of accuracy and accuracy+ with perception and cognition totals"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从公开数据集采样图像用于14个感知和认知子任务"] --> B["为每张图像手动设计两个答案相反的是非问答对"]
    B["为每张图像手动设计两个答案相反的是非问答对"] --> C["将每条指令格式化为问题加\"请回答是或否\""]
    C["将每条指令格式化为问题加\"请回答是或否\""] --> D["粗粒度任务收集30张图像细粒度任务最多200张"]
    D["粗粒度任务收集30张图像细粒度任务最多200张"] --> E["向模型输入指令图像对并提取是否回答进行评估"]
    E["向模型输入指令图像对并提取是否回答进行评估"] --> F["计算每题准确率和要求每图两题全对的准确率+"]
    F["计算每题准确率和要求每图两题全对的准确率+"] --> G["计算子任务得分为准确率和准确率+之和并汇总感知认知分数"]

name: MMLongBench
intro: MMLongBench是首个涵盖多种长上下文视觉-语言任务的基准，旨在有效且全面地评估长上下文视觉-语言模型（LCVLMs）。它包含13,331个示例，涵盖五种不同类别的下游任务，如视觉RAG和多样本ICL。该基准通过提供广泛的任务覆盖、多样的图像类型和严格的长度控制，为诊断和推进下一代LCVLMs提供了基础。
org: Zhaowei Wang, Wenhao Yu, Xiyu Ren, Jipeng Zhang, Yu Zhao, Rohit Saxena, Liang Cheng, Ginny Wong, Sim
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 长上下文, 多模态, 跨模态
intro_en: MMLongBench is the first benchmark covering various long-context vision-language tasks, designed to effectively and comprehensively evaluate long-context vision-language models (LCVLMs). It includes 13,331 examples across five different downstream task categories, such as visual RAG and multi-sample ICL. By offering broad task coverage, diverse image types, and strict length control, this benchmark provides a foundation for diagnosing and advancing the next generation of LCVLMs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start Benchmark Construction] --> B(Identify Long-Context VLM Tasks)
    B --> C{Select Task Categories}
    C --> D[Visual RAG] & E[Many-Shot ICL] & F[NIAH] & G[DocVQA] & H[Summarization]
    D --> D1(Knowledge-based VQA Datasets) & D2(Wikipedia Passages)
    E --> E1(Image Classification Problems) & E2(Four Domains)
    H --> H1(Image-based PDF Documents)
    D1 & D2 --> I[Collect VRAG Examples]
    E1 & E2 --> J[Collect ICL Examples]
    F --> K[Collect NIAH Examples]
    G --> L[Collect DocVQA Examples]
    H1 --> M[Collect Summarization Examples]
    I & J & K & L & M --> N(Combine 13,331 Examples)
    N --> O{Include Diverse Image Types}
    O -- Yes --> P[Natural Images] & Q[Synthetic Images]
    P & Q --> R[Apply Cross-Modal Tokenization]
    R --> S(Unified Token-Count Method: Vision Patches + Text Tokens)
    S --> T[Standardize Input Lengths (8K-128K Tokens)]
    T --> U[Ensure Extendability to Longer Contexts]
    U --> V[Final Dataset Composition]
    V --> W[Benchmark 46 LCVLMs]
    W --> X[Analyze Performance and Findings]
    X --> Y[End Benchmark Construction]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select datasets across five categories: VRAG, NIAH, ICL, Summarization, and DocVQA"] --> B["For VRAG, insert gold Wikipedia passages among retrieved distractors until target length"]
    B["For VRAG, insert gold Wikipedia passages among retrieved distractors until target length"] --> C["For NIAH, procedurally generate needles at varying positions in long contexts"]
    C["For NIAH, procedurally generate needles at varying positions in long contexts"] --> D["Count tokens using Llama2 tokenizer for text and 14×14 patches for images"]
    D["Count tokens using Llama2 tokenizer for text and 14×14 patches for images"] --> E["Adjust passages, images, or exemplars to create five lengths: 8K to 128K tokens"]
    E["Adjust passages, images, or exemplars to create five lengths: 8K to 128K tokens"] --> F["Sample 100 examples randomly from each dataset for evaluation"]
    F["Sample 100 examples randomly from each dataset for evaluation"] --> G["Evaluate 46 LCVLMs using greedy decoding with substring exact match or accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择五类数据集：视觉RAG、NIAH、ICL、摘要和文档VQA"] --> B["为视觉RAG在检索干扰项中插入金标准维基百科段落"]
    B["为视觉RAG在检索干扰项中插入金标准维基百科段落"] --> C["为NIAH在长上下文不同位置程序化生成针"]
    C["为NIAH在长上下文不同位置程序化生成针"] --> D["用Llama2分词器计算文本和14×14图像块计算token"]
    D["用Llama2分词器计算文本和14×14图像块计算token"] --> E["调整段落、图像或样本创建8K到128K五种长度"]
    E["调整段落、图像或样本创建8K到128K五种长度"] --> F["从每个数据集随机采样100个样本用于评估"]
    F["从每个数据集随机采样100个样本用于评估"] --> G["用贪婪解码评估46个模型并计算子串匹配或准确率"]

name: MMLU
intro: MMLU是一个多任务准确率测试，涵盖57个任务，包括基础数学、美国历史、计算机科学和法律等。高准确率要求模型具备广泛的世界知识和问题解决能力。
org: UC Berkeley, Columbia University, UChicago, UIUC
build_method: 考试题, 专家构建
eval_feature: 少样本
intro_en: MMLU is a multi-task accuracy test covering 57 tasks, including basic math, U.S. history, computer science, and law. High accuracy requires models to have broad world knowledge and problem-solving skills.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[确定测试目标：测量大规模多任务语言理解] --> B[选择多项选择题格式]
    B --> C[收集问题来源：STEM、人文、社会科学等领域的现有测试和教育材料]
    C --> D{问题筛选与去重}
    D -- Filtering --> C
    D -- 通过 --> E[构建57个主题任务]
    E --> F[设计零样本/少样本Evaluation机制]
    F --> G[创建开发集：用于少样本提示]
    F --> H[创建Validation集：用于超参数调优]
    F --> I[创建Test Set：用于最终准确率计算]
    I --> J[模型Evaluation：计算多项选择题准确率]
    J --> K[结果分析：识别模型知识盲点和能力不平衡]
    K --> L(MMLU Benchmark)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect questions across 57 subjects spanning STEM, humanities, and social sciences"] --> B["Include questions ranging from elementary level to advanced professional level difficulty"]
    B["Include questions ranging from elementary level to advanced professional level difficulty"] --> C["Format all questions as multiple-choice items with four answer options"]
    C["Format all questions as multiple-choice items with four answer options"] --> D["Evaluate models in zero-shot and few-shot settings without task-specific fine-tuning"]
    D["Evaluate models in zero-shot and few-shot settings without task-specific fine-tuning"] --> E["Provide few-shot prompts with example questions and answers from the same subject"]
    E["Provide few-shot prompts with example questions and answers from the same subject"] --> F["Measure multitask accuracy across all 57 tasks to assess breadth of knowledge"]
    F["Measure multitask accuracy across all 57 tasks to assess breadth of knowledge"] --> G["Analyze performance gaps between subjects to identify model shortcomings and lopsided understanding"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集涵盖STEM、人文和社科的57个学科问题"] --> B["纳入从基础到专业高级难度的题目"]
    B["纳入从基础到专业高级难度的题目"] --> C["将所有问题格式化为四选项选择题"]
    C["将所有问题格式化为四选项选择题"] --> D["在零样本和少样本设置下评估模型"]
    D["在零样本和少样本设置下评估模型"] --> E["提供同学科示例问题和答案作为提示"]
    E["提供同学科示例问题和答案作为提示"] --> F["测量57个任务的多任务准确率"]
    F["测量57个任务的多任务准确率"] --> G["分析学科间表现差距以识别模型缺陷"]

name: MMLU-CF
intro: MMLU-CF是一个无污染且更具挑战性的多项选择题基准，用于评估大型语言模型的常识、理解和解决问题能力。通过广泛领域数据和去污染规则，确保评测结果可靠。包含公开验证集和封闭测试集。
build_method: 网络爬取, 自动生成, 混合
eval_feature: 防污染, 结果导向, 零样本, 少样本
intro_en: MMLU-CF is a clean and more challenging multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' commonsense, comprehension, and problem-solving abilities. It ensures reliable evaluation results through extensive domain data and decontamination rules. It includes both a public validation set and a closed test set.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[起始：现有MCQ基准污染问题] --> B[提出MMLU-CF基准]
    B --> C{避免无意数据泄露}
    C -- 是 --> D[从更广泛领域获取数据(数据源)]
    D --> E[设计三条去污染规则(去污染规则)]
    E --> F{避免恶意数据泄露}
    F -- 是 --> G[划分Validation集和Test Set(数据集划分)]
    G --> H[确保Validation集与Test Set难度和主题分布相似(Quality Control)]
    H --> I[Test Set保持闭源(Test Set管理)]
    H --> J[Validation集公开可用(Validation集管理)]
    I --> K[Final Dataset组成(MMLU-CF数据集)]
    J --> K
    K --> L[LLMEvaluation(Evaluation方法)]
    L --> M[报告5-shot和0-shot分数(Evaluation结果)]
    M --> N[End：提供更严格、无污染的Evaluation标准]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract 2.7 million MCQs from 200+ billion documents across 3,000+ website domains using rule-based methods"] --> B["Clean MCQs by filtering format, removing invalid choices, standardizing labels, and deduplicating to 1.66 million questions"]
    B["Clean MCQs by filtering format, removing invalid choices, standardizing labels, and deduplicating to 1.66 million questions"] --> C["Sample questions to ensure appropriate difficulty distribution across 14 fields"]
    C["Sample questions to ensure appropriate difficulty distribution across 14 fields"] --> D["Use GPT-4o, Gemini, and Claude to check accuracy and safety of sampled questions"]
    D["Use GPT-4o, Gemini, and Claude to check accuracy and safety of sampled questions"] --> E["Apply three contamination-free rules to rewrite questions and prevent data leakage"]
    E["Apply three contamination-free rules to rewrite questions and prevent data leakage"] --> F["Construct 10,000-question test set and keep it closed-source to prevent malicious exposure"]
    F["Construct 10,000-question test set and keep it closed-source to prevent malicious exposure"] --> G["Construct 10,000-question validation set and release it open-source for transparency and verification"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从2000多亿文档中提取270万道选择题"] --> B["清洗题目格式并去重至166万道"]
    B["清洗题目格式并去重至166万道"] --> C["采样题目确保14个领域难度分布合理"]
    C["采样题目确保14个领域难度分布合理"] --> D["用GPT-4o等模型检查准确性和安全性"]
    D["用GPT-4o等模型检查准确性和安全性"] --> E["应用三条去污染规则改写题目防泄露"]
    E["应用三条去污染规则改写题目防泄露"] --> F["构建1万道题测试集并保持闭源"]
    F["构建1万道题测试集并保持闭源"] --> G["构建1万道题验证集并开源供验证"]

name: MMLU-Pro
intro: MMLU-Pro是MMLU的增强版，旨在通过整合更具挑战性的、以推理为中心的问题，并将选项从四个扩展到十个，来扩展以知识驱动为主的MMLU基准。该基准包含了超过12,000个来自学术考试和教科书的严谨策划的问题，涵盖14个不同领域。实验结果表明，MMLU-Pro不仅提升了挑战性，还表现出在不同提示下的更高稳定性。
eval_feature: 思维链
intro_en: MMLU-Pro is an enhanced version of MMLU, designed to expand the knowledge-driven MMLU benchmark by incorporating more challenging, reasoning-focused questions and increasing the number of options from four to ten. The benchmark includes over 12,000 rigorously curated questions from academic exams and textbooks, covering 14 different domains. Experimental results show that MMLU-Pro not only increases difficulty but also demonstrates greater stability across different prompts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Review Original MMLU Dataset]
    B --> C{Merge Subject Categories}
    C --> D[Evaluate Questions with 8 LLMs]
    D --> E{Questions Answered Correctly by >4 Models?}
    E -- Yes --> F[Exclude Too Easy Questions]
    E -- No --> G[Keep Challenging Questions]

    G --> H[Collect Questions from External Sources]
    H --> H1(STEM Website)
    H --> H2(TheoremQA)
    H --> H3(SciBench)

    H1 --> I[Extract Short Answers GPT-4-Turbo]
    H2 --> I
    I --> J[Generate 3 Additional Distractors]
    J --> K{Manually Compare Solutions & Extracted Answers}
    K -- Incomplete/Incorrect --> L[Remove Question]
    K -- Correct --> M[Prepare for Option Augmentation]

    M --> N[Option Augmentation GPT-4-Turbo]
    N --> O[Introduce 6 Additional Distractors]

    O --> P[Expert Review Phase 1]
    P --> P1{Verify Answer Accuracy}
    P1 -- Incorrect --> Q[Remove Question]
    P1 -- Correct --> P2{Remove Unsuitable MCQs}
    P2 -- Unsuitable --> Q
    P2 -- Suitable --> P3{Discard Questions Lacking Info/Non-Textual Elements}
    P3 -- Discard --> Q
    P3 -- Keep --> R[Expert Review Phase 2]

    R --> R1[Gemini-1.5-Pro Re-evaluate Options]
    R1 --> R2{Identify Potential False Negatives}
    R2 -- Yes --> R3[Human Experts Review Identified Options]
    R3 --> R4{Ensure Distractors are Incorrect & Distinct}
    R4 -- Valid --> S[Final Dataset Composition]
    R4 -- Invalid --> Q

    Q --> T[Removed Questions Pool]
    S --> U[Evaluation Methodology]
    U --> V[End]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Merge MMLU's 57 subjects into 14 broader discipline categories"] --> B["Filter out questions answered correctly by over four of eight small models"]
    B["Filter out questions answered correctly by over four of eight small models"] --> C["Collect additional questions from STEM Website, TheoremQA, and SciBench sources"]
    C["Collect additional questions from STEM Website, TheoremQA, and SciBench sources"] --> D["Use GPT-4-Turbo to extract short answers and generate three distractors for new questions"]
    D["Use GPT-4-Turbo to extract short answers and generate three distractors for new questions"] --> E["Manually verify extracted answers against solutions, removing incomplete or incorrect entries"]
    E["Manually verify extracted answers against solutions, removing incomplete or incorrect entries"] --> F["Augment all questions from four to ten options using GPT-4-Turbo for six plausible distractors"]
    F["Augment all questions from four to ten options using GPT-4-Turbo for six plausible distractors"] --> G["Deploy SoTA LLMs to identify potential errors for targeted human annotator verification"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将MMLU的57个科目合并为14个学科类别"] --> B["过滤掉被八个小模型中超过四个答对的问题"]
    B["过滤掉被八个小模型中超过四个答对的问题"] --> C["从STEM网站、TheoremQA和SciBench收集额外问题"]
    C["从STEM网站、TheoremQA和SciBench收集额外问题"] --> D["用GPT-4-Turbo提取简短答案并生成三个干扰项"]
    D["用GPT-4-Turbo提取简短答案并生成三个干扰项"] --> E["人工验证提取答案与解答的一致性并移除错误条目"]
    E["人工验证提取答案与解答的一致性并移除错误条目"] --> F["用GPT-4-Turbo将所有问题从四选项扩展到十选项"]
    F["用GPT-4-Turbo将所有问题从四选项扩展到十选项"] --> G["用顶尖模型识别潜在错误供人工标注员验证"]

name: MMLU-Redux
intro: MMLU-Redux是MMLU的一个经过修正的子集，旨在解决原始数据集中存在的标注错误问题。该数据集包含了对MMLU全部57个学科的5700个问题的手动重新标注，研究发现原始数据集中约有6.49%的题目存在错误。通过提供更准确的基准，MMLU-Redux有助于更可靠地评估和比较大型语言模型的能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a revised subset of MMLU designed to address annotation errors in the original dataset. It contains 5,700 manually re-annotated questions covering all 57 subjects of MMLU. Studies found that about 6.49% of the original questions contained errors. By providing a more accurate benchmark, MMLU-Redux helps to more reliably evaluate and compare the capabilities of large language models.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[原始MMLU数据集] --> B[错误识别框架]
    B --> C{错误标注协议}
    C --> D[分析MMLU问题]
    D -- 发现错误 --> E[手动重新标注]
    D -- 无错误 --> F[保留原始问题]
    E --> G(5700个重新标注问题)
    F --> H(原始问题)
    G & H --> I[MMLU-Redux数据集]
    I --> J[模型性能重新Evaluation]
    J --> K(性能差异分析)
    K --> L[修订MMLU建议]
    B -- 未发现错误 --> M[MMLU-Redux创建]
    M --> I
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Randomly select 100 samples from each of the 57 MMLU subjects for annotation"] --> B["Apply hierarchical error annotation protocol to assess question clarity and option clarity"]
    B["Apply hierarchical error annotation protocol to assess question clarity and option clarity"] --> C["Verify ground truth by checking for no correct answer, multiple answers, or wrong labels"]
    C["Verify ground truth by checking for no correct answer, multiple answers, or wrong labels"] --> D["Confirm detected errors by tracing back to original sources when available"]
    D["Confirm detected errors by tracing back to original sources when available"] --> E["Aggregate 14 human experts' annotations to create the 5,700-question MMLU-Redux subset"]
    E["Aggregate 14 human experts' annotations to create the 5,700-question MMLU-Redux subset"] --> F["Re-evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs on error-free instances to measure performance impact"]
    F["Re-evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs on error-free instances to measure performance impact"] --> G["Compare model rankings on all instances versus correct-only instances across high-error subjects"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从57个MMLU学科中各随机抽取100个样本"] --> B["应用分层标注协议评估问题和选项清晰度"]
    B["应用分层标注协议评估问题和选项清晰度"] --> C["验证标准答案是否缺失、重复或错误"]
    C["验证标准答案是否缺失、重复或错误"] --> D["通过追溯原始来源确认检测到的错误"]
    D["通过追溯原始来源确认检测到的错误"] --> E["汇总14位专家标注形成5700题的子集"]
    E["汇总14位专家标注形成5700题的子集"] --> F["在无错误样本上重新评估模型性能影响"]
    F["在无错误样本上重新评估模型性能影响"] --> G["比较全部样本与仅正确样本的模型排名"]

name: MMLU-Redux 2.0
intro: MMLU-Redux是一个经过精心手动重新注释的MMLU（大规模多任务语言理解）数据集子集，旨在纠正原始基准中的错误，提供一个更准确、更可靠的评测标准。该子集包含57个MMLU科目中的5700个问题。研究结果表明，原始MMLU中约有6.49%的问题存在错误，使用MMLU-Redux进行评测可以显著改变模型性能的评估结果。
org: University of Edinburgh, Sapienza University of Rome, Polytechnic University of Bari, University Col
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a carefully manually re-annotated subset of the MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding) dataset, designed to correct errors in the original benchmark and provide a more accurate and reliable evaluation standard. This subset contains 5,700 questions from 57 MMLU subjects. Research shows that about 6.49% of the questions in the original MMLU contain errors, and using MMLU-Redux for evaluation can significantly alter the assessment of model performance.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[原始 MMLU 数据集] --> B{识别 MMLU 错误}
    B --> C[开发分层错误标注协议]
    C --> D{错误类型分类}
    D -- 问题Evaluation错误 --> D1[问题清晰度差]
    D -- 问题Evaluation错误 --> D2[选项清晰度差]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D3[无正确答案]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D4[多重正确答案]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D5[错误真值]
    C --> E[招募 14 名人类Experts]
    E --> F[手动Evaluation和重新标注 5700 个问题]
    F --> G{确认原始来源}
    G -- 来源可用 --> H[Validation原始来源]
    G -- 来源不可用 --> F
    H --> I[创建 MMLU-Redux 子集]
    I --> J[估计 MMLU 错误率 (6.49%)]
    J --> K[分析 MMLU-Redux 错误统计]
    K --> L[使用 MMLU-Redux 重新Evaluation LLM 性能]
    L --> M[发布 MMLU-Redux 2.0]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Randomly select 100 samples from each of the 57 MMLU subjects for annotation"] --> B["Apply hierarchical error annotation protocol assessing question clarity and ground truth verification"]
    B["Apply hierarchical error annotation protocol assessing question clarity and ground truth verification"] --> C["Trace original sources to confirm error detection wherever source material is available"]
    C["Trace original sources to confirm error detection wherever source material is available"] --> D["Classify errors into bad question clarity, bad options clarity, no correct answer, multiple correct answers, or wrong ground truth"]
    D["Classify errors into bad question clarity, bad options clarity, no correct answer, multiple correct answers, or wrong ground truth"] --> E["Manually re-annotate all 5,700 questions with 14 human experts to create MMLU-Redux"]
    E["Manually re-annotate all 5,700 questions with 14 human experts to create MMLU-Redux"] --> F["Re-evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs on corrected instances to measure performance metric changes"]
    F["Re-evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs on corrected instances to measure performance metric changes"] --> G["Compare model rankings on all instances versus correct-only instances for high-error subjects"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从57个MMLU科目中各随机抽取100个样本"] --> B["应用分层错误标注协议评估问题清晰度和真值验证"]
    B["应用分层错误标注协议评估问题清晰度和真值验证"] --> C["追溯原始来源以确认错误检测"]
    C["追溯原始来源以确认错误检测"] --> D["将错误分类为问题不清、选项不清、无正确答案、多个正确答案或真值错误"]
    D["将错误分类为问题不清、选项不清、无正确答案、多个正确答案或真值错误"] --> E["由14名专家手动重新标注全部5700个问题"]
    E["由14名专家手动重新标注全部5700个问题"] --> F["在修正实例上重新评估先进LLM以测量性能变化"]
    F["在修正实例上重新评估先进LLM以测量性能变化"] --> G["比较全部实例与仅正确实例的模型排名"]

name: MMMU
intro: MMMU是一个评估多模态模型在需要大学水平知识和推理任务上的基准，包含来自六个学科的11500个问题和多样化图像类型。该基准设计用于测试模型的高级感知与领域知识推理能力。
org: IN.AI Research, University of Waterloo, The Ohio State University, Carnegie Mellon University, Unive
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 领域特定, 多轮
intro_en: MMMU is a benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on tasks requiring university-level knowledge and reasoning. It includes 11,500 questions from six disciplines and diverse image types. The benchmark is designed to test models' advanced perception and domain knowledge reasoning abilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Initial Subject Selection] --> B(Selected Subjects: 30 disciplines)
    B --> C[Annotator Recruitment: 50+ University Students]
    C --> D[Question Collection: Textbooks & Online Resources]
    D --> E{Copyright & License Adherence?}
    E -- Yes --> F{Avoid Data Contamination?}
    E -- No --> G[Reject Question]
    F -- Yes --> H(Initial Dataset: 13K Questions)
    F -- No --> G
    H --> I[Data Quality Control Stage 1: Duplicate Identification]
    I --> J{Duplicates Found?}
    J -- Yes --> K[Review & Eliminate Duplicates]
    J -- No --> L[Data Quality Control Stage 2: Format & Typo Checking]
    K --> L
    L --> M[Data Quality Control Stage 3: Difficulty Categorization]
    M --> N{Problems Very Easy (10%)?}
    N -- Yes --> O[Exclude Problems]
    N -- No --> P(Final Dataset: 11.5K Multimodal Questions)
    O --> P
    P --> Q[Evaluation Methodology: Micro-averaged Accuracy]
    Q --> R[Evaluation Pipelines: Rule-based (Open & MC Questions)]
    R --> S[Answer Extraction: Regex & Response Processing]
    S --> T{Valid Answer Found?}
    T -- Yes --> U(Evaluated Accuracy)
    T -- No (MC) --> V[Random Selection]
    T -- No (Open) --> W[Mark as Incorrect]
    V --> U
    W --> U
    U --> X[Baselines: Random Choice & Frequent Choice]
    X --> Y[Human Experts Evaluation: 90 Students, 900 Questions]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect multimodal questions from college exams, quizzes, and textbooks across six disciplines"] --> B["Organize questions into 30 subjects and 183 subfields requiring college-level knowledge"]
    B["Organize questions into 30 subjects and 183 subfields requiring college-level knowledge"] --> C["Curate 30 heterogeneous image types including charts, diagrams, music sheets, and chemical structures"]
    C["Curate 30 heterogeneous image types including charts, diagrams, music sheets, and chemical structures"] --> D["Construct questions with interleaved text and images demanding advanced perception and reasoning"]
    D["Construct questions with interleaved text and images demanding advanced perception and reasoning"] --> E["Assemble 11,500 questions testing expert-level domain-specific knowledge and deliberate reasoning"]
    E["Assemble 11,500 questions testing expert-level domain-specific knowledge and deliberate reasoning"] --> F["Evaluate 28 open-source LMMs plus GPT-4V and Gemini on the benchmark"]
    F["Evaluate 28 open-source LMMs plus GPT-4V and Gemini on the benchmark"] --> G["Measure accuracy to assess model performance on college-level multimodal understanding tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从大学考试、测验和教材中收集六个学科的多模态问题"] --> B["将问题组织为30个科目和183个子领域，要求大学水平知识"]
    B["将问题组织为30个科目和183个子领域，要求大学水平知识"] --> C["整理30种异构图像类型，包括图表、乐谱和化学结构"]
    C["整理30种异构图像类型，包括图表、乐谱和化学结构"] --> D["构建文本与图像交错的问题，要求高级感知和推理"]
    D["构建文本与图像交错的问题，要求高级感知和推理"] --> E["汇集11500个测试专家级领域知识和深思推理的问题"]
    E["汇集11500个测试专家级领域知识和深思推理的问题"] --> F["在基准上评估28个开源LMM及GPT-4V和Gemini"]
    F["在基准上评估28个开源LMM及GPT-4V和Gemini"] --> G["测量准确率以评估模型在大学级多模态理解任务上的表现"]

name: MMMU-Pro
intro: MMMU-Pro是MMMU基准的强化版本，通过剔除文本模型可解答的问题、扩展候选选项，并引入仅视觉输入的设置（问题嵌入图像中），严格评估多模态模型的真实理解与推理能力。结果显示模型在MMMU-Pro上的表现显著下降，提供了更严苛的多模态AI评测工具。
build_method: 混合, 专家构建
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
eval_feature: 对抗性, 思维链, 领域特定
intro_en: MMMU-Pro is an enhanced version of the MMMU benchmark that strictly evaluates multimodal models' true understanding and reasoning abilities by removing questions solvable by text-only models, expanding candidate options, and introducing a vision-only setting (with questions embedded in images). Results show a significant performance drop on MMMU-Pro, providing a more rigorous multimodal AI evaluation tool.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Filter MMMU questions using four text-only LLMs across ten trials each without images"] --> B["Exclude questions answered correctly by three or more LLMs in majority of trials"]
    B["Exclude questions answered correctly by three or more LLMs in majority of trials"] --> C["Randomly sample 1800 questions evenly across 30 subjects from remaining pool"]
    C["Randomly sample 1800 questions evenly across 30 subjects from remaining pool"] --> D["Augment options from four to ten using GPT-4o generation and Claude 3.5 filtering"]
    D["Augment options from four to ten using GPT-4o generation and Claude 3.5 filtering"] --> E["Conduct two rounds of human review to refine options and remove irrelevant questions"]
    E["Conduct two rounds of human review to refine options and remove irrelevant questions"] --> F["Create vision-only variants by embedding questions within screenshots or photos with artifacts"]
    F["Create vision-only variants by embedding questions within screenshots or photos with artifacts"] --> G["Evaluate models on augmented-option standard setting and vision-only setting with Direct and CoT prompts"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用四个纯文本LLM对MMMU问题进行十轮无图过滤"] --> B["排除三个以上LLM多数轮次答对的问题"]
    B["排除三个以上LLM多数轮次答对的问题"] --> C["从剩余池中均匀抽取30学科各60题共1800题"]
    C["从剩余池中均匀抽取30学科各60题共1800题"] --> D["用GPT-4o生成和Claude 3.5筛选将选项从4扩至10个"]
    D["用GPT-4o生成和Claude 3.5筛选将选项从4扩至10个"] --> E["进行两轮人工审核优化选项并移除无关问题"]
    E["进行两轮人工审核优化选项并移除无关问题"] --> F["将问题嵌入截图或照片中创建纯视觉变体"]
    F["将问题嵌入截图或照片中创建纯视觉变体"] --> G["用直接和CoT提示在扩展选项和纯视觉设置下评估模型"]

name: MMSIBench
intro: MMSI-Bench是一个专注于多图像空间智能的视觉问答（VQA）基准测试。它旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在复杂物理世界中进行多图像空间推理的能力。该基准包含1,000个具有挑战性的多项选择题，由六位3D视觉研究人员精心制作，并配有详细的推理过程和精心设计的干扰项。通过对34个MLLM的广泛实验，MMSI-Bench揭示了模型与人类表现之间的巨大差距，为未来的研究提供了广阔空间。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Zhejiang University, Tsinghua Universit
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 多图像, 高质量, 真实世界场景对齐, 综合性与挑战性, 思维链
eval_feature_en: Multiple Images, High Quality, Real-world Scene Alignment, Comprehensive and Challenging, Chain-of-Thought
intro_en: MMSI-Bench is a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark focused on multi-image spatial intelligence. It aims to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perform multi-image spatial reasoning in complex physical environments. The benchmark includes 1,000 challenging multiple-choice questions, carefully crafted by six 3D vision researchers, with detailed reasoning processes and well-designed distractors. Extensive experiments on 34 MLLMs reveal a significant gap between model and human performance, highlighting ample opportunities for future research.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR

name: MMStar
intro: MMStar是一个精英级的视觉不可或缺的多模态基准测试，包含1500个经过人工精心挑选的样本。它旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的多模态能力，涵盖6个核心能力和18个详细维度。该基准测试通过自动化流程初步筛选样本，并进行严格的人工审查，以确保样本具有视觉依赖性、最小数据泄露，并需要高级多模态能力。此外，还开发了两种指标来衡量数据泄露和多模态训练中的实际性能增益。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Artific
intro_en: MMStar is an elite, vision-essential multimodal benchmark consisting of 1,500 carefully curated samples. It aims to evaluate the multimodal capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), covering 6 core abilities and 18 detailed dimensions. The benchmark uses an automated process for initial sample screening followed by rigorous manual review to ensure visual dependency, minimal data leakage, and the need for advanced multimodal skills. Additionally, two metrics were developed to measure data leakage and actual performance gains in multimodal training.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Identify Issues in Existing Benchmarks] --> B{Current Benchmarks have Visual Unnecessary Samples & Data Leakage}
    B -- Yes --> C[Goal: Create Vision-Indispensable Benchmark]
    C --> D[Initial Sample Pool (from Current Benchmarks)]
    D --> E[Automated Pipeline for Rough Selection]
    E --> F(Roughly Selected Samples)
    F --> G[Human Review for Quality Control]
    G -- Check 1: Visual Dependency --> H{Is Visual Content Indispensable?}
    H -- No --> G
    H -- Yes --> I{Check 2: Minimal Data Leakage?}
    I -- No --> G
    I -- Yes --> J{Check 3: Advanced Multi-modal Capabilities Required?}
    J -- No --> G
    J -- Yes --> K(Curated Samples)
    K --> L[Final Dataset: MMStar (1,500 Samples)]
    L --> M[Define 6 Core Capabilities & 18 Detailed Axes]
    M --> N[Develop 2 Metrics: Data Leakage & Actual Performance Gain]
    N --> O[Evaluate 16 Leading LVLMs on MMStar]
    O --> P[Evaluate LVLMs on 7 Other Benchmarks using New Metrics]
    P --> Q[Analyze Results & Insights]
    Q --> R(MMStar Benchmark Report)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect samples from six benchmarks covering natural images and scientific knowledge"] --> B["Deploy eight LLM inspectors to evaluate samples without visual input using 2-shot inference"]
    B["Deploy eight LLM inspectors to evaluate samples without visual input using 2-shot inference"] --> C["Retain only samples with two or fewer correct LLM responses, filtering 22,401 to 11,607"]
    C["Retain only samples with two or fewer correct LLM responses, filtering 22,401 to 11,607"] --> D["Conduct expert manual review to verify visual dependency and minimal data leakage"]
    D["Conduct expert manual review to verify visual dependency and minimal data leakage"] --> E["Curate 1,500 elite samples balanced across six core capabilities and 18 detailed axes"]
    E["Curate 1,500 elite samples balanced across six core capabilities and 18 detailed axes"] --> F["Develop two metrics measuring data leakage and actual multi-modal training gain"]
    F["Develop two metrics measuring data leakage and actual multi-modal training gain"] --> G["Evaluate 16 leading LVLMs on MMStar to assess their multi-modal capabilities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从六个基准中收集自然图像和科学知识样本"] --> B["部署八个LLM检查器用2-shot推理评估样本"]
    B["部署八个LLM检查器用2-shot推理评估样本"] --> C["仅保留LLM正确数不超过两个的样本,筛至11607个"]

    E["精选1500个样本平衡分布于6项核心能力和18个维度"] --> F["开发两个指标测量数据泄露和多模态训练增益"]
    F["开发两个指标测量数据泄露和多模态训练增益"] --> G["在MMStar上评估16个领先LVLM的多模态能力"]

name: MMVP
intro: MMVP基准测试旨在揭示多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在视觉理解方面的系统性缺陷。该基准通过构建“CLIP盲点对”——即CLIP认为相似但视觉上明显不同的图像——来评估模型。MMVP包含九种基本视觉模式的直接问题，即使是GPT-4V等最先进系统也难以正确回答，并常提供错误的解释。研究表明，视觉表征学习仍是一个开放挑战，准确的视觉接地对未来成功的多模态系统至关重要。
org: New York University, University of California, Berkeley, Princeton University, Meta AI Research (FAI
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 防污染, 视觉接地
intro_en: The MMVP benchmark aims to reveal systematic flaws in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) regarding visual understanding. It evaluates models by constructing "CLIP blind spot pairs"—images that CLIP deems similar but are visually distinct. MMVP includes direct questions covering nine fundamental visual patterns, which even state-of-the-art systems like GPT-4V struggle to answer correctly and often provide incorrect explanations for. The study highlights that visual representation learning remains an open challenge, and accurate visual grounding is crucial for the future success of multimodal systems.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[数据源: ImageNet-1K & LAION-Aesthetics] --> B[计算 CLIP 嵌入 (CLIP-ViT-L-14)]
    A --> C[计算 DINOv2 嵌入 (DINOv2-ViT-L-14)]
    B --> D{CLIP 相似度 > 0.95?}
    C --> E{DINOv2 相似度 < 0.6?}
    D -- 是 --> F{CLIP-blind Pair 候选}
    E -- 是 --> F
    F -- 满足条件 --> G[识别 CLIP-blind Pairs]
    G --> H[人工检查 CLIP-blind Pairs]
    H --> I[识别 CLIP 忽略的视觉细节]
    I --> J[设计问题 (150 对, 300 个问题)]
    J --> K[构建 MMVP 基准测试]
    K --> L[Evaluation多模态 LLM (GPT-4V, LLaVA-1.5等)]
    K --> M[进行用户研究 (300 个问题)]
    L --> N{LLM 对 CLIP-blind Pair 的两个问题都回答正确?}
    M --> O[人类表现基线]
    N -- 是 --> P[LLM 评分]
    N -- 否 --> Q[识别 LLM 视觉缺陷]
    P --> R[分析 LLM 性能]
    Q --> R
    R --> S[MMVP 结果]
    O --> S

    B["Compute CLIP-ViT-L-14 and DINOv2-ViT-L-14 embeddings for each image pair"] --> C["Filter pairs with CLIP similarity >0.95 and DINOv2 similarity <0.6 as CLIP-blind pairs"]
    C["Filter pairs with CLIP similarity >0.95 and DINOv2 similarity <0.6 as CLIP-blind pairs"] --> D["Human annotators identify visual differences and craft straightforward questions for each pair"]
    D["Human annotators identify visual differences and craft straightforward questions for each pair"] --> E["Curate 150 CLIP-blind pairs with 300 questions targeting overlooked visual details"]
    E["Curate 150 CLIP-blind pairs with 300 questions targeting overlooked visual details"] --> F["Evaluate MLLMs independently on each question, scoring only when both pair questions are correct"]
    F["Evaluate MLLMs independently on each question, scoring only when both pair questions are correct"] --> G["Conduct user study with randomized questions to measure human performance baseline"]
    G["Conduct user study with randomized questions to measure human performance baseline"] --> H["Use GPT-4 to categorize questions into 9 systematic visual patterns from benchmark content"]

name: MMVU
intro: MMVU是一个全面的专家级、多学科视频理解基准，用于评估基础模型在视频理解方面的能力。它包含3,000个由专家标注的问题，涵盖科学、医疗健康、人文社会科学和工程四大核心学科的27个主题。MMVU旨在挑战模型应用领域特定知识并进行专家级推理，以分析专业领域的视频，超越了当前视频基准中通常评估的基本视觉感知。每个示例都由人类专家从头开始标注，并辅以专家标注的推理依据和相关领域知识，以促进深入分析。
org: Yilun Zhao, Lujing Xie, Haowei Zhang, Guo Gan, Yitao Long, Zhiyuan Hu, Tongyan Hu, Weiyuan Chen, Chu
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: MMVU is a comprehensive expert-level, multidisciplinary video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate foundational models' capabilities in video comprehension. It includes 3,000 expert-annotated questions covering 27 topics across four core disciplines: science, medical health, humanities and social sciences, and engineering. MMVU aims to challenge models to apply domain-specific knowledge and perform expert-level reasoning to analyze videos in specialized fields, going beyond the basic visual perception typically assessed in current video benchmarks. Each example is annotated from scratch by human experts, accompanied by expert-provided reasoning and relevant domain knowledge to support in-depth analysis.

name: MORSE-500
intro: MORSE-500是一个视频基准测试，旨在解决现有基准在多模态推理方面的不足。它包含500个完全脚本化的视频片段和嵌入式问题，涵盖六种互补的推理类别。该基准测试通过程序化生成，支持对视觉复杂性、干扰密度和时间动态的精细控制，并能系统地调整难度。MORSE-500旨在通过其可控的生成管道，支持创建任意具有挑战性的新实例，以压力测试下一代模型。
org: University of Maryland, Google, Cornell University
build_method: 自动生成, 混合
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MORSE-500 is a video benchmark designed to address the limitations of existing benchmarks in multimodal reasoning. It contains 500 fully scripted video clips with embedded questions, covering six complementary reasoning categories. The benchmark is programmatically generated, allowing fine-grained control over visual complexity, interference density, and temporal dynamics, as well as systematic difficulty adjustment. MORSE-500 aims to support the creation of arbitrarily challenging new instances through its controllable generation pipeline to stress-test next-generation models.

    Q --> R(性能差距分析)

name: MotionBench
intro: MotionBench是一个全面的评估基准，旨在评估视频理解模型对细粒度运动的理解能力。它通过六种主要类型的运动导向问题来评估模型的运动级感知，并包含从不同来源收集的数据，确保了对真实世界视频内容的广泛代表性。实验结果表明，现有视觉语言模型在理解细粒度运动方面表现不佳，该基准旨在指导和激励开发更强大的视频理解模型。
build_method: 网络爬取, 自动生成, 人工标注, 混合
metric: Accuracy, MR, LM, CM, MO, AO, RC
eval_feature: 细粒度评估, 多样化数据, 高质量标注
build_method_en: Web Crawling, Automated Generation, Human Annotation, Hybrid
eval_feature_en: Fine-grained Evaluation, Diverse Data, High-quality Annotation
intro_en: MotionBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate video understanding models' ability to comprehend fine-grained motion. It assesses models' motion-level perception through six main types of motion-oriented questions and includes data collected from various sources to ensure broad representation of real-world video content. Experimental results show that existing vision-language models perform poorly in understanding fine-grained motion, and this benchmark aims to guide and inspire the development of more robust video understanding models.

flowchart TD

    B --> C[Data Collection]
    C --> C1(Web Videos: Panda-70M, Pexels)
    C --> C2(Public Datasets: MedVid, SportsSloMo, Ha-ViD)
    C --> C3(Self-synthetic Videos: Unity)

    C --> D[Video Curation & Filtering]
    D --> D1{Video Type: Intricate Interactions?}
    D1 -- Yes --> E[Manual Caption Annotation]
    E --> F[GPT-4o QA Generation (6 pairs/video)]
    F --> G{Filter Common Knowledge/Single Frame Qs}
    G -- Discard --> F
    G -- Keep --> H[Manual QA Filtering & Categorization]
    H --> I(4922 QA Pairs Retained)

    D1 -- No, Specific Fields --> J[Direct QA Annotation]
    J --> K(2530 QA Pairs Selected)

    D1 -- No, Virtual Videos --> L[Automatic QA Construction]
    L --> M(600 QA Pairs Generated)

    I & K & M --> N[Combine QA Pairs]
    N --> O[Define 6 Motion-Oriented Task Categories]
    O --> O1(Motion Recognition)
    O --> O2(Location-related Motion)
    O --> O3(Action Order)
    O --> O4(Repetition Count)
    O --> O5(Motion-related Objects)
    O --> O6(Camera Motion)

    N --> P[Quality Control: Final Review]
    P --> Q(Final Dataset: 5385 Videos, 8052 QAs)
    Q --> R[Evaluation Methodology]
    R --> S(Annotation Density: 68.4)
    R --> T(Model Performance Evaluation)
    T --> U[MotionBench Results]
metric_en: Accuracy, MR, LM, CM, MO, AO, RC

    G["Double-check all annotations to ensure fine-grained motion description quality"] --> H["Evaluate video VLMs using the curated benchmark with motion-level perception tasks"]

name: MRCR
intro: OpenAI MRCR（多轮共指消解）是一个长上下文数据集，用于评估大型语言模型在上下文中区分多个“针”的能力。该评估的灵感来自Gemini首次引入的MRCR评估。OpenAI MRCR扩展了任务难度，并提供了开源数据以重现结果。该任务具有挑战性，因为“针”与干扰项来自相同的分布，模型必须区分“针”的顺序，并且上下文越长，任务越困难。
build_method: 自动生成, 混合
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 长上下文
intro_en: OpenAI MRCR (Multi-turn Coreference Resolution) is a long-context dataset designed to evaluate large language models' ability to distinguish multiple "needles" within context. This benchmark is inspired by the MRCR evaluation first introduced by Gemini. OpenAI MRCR increases task difficulty and provides open-source data for result reproduction. The task is challenging because the "needles" and distractors come from the same distribution, models must differentiate the order of the "needles," and the longer the context, the harder the task.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义基准目标] --> B[设计任务: 多轮对话与隐藏“针”]
    B --> C[确定“针”的数量: 2, 4, 8] 
    C --> D[选择写作主题与格式: 438实体, 10格式]
    D --> E[使用GPT-4o生成对话内容] 
    E --> F{“针”与干扰项分布一致性检查}
    F -- 是 --> G[生成多轮对话样本]
    F -- 否 --> E
    G --> H[嵌入“针”到对话中]
    H --> I[生成模型指令: 返回第i个“针”]
    I --> J[数据集初步生成]
    J --> K{Quality Control: 检查“针”数量与真实性}
    K -- 发现错误 --> L[错误数据点修正与更新]
    L --> J
    K -- 无错误 --> M[根据Token数量分桶: 8个区间]
    M --> N[每桶100个样本]
    N --> O[Final Dataset组成]
    O --> P[Evaluation方法: 模型预置字母数字哈希]
    P --> Q[Evaluation方法: SequenceMatcher相似度计算]
    Q --> R[Evaluation方法: 哈希不匹配则相似度为0]
    R --> S[发布数据集]

name: MT-Bench
intro: MT-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）多轮对话能力的基准。它通过一系列具有挑战性的开放式问题，测试模型在对话和指令遵循方面的表现。
org: UC Berkeley, Carnegie Mellon University, Stanford University, MBZUAI, UC San Diego, LMSYS
task_type: 对话, 开放式问答, 指令遵循
eval_feature: 多轮, 结果导向
intro_en: MT-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating the multi-turn dialogue capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It tests models' performance in conversation and instruction following through a series of challenging open-ended questions.

    L -- 否 --> K
    K --> N[Quality Control: 允许跳过不确定问题]

    R -- 参考指导评分 --> U[LLM评判者对比参考答案Evaluation]
    S --> V[ValidationLLM评判者与人类偏好一致性]
    T --> V
    U --> V
    V --> W[MT-BenchFinal Dataset]

name: MT-Bench-101
intro: MT-Bench-101是一个专门为评估大型语言模型（LLM）在多轮对话中细粒度能力而设计的基准。它通过分析真实的多轮对话数据，构建了一个包含13个不同任务中1388个多轮对话的4208个轮次的三层分层能力分类法。该基准对21个流行的LLM进行了评估，从能力和任务的角度进行了全面分析。研究发现，常见对齐技术或聊天特定设计并未显著提升LLM的多轮对话能力。
org: Alibaba Group, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory
eval_feature: 多轮, LLM-as-a-Judge
intro_en: MT-Bench-101 is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the fine-grained capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in multi-turn conversations. By analyzing real multi-turn dialogue data, it constructs a three-layer hierarchical taxonomy of abilities, covering 4,208 turns across 1,388 multi-turn dialogues in 13 different tasks. The benchmark evaluates 21 popular LLMs, providing a comprehensive analysis from both capability and task perspectives. The study finds that common alignment techniques or chat-specific designs do not significantly improve LLMs' multi-turn conversational abilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD

    B --> C[为每个任务定制数据生成提示]

    F -- 不符合标准 --> D
    G --> H{五名注释者独立审查}
    H -- 全部通过 --> I[形成Final Dataset]
    H -- 未全部通过 --> G

    J --> K[Final Dataset组成: 13任务, 1388对话, 4208轮]
    K --> L[涵盖30个不同主题]
    L --> M[采用GPT-4进行Evaluation]
    M --> N[制定详细Evaluation指南]
    N --> O[GPT-4响应评分(1-10分)]
    O --> P[最终得分: 对话最低分]

name: MTVQA
intro: MTVQA是一个多语言文本中心视觉问答基准，旨在评估AI模型在文本中心场景理解方面的能力。该基准首次通过高质量的人工专家标注，涵盖9种不同语言，包含6,778个问答对和2,116张图像。它揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在多语言文本中心视觉问答任务上与人类表现之间存在显著差距，并提供了多语言训练数据以促进模型性能提升。
org: ByteDance Inc., Huazhong University of Science and Technology
build_method: 人工标注
eval_feature: 多语言, 人工标注
intro_en: MTVQA is a multilingual text-centered visual question answering benchmark designed to evaluate AI models' ability in text-centered scene understanding. This benchmark, for the first time, features high-quality expert annotations across 9 different languages, containing 6,778 QA pairs and 2,116 images. It reveals a significant gap between current multimodal large language models and human performance on multilingual text-centered visual QA tasks, and provides multilingual training data to facilitate model improvement.

name: MUIRBENCH
intro: MuirBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（LLMs）的鲁棒多图像理解能力。它包含12个不同的多图像任务和10个多图像关系类别，由11,264张图像和2,600个多项选择题组成。该基准通过将每个标准实例与语义差异最小的无法回答的变体配对，以实现可靠评估，并揭示了现有模型在此任务上的不足。
org: USC, UPenn, UMN, UC Davis, UW-Madison, UCLA, OSU, Microsoft Research
task_type: 多项选择题, 图像问答
eval_feature: 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MuirBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the robust multi-image understanding capabilities of multimodal large language models (LLMs). It includes 12 different multi-image tasks and 10 categories of multi-image relationships, comprising 11,264 images and 2,600 multiple-choice questions. The benchmark ensures reliable evaluation by pairing each standard instance with an unanswerable variant that has minimal semantic differences, revealing the shortcomings of existing models on this task.

name: MulDimIF
intro: 该基准旨在评估大型语言模型遵循用户定义指令的能力。现有基准通常依赖模板化约束提示，缺乏真实世界使用的多样性，限制了细粒度的性能评估。为解决此问题，我们提出了一个多维约束框架，包含三种约束模式、四种约束类别和四个难度级别。在此框架基础上，我们开发了一个自动化指令生成流程，包括约束扩展、冲突检测和指令重写，生成了1200个可代码验证的指令遵循测试样本。
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 多维约束, 自动化指令生成, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Multi-dimensional Constraints, Automated Instruction Generation, Process Evaluation
intro_en: This benchmark aims to evaluate large language models' ability to follow user-defined instructions. Existing benchmarks often rely on templated constraint prompts, lacking the diversity of real-world usage and limiting fine-grained performance assessment. To address this, we propose a multidimensional constraint framework featuring three constraint modes, four constraint categories, and four difficulty levels. Based on this framework, we developed an automated instruction generation process, including constraint expansion, conflict detection, and instruction rewriting, producing 1,200 code-verifiable instruction-following test samples.

    E --> F[Instruction-Following Test Samples]

    H --> I[Evaluation of 19 LLMs]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
    J --> K[Reinforcement Learning Data Generation]
    K --> L[Improvement in Instruction Following]

    A -- Framework Components --> A3(Difficulty Levels)

    A1 --> A1_3(Incorporation)

    A3 --> A3_1(Level I)

name: Multi-IF
intro: Multi-IF是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在多轮和多语言指令遵循能力方面的新基准。该基准通过结合LLM和人工标注者，扩展了IFEval，纳入了多轮对话序列，并将英文提示翻译成其他7种语言。它包含4,501个多语言对话，每个对话有三轮，旨在反映真实世界应用中处理多轮和多语言交互的复杂性。
build_method: 混合
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
eval_feature: 多语言, 多轮
intro_en: Multi-IF is a new benchmark designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) on multi-turn and multilingual instruction-following capabilities. By combining LLMs and human annotators, it extends IFEval by incorporating multi-turn dialogue sequences and translating English prompts into seven other languages. It contains 4,501 multilingual dialogues, each with three turns, aiming to reflect the complexity of handling multi-turn and multilingual interactions in real-world applications.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[IFEval English Single-Turn Prompts] --> B[Multi-turn Expansion]
    B --> C{Instruction Type Sampling (30 types)}
    C --> D[LLM Prompt Generation (Llama 3.1 405B)]
    D --> E[Multi-turn Prompts (English)]
    E --> F{LLM Conflict Identification (Llama 3.1 405B)}
    F -- Conflicting --> G[Human Auditing (Conflict Resolution)]
    F -- No Conflict --> H[Clean English Multi-turn Prompts]
    G --> H
    H --> I[Multilingual Translation (Llama 3.1 405B)]
    I --> J{Multilingual Human Auditing & Revision}
    J -- Needs Revision --> I
    J -- Approved --> K[Translated Multilingual Prompts]
    K --> L{LLM Sensitive Content Flagging}
    L -- Sensitive --> M[Human Review & Elimination]
    L -- Not Sensitive --> N[Final Multilingual Conversations]
    M --> N
    N --> O[Dataset: 4,501 Multilingual Conversations (8 languages, 3 turns)]
    O --> P[Evaluation of SOTA LLMs (e.g., Llama 3.1, GPT-4o)]
    P --> Q(Performance Analysis: Multi-turn Accuracy, Multilingual Capabilities)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Use original IFEval English prompts as first turn of conversations"] --> B["Randomly sample instruction types and prompt Llama 3.1 405B to generate two additional turns"]
    B["Randomly sample instruction types and prompt Llama 3.1 405B to generate two additional turns"] --> C["Use Llama 3.1 405B to identify conflicting instructions across turns"]
    C["Use Llama 3.1 405B to identify conflicting instructions across turns"] --> D["Human annotators filter out prompts with contradictory instructions"]
    D["Human annotators filter out prompts with contradictory instructions"] --> E["Translate English multi-turn prompts into seven languages using Llama 3.1 405B"]
    E["Translate English multi-turn prompts into seven languages using Llama 3.1 405B"] --> F["Multilingual annotators evaluate translation fidelity and revise to native speaker style"]
    F["Multilingual annotators evaluate translation fidelity and revise to native speaker style"] --> G["LLM flags sensitive content; human annotators review and remove flagged prompts"]
    G["LLM flags sensitive content; human annotators review and remove flagged prompts"] --> H["Evaluate LLMs by concatenating previous turns with current prompt for each response"]

    A["使用IFEval英文提示作为对话首轮"] --> B["随机采样指令类型并用Llama生成两轮后续提示"]
    B["随机采样指令类型并用Llama生成两轮后续提示"] --> C["用Llama识别跨轮次冲突指令"]

name: Multi-LogiEval
intro: Multi-LogiEval是一个综合性的评测基准，专注于评估大型语言模型的多步逻辑推理能力。该数据集涵盖了命题逻辑、一阶逻辑和非单调逻辑，包含了超过30种推理规则及其60多种组合，并具有不同的推理深度。该基准旨在推动对大型语言模型逻辑推理能力的研究和改进。
org: Arizona State University, Google, Intel, UCSF
eval_feature: 思维链
intro_en: Multi-LogiEval is a comprehensive benchmark focused on evaluating the multi-step logical reasoning abilities of large language models. The dataset covers propositional logic, first-order logic, and non-monotonic logic, featuring over 30 reasoning rules and more than 60 combinations, with varying reasoning depths. This benchmark aims to advance research and improvement in the logical reasoning capabilities of large language models.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[研究现有逻辑推理基准] --> B{识别现有基准局限性}
    B -- 局限性包括 --> C[单一逻辑类型]
    B -- 局限性包括 --> D[有限推理规则]
    B -- 局限性包括 --> E[缺乏非单调推理数据集]
    F[定义Multi-LogiEval目标] --> G[设计两阶段数据生成流程]
    G --> H[阶段1: 规则组合生成]
    H --> I(推理规则库)
    I --> J[创建推理规则的组合]
    J --> K[生成不同推理深度的实例]
    K --> L(规则组合数据集)
    G --> M[阶段2: 数据实例生成]
    M --> N(LLM提示模板)
    N --> O[提示LLM生成<上下文,问题,答案>三元组]
    O --> P(原始数据实例)
    P --> Q{人工Validation}
    Q -- 通过 --> R[高质量数据实例]
    Q -- 失败 --> O
    R --> S[Final Dataset组成]
    S --> T(Multi-LogiEval数据集)
    T --> U[Evaluation方法: 零样本思维链]
    U --> V[在多种LLM上进行Evaluation]
    V --> W(LLM性能结果)
    W --> X[分析推理链]
    X --> Y[发现重要研究结果]
    Y --> Z[促进未来研究]

    G["Formulate binary classification task where models determine if story entails the conclusion"] --> H["Evaluate LLMs using zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting across different reasoning depths"]

name: Multi-SWE-bench
intro: Multi-SWE-bench是一个多语言基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在解决真实世界软件开发问题上的能力。该基准涵盖了Python、Java、TypeScript、JavaScript、Go、Rust、C和C++等多种编程语言，包含了2132个从实际软件项目中筛选并由专家精心标注的高质量实例。它通过模拟真实开发场景中的问题修复任务，为评估和提升大模型在软件工程领域的应用提供了可靠的平台。
intro_en: Multi-SWE-bench is a multilingual benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' ability to solve real-world software development problems. It covers multiple programming languages, including Python, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C, and C++, and contains 2,132 high-quality instances carefully curated and annotated by experts from real software projects. By simulating bug-fixing tasks in real development scenarios, it provides a reliable platform for assessing and improving large models' applications in software engineering.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Issue Candidates Collection] --> B(2,456 Candidate Issues)
    B --> C[Expert Annotation Process]
    C -- 68 Expert Annotators --> D(Annotated Instances)
    D --> E{Quality Control & Filtering}
    E -- Problematic Issues Filtered --> F(1,632 High-Quality Instances)
    F --> G[Multi-SWE-bench Dataset]
    G --> H[Evaluation Methodology]
    H -- Agentless, SWE-agent, OpenHands --> I[Model Evaluation Results]
    J[Multi-SWE-RL Community Launch] --> K(4,723 RL Training Instances)
    K --> L[Open-source Data Production Pipeline]
    L --> M[Continuous Contribution & Expansion]
    G -- Covers --> N(Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C, C++ Languages)

    D["Filter PRs by patch size, file count, and test coverage thresholds"] --> E["68 expert annotators manually verify 2,456 candidates to produce 1,632 high-quality instances"]
    E["68 expert annotators manually verify 2,456 candidates to produce 1,632 high-quality instances"] --> F["Adapt Agentless, SWE-agent, and OpenHands methods with multilingual prompts and language-specific tooling"]

name: MultiChallenge
intro: MultiChallenge是一个开创性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在与人类用户进行多轮对话方面的能力。该基准测试识别了多轮对话中常见的四类挑战，这些挑战对当前的前沿LLMs来说都极具难度。MultiChallenge要求LLMs同时具备准确的指令遵循、上下文分配和上下文推理能力。尽管在现有基准测试中表现出色，所有前沿模型在MultiChallenge上的准确率均低于50%。
org: Scale AI, Labelbox, Technical University of Denmark
build_method: 混合
intro_en: MultiChallenge is a pioneering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to engage in multi-turn conversations with human users. It identifies four common challenges in multi-turn dialogue that are difficult for state-of-the-art LLMs. MultiChallenge requires LLMs to demonstrate accurate instruction following, context allocation, and context reasoning simultaneously. Despite strong performance on existing benchmarks, all leading models achieve less than 50% accuracy on MultiChallenge.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[多阶段多智能体系统 (MMSE) 生成合成数据]
    B --> C{MMSE Input}
    C -- 包含 --> C1(分层主题种子)
    C -- 包含 --> C2(角色种子)
    C -- 包含 --> C3(Evaluation配置)
    C --> D[智能体角色分配]
    D --> D1[规划智能体]
    D --> D2[用户智能体]
    D --> D3[响应智能体 (6个前沿LLM)]
    D1 -- 生成并更新 --> E(对话蓝图)
    D2 -- 根据蓝图与 --> D3
    D3 -- 响应 --> D2
    E -- 持续更新基于 --> F(对话历史)
    F --> G{规划智能体检测到模型失败?}
    G -- 是 --> H[对话终止并保存]
    G -- 否 --> I{达到最大轮次限制?}
    I -- 是 --> J[对话丢弃]
    I -- 否 --> E
    H --> K[人工审查和编辑]
    K --> K1[招募并培训Human Annotation者]
    K1 --> K2{审查标准}
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2a(符合挑战定义)
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2b(对话自然真实)
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2c(至少3个LLM合理失败)
    K2 --> L{质量不满意?}
    L -- 是 --> L1[编辑或丢弃合成示例]
    L -- 否 --> M[通过第一层审查]
    M --> N[第二层审查 (不同审查员池)]
    N --> O[第三层审查 (不同审查员池)]
    O --> P[通过所有审查层]
    P --> Q[自动Evaluation (LLM作为评判者)]
    Q --> Q1(实例级Evaluation标准)
    Q1 -- 93.91%对齐 --> R(人工评判)
    R --> S[最终基准数据集]

flowchart LR
    A["Input hierarchical topic seeds, PersonaHub persona seeds, and category-specific evaluation configs into MMSE multi-agent system"] --> B["Planner, User, and Responder agents collaborate to synthetically generate multi-turn conversation candidates for each challenge category"]
    B["Planner, User, and Responder agents collaborate to synthetically generate multi-turn conversation candidates for each challenge category"] --> C["Human experts review and edit synthetic conversations to produce final test examples with realistic challenges"]

    D["Human raters create binary rubric questions for each example requiring only the final model response"] --> E["Evaluate LLMs by having them respond to final user turns given multi-turn conversation histories"]

name: MultiMedQA
intro: MultiMedQA是Google发布的综合性医疗领域AI评测套件，整合了六个现有开放式医疗问答数据集，涵盖专业医学考试、研究和消费者查询，并新增HealthSearchQA数据集，全面评估大型语言模型的临床知识和推理能力。
metric: Accuracy, 人工评估（事实性, 精确性, 潜在危害, 偏见）
eval_feature: 整合多数据集，含人工评估事实性, 精确性, 潜在危害和偏见
scale: 整合多个医疗问答数据集，共约数万题
build_method_en: Integrate existing datasets, partially manually generated
eval_feature_en: Integrate multiple datasets, including manual evaluation of factuality, accuracy, potential harm, and bias
intro_en: MultiMedQA is a comprehensive medical AI benchmark released by Google, integrating six existing open-domain medical QA datasets covering professional medical exams, research, and consumer queries, and adding the HealthSearchQA dataset to thoroughly evaluate large language models' clinical knowledge and reasoning abilities.

    J --> K[Performance Analysis & Reporting]
