name: MultiPL-E
intro: MultiPL-E是一个用于将单元测试驱动的代码生成基准测试翻译成新语言的系统。它通过将两个流行的Python代码生成基准测试扩展到18种额外的编程语言，创建了第一个大规模多语言代码生成基准测试。该基准测试用于评估Codex、CodeGen和InCoder等最先进代码生成模型的多语言性能，并探讨语言频率和语言特性对模型性能的影响。
eval_feature: 多语言
intro_en: MultiPL-E is a system that translates unit test-driven code generation benchmarks into new languages. By extending two popular Python code generation benchmarks to 18 additional programming languages, it creates the first large-scale multilingual code generation benchmark. This benchmark evaluates the multilingual performance of state-of-the-art code generation models such as Codex, CodeGen, and InCoder, and explores the impact of language frequency and language features on model performance.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select HumanEval and MBPP Python code generation benchmarks as source benchmarks"] --> B["Build 18 compilers to translate function signatures, unit tests, comments, and type annotations"]
    B["Build 18 compilers to translate function signatures, unit tests, comments, and type annotations"] --> C["Apply rule-based tool to translate technical terms in comments to target language equivalents"]
    C["Apply rule-based tool to translate technical terms in comments to target language equivalents"] --> D["Generate MultiPL-HumanEval and MultiPL-MBPP benchmarks across 18 additional programming languages"]
    D["Generate MultiPL-HumanEval and MultiPL-MBPP benchmarks across 18 additional programming languages"] --> E["Prompt Codex, CodeGen, and InCoder models to generate code completions for each language"]
    E["Prompt Codex, CodeGen, and InCoder models to generate code completions for each language"] --> F["Compile generated programs in containerized sandbox with appropriate timeouts if necessary"]
    F["Compile generated programs in containerized sandbox with appropriate timeouts if necessary"] --> G["Run generated code against translated unit tests and validate correctness"]
    G["Run generated code against translated unit tests and validate correctness"] --> H["Classify each output as successful, syntax error, or other failure type"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择HumanEval和MBPP作为源基准"] --> B["构建18个编译器翻译函数签名、单元测试、注释和类型标注"]
    B["构建18个编译器翻译函数签名、单元测试、注释和类型标注"] --> C["应用规则工具将注释中的技术术语翻译为目标语言"]
    C["应用规则工具将注释中的技术术语翻译为目标语言"] --> D["生成18种编程语言的MultiPL-HumanEval和MultiPL-MBPP基准"]
    D["生成18种编程语言的MultiPL-HumanEval和MultiPL-MBPP基准"] --> E["提示Codex、CodeGen和InCoder模型生成各语言代码"]
    E["提示Codex、CodeGen和InCoder模型生成各语言代码"] --> F["在容器化沙箱中编译生成的程序并设置超时"]
    F["在容器化沙箱中编译生成的程序并设置超时"] --> G["对翻译的单元测试运行生成代码并验证正确性"]
    G["对翻译的单元测试运行生成代码并验证正确性"] --> H["将每个输出分类为成功、语法错误或其他失败类型"]

name: MultiPriv
intro: MultiPriv是系统评估视觉语言模型个体级别隐私推理能力的基准，通过隐私感知与推理框架和双语多模态数据集，涵盖属性检测、跨图像重识别和链式推理等九项挑战性任务。
task_type: 属性检测, 重识别, 链式推理
eval_feature: 评估VLM个体级别隐私推理能力，双语多模态
build_method_en: Synthetic bilingual multimodal dataset of individual profiles
eval_feature_en: Evaluate VLM individual-level privacy reasoning ability, bilingual multimodal
intro_en: MultiPriv is a benchmark for systematically evaluating the individual-level privacy inference capabilities of vision-language models. It features a privacy-aware inference framework and a bilingual multimodal dataset, covering nine challenging tasks including attribute detection, cross-image re-identification, and chain reasoning.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Raw Multilingual Medical Data) --> B[Expert Curation & Selection]
    B --> C[Data Anonymization & De-identification]
    C --> D[Multilingual Translation & Normalization]
    D --> E[Privacy Compliance Review]
    E --> F[Expert Validation]
    F --> G{Privacy Risk Assessment}
    G -- "Meets Standards" --> H(MultiPriv Benchmark Dataset)
    G -- "Requires Revision" --> C
    H --> I[Medical AI System Evaluation]
    I --> J(Privacy Risk Assessment Report)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define privacy taxonomy covering 36 sensitive attribute subcategories guided by GDPR and CCPA frameworks"] --> B["Construct 40 synthetic individual profiles with bilingual metadata in Chinese and English"]
    B["Construct 40 synthetic individual profiles with bilingual metadata in Chinese and English"] --> C["Generate 719 images linking direct identifiers to sensitive attributes across profiles"]
    C["Generate 719 images linking direct identifiers to sensitive attributes across profiles"] --> D["Design nine tasks evaluating attribute detection, cross-image re-identification, and chained reasoning"]
    D["Design nine tasks evaluating attribute detection, cross-image re-identification, and chained reasoning"] --> E["Evaluate commercial models, foundational VLMs, and RVLMs on privacy perception capabilities"]
    E["Evaluate commercial models, foundational VLMs, and RVLMs on privacy perception capabilities"] --> F["Assess models' privacy reasoning ability to link distributed attributes into individual profiles"]
    F["Assess models' privacy reasoning ability to link distributed attributes into individual profiles"] --> G["Measure accuracy of extracted privacy content and treat refusals as task failures"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["依据GDPR和CCPA框架定义涵盖36个敏感属性子类的隐私分类"] --> B["构建40个包含中英文元数据的合成个体档案"]
    B["构建40个包含中英文元数据的合成个体档案"] --> C["生成719张图像将直接标识符关联到档案中的敏感属性"]
    C["生成719张图像将直接标识符关联到档案中的敏感属性"] --> D["设计九项任务评估属性检测、跨图像重识别和链式推理"]
    D["设计九项任务评估属性检测、跨图像重识别和链式推理"] --> E["评估商业模型、基础VLM和RVLM的隐私感知能力"]
    E["评估商业模型、基础VLM和RVLM的隐私感知能力"] --> F["评估模型将分散属性关联为个体档案的隐私推理能力"]
    F["评估模型将分散属性关联为个体档案的隐私推理能力"] --> G["测量提取隐私内容的准确性并将拒答视为任务失败"]

name: MuSR
intro: MuSR（多步软推理）是一个用于评估语言模型多步软推理能力的数据集，任务以自然语言叙述形式呈现。数据集通过新颖的神经符号合成到自然语言生成算法构建，包含复杂推理实例，挑战先进语言模型。实例为自由文本叙述，贴近真实推理场景，兼具挑战性和现实性。
eval_feature: 思维链
build_method_en: Neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm
intro_en: MuSR (Multi-step Soft Reasoning) is a dataset designed to evaluate language models' multi-step soft reasoning abilities, with tasks presented in natural language narrative form. The dataset is constructed using a novel neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm and contains complex reasoning instances that challenge advanced language models. The examples are free-text narratives, closely reflecting real-world reasoning scenarios, combining both challenge and realism.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[定义领域和问题]
    B --> C[构建初始事实集F]
    C --> D[生成多样性事实G]
    D --> E(领域特定事实)
    E --> F[递归采样LLM (GPT-4)]
    F --> G(LLMOutput)
    G --> H[应用树Validation器V]
    H --> I{是否有效?}
    I -- 否 --> F
    I -- 是 --> J[生成推理树T]
    J --> K{达到目标深度?}
    K -- 否 --> F
    K -- 是 --> L(场景特定事实S(T))
    L --> M(常识事实C(T))
    L --> N[将S(T)分块]
    N --> O[LLM生成章节]
    O --> P[连接章节生成叙述x]
    P --> Q{事实一致性?}
    Q -- 否 --> O
    Q -- 是 --> R[数据集Validation]
    R --> S[人工Evaluation]
    S --> T[Final Dataset组成]
    T --> U(MuSR数据集)
    U --> V[End]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample problem outline with victim, suspects, and gold answer facts across three domains"] --> B["Recursively sample from LLM to build reasoning tree linking conclusions to story facts via commonsense"]
    B["Recursively sample from LLM to build reasoning tree linking conclusions to story facts via commonsense"] --> C["Iteratively generate narrative chunks describing detective interactions and facts using the reasoning tree"]
    C["Iteratively generate narrative chunks describing detective interactions and facts using the reasoning tree"] --> D["Validate each generated chunk for fact consistency and recall before accepting it"]
    D["Validate each generated chunk for fact consistency and recall before accepting it"] --> E["Compile 756 examples across murder mysteries, object placement, and team assignment domains"]
    E["Compile 756 examples across murder mysteries, object placement, and team assignment domains"] --> F["Evaluate LLMs using chain-of-thought prompting variants and neurosymbolic approaches on the narratives"]
    F["Evaluate LLMs using chain-of-thought prompting variants and neurosymbolic approaches on the narratives"] --> G["Characterize performance gaps between models and human annotators on multistep soft reasoning tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["在三个领域中采样问题大纲，包含受害者、嫌疑人和黄金答案事实"] --> B["递归采样LLM构建推理树，通过常识将结论与故事事实关联"]
    B["递归采样LLM构建推理树，通过常识将结论与故事事实关联"] --> C["使用推理树迭代生成叙述片段，描述侦探互动和事实"]
    C["使用推理树迭代生成叙述片段，描述侦探互动和事实"] --> D["验证每个生成片段的事实一致性和召回率后接受"]
    D["验证每个生成片段的事实一致性和召回率后接受"] --> E["编译756个示例，涵盖谋杀悬疑、物体放置和团队分配领域"]
    E["编译756个示例，涵盖谋杀悬疑、物体放置和团队分配领域"] --> F["使用思维链提示变体和神经符号方法评估LLM在叙述上的表现"]
    F["使用思维链提示变体和神经符号方法评估LLM在叙述上的表现"] --> G["表征模型与人类标注者在多步软推理任务上的性能差距"]

name: MVBench
intro: MVBench是一个全面的多模态视频理解基准，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在动态视频任务中的时序理解能力。它涵盖了20项具有挑战性的视频任务，这些任务无法通过单帧有效解决。该基准通过新颖的“静态到动态”方法定义时序相关任务，并自动将公共视频标注转换为多项选择题进行评估。
org: OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shenzhen Institutes of Advanced Technology, Chinese Academy of Sc
intro_en: MVBench is a comprehensive multimodal video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the temporal reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on dynamic video tasks. It covers 20 challenging video tasks that cannot be effectively solved using single frames. The benchmark defines temporal reasoning tasks through a novel "static-to-dynamic" approach and automatically converts public video annotations into multiple-choice questions for evaluation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[定义20个时间相关任务]
    B --> C{静态到动态方法}
    C --> D[参考现有图像任务定义]
    D --> E[增强问题以包含视频时间上下文]
    E --> F[自动标注范式]
    F --> G[收集11个公共视频基准数据集]
    G --> H[使用LLM将开放式QA转换为多项选择QA]
    H --> I[处理答案选项：随机采样、打乱顺序、LLM确保长度相似]
    I --> J[确保Evaluation公平性和准确性]
    J --> K[设计Evaluation提示]
    K --> L[强调时间敏感性]
    L --> M[使用特定提示确保100%选项提取率]
    M --> N[开发VideoChat2基线]
    N --> O[收集多模态指令微调数据]
    O --> P[VideoChat2渐进式多模态训练]
    P --> Q[阶段1：视觉-语言对齐]
    Q --> R[阶段2：视觉-语言连接]
    R --> S[阶段3：指令微调]
    S --> T[完成]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define temporal tasks by adapting static image tasks with dynamic evolution"] --> B["Transform static tasks into dynamic ones to generate 20 challenging video tasks"]
    B["Transform static tasks into dynamic ones to generate 20 challenging video tasks"] --> C["Collect public video annotations from existing datasets for each task"]
    C["Collect public video annotations from existing datasets for each task"] --> D["Automatically convert video annotations into multiple-choice question-answer format"]
    D["Automatically convert video annotations into multiple-choice question-answer format"] --> E["Ensure tasks require temporal skills and cannot be solved with single frames"]
    E["Ensure tasks require temporal skills and cannot be solved with single frames"] --> F["Evaluate MLLMs on the 20 tasks using ground-truth annotations"]
    F["Evaluate MLLMs on the 20 tasks using ground-truth annotations"] --> G["Score model responses against ground-truth answers for fairness without LLM bias"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["通过动态演化改编静态图像任务来定义时序任务"] --> B["将静态任务转换为动态任务生成20个视频任务"]
    B["将静态任务转换为动态任务生成20个视频任务"] --> C["为每个任务收集现有数据集的公开视频标注"]
    C["为每个任务收集现有数据集的公开视频标注"] --> D["自动将视频标注转换为多项选择问答格式"]
    D["自动将视频标注转换为多项选择问答格式"] --> E["确保任务需要时序技能且无法用单帧解决"]
    E["确保任务需要时序技能且无法用单帧解决"] --> F["使用真实标注在20个任务上评估多模态模型"]
    F["使用真实标注在20个任务上评估多模态模型"] --> G["对照真实答案评分确保公平性避免模型偏见"]

name: NeedleBench V2
intro: NeedleBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在不同信息密度下检索与推理能力的合成框架。它通过在长文本中不同深度嵌入关键信息（“针”），来测试模型在信息稀疏和信息密集场景下的表现。该基准包含信息检索和复杂的祖先关系追溯等任务，旨在揭示模型处理长上下文的瓶颈。
task_type: 单, 多针检索, 多针推理, 祖先追溯
eval_feature: 长文本, 双语, 思维链
task_type_en: Single, multi-shot retrieval, multi-shot reasoning, ancestor tracing
intro_en: NeedleBench is a synthetic framework designed to evaluate large language models' retrieval and reasoning abilities under varying information densities. It tests models by embedding key information ("needles") at different depths within long texts, assessing performance in both sparse and dense information scenarios. The benchmark includes tasks such as information retrieval and complex ancestor tracing, aiming to reveal models' bottlenecks in handling long contexts.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate synthetic, fictional needles avoiding real-world knowledge overlap for retrieval and kinship reasoning tasks"] --> B["Construct haystack filler using PaulGrahamEssays for English and ChineseDomainModelingEval for Chinese tasks"]
    B["Construct haystack filler using PaulGrahamEssays for English and ChineseDomainModelingEval for Chinese tasks"] --> C["Embed single or multiple needles at varying depths in haystack for information-sparse retrieval and reasoning tasks"]
    C["Embed single or multiple needles at varying depths in haystack for information-sparse retrieval and reasoning tasks"] --> D["Distribute synthetic kinship needles continuously throughout context for information-dense Ancestral Trace Challenge"]
    D["Distribute synthetic kinship needles continuously throughout context for information-dense Ancestral Trace Challenge"] --> E["Generate test instances across multiple context lengths, needle depths, and repetitions for each task type"]
    E["Generate test instances across multiple context lengths, needle depths, and repetitions for each task type"] --> F["Evaluate model predictions using keyword-aware Exact Match, awarding full credit if any predefined keyword appears"]
    F["Evaluate model predictions using keyword-aware Exact Match, awarding full credit if any predefined keyword appears"] --> G["Average scores across context lengths, depths, and repetitions per task, then compute weighted overall score"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["生成合成虚构的针信息避免真实知识重叠用于检索和亲属推理"] --> B["用PaulGrahamEssays构建英文干草用ChineseDomainModelingEval构建中文干草"]
    B["用PaulGrahamEssays构建英文干草用ChineseDomainModelingEval构建中文干草"] --> C["在干草不同深度嵌入单个或多个针构建信息稀疏检索推理任务"]
    C["在干草不同深度嵌入单个或多个针构建信息稀疏检索推理任务"] --> D["在上下文中连续分布合成亲属针构建信息密集祖先追溯挑战"]
    D["在上下文中连续分布合成亲属针构建信息密集祖先追溯挑战"] --> E["为每类任务生成跨多个上下文长度针深度和重复的测试实例"]
    E["为每类任务生成跨多个上下文长度针深度和重复的测试实例"] --> F["用关键词感知精确匹配评估模型预测若含预定义关键词则满分"]
    F["用关键词感知精确匹配评估模型预测若含预定义关键词则满分"] --> G["对每任务跨长度深度重复平均得分然后计算加权总分"]

name: NL2Repo-Bench
intro: NL2Repo-Bench是一个旨在评估编码智能体长周期代码仓库生成能力的基准测试。它要求智能体根据自然语言需求文档，自主设计架构、管理依赖、实现多模块逻辑并生成可安装的Python库。实验表明，现有模型在长周期仓库生成方面表现不佳，平均测试通过率低于40%。该基准测试揭示了长周期推理是下一代自主编码智能体的关键瓶颈。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of Technology, Peking University, Renmin University of China,
eval_feature: 长周期, 过程评估
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, Automated Generation
intro_en: NL2Repo-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the long-term code repository generation capabilities of coding agents. It requires agents to autonomously design architecture, manage dependencies, implement multi-module logic, and generate installable Python libraries based on natural language requirement documents. Experiments show that existing models perform poorly in long-term repository generation, with an average test pass rate below 40%. This benchmark reveals that long-term reasoning is a key bottleneck for the next generation of autonomous coding agents.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[选择真实世界开源项目] --> B[逆向工程与需求提取]
    B --> C[生成自然语言需求文档]
    C --> D(空工作区)
    D --> E[编码代理接收任务]
    E --> F[代理：架构设计]
    F --> G[代理：依赖管理]
    G --> H[代理：多模块逻辑实现]
    H --> I[代理：生成Python库]
    I --> J(生成的Python库)
    J --> K[受控环境执行]
    K --> L[上游Pytest套件Validation]
    L --> M{测试结果?}
    M -- 通过 --> N[任务成功]
    M -- 失败 --> O[任务失败]
    N --> P(NL2Repo-Bench数据集)
    O --> P
    P --> Q[数据集：104个多样化任务]
    Q --> R[Evaluation：执行通过率]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select Python repositories from GitHub meeting complexity, maturity, testability, and recency criteria"] --> B["Clone candidate repositories and perform preliminary review of structure, dependencies, and organization"]
    B["Clone candidate repositories and perform preliminary review of structure, dependencies, and organization"] --> C["Execute native pytest suites; retain only repositories that pass all tests"]
    C["Execute native pytest suites; retain only repositories that pass all tests"] --> D["Reverse-engineer repositories into natural-language specification documents describing functionality and module relationships"]
    D["Reverse-engineer repositories into natural-language specification documents describing functionality and module relationships"] --> E["Provide agents with only the natural-language document, withholding scaffolding, source code, and tests"]
    E["Provide agents with only the natural-language document, withholding scaffolding, source code, and tests"] --> F["Agents autonomously generate complete installable repositories from the specification"]
    F["Agents autonomously generate complete installable repositories from the specification"] --> G["Evaluate generated repositories by executing them against original upstream pytest suites"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从GitHub选择满足复杂度、成熟度、可测试性和时效性标准的Python仓库"] --> B["克隆候选仓库并初步审查其结构、依赖和组织方式"]
    B["克隆候选仓库并初步审查其结构、依赖和组织方式"] --> C["执行原生pytest测试套件，仅保留通过全部测试的仓库"]
    C["执行原生pytest测试套件，仅保留通过全部测试的仓库"] --> D["将仓库逆向工程为描述功能和模块关系的自然语言规范文档"]
    D["将仓库逆向工程为描述功能和模块关系的自然语言规范文档"] --> E["仅向智能体提供自然语言文档，隐藏脚手架、源代码和测试"]
    E["仅向智能体提供自然语言文档，隐藏脚手架、源代码和测试"] --> F["智能体根据规范自主生成完整的可安装仓库"]
    F["智能体根据规范自主生成完整的可安装仓库"] --> G["通过对照原始上游pytest套件执行生成的仓库来评估"]

name: NOVA-63
intro: NOVA-63是一个大规模、学科平衡、原生多语言基准测试，包含14种语言和63个学科的89,107个问题。该基准测试通过LLM辅助格式化、专家质量验证和多级别难度筛选，确保了学科平衡、难度标准一致和语言元素的真实性。对现有LLM的广泛实验揭示了跨语言一致性和模型在不同学科能力上的显著差异。这项工作为多语言模型的未来发展提供了宝贵的基准数据。
org: Peking University, Alibaba Group, Zhejiang University
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, Automated Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: NOVA-63 is a large-scale, discipline-balanced, native multilingual benchmark comprising 89,107 questions across 63 disciplines and 14 languages. The benchmark ensures discipline balance, consistent difficulty standards, and linguistic authenticity through LLM-assisted formatting, expert quality validation, and multi-level difficulty screening. Extensive experiments on existing LLMs reveal cross-lingual consistency and significant variations in model capabilities across different disciplines. This work provides valuable benchmark data for the future development of multilingual models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect questions from native speakers via local educational websites, academic publications, and exams"] --> B["Use LLMs with in-context learning to extract question components and classify into MCQ or QA"]
    B["Use LLMs with in-context learning to extract question components and classify into MCQ or QA"] --> C["Annotate questions on readability, completeness, and clarity dimensions, then filter deficient ones"]
    C["Annotate questions on readability, completeness, and clarity dimensions, then filter deficient ones"] --> D["Classify questions hierarchically into 13 primary, 63 secondary, and 262 tertiary academic disciplines"]
    D["Classify questions hierarchically into 13 primary, 63 secondary, and 262 tertiary academic disciplines"] --> E["Screen difficulty using multiple LLMs to ensure complexity and robustness of questions"]
    E["Screen difficulty using multiple LLMs to ensure complexity and robustness of questions"] --> F["Supplement questions and select final set maintaining 50-150 questions per language per discipline"]
    F["Supplement questions and select final set maintaining 50-150 questions per language per discipline"] --> G["Evaluate 62 LLMs on the benchmark to analyze cross-lingual consistency and disciplinary disparities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从本地教育网站、学术出版物和考试中收集母语者问题"] --> B["使用LLM上下文学习提取问题组件并分类为选择题或问答题"]

    D["将问题分层分类为13个一级、63个二级和262个三级学科"] --> E["使用多个LLM筛选难度以确保问题的复杂性和鲁棒性"]
    E["使用多个LLM筛选难度以确保问题的复杂性和鲁棒性"] --> F["补充问题并选择最终集合保持每语言每学科50-150题"]

name: NYU CTF Bench
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在网络安全领域的夺旗（CTF）挑战解决能力尚未得到充分评估。为解决此问题，本研究开发了一种新颖的方法，通过创建一个可扩展的开源基准数据集来评估LLMs在CTF挑战中的表现。该基准数据集包含来自流行竞赛的各种CTF挑战，并支持LLM测试和自适应学习的元数据。通过提供专门的基准，该项目为开发、测试和完善基于LLM的漏洞检测和解决方案提供了理想平台。
eval_feature: 可扩展, 开源, 动态更新, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Scalable, open source, Dynamic Update, process evaluation, tool invocation
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) have not been fully evaluated in their ability to solve cybersecurity capture-the-flag (CTF) challenges. To address this, this study developed a novel approach by creating a scalable open-source benchmark dataset to assess LLM performance on CTF challenges. The benchmark dataset includes various CTF challenges from popular competitions and supports metadata for LLM testing and adaptive learning. By providing a dedicated benchmark, this project offers an ideal platform for developing, testing, and refining LLM-based vulnerability detection and solutions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[CSAW CTF Competition Challenges] --> B(Initial Database of 568 Challenges)
    B --> C[Manual Validation & Curation]
    C --> D(200 Validated Challenges)
    D --> E{Challenge Type}
    E -- Server-side --> F[Manual Verification: Docker Connectivity]
    E -- Non-server --> G[Check Config Files & Source Code]
    F --> H{Missing Files?}
    G --> H
    H -- Yes --> I[Identify & Resolve Missing Files]
    H -- No --> J[Docker Image Validation]
    I --> J
    J --> K[Adjustments for External Connectivity]
    K --> L(Docker Containers with Environments)
    L --> M[JSON File Creation for Each Challenge]
    M --> N(Directory Structure: Year/Competition/Event/Category/Challenge Name)
    M --> O{Server Connection Required?}
    O -- Yes --> P[docker-compose.yml Inclusion]
    O -- No --> Q(Final Dataset: 200 CTF Challenges)
    P --> Q
    Q --> R(Categories: Crypto, Forensics, Pwn, Rev, Web, Misc)
    Q --> S(Years: 2017-2023)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source 568 CTF challenges from global CSAW CTF competitions spanning 2011 to 2023."] --> B["Manually verify setup and solvability of each challenge despite software package version changes."]
    B["Manually verify setup and solvability of each challenge despite software package version changes."] --> C["For server-side challenges, verify container connectivity from external and internal Docker network devices."]
    C["For server-side challenges, verify container connectivity from external and internal Docker network devices."] --> D["For non-server challenges, check configuration files and source code for completeness and missing files."]
    D["For non-server challenges, check configuration files and source code for completeness and missing files."] --> E["Adjust and ensure Docker Hub images load with Docker Compose with external connectivity."]
    E["Adjust and ensure Docker Hub images load with Docker Compose with external connectivity."] --> F["Validate 200 challenges across six categories with JSON metadata and docker-compose files."]
    F["Validate 200 challenges across six categories with JSON metadata and docker-compose files."] --> G["Integrate five LLMs with eight cybersecurity tools in automated framework for challenge solving."]
    G["Integrate five LLMs with eight cybersecurity tools in automated framework for challenge solving."] --> H["Evaluate LLM performance automatically by checking if correct flag string is obtained."]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从全球CSAW CTF竞赛收集568个挑战题目"] --> B["手动验证每个挑战的配置和可解性"]
    B["手动验证每个挑战的配置和可解性"] --> C["验证服务器端挑战的容器连接性"]
    C["验证服务器端挑战的容器连接性"] --> D["检查非服务器挑战的配置文件完整性"]
    D["检查非服务器挑战的配置文件完整性"] --> E["调整并确保Docker镜像可通过Compose加载"]

    F["验证200个挑战并配备JSON元数据文件"] --> G["将五个LLM与八个安全工具集成到自动化框架"]
    G["将五个LLM与八个安全工具集成到自动化框架"] --> H["通过检查正确flag字符串自动评估LLM性能"]

name: OCNLI
intro: OCNLI（Original Chinese Natural Language Inference）是首个为中文设计的大规模自然语言推理数据集。该数据集包含约56,000个由语言学专家人工标注的句子对，遵循MNLI的标注协议，旨在为中文自然语言理解的研究提供一个具有挑战性的新基准。
org: Indiana University, Allen Institute for Artificial Intelligence
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: OCNLI (Original Chinese Natural Language Inference) is the first large-scale natural language inference dataset designed for Chinese. It contains approximately 56,000 sentence pairs manually annotated by linguistics experts, following the MNLI annotation protocol, aiming to provide a challenging new benchmark for Chinese natural language understanding research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[研究目标: 构建大规模中文NLI数据集] --> B(Data Sources: 原始中文文本)
    B --> C{选择文本体裁}
    C --> D[文本体裁: 电视、政府、文学、新闻、电话] --> E[前提句收集]
    E --> F[假设生成: 语言学Experts生成多样化假设]
    F --> G{假设生成策略}
    G -- 单一假设 --> H[SINGLE数据集]
    G -- 多假设 --> I[MULTI数据集]
    I -- 鼓励多样性 --> J[MULTI ENCOURAGE]
    I -- 约束条件 --> K[MULTI CONSTRAINT]
    H & J & K --> L(原始P-H对)
    L --> M[标注: 4名独立标注员+1名原始作者标注]
    M --> N{标签一致性检查}
    N -- 3票以上一致 --> O[多数投票确定黄金标签]
    N -- 不一致 --> P[标记为'-'，可排除]
    O --> Q[Quality Control: 避免词汇重叠 (>70%)]
    Q --> R[数据集划分: Training Set、开发集、Test Set]
    R -- 6000对重标注数据 --> S[开发集 & Test Set (各3000对)]
    R -- 剩余约50000对 --> T[Training Set]
    S & T --> U(最终OCNLI数据集)
    U --> V[基线模型Evaluation: BERT, RoBERTa等预训练模型]
    U --> W[人类表现Evaluation: 5名Expert Annotation300例Test Set]
    V & W --> X[结果分析与挑战性Validation]

flowchart LR
    A["Collect premises from original Chinese sources across five text genres"] --> B["Recruit native Chinese speakers with linguistics expertise as annotators"]
    B["Recruit native Chinese speakers with linguistics expertise as annotators"] --> C["Train annotators using MNLI annotation protocol adapted for Chinese"]
    C["Train annotators using MNLI annotation protocol adapted for Chinese"] --> D["Elicit three hypotheses per premise-label pair using multi-constraint strategy for difficulty levels"]
    D["Elicit three hypotheses per premise-label pair using multi-constraint strategy for difficulty levels"] --> E["Collect three-vote consensus annotations to ensure quality and consistency"]
    E["Collect three-vote consensus annotations to ensure quality and consistency"] --> F["Validate annotator agreement achieving approximately 98% consensus rate"]
    F["Validate annotator agreement achieving approximately 98% consensus rate"] --> G["Evaluate state-of-the-art Chinese pre-trained models as baselines on the dataset"]
    G["Evaluate state-of-the-art Chinese pre-trained models as baselines on the dataset"] --> H["Measure human performance gap showing models lag behind by approximately 12%"]

    B["招募具有语言学专业背景的中文母语者作为标注员"] --> C["使用改编的MNLI标注协议培训标注员"]

    D["用多约束策略为每个前提标签对生成三个难度假设"] --> E["收集三票共识标注以确保质量和一致性"]
    E["收集三票共识标注以确保质量和一致性"] --> F["验证标注员一致性达到约98%共识率"]

name: OCRBench
intro: OCRBench是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型多模态模型的光学字符识别（OCR）能力。它包含29个数据集，涵盖文本识别、场景文本视觉问答、文档视觉问答、关键信息提取和手写数学表达式识别等任务。该基准包含1000个经过人工验证和校正的问题-答案对，以确保评估的准确性。研究揭示了模型在处理多语言文本、手写文本、非语义文本和数学表达式识别方面的优势和劣势。
org: Huazhong University of Science and Technology, Microsoft Research, University of Science and Technol
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
task_type: 视觉问答, 文本识别, 关键信息提取
eval_feature: 多任务, 多语言
task_type_en: Visual QA, text recognition, key information extraction
intro_en: OCRBench is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess the optical character recognition (OCR) capabilities of large multimodal models. It includes 29 datasets covering tasks such as text recognition, scene text visual question answering, document visual question answering, key information extraction, and handwritten mathematical expression recognition. The benchmark contains 1,000 manually verified and corrected question-answer pairs to ensure evaluation accuracy. Studies reveal the models' strengths and weaknesses in handling multilingual text, handwritten text, non-semantic text, and mathematical expression recognition.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 29 existing datasets across five OCR tasks: text recognition, scene VQA, document VQA, KIE, and HMER"] --> B["Sample 3000 question instances from large datasets for testing purposes"]
    B["Sample 3000 question instances from large datasets for testing purposes"] --> C["Create Semantic Text and Non-Semantic Text datasets by shuffling IIIT5k dictionary characters"]
    C["Create Semantic Text and Non-Semantic Text datasets by shuffling IIIT5k dictionary characters"] --> D["Filter out questions with answers containing fewer than 4 symbols to reduce false positives"]
    D["Filter out questions with answers containing fewer than 4 symbols to reduce false positives"] --> E["Manually filter and correct 1000 question-answer pairs across all five tasks"]
    E["Manually filter and correct 1000 question-answer pairs across all five tasks"] --> F["Apply task-specific prompts like 'What is written in the image' for English text recognition"]
    F["Apply task-specific prompts like 'What is written in the image' for English text recognition"] --> G["Evaluate LMMs by checking whether ground truth appears in model output"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集29个数据集涵盖五类OCR任务"] --> B["从大型数据集中抽取3000个问题实例"]
    B["从大型数据集中抽取3000个问题实例"] --> C["用IIIT5k词典创建语义和非语义文本数据集"]
    C["用IIIT5k词典创建语义和非语义文本数据集"] --> D["过滤答案少于4个符号的问题以减少误报"]
    D["过滤答案少于4个符号的问题以减少误报"] --> E["人工筛选并校正1000个问答对"]
    E["人工筛选并校正1000个问答对"] --> F["为不同任务应用特定提示词如英文识别提示"]
    F["为不同任务应用特定提示词如英文识别提示"] --> G["检查真值是否出现在模型输出中以评估模型"]

name: OctoBench
intro: OctoBench评估大型语言模型在代码脚手架中遵循指令的能力，特别是在基于代码库的智能体编码场景。包含34个环境和217个任务，配备自动化工具用于细粒度分析任务完成度及规则遵守情况。
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: OctoBench evaluates large language models' ability to follow instructions in code scaffolding, especially in codebase-based agent coding scenarios. It includes 34 environments and 217 tasks, equipped with automated tools for fine-grained analysis of task completion and rule compliance.

    H --> I(Execution Trajectories)
    I --> J[LLM-assisted Checklist Generation]
    J --> K{LLM}
    K --> L[Checklist Draft]
    L --> M[Joint Human-LLM Review]
    M --> N{Human & LLM}
    N --> O[Final Checklist]
    E --> P[Instance Bundling]
    O --> P
    P --> Q[[OctoBench Instance]]
    R[Conflict Set Construction] --> S{Instruction Conflicts}
    S --> T[[OctoBench-Conflict]]

    A["Collect and normalize constraint-carrying artifacts from multiple sources into self-contained coding environments"] --> B["Package repository policy files, skill docs, and state files into Docker images under three scaffold types"]
    B["Package repository policy files, skill docs, and state files into Docker images under three scaffold types"] --> C["Construct task specifications combining user queries with heterogeneous instruction sources to elicit verifiable constraints"]
    C["Construct task specifications combining user queries with heterogeneous instruction sources to elicit verifiable constraints"] --> D["Generate instance-specific binary checklists enumerating objectively decidable checks across all instruction sources"]
    D["Generate instance-specific binary checklists enumerating objectively decidable checks across all instruction sources"] --> E["Execute tasks in packaged environments and record full trajectories via proxy logger capturing all model calls"]
    E["Execute tasks in packaged environments and record full trajectories via proxy logger capturing all model calls"] --> F["Map recorded trajectories to structured checklists using LLM-as-a-judge for binary constraint verification"]
    F["Map recorded trajectories to structured checklists using LLM-as-a-judge for binary constraint verification"] --> G["Score fine-grained metrics disentangling task-solving from scaffold-aware compliance across 7,098 checklist items"]

flowchart LR
    A["收集并规范化多源约束工件为独立编码环境"] --> B["将策略文件和技能文档打包为三种脚手架的镜像"]
    B["将策略文件和技能文档打包为三种脚手架的镜像"] --> C["构建任务规范结合用户查询与多源指令以触发约束"]

    F["用LLM评判器将轨迹映射到检查表进行二元验证"] --> G["评分细粒度指标区分任务解决与脚手架遵从性"]

name: OJBench
intro: OJBench是一个新颖且具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在竞争级代码推理方面的能力。它包含232个来自NOI和ICPC的编程竞赛问题，为模型提供了更严格的推理技能测试。研究表明，即使是最先进的推理导向模型，也难以应对这些高挑战性的问题。这突显了模型在竞争级代码推理方面面临的重大挑战。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University
eval_feature: 无
intro_en: OJBench is a novel and challenging benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' abilities in competitive-level code reasoning. It includes 232 programming contest problems from NOI and ICPC, providing a more rigorous test of models' reasoning skills. Studies show that even state-of-the-art reasoning-oriented models struggle with these highly challenging problems, highlighting significant challenges in competitive-level code reasoning.

    K --> M{竞赛排名数据}

    P --> Q[GPT-4o翻译NOI问题]

    R -- 失败 --> Q
    R -- 成功 --> S[Final Dataset (232个问题)]
    S --> T[Evaluation方法 (基于测试用例)]
    T --> U(支持Python和CPP双语Evaluation)

name: olmOCR-bench
intro: olmOCR-Bench是一个用于评估文档提取工具的综合基准，包含1400个PDF文件，涵盖公式、表格、小字体及旧扫描件等多种复杂内容。该基准与开源PDF处理工具olmOCR一同发布，旨在测试OCR系统的多样化能力。
intro_en: olmOCR-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating document extraction tools, consisting of 1,400 PDF files featuring complex content such as formulas, tables, small fonts, and old scans. Released alongside the open-source PDF processing tool olmOCR, it aims to test the diverse capabilities of OCR systems.

    K --> L2[文本缺失: Validation外围内容排除]
    K --> L3[自然阅读顺序: Validation文本段顺序]
    K --> L4[表格准确性: 检查表格内容和单元格属性]
    K --> L5[数学公式准确性: 检查数学方程存在]
    K --> L6[基线: 默认文本Output检查]
    L1 & L2 & L3 & L4 & L5 & L6 --> M[应用字符串归一化]
    M --> N(Final Dataset: 1400个PDF, 7000+单元测试)
    N --> O[Evaluation: 运行工具生成文本]
    O --> P[评分: Pass/Fail测试, 按文档类型宏平均]
    P --> Q(最终分数: 各测试源百分比平均值)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 1,400 PDF pages capturing challenging content types like formulas, tables, tiny fonts, and old scans"] --> B["Define over 7,000 binary pass-or-fail unit-test cases spanning diverse document types for each PDF"]
    B["Define over 7,000 binary pass-or-fail unit-test cases spanning diverse document types for each PDF"] --> C["Extract plain text output from the input PDF using the OCR system under evaluation"]
    C["Extract plain text output from the input PDF using the OCR system under evaluation"] --> D["Execute predefined unit-tests to check whether extracted text satisfies specific properties without gold reference matching"]
    D["Execute predefined unit-tests to check whether extracted text satisfies specific properties without gold reference matching"] --> E["Calculate pass rate percentage across all unit-test cases to measure overall extraction performance"]
    E["Calculate pass rate percentage across all unit-test cases to measure overall extraction performance"] --> F["Compare OCR systems directly using binary test results without relying on LLM-as-judge evaluation"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["筛选1400个PDF页面，涵盖公式、表格、小字体和旧扫描件等难点内容"] --> B["为每个PDF定义超过7000个二元通过或失败的单元测试用例"]
    B["为每个PDF定义超过7000个二元通过或失败的单元测试用例"] --> C["使用待评估的OCR系统从输入PDF中提取纯文本输出"]
    C["使用待评估的OCR系统从输入PDF中提取纯文本输出"] --> D["执行预定义单元测试，检查提取文本是否满足特定属性，无需黄金参考匹配"]
    D["执行预定义单元测试，检查提取文本是否满足特定属性，无需黄金参考匹配"] --> E["计算所有单元测试用例的通过率百分比以衡量整体提取性能"]
    E["计算所有单元测试用例的通过率百分比以衡量整体提取性能"] --> F["使用二元测试结果直接比较OCR系统，无需依赖LLM评判"]

name: OlympiadBench
intro: OlympiadBench是一个奥林匹克级别的双语多模态科学基准，包含8476道数学和物理竞赛题目，其中包括中国高考题。该基准配备专家级逐步推理注释，旨在评估大型语言模型和多模态模型的高级能力，以应对传统基准日益严峻的挑战。
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答, 定理证明
eval_feature: 双语, 思维链, 领域特定
task_type_en: Math Problems, Open-ended QA, Theorem Proving
intro_en: OlympiadBench is an Olympiad-level bilingual multimodal science benchmark containing 8,476 math and physics competition problems, including Chinese Gaokao questions. It features expert-level step-by-step reasoning annotations and aims to evaluate the advanced capabilities of large language models and multimodal models in addressing the increasing challenges of traditional benchmarks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect Olympiad-level math and physics problems from official competition PDFs and Chinese Gaokao sources"] --> B["Convert PDF files to markdown format using Mathpix OCR tool"]
    B["Convert PDF files to markdown format using Mathpix OCR tool"] --> C["Manually verify converted markdown texts against original PDF files for accuracy"]
    C["Manually verify converted markdown texts against original PDF files for accuracy"] --> D["Structure markdown texts into Problem-Solution-Answer format with markup language"]
    D["Structure markdown texts into Problem-Solution-Answer format with markup language"] --> E["Vectorize data using specialized math-trained language model and deduplicate by cosine similarity"]
    E["Vectorize data using specialized math-trained language model and deduplicate by cosine similarity"] --> F["Manually annotate each question with topic labels and problem type classifications"]
    F["Manually annotate each question with topic labels and problem type classifications"] --> G["Classify answer types into numeric, expression, equation, interval, and tuple categories"]
    G["Classify answer types into numeric, expression, equation, interval, and tuple categories"] --> H["Evaluate model responses using automated pipeline with floating-point operations and SymPy symbolic computation"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从官方竞赛PDF和中国高考来源收集奥赛级数理题目"] --> B["使用Mathpix OCR工具将PDF文件转换为markdown格式"]
    B["使用Mathpix OCR工具将PDF文件转换为markdown格式"] --> C["人工核对转换后的markdown文本与原始PDF文件"]
    C["人工核对转换后的markdown文本与原始PDF文件"] --> D["将markdown文本结构化为问题-解答-答案格式"]
    D["将markdown文本结构化为问题-解答-答案格式"] --> E["用数学训练语言模型向量化数据并按余弦相似度去重"]
    E["用数学训练语言模型向量化数据并按余弦相似度去重"] --> F["人工标注每道题目的主题标签和问题类型分类"]
    F["人工标注每道题目的主题标签和问题类型分类"] --> G["将答案类型分类为数值、表达式、方程、区间和元组"]
    G["将答案类型分类为数值、表达式、方程、区间和元组"] --> H["用浮点运算和SymPy符号计算的自动化流程评估模型回答"]

name: OmniDocBench
intro: OmniDocBench是一个针对多样化PDF文档解析的基准测试，旨在解决现有基准测试中文档类型覆盖范围窄、评估程序简化和不切实际的问题。它提供了高质量的标注，涵盖了学术论文、教科书、手写笔记和密集排版报纸等九种文档来源。该基准支持灵活的多级别评估，从端到端评估到基于任务和属性的分析，使用19种布局类别和15个属性标签。OmniDocBench为文档解析领域公平、多样化和细粒度的评估树立了新标准。
org: OpenDataLab, Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, University of Hong Kong, Rutgers Business
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
metric: Normalized Edit Distance, BLEU, METEOR, TEDS, COCODet (mAP, mAR, etc.)
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
eval_feature: 多级评估, 细粒度评估
scale: 1355个PDF页面, 包含9种文档类型, 20k+块级元素, 80k+跨度级元素
intro_en: OmniDocBench is a benchmark for diverse PDF document parsing, designed to address the narrow document type coverage, simplified evaluation procedures, and impracticality of existing benchmarks. It provides high-quality annotations covering nine document sources, including academic papers, textbooks, handwritten notes, and densely formatted newspapers. The benchmark supports flexible multi-level evaluation, from end-to-end assessment to task- and attribute-based analysis, using 19 layout categories and 15 attribute labels. OmniDocBench sets a new standard for fair, diverse, and fine-grained evaluation in document parsing.
scale_en: 1355 items PDF pages, including 9 document types, 20k+ block-level elements, 80k+ span-level elements
metric_en: Normalized Edit Distance, BLEU, METEOR, TEDS, COCODet (mAP, mAR, etc.)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect over 200,000 PDF documents from Common Crawl, Google, Baidu, and internal sources"] --> B["Extract visual features using ResNet-50 and cluster with Faiss into 10 centers"]
    B["Extract visual features using ResNet-50 and cluster with Faiss into 10 centers"] --> C["Sample 6,000 visually diverse pages from cluster centers for annotation candidates"]
    C["Sample 6,000 visually diverse pages from cluster centers for annotation candidates"] --> D["Annotate page-level attributes including PDF type, layout type, and language for each page"]
    D["Annotate page-level attributes including PDF type, layout type, and language for each page"] --> E["Balance selection to 981 samples covering nine document types with diverse attributes"]
    E["Balance selection to 981 samples covering nine document types with diverse attributes"] --> F["Perform semi-automated layout and content annotation with 19 categories and 15 attribute labels"]
    F["Perform semi-automated layout and content annotation with 19 categories and 15 attribute labels"] --> G["Apply annotator corrections and expert quality checks to ensure annotation accuracy"]
    G["Apply annotator corrections and expert quality checks to ensure annotation accuracy"] --> H["Evaluate pipeline-based and end-to-end VLM methods using multi-level task-specific metrics"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从Common Crawl、谷歌、百度和内部数据源收集20万份PDF文档"] --> B["用ResNet-50提取视觉特征并用Faiss聚类为10个中心"]
    B["用ResNet-50提取视觉特征并用Faiss聚类为10个中心"] --> C["从聚类中心采样6000个视觉多样化页面作为标注候选"]
    C["从聚类中心采样6000个视觉多样化页面作为标注候选"] --> D["标注每页的页面级属性包括PDF类型、布局类型和语言"]
    D["标注每页的页面级属性包括PDF类型、布局类型和语言"] --> E["平衡筛选至981个样本覆盖九种文档类型和多样属性"]
    E["平衡筛选至981个样本覆盖九种文档类型和多样属性"] --> F["执行半自动布局和内容标注含19个类别和15个属性标签"]
    F["执行半自动布局和内容标注含19个类别和15个属性标签"] --> G["应用标注员修正和专家质检以确保标注准确性"]
    G["应用标注员修正和专家质检以确保标注准确性"] --> H["用多级任务特定指标评估流水线和端到端VLM方法"]

name: OmniMedVQA
intro: OmniMedVQA是一个针对医学领域的大规模综合视觉问答（VQA）基准。它从73个不同的医学数据集中收集，涵盖12种不同的模态和20多个解剖区域。该基准旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在医学领域的表现，并发现现有LVLMs在处理医学VQA问题上的局限性。所有图像均来源于真实的医疗场景，确保了与医疗领域需求的对齐。
org: University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Southeast University
eval_feature: 无
intro_en: OmniMedVQA is a large-scale comprehensive visual question answering (VQA) benchmark for the medical field. It is collected from 73 different medical datasets, covering 12 modalities and over 20 anatomical regions. The benchmark aims to evaluate the performance of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in the medical domain and identify the limitations of existing LVLMs in handling medical VQA tasks. All images are sourced from real medical scenarios, ensuring alignment with healthcare needs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(73 Medical Datasets) --> D[Dataset Integration]
    B(12 Imaging Modalities) --> D
    C(20+ Anatomical Regions) --> D
    D --> E[Data Standardization]
    E --> F[Annotation & Labeling]
    F --> G{Quality Assurance}
    G -- Pass --> H[Expert Validation]
    G -- Fail --> Z[Discard Invalid Data]
    H --> I(OmniMedVQA Benchmark)
    I --> J[LVLM Evaluation]
    J --> K[Real-world Medical VQA]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 73 medical classification datasets covering 12 modalities and 20+ anatomical regions"] --> B["Design QA templates for each dataset based on category, modality, and anatomy attributes"]
    B["Design QA templates for each dataset based on category, modality, and anatomy attributes"] --> C["Use ChatGPT API to transfer classification attributes into five question types"]
    C["Use ChatGPT API to transfer classification attributes into five question types"] --> D["Generate incorrect answer options for each QA pair to create multi-choice questions"]
    D["Generate incorrect answer options for each QA pair to create multi-choice questions"] --> E["Construct prompts combining image, question, and candidate options for LVLM input"]
    E["Construct prompts combining image, question, and candidate options for LVLM input"] --> F["Calculate Question-answering Score by comparing response similarity with candidate options"]
    F["Calculate Question-answering Score by comparing response similarity with candidate options"] --> G["Calculate Prefix-based Score by prefixing visual features into text embeddings"]

    A["收集73个医学分类数据集涵盖12种模态和20+解剖区域"] --> B["基于类别、模态和解剖属性为每个数据集设计问答模板"]
    B["基于类别、模态和解剖属性为每个数据集设计问答模板"] --> C["使用ChatGPT API将分类属性转换为五种问题类型"]
    C["使用ChatGPT API将分类属性转换为五种问题类型"] --> D["为每个问答对生成错误选项以创建多选题"]
    D["为每个问答对生成错误选项以创建多选题"] --> E["构建结合图像、问题和候选选项的提示作为LVLM输入"]
    E["构建结合图像、问题和候选选项的提示作为LVLM输入"] --> F["通过比较响应与候选选项的相似度计算问答分数"]
    F["通过比较响应与候选选项的相似度计算问答分数"] --> G["通过将视觉特征前缀到文本嵌入中计算前缀分数"]

name: Oolong
intro: Oolong是一个长文本推理基准，包含两个任务集：Oolong-synth和Oolong-real。它要求模型分析单个文本块并聚合这些分析以回答分布问题。即使是前沿模型在128K上下文长度下也难以在此基准上取得高分。
task_type: 分类, 计数, 关系推理, 时间推理
eval_feature: 长上下文
task_type_en: Classification, Counting, Relational Reasoning, Temporal Reasoning
intro_en: Oolong is a long-text reasoning benchmark consisting of two task sets: Oolong-synth and Oolong-real. It requires models to analyze individual text chunks and aggregate these analyses to answer distributional questions. Even state-of-the-art models struggle to achieve high scores on this benchmark with a 128K context length.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Oolong-synth
        A[收集10个文本分类数据集] --> B{标签数量 > 2?}
        B -- 是 --> C[标签空间简化: 单一正负标签]
        B -- 否 --> D[数据Filtering/Quality Control]
        C --> D
        D --> E[使用GPT-4.1 nano和Llama 4 Maverick进行零样本ICL]
        E --> F{模型预测是否一致且正确?}
        F -- 否 --> G[排除错误/困难示例]
        F -- 是 --> H[构建上下文窗口]
        G --> H
        H --> I[Oolong-synth数据集]
    end

    subgraph Oolong-real
        J[收集Dungeons & Dragons节目转录本] --> K[Human Annotation黄金答案]
        K --> L[Oolong-real数据集]
    end

    I --> M[Oolong基准]
    L --> M
    M --> N[Evaluation模型: 多步长上下文推理]
    N --> O[分析信息聚合能力]
    O --> P[结果分析]
    P --> Q[发布数据和Evaluation工具]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Create Oolong-synth with naturalistic synthetic tasks enabling ablation of reasoning components"] --> B["Build Oolong-real from real-world conversational data requiring downstream reasoning"]
    B["Build Oolong-real from real-world conversational data requiring downstream reasoning"] --> C["Design tasks requiring models to identify relevant input chunks for each question"]
    C["Design tasks requiring models to identify relevant input chunks for each question"] --> D["Embed atomic-level subtasks like classification at each relevant chunk"]
    D["Embed atomic-level subtasks like classification at each relevant chunk"] --> E["Require aggregation of subtask results to answer distributional questions"]
    E["Require aggregation of subtask results to answer distributional questions"] --> F["Test classification, counting, temporal reasoning, and user relation reasoning in-context"]
    F["Test classification, counting, temporal reasoning, and user relation reasoning in-context"] --> G["Evaluate models at 128K context length using the released evaluation harness"]
    G["Evaluate models at 128K context length using the released evaluation harness"] --> H["Measure accuracy on both splits to assess long-context aggregation capabilities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["创建Oolong-synth合成任务集以支持推理组件消融"] --> B["从真实对话数据构建Oolong-real任务集"]
    B["从真实对话数据构建Oolong-real任务集"] --> C["设计任务要求模型识别问题相关的输入块"]
    C["设计任务要求模型识别问题相关的输入块"] --> D["在相关块中嵌入分类等原子级子任务"]
    D["在相关块中嵌入分类等原子级子任务"] --> E["要求聚合子任务结果以回答分布性问题"]
    E["要求聚合子任务结果以回答分布性问题"] --> F["测试上下文中的分类、计数、时序和用户关系推理"]
    F["测试上下文中的分类、计数、时序和用户关系推理"] --> G["使用评估工具在128K上下文长度下评估模型"]
    G["使用评估工具在128K上下文长度下评估模型"] --> H["测量两个任务集的准确率以评估长文本聚合能力"]

name: OpenAI-Proof Q&A
intro: OpenAI-Proof Q&A 评估 AI 模型在 OpenAI 遇到的 20 个内部研究和工程瓶颈上的表现。这些瓶颈每个都代表着一个主要项目至少一天的延迟，在某些情况下还会影响大型训练运行和发布的结果。“OpenAI-Proof”指的是 OpenAI 团队解决每个问题都需要一天以上的时间。任务要求模型诊断和解释复杂问题，例如意外的性能退化、异常的训练指标或细微的实现错误。
intro_en: OpenAI-Proof Q&A evaluates AI models on 20 internal research and engineering bottlenecks encountered at OpenAI. Each bottleneck represents at least a one-day delay in a major project and, in some cases, impacts large-scale training runs and releases. "OpenAI-Proof" refers to the fact that OpenAI teams require more than a day to resolve each issue. The tasks require models to diagnose and explain complex problems, such as unexpected performance degradation, abnormal training metrics, or subtle implementation errors.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[招募撰写者] --> B(撰写问题和解释)
    B --> C{ExpertsValidation #1}
    C -- 通过 --> D[问题修订]
    C -- 未通过 --> B
    D --> E{ExpertsValidation #2}
    E -- 通过 --> F{非ExpertsValidation}
    E -- 未通过 --> D
    F -- 满足条件 --> G(GPQA DIAMOND数据集)
    F -- 不满足条件 --> D
    G --> H[Evaluation模型]
    H --> I(Experts准确率)
    H --> J(非Experts准确率)
    H --> K(AI系统准确率)
    subgraph Quality Control
        C
        E
        F
    end
    subgraph 激励机制
        B -- 奖金 --> B_incentive(撰写者奖金)
        C -- 奖金 --> C_incentive(ExpertsValidation者奖金)
        F -- 奖金 --> F_incentive(非ExpertsValidation者奖金)
    end
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style B fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style C fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style D fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style E fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style F fill:#ccf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style G fill:#afa,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style H fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style I fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style J fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style K fill:#bbf,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Solicit graduate-level multiple-choice questions from PhD experts in biology, physics, and chemistry subdomains"] --> B["Validate question correctness and quality with domain experts holding or pursuing PhDs in the same field"]
    B["Validate question correctness and quality with domain experts holding or pursuing PhDs in the same field"] --> C["Test questions with highly skilled non-expert validators who hold or pursue PhDs in different domains"]
    C["Test questions with highly skilled non-expert validators who hold or pursue PhDs in different domains"] --> D["Allow non-experts unrestricted web access (excluding LLM assistants) for over 30 minutes per question"]
    D["Allow non-experts unrestricted web access (excluding LLM assistants) for over 30 minutes per question"] --> E["Confirm questions are Google-proof by verifying non-experts achieve only 34% accuracy despite web access"]
    E["Confirm questions are Google-proof by verifying non-experts achieve only 34% accuracy despite web access"] --> F["Have experts retrospectively identify clear mistakes to calculate adjusted accuracy of 74% versus raw 65%"]
    F["Have experts retrospectively identify clear mistakes to calculate adjusted accuracy of 74% versus raw 65%"] --> G["Evaluate AI systems using multiple-choice accuracy on the 448-question dataset across three scientific domains"]

flowchart LR
    A["向生物、物理和化学领域的博士专家征集研究生级别的多选题"] --> B["由同领域的博士专家验证问题的正确性和质量"]
    B["由同领域的博士专家验证问题的正确性和质量"] --> C["由其他领域的博士非专家验证者测试问题难度"]
    C["由其他领域的博士非专家验证者测试问题难度"] --> D["允许非专家使用网络资源（不含LLM助手）每题超过30分钟"]
    D["允许非专家使用网络资源（不含LLM助手）每题超过30分钟"] --> E["确认非专家即使使用网络也仅达34%准确率，验证问题抗搜索性"]
    E["确认非专家即使使用网络也仅达34%准确率，验证问题抗搜索性"] --> F["让专家回顾性识别明显错误，计算调整后74%对比原始65%准确率"]
    F["让专家回顾性识别明显错误，计算调整后74%对比原始65%准确率"] --> G["在三个科学领域的448道题上用多选准确率评估AI系统"]

name: OpenAudioBench
intro: OpenAudioBench是一个用于评估多模态及音频专用语言模型能力的音频理解评测基准。它包含五个子任务，涵盖逻辑推理、常识问答和开放式问答等多个领域，旨在全面衡量模型的音频理解和“智能”水平。该基准由四个公开数据集和一个由百川智能团队构建的语音逻辑推理数据集组成，共计2701条数据。
task_type: 开放式问答, 逻辑推理, 常识问答
task_type_en: Open-ended QA, Logical Reasoning, Commonsense QA
build_method_en: Hybrid Construction (partly from existing public datasets, partly manually constructed)
intro_en: OpenAudioBench is an audio understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the capabilities of multimodal and audio-specific language models. It includes five sub-tasks covering areas such as logical reasoning, commonsense QA, and open-ended QA, aiming to comprehensively assess models' audio understanding and "intelligence" levels. The benchmark consists of four public datasets and one speech logical reasoning dataset created by the Baichuan Intelligence team, totaling 2,701 samples.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect four public audio understanding datasets for sub-tasks"] --> B["Construct speech logical reasoning dataset by Baichuan team"]
    B["Construct speech logical reasoning dataset by Baichuan team"] --> C["Integrate datasets into five sub-tasks covering reasoning and QA domains"]
    C["Integrate datasets into five sub-tasks covering reasoning and QA domains"] --> D["Compile 2701 total samples across all sub-tasks"]
    D["Compile 2701 total samples across all sub-tasks"] --> E["Evaluate models on audio understanding across logical reasoning tasks"]
    E["Evaluate models on audio understanding across logical reasoning tasks"] --> F["Evaluate models on common sense and open-ended audio QA"]
    F["Evaluate models on common sense and open-ended audio QA"] --> G["Measure overall audio intelligence level of multimodal language models"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集四个公开音频理解数据集用于子任务"] --> B["由百川团队构建语音逻辑推理数据集"]
    B["由百川团队构建语音逻辑推理数据集"] --> C["整合数据集为五个子任务涵盖推理和问答领域"]
    C["整合数据集为五个子任务涵盖推理和问答领域"] --> D["汇总全部子任务共2701条样本"]
    D["汇总全部子任务共2701条样本"] --> E["在逻辑推理任务上评估模型音频理解能力"]
    E["在逻辑推理任务上评估模型音频理解能力"] --> F["在常识和开放式音频问答上评估模型"]
    F["在常识和开放式音频问答上评估模型"] --> G["衡量多模态语言模型整体音频智能水平"]

name: OpenBookQA
intro: OpenBookQA是一个模拟开卷考试的问答数据集，旨在评估对一个学科的理解能力。该数据集提供一本包含1329个基础科学事实的“开卷”，并提出约6000个问题，这些问题需要结合开卷中的事实和广泛的常识来回答。
build_method: 众包, 专家构建
eval_feature: 思维链
intro_en: OpenBookQA is an open-book exam-style QA dataset designed to assess understanding of a subject. It provides an "open book" containing 1,329 basic science facts and poses about 6,000 questions that require combining these facts with broad commonsense knowledge to answer.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Compile 1326 elementary science facts as the open book F"] --> B["Crowdsource questions based on F probing novel situations requiring common knowledge"]
    B["Crowdsource questions based on F probing novel situations requiring common knowledge"] --> C["Apply automatic filter to ensure hardness for retrieval and association systems"]
    C["Apply automatic filter to ensure hardness for retrieval and association systems"] --> D["Apply crowd filter to ensure questions are answerable by lay persons"]
    D["Apply crowd filter to ensure questions are answerable by lay persons"] --> E["Apply expert filter to ensure higher quality in Dev and Test sets"]
    E["Apply expert filter to ensure higher quality in Dev and Test sets"] --> F["Annotate Train and Dev questions with the fact f used during generation"]
    F["Annotate Train and Dev questions with the fact f used during generation"] --> G["Evaluate systems and measure human performance at approximately 92% accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["编制1326条基础科学事实作为开卷F"] --> B["众包基于F的问题探测需常识的新情境"]
    B["众包基于F的问题探测需常识的新情境"] --> C["应用自动过滤器确保检索和关联系统难度"]
    C["应用自动过滤器确保检索和关联系统难度"] --> D["应用众包过滤器确保普通人可答"]
    D["应用众包过滤器确保普通人可答"] --> E["应用专家过滤器确保开发和测试集高质量"]
    E["应用专家过滤器确保开发和测试集高质量"] --> F["为训练和开发集问题标注生成时使用的事实f"]
    F["为训练和开发集问题标注生成时使用的事实f"] --> G["评估系统并测量人类表现约92%准确率"]

name: OpenRCA
intro: OpenRCA是一个基准数据集和评估框架，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）识别软件故障根本原因的能力。该基准包含来自三个企业软件系统的335个故障案例，以及超过68GB的遥测数据（日志、指标和跟踪）。给定一个故障案例及其相关的遥测数据，LLM的任务是识别触发故障的根本原因，这需要理解软件依赖关系并对异构、长上下文遥测数据进行推理。当前模型只能处理最简单的情况，即使是专门设计的RCA-agent，表现最好的模型Claude 3.5也只解决了11.34%的故障案例。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Microsoft, Tsinghua University
intro_en: OpenRCA is a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework designed to assess large language models' (LLMs) ability to identify the root causes of software failures. The benchmark includes 335 failure cases from three enterprise software systems, along with over 68GB of telemetry data (logs, metrics, and traces). Given a failure case and its related telemetry data, the LLM's task is to identify the root cause of the failure, which requires understanding software dependencies and reasoning over heterogeneous, long-context telemetry data. Current models can only handle the simplest cases; even the best-performing RCA-agent, Claude 3.5, solves just 11.34% of the failure cases.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 335 real-world failure cases from three deployed enterprise software systems"] --> B["Gather over 68 GB of telemetry data including metrics, logs, and traces for each failure"]
    B["Gather over 68 GB of telemetry data including metrics, logs, and traces for each failure"] --> C["De-identify telemetry data to protect sensitive information while preserving failure patterns"]
    C["De-identify telemetry data to protect sensitive information while preserving failure patterns"] --> D["Pair each failure with a natural language query specifying time window and system"]
    D["Pair each failure with a natural language query specifying time window and system"] --> E["Annotate ground truth root cause elements: time, component, and failure reason"]
    E["Annotate ground truth root cause elements: time, component, and failure reason"] --> F["Evaluate LLMs by comparing generated root cause elements against ground truth annotations"]
    F["Evaluate LLMs by comparing generated root cause elements against ground truth annotations"] --> G["Test RCA-agent using program synthesis and execution for telemetry retrieval and analysis"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从三个企业软件系统收集335个真实故障案例"] --> B["为每个故障收集超过68GB的遥测数据"]
    B["为每个故障收集超过68GB的遥测数据"] --> C["对遥测数据去标识化以保护敏感信息"]
    C["对遥测数据去标识化以保护敏感信息"] --> D["为每个故障配对自然语言查询指定时间和系统"]
    D["为每个故障配对自然语言查询指定时间和系统"] --> E["标注根因要素真值:时间、组件和故障原因"]
    E["标注根因要素真值:时间、组件和故障原因"] --> F["通过对比生成根因与真值评估大语言模型"]
    F["通过对比生成根因与真值评估大语言模型"] --> G["测试基于程序合成的RCA智能体进行遥测检索分析"]

name: OR-Bench
intro: OR-Bench是一个大规模评测LLM过度拒绝现象的基准，包含8万个可能被模型拒绝但无害的提示，以及少量难题和有毒提示。该基准帮助研究者理解并缓解模型过度谨慎拒答无害查询的问题。
build_method: 自动生成, LLM生成
eval_feature: 对抗性
intro_en: OR-Bench is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating LLM over-rejection, containing 80,000 prompts that models may reject but are harmless, along with a small number of challenging and toxic prompts. This benchmark helps researchers understand and mitigate the issue of models being overly cautious in refusing harmless queries.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate 2,000 toxic seed prompts per category using Mixtral 8*7B across 10 harmful categories"] --> B["Remove duplicate toxic seeds from the generated set"]
    B["Remove duplicate toxic seeds from the generated set"] --> C["Rewrite each toxic seed into 5 safe prompts using Mixtral 8*7B"]
    C["Rewrite each toxic seed into 5 safe prompts using Mixtral 8*7B"] --> D["Moderate rewritten prompts with LLM moderators to classify as safe or toxic"]
    D["Moderate rewritten prompts with LLM moderators to classify as safe or toxic"] --> E["Add safe prompts to OR-Bench-80K and toxic ones to toxic dataset"]
    E["Add safe prompts to OR-Bench-80K and toxic ones to toxic dataset"] --> F["Create OR-Bench-Hard-1K from prompts rejected by at least 3 top models per family"]
    F["Create OR-Bench-Hard-1K from prompts rejected by at least 3 top models per family"] --> G["Evaluate 32 LLMs using keyword matching on 80K and GPT-4 on hard subset"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用Mixtral 8*7B在10个有害类别中每类生成2000个有毒种子提示"] --> B["从生成集中移除重复的有毒种子"]
    B["从生成集中移除重复的有毒种子"] --> C["用Mixtral 8*7B将每个有毒种子改写为5个安全提示"]
    C["用Mixtral 8*7B将每个有毒种子改写为5个安全提示"] --> D["用LLM审核器审核改写提示并分类为安全或有毒"]
    D["用LLM审核器审核改写提示并分类为安全或有毒"] --> E["将安全提示加入OR-Bench-80K有毒提示加入有毒数据集"]
    E["将安全提示加入OR-Bench-80K有毒提示加入有毒数据集"] --> F["从每个模型族至少3个顶级模型拒绝的提示中创建OR-Bench-Hard-1K"]
    F["从每个模型族至少3个顶级模型拒绝的提示中创建OR-Bench-Hard-1K"] --> G["用关键词匹配评估80K数据集用GPT-4评估困难子集的32个LLM"]

name: OSWorld
intro: OSWorld是一个为多模态智能体设计的可扩展、真实的计算机环境，支持在Ubuntu、Windows和macOS等操作系统上进行任务设置、基于执行的评估和交互式学习。它提供了一个统一的平台，用于评估涉及任意应用程序的开放式计算机任务。该基准包含369个计算机任务，涵盖真实网络和桌面应用、操作系统文件I/O以及跨多个应用程序的工作流。对现有LLM/VLM智能体的评估显示，它们在作为计算机助手方面存在显著不足，人类完成率为72.36%，而最佳模型仅为12.24%。
build_method: 混合
intro_en: OSWorld is a scalable, realistic computer environment designed for multimodal agents, supporting task setup, execution-based evaluation, and interactive learning on operating systems such as Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS. It provides a unified platform for evaluating open-ended computer tasks involving arbitrary applications. The benchmark includes 369 computer tasks covering real web and desktop applications, OS file I/O, and workflows across multiple applications. Evaluations of existing LLM/VLM agents reveal significant shortcomings as computer assistants, with a human success rate of 72.36% compared to only 12.24% for the best model.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Derive 369 computer tasks from real-world use cases across open domains"] --> B["Configure detailed initial state setup for each task in virtual machines"]
    B["Configure detailed initial state setup for each task in virtual machines"] --> C["Write custom execution-based evaluation scripts for each task"]
    C["Write custom execution-based evaluation scripts for each task"] --> D["Deploy tasks across Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS operating systems"]
    D["Deploy tasks across Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS operating systems"] --> E["Establish human performance baseline by having humans complete the tasks"]
    E["Establish human performance baseline by having humans complete the tasks"] --> F["Evaluate state-of-the-art LLM and VLM-based agents on all tasks"]
    F["Evaluate state-of-the-art LLM and VLM-based agents on all tasks"] --> G["Measure success rates using execution-based evaluation scripts for reproducible results"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从真实使用场景中提取369个计算机任务"] --> B["为每个任务配置详细的初始状态设置"]
    B["为每个任务配置详细的初始状态设置"] --> C["为每个任务编写自定义执行评估脚本"]
    C["为每个任务编写自定义执行评估脚本"] --> D["在Ubuntu、Windows和macOS系统上部署任务"]
    D["在Ubuntu、Windows和macOS系统上部署任务"] --> E["通过人类完成任务建立基准表现"]
    E["通过人类完成任务建立基准表现"] --> F["在所有任务上评估最先进的LLM和VLM智能体"]
    F["在所有任务上评估最先进的LLM和VLM智能体"] --> G["使用执行评估脚本测量成功率以确保可重现性"]

name: OSWorld-Verified
intro: OSWorld-Verified 是 OSWorld 的系统复核版本，围绕真实计算机使用场景对任务定义、评测脚本和基础设施进行大规模修正，提供更稳定、更可比的计算机使用智能体评测信号。
org: XLANG Lab, The University of Hong Kong
build_method: 综合修订流程, 300+问题修复, AWS并行化
eval_feature: 真实计算机环境, 基于执行的评估, 系统复核
intro_en: OSWorld-Verified is the systematically refined release of OSWorld, improving task quality, evaluation reliability, and infrastructure stability for computer-use agents.
build_method_en: comprehensive refinement process, 300+ issues, AWS parallelization
eval_feature_en: Real Computer Environment, Execution-based Evaluation, Systematic Verification
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["以 OSWorld 原始 369 个真实计算机任务为基础"] --> B["持续收集社区与机构反馈，累计整理 300+ 问题"]
    B --> C["逐项复核网页变化、指令歧义、初始状态与评测脚本鲁棒性"]
    C --> D["修复任务配置、执行脚本与环境依赖中的不稳定因素"]
    D --> E["将评测基础设施迁移并重构为更稳定的并行执行方案"]
    E --> F["在修正版任务集上重新运行主流计算机使用智能体"]
    F --> G["发布 OSWorld-Verified，提供更可靠的 success rate 评测信号"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Start from the original 369 real computer-use tasks in OSWorld"] --> B["Collect community and institutional feedback, accumulating 300+ issues"]
    B --> C["Audit web changes, instruction ambiguity, initial states, and evaluator robustness"]
    C --> D["Fix unstable task configs, execution scripts, and environment dependencies"]
    D --> E["Migrate and refactor the evaluation infrastructure for more stable parallel execution"]
    E --> F["Re-run leading computer-use agents on the corrected task set"]
    F --> G["Release OSWorld-Verified with more reliable success-rate signals"]

name: OVBench
intro: OVBench是一个综合性的问答基准测试，旨在评估模型在在线视频上下文中感知、记忆和推理的能力。它包含六种核心任务类型，涵盖过去、当前和未来的三种时间上下文，形成来自不同数据集的16个子任务。
org: Nanjing University, China Mobile Research Institute, OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory
build_method: 混合
intro_en: OVBench is a comprehensive question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate models' abilities in perception, memory, and reasoning within online video contexts. It includes six core task types covering past, present, and future temporal contexts, comprising 16 subtasks from various datasets.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define three temporal contexts (past, current, future) and formulate 6 core task types across 16 subtasks"] --> B["Curate 8 datasets across 6 domains, selecting only validation and test sets to prevent data leakage"]
    B["Curate 8 datasets across 6 domains, selecting only validation and test sets to prevent data leakage"] --> C["Collect data with specific timestamps and bounding box annotations for spatiotemporal comprehension"]
    C["Collect data with specific timestamps and bounding box annotations for spatiotemporal comprehension"] --> D["Human annotators generate approximately 7,000 high-quality annotations emphasizing spatiotemporal details"]
    D["Human annotators generate approximately 7,000 high-quality annotations emphasizing spatiotemporal details"] --> E["Generate multiple-choice options with distractors selected from different timestamps within the same video"]
    E["Generate multiple-choice options with distractors selected from different timestamps within the same video"] --> F["Manually check question clarity, option ambiguity, and annotation accuracy through human verification"]
    F["Manually check question clarity, option ambiguity, and annotation accuracy through human verification"] --> G["Trim excessive video context length according to the timestamp of the earliest relevant frame"]
    G["Trim excessive video context length according to the timestamp of the earliest relevant frame"] --> H["Evaluate leading offline and online MLLMs on OVBench using the curated question-answering benchmark"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义三种时间上下文并制定6类核心任务共16个子任务"] --> B["从6个领域收集8个数据集,仅选验证集和测试集防泄漏"]
    B["从6个领域收集8个数据集,仅选验证集和测试集防泄漏"] --> C["收集带时间戳和边界框标注的时空理解数据"]
    C["收集带时间戳和边界框标注的时空理解数据"] --> D["人工标注员生成约7000条强调时空细节的高质量标注"]
    D["人工标注员生成约7000条强调时空细节的高质量标注"] --> E["生成多选项,干扰项从同视频不同时间戳中选取"]
    E["生成多选项,干扰项从同视频不同时间戳中选取"] --> F["人工检查问题清晰度、选项歧义性和标注准确性"]
    F["人工检查问题清晰度、选项歧义性和标注准确性"] --> G["根据最早相关帧的时间戳修剪过长视频上下文"]
    G["根据最早相关帧的时间戳修剪过长视频上下文"] --> H["在OVBench上评估主流离线和在线多模态大模型"]

name: PaperBench
intro: PaperBench是一个旨在评测AI代理复现顶尖人工智能研究能力的基准。它要求代理从零开始，完整复现20篇ICML 2024的重点论文，涵盖了从理解论文贡献、开发代码到执行实验的全过程。该基准采用一个包含8316个可评分子任务的分层评分体系进行客观评估，并配备了一个基于大型语言模型的自动评分机制以实现规模化评测。
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成, 混合
intro_en: PaperBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' ability to replicate cutting-edge AI research. It requires agents to fully reproduce 20 key ICML 2024 papers from scratch, covering the entire process from understanding the paper's contributions, developing code, to executing experiments. The benchmark uses a hierarchical scoring system with 8,316 scorable subtasks for objective evaluation and features an LLM-based automatic scoring mechanism for scalable assessment.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 20 Spotlight and Oral papers from ICML 2024 spanning 12 topics"] --> B["Co-develop hierarchical rubrics with original paper authors specifying replication outcomes"]
    B["Co-develop hierarchical rubrics with original paper authors specifying replication outcomes"] --> C["Provide agent with paper and clarifications; agent develops codebase with reproduce.sh"]
    C["Provide agent with paper and clarifications; agent develops codebase with reproduce.sh"] --> D["Copy submission to fresh Ubuntu VM with A10 GPU"]
    D["Copy submission to fresh Ubuntu VM with A10 GPU"] --> E["Execute reproduce.sh to generate results and reproduce.log from clean start"]
    E["Execute reproduce.sh to generate results and reproduce.log from clean start"] --> F["LLM-based judge grades leaf nodes against rubric for binary pass/fail"]
    F["LLM-based judge grades leaf nodes against rubric for binary pass/fail"] --> G["Propagate scores up rubric tree via weighted average to compute Replication Score"]
    G["Propagate scores up rubric tree via weighted average to compute Replication Score"] --> H["Validate judge performance using JudgeEval with human expert gold labels"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从ICML 2024选取20篇涵盖12个主题的重点论文"] --> B["与原作者共同开发分层评分标准明确复现结果"]
    B["与原作者共同开发分层评分标准明确复现结果"] --> C["向智能体提供论文和说明由其开发含reproduce.sh的代码库"]
    C["向智能体提供论文和说明由其开发含reproduce.sh的代码库"] --> D["将提交内容复制到配备A10 GPU的全新虚拟机"]
    D["将提交内容复制到配备A10 GPU的全新虚拟机"] --> E["执行reproduce.sh从零生成结果和日志文件"]
    E["执行reproduce.sh从零生成结果和日志文件"] --> F["基于LLM的评判器对照标准为叶节点打分"]
    F["基于LLM的评判器对照标准为叶节点打分"] --> G["通过加权平均向上传播分数计算复现得分"]
    G["通过加权平均向上传播分数计算复现得分"] --> H["用JudgeEval和人类专家标签验证评判器性能"]

name: PathVQA
intro: PathVQA是基于病理图像的视觉问答基准，包含32799个开放式问题和4998张病理图像，通过半自动化流程从病理学教科书和数字图书馆提取，促进医学VQA领域研究。
eval_feature: 基于病理图像的视觉问答，开放式和封闭式问题
eval_feature_en: Visual question answering based on pathological images, open-ended and closed-ended questions
intro_en: PathVQA is a pathology image-based visual question answering benchmark, containing 32,799 open-ended questions and 4,998 pathology images. It is extracted through a semi-automated process from pathology textbooks and digital libraries to advance research in medical VQA.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Pathology Textbooks) --> C{{Semi-automated Process}}
    B(Online Digital Libraries) --> C
    C --> D[Extract Images & Captions]
    D --> E{{NLP for Q&A Generation}}
    E --> F(Raw Q&A Pairs)
    F --> G{Manual Review for Correctness}
    G -->|Correct| H(PathVQA Dataset
32799 Qs, 4998 Images)
    G -->|Incorrect| I[Discard/Refine]
    H --> J[Medical VQA Model Evaluation]
    J --> K[Facilitate Research]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Extract pathology images and captions from textbooks and online digital libraries"] --> B["Apply natural language processing to generate question-answer pairs from extracted captions"]
    B["Apply natural language processing to generate question-answer pairs from extracted captions"] --> C["Manually check each automatically-generated question to ensure correctness"]
    C["Manually check each automatically-generated question to ensure correctness"] --> D["Fix small grammatical issues in the checked questions and answers"]
    D["Fix small grammatical issues in the checked questions and answers"] --> E["Collect 32,799 open-ended questions paired with 4,998 pathology images"]
    E["Collect 32,799 open-ended questions paired with 4,998 pathology images"] --> F["Release the dataset publicly to promote medical VQA research"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从教科书和在线数字图书馆提取病理图像和标题"] --> B["对提取的标题应用自然语言处理生成问答对"]
    B["对提取的标题应用自然语言处理生成问答对"] --> C["人工检查每个自动生成的问题以确保正确性"]
    C["人工检查每个自动生成的问题以确保正确性"] --> D["修正已检查问答对中的小语法问题"]
    D["修正已检查问答对中的小语法问题"] --> E["收集32799个开放式问题配对4998张病理图像"]
    E["收集32799个开放式问题配对4998张病理图像"] --> F["公开发布数据集以促进医学视觉问答研究"]

name: PHYBench
intro: PHYBench是一个旨在全面评估大型语言模型在物理感知和鲁棒推理能力方面的基准测试。它包含500个原创物理问题，难度从高中到物理奥林匹克竞赛不等。PHYBench通过原创内容解决数据污染问题，并采用系统化的筛选流程来消除有缺陷的评估项。评估结果表明，PHYBench能够激活更多的token，并能更好地区分不同推理模型。
build_method: 专家构建, 自动生成
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: PHYBench is a benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate large language models' physical perception and robust reasoning abilities. It contains 500 original physics problems, ranging in difficulty from high school to Physics Olympiad level. PHYBench addresses data contamination by using original content and employs a systematic screening process to eliminate flawed evaluation items. Results show that PHYBench activates more tokens and better differentiates between reasoning models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Create 500 original physics problems spanning high school to Physics Olympiad difficulty levels"] --> B["Apply systematic curation pipeline to eliminate flawed questions and ensure correctness"]
    B["Apply systematic curation pipeline to eliminate flawed questions and ensure correctness"] --> C["Verify all problems are novel, correct, and reliably evaluable through expert review"]
    C["Verify all problems are novel, correct, and reliably evaluable through expert review"] --> D["Establish human baseline by recruiting Peking University physics undergraduates to solve problems"]
    D["Establish human baseline by recruiting Peking University physics undergraduates to solve problems"] --> E["Evaluate multiple LLMs on the benchmark using both reasoning and general models"]
    E["Evaluate multiple LLMs on the benchmark using both reasoning and general models"] --> F["Compute Expression Edit Distance Score by measuring tree edit distance between generated and reference expressions"]
    F["Compute Expression Edit Distance Score by measuring tree edit distance between generated and reference expressions"] --> G["Report both binary accuracy and EED Score to assess model performance comprehensively"]

    B["应用系统化筛选流程消除有缺陷的问题并确保正确性"] --> C["通过专家审查验证所有问题的原创性、正确性和可评估性"]
    C["通过专家审查验证所有问题的原创性、正确性和可评估性"] --> D["招募北京大学物理系本科生解题以建立人类基线"]
    D["招募北京大学物理系本科生解题以建立人类基线"] --> E["使用推理模型和通用模型评估多个大语言模型"]
    E["使用推理模型和通用模型评估多个大语言模型"] --> F["通过计算生成表达式与参考表达式的树编辑距离得出EED分数"]
    F["通过计算生成表达式与参考表达式的树编辑距离得出EED分数"] --> G["报告二元准确率和EED分数以全面评估模型性能"]

name: PhyX
intro: PhyX是一个大规模基准测试，旨在评估模型在视觉场景中基于物理的推理能力。它包含3000个精心策划的多模态问题，涵盖6种推理类型、25个子领域和6个核心物理领域。评估结果显示，即使是最先进的模型也难以应对，与人类专家相比存在显著差距。该基准测试揭示了当前模型在物理理解方面的局限性，并提供了细致的分析和评估范式。
org: The University of Hong Kong, University of Michigan, Independent, University of Toronto, University
build_method: 人工标注
task_type: 多模态问答, 物理推理
eval_feature: 物理推理, 视觉理解, 多模态, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Physical reasoning, visual understanding, Multimodal, process evaluation
intro_en: PhyX is a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate models' physics-based reasoning abilities in visual scenes. It contains 3,000 carefully curated multimodal questions covering 6 reasoning types, 25 subdomains, and 6 core physics areas. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models struggle significantly, with a notable gap compared to human experts. This benchmark reveals current models' limitations in physical understanding and provides detailed analysis and evaluation paradigms.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Survey core physics disciplines to define 6 domains, 25 sub-domains, and 6 reasoning types"] --> B["Recruit STEM graduate students to collect 3,300 questions from textbooks avoiding immediate answers"]
    B["Recruit STEM graduate students to collect 3,300 questions from textbooks avoiding immediate answers"] --> C["Convert each question into open-ended and multiple-choice versions with three parallel text variants"]
    C["Convert each question into open-ended and multiple-choice versions with three parallel text variants"] --> D["Generate descriptive image captions using GPT-4o for LLM evaluation support"]
    D["Generate descriptive image captions using GPT-4o for LLM evaluation support"] --> E["Physics Ph.D. students detect duplicates via lexical overlap and filter shortest 10% questions"]
    E["Physics Ph.D. students detect duplicates via lexical overlap and filter shortest 10% questions"] --> F["Ph.D. students validate each scenario for scientific accuracy and eliminate dataset bias"]
    F["Ph.D. students validate each scenario for scientific accuracy and eliminate dataset bias"] --> G["Proportionally sample 1,000 problems across domains to create testmini subset for evaluation"]
    G["Proportionally sample 1,000 problems across domains to create testmini subset for evaluation"] --> H["Evaluate models using VLMEvalKit with three-step protocols on testmini subset"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["调研核心物理学科定义6个领域、25个子领域和6种推理类型"] --> B["招募STEM研究生从教材收集3300道避免直接答案的问题"]
    B["招募STEM研究生从教材收集3300道避免直接答案的问题"] --> C["将每道题转换为开放式和选择题并创建三种文本变体"]
    C["将每道题转换为开放式和选择题并创建三种文本变体"] --> D["使用GPT-4o生成图像描述文本以支持LLM评估"]
    D["使用GPT-4o生成图像描述文本以支持LLM评估"] --> E["物理博士生通过词汇重叠检测重复并过滤最短10%问题"]
    E["物理博士生通过词汇重叠检测重复并过滤最短10%问题"] --> F["博士生验证每个场景的科学准确性并消除数据集偏差"]
    F["博士生验证每个场景的科学准确性并消除数据集偏差"] --> G["按领域比例抽样1000道题创建testmini子集用于评估"]
    G["按领域比例抽样1000道题创建testmini子集用于评估"] --> H["使用VLMEvalKit三步协议在testmini子集上评估模型"]

name: PIQA
intro: PIQA是一个物理常识推理基准，包含多项选择题，测试模型对日常物品使用的理解。旨在评估模型的物理知识水平，推动具备物理世界推理能力的语言理解系统发展。
org: Carnegie Mellon University, Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington, Microsoft Research
eval_feature: Commonsense
intro_en: PIQA is a physical commonsense reasoning benchmark consisting of multiple-choice questions that test a model's understanding of everyday object usage. It aims to evaluate models' physical knowledge and promote the development of language understanding systems with physical world reasoning abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Derive prompts from instructables.com to construct physical commonsense questions"] --> B["Ask annotators to provide semantic perturbations as alternative solutions"]
    B["Ask annotators to provide semantic perturbations as alternative solutions"] --> C["Ensure alternatives are syntactically and topically similar to target physical knowledge"]
    C["Ensure alternatives are syntactically and topically similar to target physical knowledge"] --> D["Clean dataset of basic artifacts using AFLite algorithm"]
    D["Clean dataset of basic artifacts using AFLite algorithm"] --> E["Format as multiple choice QA with one correct solution per question"]
    E["Format as multiple choice QA with one correct solution per question"] --> F["Evaluate human performance achieving 95% accuracy on the benchmark"]
    F["Evaluate human performance achieving 95% accuracy on the benchmark"] --> G["Test large pretrained models achieving approximately 77% accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从instructables.com提取提示构建物理常识问题"] --> B["要求标注者提供语义扰动作为替代解决方案"]
    B["要求标注者提供语义扰动作为替代解决方案"] --> C["确保替代方案在句法和主题上相似以针对物理知识"]
    C["确保替代方案在句法和主题上相似以针对物理知识"] --> D["使用AFLite算法清除数据集中的基本伪影"]
    D["使用AFLite算法清除数据集中的基本伪影"] --> E["格式化为多项选择问答每题一个正确解决方案"]
    E["格式化为多项选择问答每题一个正确解决方案"] --> F["评估人类表现在基准上达到95%准确率"]
    F["评估人类表现在基准上达到95%准确率"] --> G["测试大型预训练模型达到约77%准确率"]

name: PolyMATH
intro: PolyMath是一个多语言数学推理基准，涵盖18种语言和4个难度级别。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型在多语言环境下的数学推理能力，并揭示了LLM在多语言推理中的关键挑战。它通过确保难度全面性、语言多样性和高质量翻译，成为一个具有高度区分度的多语言数学基准。研究发现，即使是先进的LLM也仅能达到约50%的准确率。
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
eval_feature: 多语言, 难度全面, 高质量翻译
intro_en: PolyMath is a multilingual mathematical reasoning benchmark covering 18 languages and 4 difficulty levels. It aims to evaluate large language models' mathematical reasoning abilities in a multilingual context and highlights key challenges LLMs face in multilingual reasoning. By ensuring comprehensive difficulty, language diversity, and high-quality translations, it serves as a highly discriminative multilingual math benchmark. Studies show that even advanced LLMs achieve only about 50% accuracy.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Partition difficulty into four levels by Thought Depth and Knowledge Breadth dimensions"] --> B["Collect 500 English problems from public benchmarks and official competition repositories per level"]
    B["Collect 500 English problems from public benchmarks and official competition repositories per level"] --> C["Assign difficulty levels through human judgment, each tag confirmed by two additional experts"]
    C["Assign difficulty levels through human judgment, each tag confirmed by two additional experts"] --> D["Generate preliminary translations into 17 target languages using GPT-4o"]
    D["Generate preliminary translations into 17 target languages using GPT-4o"] --> E["Mathematics experts extract key terms from English problems to form term list"]
    E["Mathematics experts extract key terms from English problems to form term list"] --> F["Annotators calibrate translations by checking term accuracy, formula migration, and fluency"]
    F["Annotators calibrate translations by checking term accuracy, formula migration, and fluency"] --> G["Evaluate LLMs using Difficulty-Weighted Accuracy across 18 languages and 4 levels"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["按思维深度和知识广度划分四个难度等级"] --> B["从公开基准和官方竞赛库收集500道英文题目"]
    B["从公开基准和官方竞赛库收集500道英文题目"] --> C["专家判定难度等级,每个标签由两名专家确认"]
    C["专家判定难度等级,每个标签由两名专家确认"] --> D["用GPT-4o生成17种目标语言的初步翻译"]
    D["用GPT-4o生成17种目标语言的初步翻译"] --> E["数学专家从英文题目提取关键术语列表"]
    E["数学专家从英文题目提取关键术语列表"] --> F["标注员校准翻译的术语准确性、公式和流畅性"]
    F["标注员校准翻译的术语准确性、公式和流畅性"] --> G["用难度加权准确率评估18语言4难度的模型表现"]

name: PreScience
intro: PreScience是一个科学预测基准，它将科研过程分解为四个相互依赖的生成式任务：合作者预测、前期工作选择、贡献生成和影响预测。该基准包含一个精心策划的9.8万篇近期AI相关研究论文的数据集，具有消歧的作者身份、时间对齐的学术元数据，以及一个跨越50.2万篇论文的作者出版历史和引用的结构化图谱。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Chicago, University of Washington, Google DeepMind
metric: nDCG, R-Precision, LACERScore, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, MAE, Pearson, Spearman
task_type: 生成, 排序, 预测
intro_en: PreScience is a scientific prediction benchmark that breaks down the research process into four interdependent generative tasks: collaborator prediction, prior work selection, contribution generation, and impact prediction.
