The benchmark includes a carefully curated dataset of 98,000 recent AI-related research papers, featuring disambiguated author identities, time-aligned academic metadata, and a structured graph of author publication histories and citations spanning 502,000 papers.
metric_en: nDCG, R-Precision, LACERScore, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, MAE, Pearson, Spearman
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 98K AI-related arXiv papers from October 2023–October 2025 with temporal metadata"] --> B["Disambiguate author identities and construct publication histories spanning 502K total papers"]
    B["Disambiguate author identities and construct publication histories spanning 502K total papers"] --> C["Build structured citation graph linking papers with temporally aligned scholarly metadata"]
    C["Build structured citation graph linking papers with temporally aligned scholarly metadata"] --> D["Decompose research process into four generative tasks: collaborators, prior work, contribution, impact"]
    D["Decompose research process into four generative tasks: collaborators, prior work, contribution, impact"] --> E["Develop LACERScore, an LLM-based metric measuring contribution similarity approximating inter-annotator agreement"]
    E["Develop LACERScore, an LLM-based metric measuring contribution similarity approximating inter-annotator agreement"] --> F["Benchmark task-specific and frontier model baselines across all four forecasting tasks"]
    F["Benchmark task-specific and frontier model baselines across all four forecasting tasks"] --> G["Compose tasks into 12-month end-to-end simulation iteratively generating and incorporating synthetic papers"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["策划9.8万篇2023年10月至2025年10月AI相关arXiv论文及时间元数据"] --> B["消歧作者身份并构建跨越50.2万篇论文的出版历史"]
    B["消歧作者身份并构建跨越50.2万篇论文的出版历史"] --> C["构建结构化引用图谱并对齐学术元数据时间线"]
    C["构建结构化引用图谱并对齐学术元数据时间线"] --> D["将科研过程分解为四个生成任务：合作者、前期工作、贡献、影响"]
    D["将科研过程分解为四个生成任务：合作者、前期工作、贡献、影响"] --> E["开发LACERScore，基于LLM的贡献相似度度量逼近标注者一致性"]
    E["开发LACERScore，基于LLM的贡献相似度度量逼近标注者一致性"] --> F["在四个预测任务上对特定任务和前沿模型基线进行基准测试"]
    F["在四个预测任务上对特定任务和前沿模型基线进行基准测试"] --> G["将任务组合为12个月端到端模拟迭代生成并整合合成论文"]

name: ProcBench
intro: ProcBench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）多步推理能力的基准测试。它通过消除路径探索和隐式知识利用，专注于直接评估多步推理。该数据集包含明确的指令和相应问题对，模型通过遵循提供的指令来解决问题。
org: Ippei Fujisawa, Sensho Nobe, Hiroki Seto, Rina Onda, Yoshiaki Uchida, Hiroki Ikoma, Pei-Chun Chien,
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 过程评估, 思维链
intro_en: ProcBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the multi-step reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). By eliminating path exploration and implicit knowledge use, it focuses on directly assessing multi-step reasoning. The dataset contains explicit instructions paired with corresponding questions, and models solve problems by following the given instructions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Design 23 task types requiring minimal implicit knowledge with explicit procedural instructions"] --> B["Create fixed templates for each task containing the complete procedure for solving questions"]
    B["Create fixed templates for each task containing the complete procedure for solving questions"] --> C["Generate questions with 2 to 25 steps using Generator, producing 10 examples per step count"]
    C["Generate questions with 2 to 25 steps using Generator, producing 10 examples per step count"] --> D["Generator simultaneously produces correct answers and all intermediate states for each question"]
    D["Generator simultaneously produces correct answers and all intermediate states for each question"] --> E["Combine templates with questions to form 240 examples per task, totaling 5,520 examples"]
    E["Combine templates with questions to form 240 examples per task, totaling 5,520 examples"] --> F["Convert model predictions into JSON format adhering to int, str, or list types"]
    F["Convert model predictions into JSON format adhering to int, str, or list types"] --> G["Evaluate using Prefix Accuracy to measure procedural adherence at each step and final state"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["设计23种任务类型,需最少隐式知识且含明确程序指令"] --> B["为每个任务创建固定模板,包含完整解题程序"]
    B["为每个任务创建固定模板,包含完整解题程序"] --> C["用生成器生成2至25步问题,每步数生成10个样例"]
    C["用生成器生成2至25步问题,每步数生成10个样例"] --> D["生成器同时生成每个问题的正确答案和所有中间状态"]
    D["生成器同时生成每个问题的正确答案和所有中间状态"] --> E["将模板与问题组合,每任务240例,共5520例"]
    E["将模板与问题组合,每任务240例,共5520例"] --> F["将模型预测转换为符合整数、字符串或列表类型的JSON格式"]
    F["将模型预测转换为符合整数、字符串或列表类型的JSON格式"] --> G["使用前缀准确率评估每步和最终状态的程序遵循度"]

name: PromptCBLUE
intro: PromptCBLUE是基于CBLUE重建的中文医疗领域大模型评测基准，评估中文大模型在医疗实体识别、文本分类、自然语言推理、对话理解及内容生成等多任务上的能力，提供在线评测平台。
task_type: 多任务（实体识别, 分类, 推理, 对话, 生成）
scale: 大规模，覆盖16个医疗NLP任务
task_type_en: Multi-task (entity recognition, Classification, Reasoning, Dialogue, Generation)
build_method_en: Reconstructed based on CBLUE benchmark, converted to prompt format
eval_feature_en: Evaluate Chinese LLM capabilities on medical multi-tasks, provide online evaluation platform
intro_en: PromptCBLUE is a Chinese medical large model evaluation benchmark reconstructed from CBLUE. It assesses the capabilities of Chinese large models across multiple tasks, including medical entity recognition, text classification, natural language inference, dialogue understanding, and content generation, and provides an online evaluation platform.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Raw Chinese Medical Data) --> B[Data Collection]
    B --> C[Initial Data Preprocessing]
    C --> D[Expert Annotation]
    D --> E[Quality Control & Review]
    E --> F{Data Validity Check}
    F -- Valid --> G[Dataset Formatting]
    F -- Invalid --> H[Re-annotation/Correction]
    H --> D
    G --> I(PromptCBLUE Final Dataset)
    I --> J[LLM Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)
scale_en: Large-scale, covering 16 items medical NLP tasks
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Rebuild CBLUE benchmark into prompt-tuning format for medical LLM evaluation"] --> B["Construct multi-task datasets covering entity recognition, classification, inference, dialogue understanding, and generation"]
    B["Construct multi-task datasets covering entity recognition, classification, inference, dialogue understanding, and generation"] --> C["Withhold test ground truths from public corpus to prevent data leakage"]
    C["Withhold test ground truths from public corpus to prevent data leakage"] --> D["Deploy benchmark on online platform for test evaluation and leaderboard"]
    D["Deploy benchmark on online platform for test evaluation and leaderboard"] --> E["Fine-tune nine Chinese LLMs using different fine-tuning techniques"]
    E["Fine-tune nine Chinese LLMs using different fine-tuning techniques"] --> F["Evaluate fine-tuned models on all medical tasks to establish baselines"]
    F["Evaluate fine-tuned models on all medical tasks to establish baselines"] --> G["Report systematic evaluation results and performance analysis across models and techniques"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将CBLUE基准重建为提示调优格式"] --> B["构建涵盖实体识别、分类、推理、对话理解和生成的多任务数据集"]
    B["构建涵盖实体识别、分类、推理、对话理解和生成的多任务数据集"] --> C["从公开语料中隐藏测试标准答案以防数据泄露"]
    C["从公开语料中隐藏测试标准答案以防数据泄露"] --> D["在在线平台部署基准以进行测试评估和排行榜"]
    D["在在线平台部署基准以进行测试评估和排行榜"] --> E["使用不同微调技术对九个中文大模型进行微调"]
    E["使用不同微调技术对九个中文大模型进行微调"] --> F["在所有医疗任务上评估微调模型以建立基线"]
    F["在所有医疗任务上评估微调模型以建立基线"] --> G["报告跨模型和技术的系统评估结果及性能分析"]

name: ProntoQA
intro: ProntoQA是一个合成的问答基准，旨在通过基于一阶逻辑的测试用例和思维链来评估大型语言模型的多跳推理能力。该数据集能够将生成的思维链解析为符号证明，以进行形式化分析，从而系统地探究语言模型的推理能力。研究发现，虽然模型在单个演绎步骤上表现良好，但在需要系统探索多个有效选项的证明规划方面存在困难。
build_method: 自动生成
eval_feature: 思维链, Multi-hop
intro_en: ProntoQA is a synthetic question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' multi-hop reasoning abilities through first-order logic-based test cases and chains of thought. The dataset allows generated chains of thought to be parsed into symbolic proofs for formal analysis, enabling a systematic investigation of the models' reasoning capabilities. Studies show that while models perform well on individual deductive steps, they struggle with proof planning that requires systematically exploring multiple valid options.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate synthetic ontology from prior distribution as tree structure"] --> B["Generate formal proof from ontology using first-order logic axioms and deduction"]
    B["Generate formal proof from ontology using first-order logic axioms and deduction"] --> C["Translate ontology and proof into natural language using grammar rules"]
    C["Translate ontology and proof into natural language using grammar rules"] --> D["Construct question-answering examples with context, query, and label from translated proofs"]
    D["Construct question-answering examples with context, query, and label from translated proofs"] --> E["Prompt language models with chain-of-thought examples to generate reasoning steps"]
    E["Prompt language models with chain-of-thought examples to generate reasoning steps"] --> F["Semantically parse generated chain-of-thought sentences back into formal symbolic proofs"]
    F["Semantically parse generated chain-of-thought sentences back into formal symbolic proofs"] --> G["Compare reconstructed proof steps against gold proofs to analyze reasoning capability"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从先验分布生成合成本体树结构"] --> B["用一阶逻辑公理从本体生成形式证明"]
    B["用一阶逻辑公理从本体生成形式证明"] --> C["用语法规则将本体和证明翻译为自然语言"]
    C["用语法规则将本体和证明翻译为自然语言"] --> D["从翻译的证明构建问答样例含上下文查询标签"]
    D["从翻译的证明构建问答样例含上下文查询标签"] --> E["用思维链样例提示语言模型生成推理步骤"]
    E["用思维链样例提示语言模型生成推理步骤"] --> F["将生成的思维链句子语义解析回形式符号证明"]
    F["将生成的思维链句子语义解析回形式符号证明"] --> G["对比重构证明步骤与金标准证明分析推理能力"]

name: ProtocolQA
intro: ProtocolQA是一个多项选择基准测试，旨在评估模型在解决常见生物实验室方案中失败的实验结果方面的能力。它评估了与生物武器开发相关的两用生物学知识。
org: FutureHouse Inc., University of Washington, Stanford University, Massachusetts Institute of Technolo
intro_en: ProtocolQA is a multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate models' ability to address failed experimental outcomes in common biological laboratory protocols. It assesses dual-use biological knowledge related to bioweapons development.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Biology experts manually write protocol troubleshooting questions covering common lab experimental failures"] --> B["Format questions as multiple-choice with plausible distractor answers for each scenario"]
    B["Format questions as multiple-choice with plausible distractor answers for each scenario"] --> C["Evaluate frontier LLMs using zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting with decline-to-answer option"]
    C["Evaluate frontier LLMs using zero-shot chain-of-thought prompting with decline-to-answer option"] --> D["Calculate both accuracy and precision metrics based on model coverage and correctness"]
    D["Calculate both accuracy and precision metrics based on model coverage and correctness"] --> E["Recruit PhD-level biologists to answer questions using internet tools but not AI assistants"]
    E["Recruit PhD-level biologists to answer questions using internet tools but not AI assistants"] --> F["Compare human expert performance against model performance across accuracy and precision"]
    F["Compare human expert performance against model performance across accuracy and precision"] --> G["Conduct open-response evaluation on modified subset to assess genuine reasoning versus distractor elimination"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["生物学专家手动编写实验方案故障排除问题"] --> B["将问题格式化为多项选择题并设计干扰选项"]
    B["将问题格式化为多项选择题并设计干扰选项"] --> C["用零样本思维链提示评估大模型并允许拒答"]
    C["用零样本思维链提示评估大模型并允许拒答"] --> D["基于模型覆盖率和正确率计算准确度和精确度"]
    D["基于模型覆盖率和正确率计算准确度和精确度"] --> E["招募博士生物学家用互联网工具答题但禁用AI"]
    E["招募博士生物学家用互联网工具答题但禁用AI"] --> F["比较人类专家与模型在准确度和精确度上的表现"]
    F["比较人类专家与模型在准确度和精确度上的表现"] --> G["对修改子集进行开放式评估以区分真实推理和排除法"]

name: ProverBench
intro: ProverBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在形式化定理证明方面能力的基准。它包含325个形式化问题，其中15个问题来自近期的AIME竞赛，旨在全面评估模型在解决高中竞赛级和本科水平数学问题上的能力。该基准由DeepSeek-Prover-V2论文引入，用于测试模型将复杂问题分解为子目标并使用Lean 4等证明器进行验证的能力。
intro_en: ProverBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' abilities in formal theorem proving. It contains 325 formal problems, including 15 from the recent AIME competition, designed to comprehensively assess models' capabilities in solving high school competition-level and undergraduate mathematics problems. Introduced by the DeepSeek-Prover-V2 paper, the benchmark tests models' ability to decompose complex problems into subgoals and verify them using provers like Lean 4.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 325 formalized problems including 15 from AIME 2024-2025 competitions"] --> B["Prompt DeepSeek-V3 to generate natural-language proof sketches with Lean statements containing sorry placeholders"]
    B["Prompt DeepSeek-V3 to generate natural-language proof sketches with Lean statements containing sorry placeholders"] --> C["Extract subgoals from have statements and translate them into lemma statements with premises"]
    C["Extract subgoals from have statements and translate them into lemma statements with premises"] --> D["Use 7B prover model to recursively solve decomposed subgoals in Lean 4"]
    D["Use 7B prover model to recursively solve decomposed subgoals in Lean 4"] --> E["Compose complete formal proofs by combining all successfully resolved subgoal proofs"]
    E["Compose complete formal proofs by combining all successfully resolved subgoal proofs"] --> F["Append composed proofs to DeepSeek-V3's chain-of-thought to create cold-start training data"]
    F["Append composed proofs to DeepSeek-V3's chain-of-thought to create cold-start training data"] --> G["Apply curriculum learning using both premise-included and premise-free subgoal theorem types"]
    G["Apply curriculum learning using both premise-included and premise-free subgoal theorem types"] --> H["Evaluate models on pass rate and number of problems solved across benchmark subsets"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集325个形式化问题含15个AIME 2024-2025竞赛题"] --> B["提示DeepSeek-V3生成自然语言证明草图及含sorry占位符的Lean语句"]
    B["提示DeepSeek-V3生成自然语言证明草图及含sorry占位符的Lean语句"] --> C["从have语句提取子目标并转换为带前提的引理语句"]
    C["从have语句提取子目标并转换为带前提的引理语句"] --> D["用7B证明器模型在Lean 4中递归求解分解的子目标"]
    D["用7B证明器模型在Lean 4中递归求解分解的子目标"] --> E["组合所有成功求解的子目标证明构建完整形式化证明"]
    E["组合所有成功求解的子目标证明构建完整形式化证明"] --> F["将组合证明附加到DeepSeek-V3思维链创建冷启动训练数据"]
    F["将组合证明附加到DeepSeek-V3思维链创建冷启动训练数据"] --> G["应用课程学习使用含前提和无前提两类子目标定理"]
    G["应用课程学习使用含前提和无前提两类子目标定理"] --> H["在基准子集上评估模型通过率和解决问题数量"]

name: PubMedQA
intro: PubMedQA是一个基于PubMed摘要的生物医学问答数据集，任务是用“是”、“否”或“可能”回答研究问题。包含1000个专家标注、61200个未标注及211300个人工生成问答，是首个需对生物医学研究文本进行推理的数据集。
org: University of Pittsburgh, Carnegie Mellon University
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成, 网络爬取, 混合
build_method_en: Expert Curation, LLM Generation, Web Crawling, Hybrid
intro_en: PubMedQA is a biomedical question answering dataset based on PubMed abstracts, where the task is to answer research questions with "yes," "no," or "maybe." It includes 1,000 expert-annotated, 61,200 unlabeled, and 211,300 artificially generated QA pairs, making it the first dataset requiring reasoning over biomedical research texts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(PubMed Abstracts) --> B[Extract Abstracts]
    B --> C[Generate Initial QA Instances]
    C --> D{QA Instance Type}
    D -->|Expert Annotation| E[Expert Annotation]
    D -->|Automatic Generation| F[Automatic Generation]
    D -->|Unlabeled| G(Unlabeled QA Instances)
    E --> H(Expert Annotated QA)
    F --> I(Automatically Generated QA)
    H & I & G --> J[Integrate & Validate Instances]
    J --> K(PubMedQA Dataset)
    K --> L[Evaluate Biomedical QA Models]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect all PubMed articles with question titles as candidate instances"] --> B["Extract question from article title and context from abstract excluding conclusion section"]
    B["Extract question from article title and context from abstract excluding conclusion section"] --> C["Extract conclusion section of abstract as long answer for each instance"]
    C["Extract conclusion section of abstract as long answer for each instance"] --> D["Manually annotate 1k instances with yes/no/maybe labels by human experts"]
    D["Manually annotate 1k instances with yes/no/maybe labels by human experts"] --> E["Artificially generate 211.3k additional QA instances and keep 61.2k unlabeled"]
    E["Artificially generate 211.3k additional QA instances and keep 61.2k unlabeled"] --> F["Split expert-annotated instances into cross-validation and test sets"]
    F["Split expert-annotated instances into cross-validation and test sets"] --> G["Fine-tune BioBERT with long answer bag-of-word statistics as additional supervision"]
    G["Fine-tune BioBERT with long answer bag-of-word statistics as additional supervision"] --> H["Evaluate model accuracy against single human performance and majority baseline"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集所有带问题标题的PubMed文章作为候选实例"] --> B["从标题提取问题并从摘要中提取上下文排除结论部分"]
    B["从标题提取问题并从摘要中提取上下文排除结论部分"] --> C["提取摘要的结论部分作为每个实例的长答案"]
    C["提取摘要的结论部分作为每个实例的长答案"] --> D["由专家对1000个实例手动标注是/否/可能标签"]
    D["由专家对1000个实例手动标注是/否/可能标签"] --> E["人工生成21.13万个额外问答实例并保留6.12万个未标注"]
    E["人工生成21.13万个额外问答实例并保留6.12万个未标注"] --> F["将专家标注实例划分为交叉验证集和测试集"]
    F["将专家标注实例划分为交叉验证集和测试集"] --> G["用长答案词袋统计作为额外监督微调BioBERT"]
    G["用长答案词袋统计作为额外监督微调BioBERT"] --> H["评估模型准确率并与单人表现和多数基线对比"]

name: RareArena
intro: RareArena 是一个覆盖近 5 万名患者、4000 多种疾病的罕见病诊断基准，包含罕见病筛查和罕见病确认两类任务，用于评估模型在真实病例基础上的诊断召回能力。
intro_en: RareArena is a rare-disease diagnosis benchmark covering nearly 50,000 patients and more than 4,000 diseases. It includes rare-disease screening and confirmation settings to evaluate diagnostic recall on real patient cases.
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从 PMC-Patients 病例摘要库出发"] --> B["筛出罕见病病例并抽取真实诊断"]
    B --> C["用 CODER 把诊断映射到 Orphanet"]
    C --> D["删除映射失败的病例"]
    D --> E["截断并改写病例文本以避免诊断泄漏"]
    E --> F["构建 RDS 与 RDC 两类诊断场景"]
    F --> G["再移除仍含泄漏风险的样本"]
    G --> H["让模型输出 top-5 诊断候选"]
    H --> I["用 GPT-4o 对齐同义词 / 上位词后计算 Top-1 与 Top-5 Recall"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Start from the PMC-Patients case-summary corpus"] --> B["Keep rare-disease cases and extract ground-truth diagnoses"]
    B --> C["Map diagnoses to Orphanet with CODER"]
    C --> D["Remove cases whose diagnoses cannot be mapped"]
    D --> E["Truncate and rewrite case text to avoid diagnosis leakage"]
    E --> F["Build the RDS and RDC diagnostic settings"]
    F --> G["Remove samples that still leak the diagnosis"]
    G --> H["Ask each model for top-5 diagnosis candidates"]
    H --> I["Use GPT-4o to align synonyms / hypernyms and compute Top-1 and Top-5 Recall"]

name: RareBench
intro: RareBench是首个系统性评估大语言模型在罕见病领域能力的基准。它包含了多个罕见病患者数据集，并提出了一种动态少样本提示方法来提升诊断性能。该基准还对GPT-4与专业医生的诊断能力进行了比较。
task_type: 分类, 抽取, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 领域特定, 少样本
intro_en: RareBench is the first benchmark to systematically evaluate large language models' capabilities in the rare disease domain. It includes multiple rare disease patient datasets and introduces a dynamic few-shot prompting method to enhance diagnostic performance. The benchmark also compares the diagnostic abilities of GPT-4 with those of expert physicians.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 1,650 PUMCH EHRs and 1,122 public rare disease cases, filtering low-quality records"] --> B["Select and annotate subsets for four tasks: phenotype extraction, screening, comparison, and differential diagnosis"]
    B["Select and annotate subsets for four tasks: phenotype extraction, screening, comparison, and differential diagnosis"] --> C["Construct rare disease knowledge graph by integrating HPO, OMIM, Orphanet, and CCRD knowledge bases"]
    C["Construct rare disease knowledge graph by integrating HPO, OMIM, Orphanet, and CCRD knowledge bases"] --> D["Implement IC-based random walk algorithm on knowledge graph to generate phenotype embeddings"]
    D["Implement IC-based random walk algorithm on knowledge graph to generate phenotype embeddings"] --> E["Develop dynamic few-shot prompt methodology using phenotype embeddings to select relevant examples"]
    E["Develop dynamic few-shot prompt methodology using phenotype embeddings to select relevant examples"] --> F["Evaluate 11 LLMs using zero-shot, CoT, random few-shot, and dynamic few-shot prompts"]
    F["Evaluate 11 LLMs using zero-shot, CoT, random few-shot, and dynamic few-shot prompts"] --> G["Compare GPT-4 diagnostic performance against specialist physicians on rare disease differential diagnosis tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集1650份协和病历和1122份公开罕见病例并过滤低质量记录"] --> B["为四项任务选择并标注子集:表型提取、筛查、对比和鉴别诊断"]
    B["为四项任务选择并标注子集:表型提取、筛查、对比和鉴别诊断"] --> C["整合HPO、OMIM、Orphanet和CCRD知识库构建罕见病知识图谱"]
    C["整合HPO、OMIM、Orphanet和CCRD知识库构建罕见病知识图谱"] --> D["在知识图谱上实现基于IC的随机游走算法生成表型嵌入"]
    D["在知识图谱上实现基于IC的随机游走算法生成表型嵌入"] --> E["利用表型嵌入开发动态少样本提示方法选择相关示例"]
    E["利用表型嵌入开发动态少样本提示方法选择相关示例"] --> F["用零样本、CoT、随机少样本和动态少样本提示评估11个大模型"]
    F["用零样本、CoT、随机少样本和动态少样本提示评估11个大模型"] --> G["将GPT-4诊断性能与专科医生在罕见病鉴别诊断任务上对比"]

name: RealPref
intro: RealPref 是一个面向长期个性化用户-LLM 交互的偏好遵循评测基准，覆盖显式与隐式偏好表达、长时程交互历史以及未见场景下的偏好泛化能力。
build_method: 100个用户画像, 1300个个性化偏好, 四种偏好表达, 长时程交互历史
task_type: 偏好遵循, 个性化问答
eval_feature: 四种偏好表达, 长时程交互历史, 未见场景泛化
intro_en: RealPref evaluates long-horizon preference following in personalized user-LLM interactions with both explicit and implicit preference signals.
build_method_en: 100 user profiles, 1,300 personalized preferences, four preference-expression types, long-horizon interaction histories
eval_feature_en: Four Preference Expression Types, Long-horizon Interaction Histories, Unseen-scenario Generalization
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample 100 personas from PersonaHub and manually filter, then augment with demographics and life events"] --> B["Generate 10 original preferences per user from topic pool, ensuring diversity, uniqueness, and persona-relatedness"]
    B["Generate 10 original preferences per user from topic pool, ensuring diversity, uniqueness, and persona-relatedness"] --> C["Derive 3 generalized preferences per user rationally inferred from original preferences"]
    C["Derive 3 generalized preferences per user rationally inferred from original preferences"] --> D["Generate four expression types per preference: explicit direct, contextualized, implicit choice-based, and story-based conversations"]
    D["Generate four expression types per preference: explicit direct, contextualized, implicit choice-based, and story-based conversations"] --> E["Generate life-event and random conversations, then assemble contexts by inserting random sessions to control length"]
    E["Generate life-event and random conversations, then assemble contexts by inserting random sessions to control length"] --> F["Create multiple-choice, true-or-false, and open-ended queries for each preference-context pair"]
    F["Create multiple-choice, true-or-false, and open-ended queries for each preference-context pair"] --> G["Evaluate model responses using classification accuracy and LLM-as-a-judge with detailed rubrics for open-ended tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从PersonaHub采样100个角色并人工筛选，增补人口统计和生活事件"] --> B["从话题池为每用户生成10个原始偏好，确保多样性、独特性和角色相关性"]
    B["从话题池为每用户生成10个原始偏好，确保多样性、独特性和角色相关性"] --> C["为每用户从原始偏好推导出3个泛化偏好"]
    C["为每用户从原始偏好推导出3个泛化偏好"] --> D["为每偏好生成四种表达类型：显式直接、情境化、隐式选择和故事式对话"]
    D["为每偏好生成四种表达类型：显式直接、情境化、隐式选择和故事式对话"] --> E["生成生活事件和随机对话，插入随机会话以控制长度并组装上下文"]
    E["生成生活事件和随机对话，插入随机会话以控制长度并组装上下文"] --> F["为每个偏好-上下文对创建多选、判断和开放式查询"]
    F["为每个偏好-上下文对创建多选、判断和开放式查询"] --> G["用分类准确率和LLM评判员结合详细评分标准评估开放式任务"]

name: RealWorldQA
intro: RealWorldQA是一个旨在评估多模态AI模型真实世界空间理解能力的基准测试。它通过700多张真实世界场景（包括车载图像）的图片，配以问题和可验证的答案，来评估模型对物理环境的理解能力。该基准测试要求模型能够识别高分辨率图像中的细节，并基于识别结果进行推理，可能需要常识性知识。
intro_en: RealWorldQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate the real-world spatial understanding capabilities of multimodal AI models. It uses over 700 images of real-world scenes, including in-car images, paired with questions and verifiable answers to assess models' understanding of physical environments. The benchmark requires models to identify details in high-resolution images and perform reasoning based on these observations, potentially involving commonsense knowledge.

name: RefSpatial-Bench
intro: RefSpatial-Bench是一个具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估视觉语言模型在多步空间指代推理方面的能力。它基于真实世界中的杂乱场景，并包含大规模的问答对，涵盖了丰富的空间关系和复杂的推理过程。该基准测试填补了现有评估方法在多步空间推理方面的空白，并能有效区分不同模型的性能。
org: Beihang University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: RefSpatial-Bench is a challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of vision-language models in multi-step spatial coreference reasoning. It is based on cluttered real-world scenes and includes a large-scale set of question-answer pairs covering rich spatial relationships and complex reasoning processes. This benchmark fills the gap in existing evaluation methods for multi-step spatial reasoning and effectively differentiates the performance of various models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Filter OpenImages to 466k samples with spatially relevant, text-referable objects from 1.7M candidates"] --> B["Sample 100k frames from CA-1M with text-identifiable 3D bounding boxes from 2M frames"]
    B["Sample 100k frames from CA-1M with text-identifiable 3D bounding boxes from 2M frames"] --> C["Manually check and annotate 3k Objaverse-LVIS assets with semantic orientation labels from 46k"]
    C["Manually check and annotate 3k Objaverse-LVIS assets with semantic orientation labels from 46k"] --> D["Generate hierarchical captions from broad categories to precise spatial referents for each object"]
    D["Generate hierarchical captions from broad categories to precise spatial referents for each object"] --> E["Annotate 31 spatial relations, point coordinates, depth, and explicit multi-step reasoning processes"]
    E["Annotate 31 spatial relations, point coordinates, depth, and explicit multi-step reasoning processes"] --> F["Construct 20M QA pairs covering qualitative VQA, quantitative queries, and point prediction tasks"]
    F["Construct 20M QA pairs covering qualitative VQA, quantitative queries, and point prediction tasks"] --> G["Evaluate models on multi-step spatial referring with reasoning in cluttered real-world scenes"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从170万候选中筛选出46.6万个空间相关可文本指代的OpenImages样本"] --> B["从200万帧中采样10万个带可识别3D边界框的CA-1M帧"]
    B["从200万帧中采样10万个带可识别3D边界框的CA-1M帧"] --> C["从4.6万资产中人工检查并标注3千个带语义方向的Objaverse-LVIS资产"]
    C["从4.6万资产中人工检查并标注3千个带语义方向的Objaverse-LVIS资产"] --> D["为每个物体生成从宽泛类别到精确空间指代的层次化描述"]
    D["为每个物体生成从宽泛类别到精确空间指代的层次化描述"] --> E["标注31种空间关系、点坐标、深度及显式多步推理过程"]
    E["标注31种空间关系、点坐标、深度及显式多步推理过程"] --> F["构建2000万问答对涵盖定性问答、定量查询和点预测任务"]
    F["构建2000万问答对涵盖定性问答、定量查询和点预测任务"] --> G["在杂乱真实场景中评估模型的多步空间指代推理能力"]

name: RepoQA
intro: RepoQA是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）长上下文代码理解能力的基准测试。它通过“搜索针函数”（SNF）任务来挑战LLMs，要求模型根据自然语言描述搜索代码函数，这需要模型深入理解代码和描述。RepoQA是多语言且全面的，包含从50个流行代码库中收集的500个代码搜索任务，涵盖5种现代编程语言。
org: University of Washington, Google, ETH Zurich
eval_feature: 多语言
intro_en: RepoQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) long-context code understanding ability. It challenges LLMs with the "Search Needle Function" (SNF) task, requiring models to search for code functions based on natural language descriptions, demanding deep comprehension of both code and descriptions. RepoQA is multilingual and comprehensive, containing 500 code search tasks collected from 50 popular code repositories, covering 5 modern programming languages.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 50 GitHub repositories across Python, C++, Java, TypeScript, and Rust with 100+ stars"] --> B["Perform dependency analysis on source files under each repository's entry directory"]
    B["Perform dependency analysis on source files under each repository's entry directory"] --> C["Automatically select 10 evenly distributed needle functions per repository with unique names"]
    C["Automatically select 10 evenly distributed needle functions per repository with unique names"] --> D["Prompt GPT-4 to annotate each needle function with explicit natural-language descriptions"]
    D["Prompt GPT-4 to annotate each needle function with explicit natural-language descriptions"] --> E["Construct 16k-token code context with needle functions planted at 10% to 100% depths"]
    E["Construct 16k-token code context with needle functions planted at 10% to 100% depths"] --> F["Prompt LLM with instruction, topologically sorted code context, function description, and repeated instruction"]
    F["Prompt LLM with instruction, topologically sorted code context, function description, and repeated instruction"] --> G["Extract first syntactically correct code block from model output using tree-sitter"]
    G["Extract first syntactically correct code block from model output using tree-sitter"] --> H["Compute BLEU score; pass if output matches needle function with 0.8+ similarity"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择50个跨5种语言且星标100+的GitHub仓库"] --> B["对每个仓库入口目录下的源文件执行依赖分析"]
    B["对每个仓库入口目录下的源文件执行依赖分析"] --> C["每个仓库自动选择10个均匀分布的唯一命名针函数"]
    C["每个仓库自动选择10个均匀分布的唯一命名针函数"] --> D["用GPT-4为每个针函数标注明确的自然语言描述"]
    D["用GPT-4为每个针函数标注明确的自然语言描述"] --> E["构建16k词元代码上下文并将针函数植入10%到100%深度"]
    E["构建16k词元代码上下文并将针函数植入10%到100%深度"] --> F["用指令、拓扑排序代码、函数描述和重复指令提示LLM"]
    F["用指令、拓扑排序代码、函数描述和重复指令提示LLM"] --> G["用tree-sitter从模型输出提取首个语法正确代码块"]
    G["用tree-sitter从模型输出提取首个语法正确代码块"] --> H["计算BLEU分数若与针函数相似度0.8+则通过"]

name: ReportBench
intro: ReportBench是一个系统性基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的学术研究报告的内容质量。该基准关注两个关键维度：引用文献的质量和相关性，以及报告中陈述的忠实性和真实性。它利用arXiv上的高质量已发表综述论文作为黄金标准，通过逆向提示工程构建领域特定提示和评估语料库。
org: ByteDance, Beihang University, The University of Sydney
build_method: 混合
metric: 内容质量, 引用文献质量和相关性, 陈述忠实性和真实性
intro_en: ReportBench is a systematic benchmark designed to evaluate the content quality of academic research reports generated by large language models (LLMs). It focuses on two key dimensions: the quality and relevance of cited references, and the faithfulness and veracity of statements in the reports. It uses high-quality published survey papers from arXiv as the gold standard and employs reverse prompt engineering to construct domain-specific prompts and evaluation corpora.
metric_en: Content Quality, Citation Quality and Relevance, Statement Faithfulness and Truthfulness
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Filter arXiv metadata for post-2020 survey papers using regex and peer-review status indicators"] --> B["Classify papers as literature surveys using GPT-4o on titles and abstracts"]
    B["Classify papers as literature surveys using GPT-4o on titles and abstracts"] --> C["Parse LaTeX source files to extract cited references from bibliography databases"]
    C["Parse LaTeX source files to extract cited references from bibliography databases"] --> D["Generate three-granularity prompts from publication date and full text via reverse prompt engineering"]
    D["Generate three-granularity prompts from publication date and full text via reverse prompt engineering"] --> E["Extract and normalize URLs from generated reports, retrieve content and identify scholarly articles"]
    E["Extract and normalize URLs from generated reports, retrieve content and identify scholarly articles"] --> F["Compute overlap between extracted article titles and ground-truth references for quality scoring"]
    F["Compute overlap between extracted article titles and ground-truth references for quality scoring"] --> G["Map cited statements to sources, retrieve webpages, locate supporting passages, verify consistency"]
    G["Map cited statements to sources, retrieve webpages, locate supporting passages, verify consistency"] --> H["Extract non-cited statements, validate using multiple web-connected LLMs with majority voting"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用正则表达式和同行评审状态筛选2020年后arXiv综述论文"] --> B["用GPT-4o对标题和摘要分类识别文献综述论文"]
    B["用GPT-4o对标题和摘要分类识别文献综述论文"] --> C["解析LaTeX源文件从参考文献数据库提取引用文献"]
    C["解析LaTeX源文件从参考文献数据库提取引用文献"] --> D["根据发表日期和全文逆向生成三粒度提示词"]
    D["根据发表日期和全文逆向生成三粒度提示词"] --> E["从生成报告提取规范化URL并检索内容识别学术文章"]
    E["从生成报告提取规范化URL并检索内容识别学术文章"] --> F["计算提取标题与真实参考文献重叠率评分质量"]
    F["计算提取标题与真实参考文献重叠率评分质量"] --> G["映射引用陈述到来源检索网页定位支持段落验证一致性"]
    G["映射引用陈述到来源检索网页定位支持段落验证一致性"] --> H["提取未引用陈述用多个联网LLM验证并多数投票"]

name: ResearchRubrics
intro: ResearchRubrics是一个用于评估深度研究（Deep Research）能力的标准化基准。它利用大型语言模型处理开放式研究问题，并通过超过2500条由专家撰写的细粒度评分标准来评估模型的表现。该基准基于超过2800小时的人工劳动构建，包含跨领域的真实研究任务，旨在全面评估模型在事实依据、推理和表达清晰度等方面的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 生成, 开放式问答, Agent任务
eval_feature: 结果导向, 思维链, 领域特定
intro_en: ResearchRubrics is a standardized benchmark for evaluating Deep Research capabilities. It leverages large language models to tackle open-ended research questions and assesses model performance using over 2,500 fine-grained scoring criteria authored by experts. Built on more than 2,800 hours of human labor, the benchmark includes cross-domain real research tasks designed to comprehensively evaluate models on factual accuracy, reasoning, and clarity of expression.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Draw initial prompt ideas from user forums, Q&A sites, and brainstorming sessions"] --> B["Expert 1 drafts a prompt and corresponding rubric criteria for a chosen domain"]
    B["Expert 1 drafts a prompt and corresponding rubric criteria for a chosen domain"] --> C["Expert 2 reviews the draft and iterates with Expert 1 until approval"]
    C["Expert 2 reviews the draft and iterates with Expert 1 until approval"] --> D["Expert 3 conducts final independent review and makes last adjustments to prompt-rubric pair"]
    D["Expert 3 conducts final independent review and makes last adjustments to prompt-rubric pair"] --> E["Weight each rubric criterion by importance and include negative criteria for common pitfalls"]
    E["Weight each rubric criterion by importance and include negative criteria for common pitfalls"] --> F["Curate 101 prompts across nine categories with 2,593 fine-grained rubric items total"]
    F["Curate 101 prompts across nine categories with 2,593 fine-grained rubric items total"] --> G["Deploy human and model-based evaluation protocols to measure rubric adherence of DR agents"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从用户论坛、问答网站和头脑风暴中提取初始提示想法"] --> B["专家1为选定领域起草提示和相应评分标准"]
    B["专家1为选定领域起草提示和相应评分标准"] --> C["专家2审查草稿并与专家1迭代直至批准"]
    C["专家2审查草稿并与专家1迭代直至批准"] --> D["专家3进行最终独立审查并对提示-标准对做最后调整"]
    D["专家3进行最终独立审查并对提示-标准对做最后调整"] --> E["按重要性为每条标准加权并纳入常见错误的负向标准"]
    E["按重要性为每条标准加权并纳入常见错误的负向标准"] --> F["整理九类共101个提示及2593条细粒度评分项"]
    F["整理九类共101个提示及2593条细粒度评分项"] --> G["部署人工和模型评估协议测量深度研究智能体的标准遵循度"]

name: RewardBench 2
intro: RewardBench 2是一个全新的多技能奖励建模基准，旨在通过提供更具挑战性的数据来推进奖励模型的评估。与第一代相比，模型在RewardBench 2上的得分平均低20分，但与下游任务性能高度相关。该基准使用新的人类提示，而非现有评估中的提示，从而实现了更严格的评估。
org: Allen Institute for AI, Princeton University, University of Washington, ETH AI Center, University of
task_type: 选择题, 排序, 对话
build_method_en: Human Annotation, Crowdsourcing, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: RewardBench 2 is a new multi-skill reward modeling benchmark designed to advance reward model evaluation by providing more challenging data. Compared to the first generation, model scores on RewardBench 2 are on average 20 points lower but show a high correlation with downstream task performance. The benchmark uses new human prompts instead of those from existing evaluations, enabling a more rigorous assessment.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source unseen human prompts from WildChat representing real AI model usage"] --> B["Filter and annotate prompts using QuRater, topic classifier, and manual inspection"]
    B["Filter and annotate prompts using QuRater, topic classifier, and manual inspection"] --> C["Decontaminate prompts against 20 downstream evaluations using Tulu 3 toolkit"]
    C["Decontaminate prompts against 20 downstream evaluations using Tulu 3 toolkit"] --> D["Generate completions from 20 diverse models to create chosen and rejected responses"]
    D["Generate completions from 20 diverse models to create chosen and rejected responses"] --> E["Apply domain-specific filtering using LM-as-a-judge, verifier functions, majority voting, and rubrics"]
    E["Apply domain-specific filtering using LM-as-a-judge, verifier functions, majority voting, and rubrics"] --> F["Manually verify and curate final 1,876 prompts from initial 3,000 candidates"]
    F["Manually verify and curate final 1,876 prompts from initial 3,000 candidates"] --> G["Construct best-of-4 format with one chosen and three rejected completions per prompt"]
    G["Construct best-of-4 format with one chosen and three rejected completions per prompt"] --> H["Evaluate reward models using accuracy on classification tasks across six domains"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从WildChat获取真实AI使用的未见人类提示"] --> B["用QuRater、主题分类器和人工检查过滤标注提示"]
    B["用QuRater、主题分类器和人工检查过滤标注提示"] --> C["用Tulu 3工具对比20个下游评估去污染提示"]
    C["用Tulu 3工具对比20个下游评估去污染提示"] --> D["从20个模型生成完成文本创建选中和拒绝响应"]
    D["从20个模型生成完成文本创建选中和拒绝响应"] --> E["用LM评判、验证函数、多数投票和规则进行领域过滤"]
    E["用LM评判、验证函数、多数投票和规则进行领域过滤"] --> F["从初始3000个候选中人工验证精选最终1876个提示"]
    F["从初始3000个候选中人工验证精选最终1876个提示"] --> G["构建每个提示一个选中三个拒绝的四选一格式"]
    G["构建每个提示一个选中三个拒绝的四选一格式"] --> H["用六个领域分类任务准确率评估奖励模型"]

name: Role-play Benchmark
intro: Role-play Benchmark旨在通过情景重现来评估角色扮演代理提供沉浸式体验的能力。它不寻求“正确”答案，而是专注于检测与角色设定不符的“错位”之处，例如逻辑矛盾或脱离角色的行为。
intro_en: The Role-play Benchmark aims to evaluate the ability of role-playing agents to provide immersive experiences through scenario reenactment. It does not seek "correct" answers but focuses on detecting "discrepancies" inconsistent with the character setting, such as logical contradictions or out-of-character behavior.
metric_en: Basics, Logic, Knowledge, Diversity, Content Logic, Interaction

name: RULER
intro: RULER基准扩展了传统的needle-in-a-haystack测试，旨在全面评估长上下文语言模型。它支持灵活配置序列长度和任务复杂度，涵盖多种“针”（信息）的类型和数量，并引入了多跳追踪与聚合等新任务，用以测试模型超越简单信息检索的行为能力。
build_method: 自动生成
task_type: 开放式问答, 分类, 补全
eval_feature: 长文本, Multi-hop
intro_en: The RULER benchmark extends the traditional needle-in-a-haystack test to comprehensively evaluate long-context language models. It supports flexible configuration of sequence length and task complexity, covers various types and quantities of "needles" (information), and introduces new tasks like multi-hop tracking and aggregation to assess models' abilities beyond simple information retrieval.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate synthetic retrieval tasks by inserting key-value needles into haystack texts with configurable lengths"] --> B["Extend NIAH to multi-keys, multi-values, and multi-queries variants with hard distractors"]
    B["Extend NIAH to multi-keys, multi-values, and multi-queries variants with hard distractors"] --> C["Create variable tracking tasks with linear chains of name binding statements across long contexts"]
    C["Create variable tracking tasks with linear chains of name binding statements across long contexts"] --> D["Design common and frequent words extraction tasks as aggregation proxies for summarization"]
    D["Design common and frequent words extraction tasks as aggregation proxies for summarization"] --> E["Augment short-context QA datasets by adding distracting information to control context size"]
    E["Augment short-context QA datasets by adding distracting information to control context size"] --> F["Configure task complexity by adjusting number of hops, chains, or signal-to-noise ratio"]
    F["Configure task complexity by adjusting number of hops, chains, or signal-to-noise ratio"] --> G["Evaluate models on generated tasks across sequence lengths from 4k to 200k tokens"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["生成合成检索任务，将键值对针插入可配置长度的干草堆文本"] --> B["将NIAH扩展为多键、多值和多查询变体并加入强干扰项"]
    B["将NIAH扩展为多键、多值和多查询变体并加入强干扰项"] --> C["创建变量追踪任务，在长上下文中设置线性名称绑定链"]
    C["创建变量追踪任务，在长上下文中设置线性名称绑定链"] --> D["设计常见词和高频词提取任务作为摘要的聚合代理"]
    D["设计常见词和高频词提取任务作为摘要的聚合代理"] --> E["向短上下文问答数据集添加干扰信息以控制上下文大小"]
    E["向短上下文问答数据集添加干扰信息以控制上下文大小"] --> F["通过调整跳数、链数或信噪比来配置任务复杂度"]
    F["通过调整跳数、链数或信噪比来配置任务复杂度"] --> G["在4k到200k词元的序列长度上评估模型生成任务表现"]

name: SafeArena
intro: SafeArena针对基于LLM的网络代理滥用风险提出首个专注于恶意使用的评测基准。包含250个安全任务和250个有害任务，覆盖四个网站，评估代理在网络环境中的滥用可能性。
metric: Task Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score
eval_feature: 对抗性, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: SafeArena is the first benchmark focused on malicious use risks for LLM-based web agents. It includes 250 safety tasks and 250 harmful tasks across four websites, evaluating the potential for agent misuse in web environments.
metric_en: Task Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate harmful tasks across five categories: misinformation, illegal activity, harassment, cybercrime, and social bias"] --> B["Create 250 harmful tasks and 250 paired safe tasks across four realistic websites"]
    B["Create 250 harmful tasks and 250 paired safe tasks across four realistic websites"] --> C["Use human-in-the-loop process to generate and refine task examples with malicious intents"]
    C["Use human-in-the-loop process to generate and refine task examples with malicious intents"] --> D["Conduct human verification to ensure all tasks are valid and executable in web environments"]
    D["Conduct human verification to ensure all tasks are valid and executable in web environments"] --> E["Evaluate GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 Sonnet, Qwen-2-VL 72B, and Llama-3.2 90B agents on benchmark tasks"]
    E["Evaluate GPT-4o, Claude-3.5 Sonnet, Qwen-2-VL 72B, and Llama-3.2 90B agents on benchmark tasks"] --> F["Apply ARIA framework to categorize agent responses into four risk levels from immediate refusal to completion"]
    F["Apply ARIA framework to categorize agent responses into four risk levels from immediate refusal to completion"] --> G["Measure harmful task completion rates and attempted execution rates across all evaluated agents"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["策划五类有害任务:虚假信息、非法活动、骚扰、网络犯罪和社会偏见"] --> B["在四个真实网站上创建250个有害任务和250个配对安全任务"]
    B["在四个真实网站上创建250个有害任务和250个配对安全任务"] --> C["使用人机协同流程生成和优化恶意意图任务示例"]
    C["使用人机协同流程生成和优化恶意意图任务示例"] --> D["进行人工验证确保所有任务在网络环境中有效可执行"]
    D["进行人工验证确保所有任务在网络环境中有效可执行"] --> E["在基准任务上评估GPT-4o、Claude-3.5等代理模型"]
    E["在基准任务上评估GPT-4o、Claude-3.5等代理模型"] --> F["应用ARIA框架将代理响应分为从立即拒绝到完成的四个风险级别"]
    F["应用ARIA框架将代理响应分为从立即拒绝到完成的四个风险级别"] --> G["测量所有代理的有害任务完成率和尝试执行率"]

name: SafeSci
intro: SafeSci 是一个面向科学领域及相关场景的大模型安全评测框架，包含大规模多学科安全基准 SafeSciBench 和用于安全增强的 SafeSciTrain，用来衡量模型在科学风险场景中的安全知识与风险辨识能力。
build_method: 多学科基准, 可确定性作答问题
eval_feature: 领域特定, 安全评估, 过度拒答分析
intro_en: SafeSci is a framework for safety evaluation of LLMs in scientific domains and related contexts. It combines SafeSciBench for large-scale benchmarking and SafeSciTrain for safety enhancement, with an emphasis on objective scientific-risk assessment.
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["先把科学安全分成安全知识与情境风险"] --> B["围绕两部分构建跨学科 SafeSciBench"]
    B --> C["把问题写成可客观判定的科学安全样本"]
    C --> D["形成 25 万条评测数据"]
    D --> E["并行构建 150 万条 SafeSciTrain 安全增强数据"]
    E --> F["用 SafeSciBench 评测 24 个模型"]
    F --> G["分析脆弱点与过度拒答行为"]
    G --> H["在 SafeSciTrain 上做安全微调"]
    H --> I["比较微调前后的安全对齐提升"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Split scientific safety into safety knowledge and contextual risk"] --> B["Build the multi-disciplinary SafeSciBench around these two axes"]
    B --> C["Write objectively checkable scientific-safety samples"]
    C --> D["Assemble 0.25M benchmark examples"]
    D --> E["Build 1.5M SafeSciTrain samples for safety enhancement in parallel"]
    E --> F["Evaluate 24 models on SafeSciBench"]
    F --> G["Analyze vulnerabilities and over-refusal behavior"]
    G --> H["Fine-tune models on SafeSciTrain"]
    H --> I["Compare safety-alignment gains before and after tuning"]

name: SafetyBench
intro: SafetyBench是一个综合性的基准测试，用于评估大型语言模型的安全性。它包含11,435个多项选择题，涵盖7个不同的安全问题类别。该基准测试同时包含中文和英文数据，支持两种语言的评估。
eval_feature: 双语, 零样本, 少样本
intro_en: SafetyBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the safety of large language models. It includes 11,435 multiple-choice questions covering seven different categories of safety issues. The benchmark contains both Chinese and English data, supporting evaluation in both languages.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define seven safety categories derived from typical safety scenarios, excluding Sensitive Topics for cross-language consistency"] --> B["Transform samples from existing datasets into multiple choice questions for categories like Unfairness and Bias"]
    B["Transform samples from existing datasets into multiple choice questions for categories like Unfairness and Bias"] --> C["Curate questions from safety-related exams covering morality, law, and ethics categories"]
    C["Curate questions from safety-related exams covering morality, law, and ethics categories"] --> D["Use LLMs to augment data for under-represented categories, then filter and manually check augmented samples"]
    D["Use LLMs to augment data for under-represented categories, then filter and manually check augmented samples"] --> E["Translate all Chinese questions to English and vice versa using commercial translation API"]
    E["Translate all Chinese questions to English and vice versa using commercial translation API"] --> F["Validate all questions through human review; double-check only samples where GPT-4 disagrees with human answers"]
    F["Validate all questions through human review; double-check only samples where GPT-4 disagrees with human answers"] --> G["Remove questions with translation errors, unreasonable options, or cultural divergence; correct erroneous answers"]
    G["Remove questions with translation errors, unreasonable options, or cultural divergence; correct erroneous answers"] --> H["Remove highly sensitive keywords from Chinese subset to enable evaluation of API-based LLMs with filtering"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义七个安全类别，排除敏感话题以确保跨语言一致性"] --> B["将现有数据集样本转换为多项选择题"]
    B["将现有数据集样本转换为多项选择题"] --> C["从安全相关考试中精选道德、法律和伦理类问题"]
    C["从安全相关考试中精选道德、法律和伦理类问题"] --> D["用大模型增强数据不足类别，过滤并人工检查增强样本"]
    D["用大模型增强数据不足类别，过滤并人工检查增强样本"] --> E["用商业翻译API将中文问题译成英文，反之亦然"]
    E["用商业翻译API将中文问题译成英文，反之亦然"] --> F["人工验证所有问题，仅复核GPT-4答案不一致的样本"]
    F["人工验证所有问题，仅复核GPT-4答案不一致的样本"] --> G["删除翻译错误、选项不合理或文化差异问题，纠正错误答案"]
    G["删除翻译错误、选项不合理或文化差异问题，纠正错误答案"] --> H["从中文子集移除高敏感关键词以评估带过滤的API模型"]

name: SaladBench
intro: SaladBench是一个针对LLM及其攻击防御方法的安全评测基准，规模大、类别丰富、层级复杂且功能多样。它引入了基于LLM的多维评审器MD-Judge，专注于攻击增强查询的问答对，以确保评测的高效与可靠。
metric: Attack Success Rate, Safety Score, LLM-as-Judge
task_type: 开放式问答, 安全测试
build_method_en: Human Annotation, Expert Curation, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: SaladBench is a security evaluation benchmark for LLMs and their attack-defense methods, featuring large scale, diverse categories, complex hierarchy, and versatile functions. It introduces the LLM-based multidimensional evaluator MD-Judge, focusing on attack-enhanced query QA pairs to ensure efficient and reliable assessment.
metric_en: Attack Success Rate, Safety Score, LLM-as-Judge
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Define three-level taxonomy: 6 domains, 16 tasks, 66 categories inspired by safety policies"] --> B["Collect unsafe questions from public benchmarks and fine-tuned GPT-3.5-turbo self-instruction"]
    B["Collect unsafe questions from public benchmarks and fine-tuned GPT-3.5-turbo self-instruction"] --> C["Deduplicate via LSH with Sentence-BERT; filter benign samples using SafeRLHF reward model"]
    C["Deduplicate via LSH with Sentence-BERT; filter benign samples using SafeRLHF reward model"] --> D["Auto-label questions into taxonomy levels using GPT-4 to form base set"]
    D["Auto-label questions into taxonomy levels using GPT-4 to form base set"] --> E["Generate attack-enhanced subset: filter low-rejection questions, apply attack methods, retain lowest safety rate"]
    E["Generate attack-enhanced subset: filter low-rejection questions, apply attack methods, retain lowest safety rate"] --> F["Generate defense-enhanced subset from high-rejection questions to challenge attack strategies"]
    F["Generate defense-enhanced subset from high-rejection questions to challenge attack strategies"] --> G["Create multiple-choice questions from base set for automatic evaluation"]
    G["Create multiple-choice questions from base set for automatic evaluation"] --> H["Evaluate using MD-Judge for QA pairs and MCQ-Judge for multiple-choice questions"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["定义三级分类体系:6领域16任务66类别"] --> B["从公开基准和微调GPT收集不安全问题"]
    B["从公开基准和微调GPT收集不安全问题"] --> C["用LSH和BERT去重并用奖励模型过滤"]
    C["用LSH和BERT去重并用奖励模型过滤"] --> D["用GPT-4自动标注问题形成基础集"]
    D["用GPT-4自动标注问题形成基础集"] --> E["生成攻击增强子集并保留最低安全率样本"]
    E["生成攻击增强子集并保留最低安全率样本"] --> F["从高拒绝率问题生成防御增强子集"]
    F["从高拒绝率问题生成防御增强子集"] --> G["从基础集生成多选题用于自动评估"]
    G["从基础集生成多选题用于自动评估"] --> H["用MD-Judge评估问答对和MCQ-Judge评估多选题"]

name: ScanBench
intro: ScanBench是一个用于评估医疗增强型大型语言模型（LLM）的基准测试。它旨在从被动问答转向主动的临床级决策支持，通过模拟医生的系统工作流程来解决现有系统在开放式咨询中的局限性。该基准测试评估LLM在主动信息获取、长程推理和自适应幻觉抑制方面的能力。
metric: Overall Accuracy, Clinical Inquiry, Advisory, Safety
eval_feature: 主动信息获取, 长程推理, 幻觉抑制
eval_feature_en: Active Information Acquisition, Long-range Reasoning, Hallucination Suppression
intro_en: ScanBench is a benchmark for evaluating medical-enhanced large language models (LLMs). It aims to shift from passive Q&A to proactive clinical-grade decision support by simulating doctors' systematic workflows, addressing limitations of existing systems in open-ended consultations. The benchmark assesses LLMs' abilities in active information retrieval, long-range reasoning, and adaptive hallucination suppression.
metric_en: Overall Accuracy, Clinical Inquiry, Advisory, Safety
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Simulate consultations using passive patient simulator in two modes with probabilistic sampling"] --> B["Generate physician responses in simulated consultation environment with interaction state tracking"]
    B["Generate physician responses in simulated consultation environment with interaction state tracking"] --> C["Decompose responses into atomic claims via distilled 8B extraction model with deduplication"]
    C["Decompose responses into atomic claims via distilled 8B extraction model with deduplication"] --> D["Query two-level cache for existing verification results using exact and semantic matching"]
    D["Query two-level cache for existing verification results using exact and semantic matching"] --> E["Validate uncached claims via search-augmented agent querying authoritative medical sources"]
    E["Validate uncached claims via search-augmented agent querying authoritative medical sources"] --> F["Assign Supported, Refuted, or Uncertain labels to each atomic claim"]
    F["Assign Supported, Refuted, or Uncertain labels to each atomic claim"] --> G["Evaluate responses with LLM judge using weighted rubric clauses for protocol adherence"]
    G["Evaluate responses with LLM judge using weighted rubric clauses for protocol adherence"] --> H["Aggregate rubric decisions and fact verification into normalized scalar reward for RL"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用被动患者模拟器按概率采样两种模式模拟问诊"] --> B["在模拟问诊环境中生成医生回复并跟踪交互状态"]
    B["在模拟问诊环境中生成医生回复并跟踪交互状态"] --> C["用蒸馏8B模型将回复分解为原子声明并去重"]
    C["用蒸馏8B模型将回复分解为原子声明并去重"] --> D["用精确和语义匹配在两级缓存中查询已有验证结果"]
    D["用精确和语义匹配在两级缓存中查询已有验证结果"] --> E["用搜索增强代理查询权威医学来源验证未缓存声明"]
    E["用搜索增强代理查询权威医学来源验证未缓存声明"] --> F["为每个原子声明分配支持、反驳或不确定标签"]
    F["为每个原子声明分配支持、反驳或不确定标签"] --> G["用LLM评判器按加权规则条款评估方案遵循性"]
    G["用LLM评判器按加权规则条款评估方案遵循性"] --> H["聚合规则判定和事实验证为归一化标量奖励用于强化学习"]

name: SciCode
intro: SciCode是一个由科学家策划的编码基准，旨在评估语言模型解决真实科学研究问题的能力。该基准包含从80个主要问题分解出的338个子问题，涵盖数学、物理、化学、生物学和材料科学等16个不同的自然科学子领域。它提供了可选的科学背景信息以及科学家标注的黄金标准解决方案和测试用例。在最真实的设置下，目前最先进的模型Claude3.5-Sonnet只能解决4.6%的问题，表明该基准具有挑战性，并为未来科学AI的发展提供了方向。
org: Argonne National Laboratory, Carnegie Mellon University, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Prin
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: SciCode is a coding benchmark curated by scientists to evaluate language models' ability to solve real scientific research problems. It consists of 338 subproblems derived from 80 main problems, covering 16 natural science subfields including mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and materials science. The benchmark provides optional scientific background information along with scientist-annotated gold standard solutions and test cases. Under the most realistic settings, the state-of-the-art model Claude3.5-Sonnet can only solve 4.6% of the problems, highlighting the benchmark's challenge and guiding future development in scientific AI.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scientists select research-level coding problems from their workflow across 16 natural science subfields"] --> B["Decompose each main problem into multiple subproblems with detailed docstrings for inputs and outputs"]
    B["Decompose each main problem into multiple subproblems with detailed docstrings for inputs and outputs"] --> C["Scientists annotate gold-standard solutions and multiple test cases for all problems and subproblems"]
    C["Scientists annotate gold-standard solutions and multiple test cases for all problems and subproblems"] --> D["At least two senior researchers verify and revise each problem through three rounds"]
    D["At least two senior researchers verify and revise each problem through three rounds"] --> E["Reserve 15 main problems as development split and 65 as test split"]
    E["Reserve 15 main problems as development split and 65 as test split"] --> F["Provide optional scientific background descriptions written by scientist annotators when necessary"]
    F["Provide optional scientific background descriptions written by scientist annotators when necessary"] --> G["Evaluate generated code using numerical and domain-specific test cases with automatic grading"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["科学家从16个子领域的工作流程中选择研究级编码问题"] --> B["将每个主问题分解为多个子问题并编写详细文档字符串"]
    B["将每个主问题分解为多个子问题并编写详细文档字符串"] --> C["科学家为所有问题和子问题标注黄金标准解决方案和测试用例"]
    C["科学家为所有问题和子问题标注黄金标准解决方案和测试用例"] --> D["至少两名资深研究人员通过三轮验证和修订每个问题"]
    D["至少两名资深研究人员通过三轮验证和修订每个问题"] --> E["保留15个主问题作为开发集，65个作为测试集"]
    E["保留15个主问题作为开发集，65个作为测试集"] --> F["必要时提供科学家标注的可选科学背景描述"]
    F["必要时提供科学家标注的可选科学背景描述"] --> G["使用数值和领域特定测试用例自动评分生成的代码"]

name: Scientists' First Exam
intro: Scientists' First Exam (SFE)基准旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的科学认知能力。它通过科学信号感知、科学属性理解和科学比较推理三个相互关联的层面进行评估。SFE包含830个经过专家验证的VQA对，涵盖五大学科的66个多模态任务，旨在弥补现有科学基准在感知和推理能力评估方面的不足。
build_method: 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 多模态, 科学推理
intro_en: The Scientists' First Exam (SFE) benchmark aims to evaluate the scientific cognition abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It assesses three interconnected aspects: scientific signal perception, scientific attribute understanding, and scientific comparative reasoning. SFE includes 830 expert-verified VQA pairs covering 66 multimodal tasks across five major disciplines, designed to address the shortcomings of existing scientific benchmarks in evaluating perception and reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Identify five core disciplines and define scientific directions with domain experts"] --> B["Map each scientific direction to cognitive level and question type to formulate 66 tasks"]
    B["Map each scientific direction to cognitive level and question type to formulate 66 tasks"] --> C["Experts propose tasks satisfying domain knowledge and multimodal integration criteria"]
    C["Experts propose tasks satisfying domain knowledge and multimodal integration criteria"] --> D["Collect native disciplinary raw data formats from experts across scientific directions"]
    D["Collect native disciplinary raw data formats from experts across scientific directions"] --> E["Render and visualize scientific raw data into images and structured formats"]
    E["Render and visualize scientific raw data into images and structured formats"] --> F["Experts author and annotate 830 bilingual VQA pairs with answers"]
    F["Experts author and annotate 830 bilingual VQA pairs with answers"] --> G["Evaluate MLLMs using zero-shot prompts with temperature 0 and 1024 max tokens"]
    G["Evaluate MLLMs using zero-shot prompts with temperature 0 and 1024 max tokens"] --> H["Report BERTScore F1 and GPT-4o LLM-as-a-Judge scores for task correctness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["识别五大核心学科并与领域专家定义科学方向"] --> B["将每个科学方向映射到认知层级和问题类型以制定66个任务"]
    B["将每个科学方向映射到认知层级和问题类型以制定66个任务"] --> C["专家提出满足领域知识和多模态整合标准的任务"]
    C["专家提出满足领域知识和多模态整合标准的任务"] --> D["从各科学方向的专家处收集原生学科原始数据格式"]
    D["从各科学方向的专家处收集原生学科原始数据格式"] --> E["将科学原始数据渲染和可视化为图像和结构化格式"]
    E["将科学原始数据渲染和可视化为图像和结构化格式"] --> F["专家编写并标注830个双语VQA对及答案"]
    F["专家编写并标注830个双语VQA对及答案"] --> G["使用零样本提示、温度0和最大1024令牌评估多模态大模型"]
    G["使用零样本提示、温度0和最大1024令牌评估多模态大模型"] --> H["报告BERTScore F1和GPT-4o评判分数以衡量任务正确性"]

name: ScreenSpot
intro: ScreenSpot-Pro是一个新的基准测试，旨在严格评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在专业高分辨率环境中的GUI（图形用户界面）接地能力。该基准包含来自多个专业领域的真实高分辨率图像，并附有专家标注。它涵盖了五大行业和三个操作系统中的23个应用程序。现有GUI接地模型在该数据集上的表现不佳，最佳模型仅达到18.9%。
eval_feature_en: High resolution, Small targets, Complex environment
intro_en: ScreenSpot-Pro is a new benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the GUI grounding capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in professional high-resolution environments. It includes real high-resolution images from multiple specialized fields, annotated by experts. The benchmark covers 23 applications across five major industries and three operating systems. Existing GUI grounding models perform poorly on this dataset, with the best model achieving only 18.9%.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect over 600 interface screenshots from mobile, desktop, and web platforms"] --> B["Annotate 1200+ instructions paired with corresponding actionable elements on screenshots"]
    B["Annotate 1200+ instructions paired with corresponding actionable elements on screenshots"] --> C["Label both text elements and icon/widget elements for each GUI screenshot"]
    C["Label both text elements and icon/widget elements for each GUI screenshot"] --> D["Organize benchmark into mobile, desktop, and web subsets with text and icon categories"]
    D["Organize benchmark into mobile, desktop, and web subsets with text and icon categories"] --> E["Evaluate models by measuring their ability to locate elements given instructions and screenshots"]
    E["Evaluate models by measuring their ability to locate elements given instructions and screenshots"] --> F["Report accuracy separately for text and icon/widget elements across each platform"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从移动端、桌面端和网页端收集超过600张界面截图"] --> B["标注1200多条指令并配对对应的可操作元素"]
    B["标注1200多条指令并配对对应的可操作元素"] --> C["为每张GUI截图标注文本元素和图标/组件元素"]
    C["为每张GUI截图标注文本元素和图标/组件元素"] --> D["将基准按移动端、桌面端和网页端划分并分类文本和图标"]
    D["将基准按移动端、桌面端和网页端划分并分类文本和图标"] --> E["通过测量模型根据指令和截图定位元素的能力来评估"]
    E["通过测量模型根据指令和截图定位元素的能力来评估"] --> F["分别报告各平台上文本和图标/组件元素的准确率"]

name: SealQA
intro: SealQA是一个新的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估搜索增强型语言模型在事实查询问题上的推理能力。该基准测试的特点是网络搜索结果可能存在冲突、噪音或无用信息。它包含Seal-0、Seal-Hard和LongSeal三种类型，分别侧重于事实准确性、推理能力以及长上下文、多文档推理。
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: SealQA is a new challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning ability of search-augmented language models on factual query tasks. It features web search results that may contain conflicts, noise, or irrelevant information. The benchmark includes three types: Seal-0, Seal-Hard, and LongSeal, focusing respectively on factual accuracy, reasoning ability, and long-context, multi-document reasoning.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Recruit NLP researchers as annotators and show diverse question exemplars"] --> B["Annotators write questions with single answers, webpage support, triggering ambiguous search results"]
    B["Annotators write questions with single answers, webpage support, triggering ambiguous search results"] --> C["Conduct multi-round review by graduate-level reviewers followed by expert approval"]
    C["Conduct multi-round review by graduate-level reviewers followed by expert approval"] --> D["Verify supporting URLs, answer correctness, and question clarity across cleaning rounds"]
    D["Verify supporting URLs, answer correctness, and question clarity across cleaning rounds"] --> E["Test questions against frontier models with and without browsing over 10-15 attempts"]
    E["Test questions against frontier models with and without browsing over 10-15 attempts"] --> F["Retain only questions all models failed to form Seal-0; combine with difficult rejects for Seal-Hard"]
    F["Retain only questions all models failed to form Seal-0; combine with difficult rejects for Seal-Hard"] --> G["Pair each Seal-Hard question with one gold document and up to 50 filtered hard negatives"]
    G["Pair each Seal-Hard question with one gold document and up to 50 filtered hard negatives"] --> H["Evaluate model responses using GPT-4o mini auto-rater checking factual correctness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["招募NLP研究员作为标注者并展示多样化问题范例"] --> B["标注者撰写单一答案问题并提供网页支持，触发模糊搜索结果"]
    B["标注者撰写单一答案问题并提供网页支持，触发模糊搜索结果"] --> C["进行多轮审查，先由研究生级审稿人后由专家批准"]
    C["进行多轮审查，先由研究生级审稿人后由专家批准"] --> D["验证支持URL、答案正确性和问题清晰度"]
    D["验证支持URL、答案正确性和问题清晰度"] --> E["用前沿模型测试问题，含或不含浏览，进行10-15次尝试"]
    E["用前沿模型测试问题，含或不含浏览，进行10-15次尝试"] --> F["仅保留所有模型失败的问题形成Seal-0，与难题组成Seal-Hard"]
    F["仅保留所有模型失败的问题形成Seal-0，与难题组成Seal-Hard"] --> G["为每个Seal-Hard问题配对一个金标准文档和至多50个过滤的难负例"]
    G["为每个Seal-Hard问题配对一个金标准文档和至多50个过滤的难负例"] --> H["使用GPT-4o mini自动评分器检查事实正确性评估模型回答"]

name: Sequential-NIAH
intro: Sequential-NIAH是一个专门用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）从长上下文中提取有序信息项（即“针”）能力的基准测试。该基准测试包含三种“针”的生成方式，上下文长度从8K到128K不等，共计14000个样本。为了评估模型表现，研究者训练了一个评估模型，通过比较答案的完整性和顺序一致性来打分，提供了比GPT-4或Claude更可靠的评估指标。
org: Zhejiang University, Ant Group, Tencent Youtu Lab, Beihang University, Cornell University
eval_feature: 长文本, 防污染
intro_en: Sequential-NIAH is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) ability to extract ordered information items ("needles") from long contexts. It includes three types of "needle" generation methods, with context lengths ranging from 8K to 128K tokens, totaling 14,000 samples. To assess model performance, researchers trained an evaluation model that scores based on answer completeness and order consistency, providing a more reliable metric than GPT-4 or Claude.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Generate synthetic-temporal needles using templates combining fake subjects, timestamps, and events"] --> B["Extract real-temporal needles from TKG datasets and rewrite into QA pairs via GPT-4o"]
    B["Extract real-temporal needles from TKG datasets and rewrite into QA pairs via GPT-4o"] --> C["Generate real-logical needles from procedural or guideline documents with sequential steps"]
    C["Generate real-logical needles from procedural or guideline documents with sequential steps"] --> D["Extract long contexts from LongData-Corpus with lengths ranging from 8K to 128K tokens"]
    D["Extract long contexts from LongData-Corpus with lengths ranging from 8K to 128K tokens"] --> E["Shuffle needles and insert them into long contexts at random positions"]
    E["Shuffle needles and insert them into long contexts at random positions"] --> F["Construct 14,000 samples with balanced Chinese and English proportions across context lengths"]
    F["Construct 14,000 samples with balanced Chinese and English proportions across context lengths"] --> G["Train evaluation model on Qwen2.5-Instruct-32B to score completeness and sequential consistency"]
    G["Train evaluation model on Qwen2.5-Instruct-32B to score completeness and sequential consistency"] --> H["Evaluate LLM responses against ground truth using the trained evaluation model"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用模板组合虚构主体、时间戳和事件生成合成时序针"] --> B["从时序知识图谱提取真实时序针并用GPT-4o改写为问答对"]
    B["从时序知识图谱提取真实时序针并用GPT-4o改写为问答对"] --> C["从程序性或指南文档生成具有顺序步骤的真实逻辑针"]
    C["从程序性或指南文档生成具有顺序步骤的真实逻辑针"] --> D["从LongData语料库提取8K到128K长度的长文本"]
    D["从LongData语料库提取8K到128K长度的长文本"] --> E["打乱针的顺序并随机插入长文本中"]
    E["打乱针的顺序并随机插入长文本中"] --> F["构建14000个样本并在各长度段平衡中英文比例"]
    F["构建14000个样本并在各长度段平衡中英文比例"] --> G["基于Qwen2.5-Instruct-32B训练评估模型评分完整性和顺序一致性"]
    G["基于Qwen2.5-Instruct-32B训练评估模型评分完整性和顺序一致性"] --> H["用训练的评估模型对比标准答案评估大模型响应"]

name: SHADE-Arena
intro: SHADE-Arena是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）代理在复杂和长期任务中执行隐蔽破坏和监控能力的基准测试。它包含复杂的良性主任务和有害的次要目标对，代理需要在不引起LLM监控器怀疑的情况下完成次要任务。该基准测试旨在衡量LLM代理规避监控和实现有害隐藏目标的能力，并评估监控模型检测此类行为的能力。
intro_en: SHADE-Arena is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language model (LLM) agents' ability to perform covert sabotage and surveillance in complex, long-term tasks. It includes intricate benign primary tasks paired with harmful secondary objectives, where agents must complete the secondary tasks without raising suspicion from LLM monitors. The benchmark aims to measure LLM agents' capability to evade monitoring and achieve harmful hidden goals, as well as to assess monitoring models' effectiveness in detecting such behaviors.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Expand AgentDojo environments with over 340 unique tools and synthetic data exceeding 100,000 tokens"] --> B["Manually engineer 17 task pairs with benign main tasks and malicious side tasks in complex environments"]
    B["Manually engineer 17 task pairs with benign main tasks and malicious side tasks in complex environments"] --> C["Validate side task harm by confirming monitor assigns high suspicion scores when side task is noticed"]
    C["Validate side task harm by confirming monitor assigns high suspicion scores when side task is noticed"] --> D["Create reference solutions demonstrating side tasks achievable without detection by Claude 3.6 Sonnet monitor"]
    D["Create reference solutions demonstrating side tasks achievable without detection by Claude 3.6 Sonnet monitor"] --> E["Review tens of transcripts to verify models understand tasks and attempts are balanced and genuine"]
    E["Review tens of transcripts to verify models understand tasks and attempts are balanced and genuine"] --> F["Run agent with main and side tasks through tool call loop, stripping scratchpad from transcript"]
    F["Run agent with main and side tasks through tool call loop, stripping scratchpad from transcript"] --> G["Pass edited transcript to monitor LLM to rate suspiciousness on 0-100 scale, threshold at 80"]
    G["Pass edited transcript to monitor LLM to rate suspiciousness on 0-100 scale, threshold at 80"] --> H["Evaluate sabotage success using automatic evaluators for main task, side task, and evasion under threshold"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["扩展AgentDojo环境至340余工具和超10万token合成数据"] --> B["手工设计17个任务对，含良性主任务和恶意次要任务"]
    B["手工设计17个任务对，含良性主任务和恶意次要任务"] --> C["验证次要任务危害性，确认监控器发现时给出高怀疑分数"]
    C["验证次要任务危害性，确认监控器发现时给出高怀疑分数"] --> D["创建参考解决方案，证明可躲避Claude 3.6 Sonnet监控"]
    D["创建参考解决方案，证明可躲避Claude 3.6 Sonnet监控"] --> E["审查数十条记录，验证模型理解任务且尝试真实平衡"]
    E["审查数十条记录，验证模型理解任务且尝试真实平衡"] --> F["运行代理执行任务循环，从记录中移除草稿本内容"]
    F["运行代理执行任务循环，从记录中移除草稿本内容"] --> G["将编辑记录送监控模型评分0-100，阈值设为80"]
    G["将编辑记录送监控模型评分0-100，阈值设为80"] --> H["用自动评估器评估主任务、次要任务和低于阈值的规避成功率"]

name: SimpleQA
intro: SimpleQA是一个由OpenAI开发的事实性问答基准，旨在评估大型语言模型回答简短、事实明确问题的能力。该基准通过对抗性方式收集，针对GPT-4的回答进行设计，确保问题具有单一且无争议的答案，从而简化评分。SimpleQA旨在测试模型是否能识别其知识边界，避免对不确定的问题做出猜测性回答。
task_type: 开放式问答, 事实验证
eval_feature: 对抗性
intro_en: SimpleQA is a factual question-answering benchmark developed by OpenAI to evaluate large language models' ability to answer short, fact-based questions. Collected adversarially and designed against GPT-4's responses, it ensures questions have a single, unambiguous answer to simplify scoring. SimpleQA aims to test whether models can recognize their knowledge boundaries and avoid guessing on uncertain questions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["AI trainers write questions with single answers, timeless scope, and evidence links"] --> B["Trainers review four OpenAI model responses; retain only questions with at least one incorrect response"]
    B["Trainers review four OpenAI model responses; retain only questions with at least one incorrect response"] --> C["ChatGPT classifiers detect criteria violations and questions are revised by trainers"]
    C["ChatGPT classifiers detect criteria violations and questions are revised by trainers"] --> D["Independent second trainer answers each question without accessing the original answer"]
    D["Independent second trainer answers each question without accessing the original answer"] --> E["Keep only questions where both trainers' answers match per ChatGPT grader agreement"]
    E["Keep only questions where both trainers' answers match per ChatGPT grader agreement"] --> F["Filter questions requiring two unique source domains across trainers' evidence links"]
    F["Filter questions requiring two unique source domains across trainers' evidence links"] --> G["Third trainer validates 1,000 random examples to verify reference answer correctness"]
    G["Third trainer validates 1,000 random examples to verify reference answer correctness"] --> H["Prompted ChatGPT grades model responses as correct, incorrect, or not attempted; compute F-score"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["AI训练师编写具有单一答案、时效性和证据链接的问题"] --> B["训练师审查四个模型响应，仅保留至少一个错误的问题"]
    B["训练师审查四个模型响应，仅保留至少一个错误的问题"] --> C["ChatGPT分类器检测标准违规，训练师修订问题"]
    C["ChatGPT分类器检测标准违规，训练师修订问题"] --> D["独立的第二训练师在不查看原答案的情况下回答问题"]
    D["独立的第二训练师在不查看原答案的情况下回答问题"] --> E["仅保留两位训练师答案经ChatGPT判定一致的问题"]
    E["仅保留两位训练师答案经ChatGPT判定一致的问题"] --> F["筛选需要两个不同来源域名的问题"]
    F["筛选需要两个不同来源域名的问题"] --> G["第三训练师验证1000个随机样本以确认参考答案正确性"]
    G["第三训练师验证1000个随机样本以确认参考答案正确性"] --> H["提示ChatGPT将模型响应分为正确、错误或未尝试并计算F分数"]

name: SimpleVQA
intro: SimpleVQA是首个全面的多模态基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）回答自然语言简短问题的真实性能力。它涵盖多任务和多场景，确保高质量和具有挑战性的查询，并维护静态和永恒的参考答案。该基准将视觉问答项目分为9个围绕客观事件或常识的不同任务，并置于9个主题中。通过严格的质量控制和LLM作为评判的评分系统，SimpleVQA对MLLMs的图像理解和文本生成能力进行全面评估。
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
intro_en: SimpleVQA is the first comprehensive multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate the factual accuracy of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in answering natural language short questions. It covers multiple tasks and scenarios, ensuring high-quality and challenging queries while maintaining static and permanent reference answers. The benchmark divides visual question answering into 9 tasks focused on objective events or common sense, organized into 9 themes. Through strict quality control and an LLM-based scoring system, SimpleVQA provides a thorough assessment of MLLMs' image understanding and text generation capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Categorize VQA items into 9 tasks around objective events or common knowledge"] --> B["Situate categorized items within 9 domain topics"]
    B["Situate categorized items within 9 domain topics"] --> C["Collect 2,025 high-quality question-answer pairs across tasks and topics"]
    C["Collect 2,025 high-quality question-answer pairs across tasks and topics"] --> D["Apply human annotation with rigorous quality control for concise, clear answers"]
    D["Apply human annotation with rigorous quality control for concise, clear answers"] --> E["Ensure reference answers are static and timeless"]
    E["Ensure reference answers are static and timeless"] --> F["Evaluate 18 MLLMs and 8 text-only LLMs using the benchmark"]
    F["Evaluate 18 MLLMs and 8 text-only LLMs using the benchmark"] --> G["Score model responses using LLM-as-a-judge system with minimal variance"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将视觉问答项目分为9个任务类别"] --> B["将分类项目置于9个主题领域中"]
    B["将分类项目置于9个主题领域中"] --> C["收集2025个高质量问答对"]
    C["收集2025个高质量问答对"] --> D["人工标注并严格质量控制答案"]
    D["人工标注并严格质量控制答案"] --> E["确保参考答案静态且永恒"]
    E["确保参考答案静态且永恒"] --> F["评估18个多模态模型和8个文本模型"]
    F["评估18个多模态模型和8个文本模型"] --> G["用LLM评判系统为模型响应评分"]

name: SoMe
intro: SoMe是一个开创性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在社交媒体场景中的能力。该基准包含8个社交媒体代理任务，超过900万条帖子和17,869条精细标注的任务查询，提供了一个多样化且真实的平台。SoMe旨在全面评估社交媒体代理在理解媒体内容、用户行为和做出复杂决策方面的能力。研究表明，无论是闭源还是开源的LLM在处理这些任务时都存在局限性，因此SoMe为未来的社交媒体代理提供了一个富有挑战性的测试平台。
org: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注, 混合
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: SoMe is a pioneering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) capabilities in social media scenarios. It includes 8 social media agent tasks, over 9 million posts, and 17,869 finely annotated task queries, offering a diverse and realistic platform. SoMe aims to comprehensively assess social media agents' abilities in understanding media content, user behavior, and making complex decisions. Studies show that both closed-source and open-source LLMs have limitations in handling these tasks, making SoMe a challenging testbed for future social media agents.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect posts, user profiles, and reports from 32 social media platforms and external websites"] --> B["Convert images to captions and OCR texts using Qwen2.5-VL-72B, videos to ASR texts using GPT-4o"]
    B["Convert images to captions and OCR texts using Qwen2.5-VL-72B, videos to ASR texts using GPT-4o"] --> C["Apply semi-automated annotation pipeline to create task queries for 8 social media agent tasks"]
    C["Apply semi-automated annotation pipeline to create task queries for 8 social media agent tasks"] --> D["Build agent platform with 8 tools for data acquisition, management, and analysis of social media"]
    D["Build agent platform with 8 tools for data acquisition, management, and analysis of social media"] --> E["Agent interacts with tools through multi-round calls to process queries and generate answers"]
    E["Agent interacts with tools through multi-round calls to process queries and generate answers"] --> F["Evaluate agent answers using LLM scorer with ground truth annotations as reference"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从32个社交媒体平台和外部网站收集帖子、用户资料和报告"] --> B["用Qwen2.5-VL-72B将图像转为描述和OCR文本，用GPT-4o将视频转为ASR文本"]
    B["用Qwen2.5-VL-72B将图像转为描述和OCR文本，用GPT-4o将视频转为ASR文本"] --> C["应用半自动标注流程为8个社交媒体代理任务创建任务查询"]
    C["应用半自动标注流程为8个社交媒体代理任务创建任务查询"] --> D["构建配备8个工具的代理平台用于社交媒体数据获取、管理和分析"]
    D["构建配备8个工具的代理平台用于社交媒体数据获取、管理和分析"] --> E["代理通过多轮工具调用处理查询并生成答案"]
    E["代理通过多轮工具调用处理查询并生成答案"] --> F["使用LLM评分器参照真实标注评估代理答案"]

name: Spider 2.0
intro: Spider 2.0 是一个包含632个真实企业级数据库文本转SQL工作流问题的评测框架。数据库来自实际应用，常含1000多列，存储于本地或云端如BigQuery和Snowflake。挑战要求模型处理复杂SQL环境、长上下文、多条SQL语句及复杂推理，远超传统文本转SQL任务。
org: xlang.ai, The University of Hong Kong, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory,
build_method: 专家构建, 混合
eval_feature: 长文本, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: Spider 2.0 is a benchmark consisting of 632 real-world enterprise-level database text-to-SQL workflow problems. The databases originate from practical applications, often containing over 1,000 columns, stored locally or in the cloud such as BigQuery and Snowflake. The challenge requires models to handle complex SQL environments, long contexts, multiple SQL statements, and intricate reasoning, far exceeding traditional text-to-SQL tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source databases from real enterprise applications with over 1,000 columns each"] --> B["Deploy databases to local and cloud systems including BigQuery and Snowflake"]
    B["Deploy databases to local and cloud systems including BigQuery and Snowflake"] --> C["Curate SQL dialects from technical tutorials, community forums, and open-source projects"]
    C["Curate SQL dialects from technical tutorials, community forums, and open-source projects"] --> D["Construct 632 workflow tasks requiring database metadata, dialect docs, and project codebases"]
    D["Construct 632 workflow tasks requiring database metadata, dialect docs, and project codebases"] --> E["Write ground-truth SQL queries averaging 144 tokens with advanced dialect-specific functions"]
    E["Write ground-truth SQL queries averaging 144 tokens with advanced dialect-specific functions"] --> F["Package tasks with database interface, documents, and codebase to simulate real scenarios"]
    F["Package tasks with database interface, documents, and codebase to simulate real scenarios"] --> G["Evaluate language models using code agent framework with execution feedback validation"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从真实企业应用获取超过1000列的数据库"] --> B["将数据库部署到本地及BigQuery和Snowflake云端"]
    B["将数据库部署到本地及BigQuery和Snowflake云端"] --> C["从技术教程、社区论坛和开源项目整理SQL方言"]
    C["从技术教程、社区论坛和开源项目整理SQL方言"] --> D["构建632个需要元数据、方言文档和代码库的工作流任务"]
    D["构建632个需要元数据、方言文档和代码库的工作流任务"] --> E["编写平均144词元含高级方言函数的标准SQL查询"]
    E["编写平均144词元含高级方言函数的标准SQL查询"] --> F["打包任务含数据库接口、文档和代码库模拟真实场景"]
    F["打包任务含数据库接口、文档和代码库模拟真实场景"] --> G["用代码智能体框架和执行反馈验证评估语言模型"]

name: SpreadsheetBench
intro: SpreadsheetBench是一个具有挑战性的电子表格操作基准，完全来源于真实世界的场景，旨在让当前的大型语言模型（LLMs）沉浸在电子表格用户的实际工作流程中。与依赖合成查询和简化电子表格文件的现有基准不同，SpreadsheetBench由从在线Excel论坛收集的912个真实问题构建而成，这些问题反映了用户错综复杂的需求。相关的电子表格包含多种表格数据，如多表、非标准关系表和丰富的非文本元素。此外，我们提出了一种更可靠的评估指标，类似于在线评测平台，为每个指令创建多个电子表格文件作为测试用例，确保评估能够处理不同值的电子表格的鲁棒解决方案。我们对各种LLMs在单轮和多轮推理设置下的综合评估揭示了最先进（SOTA）模型与人类表现之间存在巨大差距，突显了基准的难度。
org: Renmin University of China, Tsinghua University
eval_feature: 真实世界场景, 鲁棒性评估
intro_en: SpreadsheetBench is a challenging spreadsheet operation benchmark entirely derived from real-world scenarios, designed to immerse current large language models (LLMs) in the actual workflows of spreadsheet users. Unlike existing benchmarks that rely on synthetic queries and simplified spreadsheet files, SpreadsheetBench is built from 912 real questions collected from online Excel forums, reflecting users' complex needs. The associated spreadsheets contain diverse tabular data, including multi-sheet, non-standard relational tables, and rich non-text elements. Additionally, we propose a more reliable evaluation metric, similar to online testing platforms, by creating multiple spreadsheet files as test cases for each instruction to ensure the assessment can handle robust solutions across spreadsheets with varying values. Our comprehensive evaluation of various LLMs under single-turn and multi-turn reasoning settings reveals a significant gap between state-of-the-art (SOTA) models and human performance, highlighting the benchmark’s difficulty.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Search Excel forums and blogs using Google, Feedspot, and Deskbright to identify data sources."] --> B["Collect posts from ExcelForum, Chandoo, MrExcel, and ExcelGuru under relevant categories."]
    B["Collect posts from ExcelForum, Chandoo, MrExcel, and ExcelGuru under relevant categories."] --> C["Filter questions by solved status, manipulation relevance, feasibility, and representativeness using keywords and GPT-4."]
    C["Filter questions by solved status, manipulation relevance, feasibility, and representativeness using keywords and GPT-4."] --> D["Format instructions by extracting user demands, issues, attempts, and output examples from posts."]
    D["Format instructions by extracting user demands, issues, attempts, and output examples from posts."] --> E["Construct multiple test case spreadsheets per instruction using perturbation techniques to vary cell values."]
    E["Construct multiple test case spreadsheets per instruction using perturbation techniques to vary cell values."] --> F["Apply perturbation techniques to prevent data leakage from training corpora."]
    F["Apply perturbation techniques to prevent data leakage from training corpora."] --> G["Evaluate LLM-generated solutions using OJ-style metric by running code on all test cases."]
    G["Evaluate LLM-generated solutions using OJ-style metric by running code on all test cases."] --> H["Calculate soft and hard scores by comparing predicted answers to ground truth across test cases."]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["通过谷歌、Feedspot和Deskbright搜索Excel论坛和博客以确定数据源。"] --> B["从四个论坛的相关类别中收集帖子。"]
    B["从四个论坛的相关类别中收集帖子。"] --> C["用关键词和GPT-4按已解决、相关性、可行性和代表性筛选问题。"]
    C["用关键词和GPT-4按已解决、相关性、可行性和代表性筛选问题。"] --> D["从帖子中提取需求、问题、尝试和输出示例以格式化指令。"]
    D["从帖子中提取需求、问题、尝试和输出示例以格式化指令。"] --> E["用扰动技术为每条指令构建多个测试用例电子表格以改变单元格值。"]
    E["用扰动技术为每条指令构建多个测试用例电子表格以改变单元格值。"] --> F["应用扰动技术防止训练语料库的数据泄漏。"]
    F["应用扰动技术防止训练语料库的数据泄漏。"] --> G["用OJ式指标在所有测试用例上运行代码以评估LLM生成的解决方案。"]
    G["用OJ式指标在所有测试用例上运行代码以评估LLM生成的解决方案。"] --> H["通过比较预测答案与真实答案计算软分数和硬分数。"]

name: StableToolBench
intro: StableToolBench是一个旨在解决工具学习基准不稳定问题的项目。它通过引入虚拟API服务器和稳定的评估系统，在ToolBench的基础上进行了改进。虚拟API服务器结合了缓存系统和API模拟器，以减轻API状态变化带来的影响；而稳定的评估系统则利用GPT-4作为自动评估器，设计了可解的通过率和获胜率，以消除评估过程中的随机性。
eval_feature: 虚拟API服务器, 稳定评估系统
eval_feature_en: Virtual API server, Stability evaluation system
