intro_en: StableToolBench is a project aimed at addressing the instability issues in tool learning benchmarks. It improves upon ToolBench by introducing a virtual API server and a stable evaluation system. The virtual API server combines a caching system and an API simulator to mitigate the impact of API state changes, while the stable evaluation system uses GPT-4 as an automatic evaluator and designs solvable pass rates and win rates to eliminate randomness in the evaluation process.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect API call history from ToolBench training and test data"] --> B["Filter valid API records and build caching system with category, tool, API name, and arguments"]
    B["Filter valid API records and build caching system with category, tool, API name, and arguments"] --> C["Deploy LLM-based API simulator to generate responses for uncached API calls"]
    C["Deploy LLM-based API simulator to generate responses for uncached API calls"] --> D["Integrate cache and simulator into virtual API server with combined calling rules"]
    D["Integrate cache and simulator into virtual API server with combined calling rules"] --> E["Design solvable pass rate metric using GPT-4 to determine task solvability and answer correctness"]
    E["Design solvable pass rate metric using GPT-4 to determine task solvability and answer correctness"] --> F["Design win rate metric by comparing paired candidates with GPT-4 automatic evaluation"]
    F["Design win rate metric by comparing paired candidates with GPT-4 automatic evaluation"] --> G["Evaluate models on I1-Instruction group using stable evaluation system to eliminate randomness"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从ToolBench训练和测试数据收集API调用历史"] --> B["过滤有效API记录并构建缓存系统"]
    B["过滤有效API记录并构建缓存系统"] --> C["部署基于LLM的API模拟器生成未缓存响应"]
    C["部署基于LLM的API模拟器生成未缓存响应"] --> D["将缓存和模拟器集成为虚拟API服务器"]
    D["将缓存和模拟器集成为虚拟API服务器"] --> E["使用GPT-4设计可解通过率指标"]
    E["使用GPT-4设计可解通过率指标"] --> F["通过GPT-4对比候选项设计获胜率指标"]
    F["通过GPT-4对比候选项设计获胜率指标"] --> G["在I1指令组上用稳定评估系统评估模型"]

name: Step-Audio-Edit
intro: Step-Audio-Edit-Benchmark 是一个用于可控语音合成的综合评测框架，专注于情感、说话风格和副语言等细粒度属性。该基准随 Step-Audio-EditX 模型一同发布，后者是一个基于大语言模型的音频编辑模型。此评测框架的提出旨在解决现有评测方法在全面性上的不足。
build_method: LLM生成, 混合
intro_en: Step-Audio-Edit-Benchmark is a comprehensive evaluation framework for controllable speech synthesis, focusing on fine-grained attributes such as emotion, speaking style, and paralinguistics. The benchmark is released alongside the Step-Audio-EditX model, an audio editing model based on large language models. This evaluation framework aims to address the limitations of existing methods in terms of comprehensiveness.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Voice actors record 10-second clips for each emotion and speaking style combination"] --> B["Perform zero-shot cloning to create triplets with neutral and expressive audio pairs"]
    B["Perform zero-shot cloning to create triplets with neutral and expressive audio pairs"] --> C["Curate professionally annotated zero-shot TTS dataset covering 60,000 speakers in Chinese and English"]
    C["Curate professionally annotated zero-shot TTS dataset covering 60,000 speakers in Chinese and English"] --> D["Organize SFT data into zero-shot TTS, emotion editing, style editing, and paralinguistic categories"]
    D["Organize SFT data into zero-shot TTS, emotion editing, style editing, and paralinguistic categories"] --> E["Collect real-world prompts and generate 20 candidate responses per prompt using SFT model"]
    E["Collect real-world prompts and generate 20 candidate responses per prompt using SFT model"] --> F["Construct preference datasets via human annotation and LLM-as-a-Judge methods"]
    F["Construct preference datasets via human annotation and LLM-as-a-Judge methods"] --> G["Evaluate against MiniMax-2.6-hd and Doubao-Seed-TTS-2.0 on emotion editing and fine-grained control tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["配音演员为每种情感和风格组合录制10秒音频"] --> B["执行零样本克隆生成中性和表现性音频三元组"]
    B["执行零样本克隆生成中性和表现性音频三元组"] --> C["整理专业标注的零样本TTS数据集涵盖6万说话人"]
    C["整理专业标注的零样本TTS数据集涵盖6万说话人"] --> D["将SFT数据分为零样本TTS、情感编辑、风格编辑和副语言类别"]
    D["将SFT数据分为零样本TTS、情感编辑、风格编辑和副语言类别"] --> E["收集真实提示并用SFT模型为每个提示生成20个候选"]
    E["收集真实提示并用SFT模型为每个提示生成20个候选"] --> F["通过人工标注和LLM评判法构建偏好数据集"]
    F["通过人工标注和LLM评判法构建偏好数据集"] --> G["在情感编辑和细粒度控制任务上对比评估两个基线"]

name: StrongReject
intro: StrongREJECT是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）越狱攻击的基准。它旨在解决现有越狱研究中普遍存在的夸大攻击效果的问题，提供了一个包含特定、有害信息请求的标准化提示数据集。其核心是一个自动评估器，能够衡量模型响应中提供有害信息的程度，并与人类判断达到很高的吻合度，从而提供更准确、更稳健的越狱有效性评估。
org: Center for Human-Compatible AI, UC Berkeley
build_method: 人工构建, LLM生成
eval_feature: 对抗性, Jailbreak
intro_en: StrongREJECT is a benchmark for evaluating jailbreak attacks on large language models (LLMs). It aims to address the common issue of exaggerated attack effectiveness in existing jailbreak research by providing a standardized prompt dataset containing specific harmful information requests. At its core is an automatic evaluator that measures the extent of harmful information in model responses and achieves high alignment with human judgments, offering a more accurate and robust assessment of jailbreak effectiveness.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Cross-reference five provider usage policies to define six forbidden harm categories"] --> B["Write manual prompts, generate with GPT-4 and pplx-70b-online, curate from existing benchmarks"]
    B["Write manual prompts, generate with GPT-4 and pplx-70b-online, curate from existing benchmarks"] --> C["Verify prompts are distinct, refused by models, detailed, answerable within one hour"]
    C["Verify prompts are distinct, refused by models, detailed, answerable within one hour"] --> D["Finalize 313 forbidden prompts with at least 50 per category"]
    D["Finalize 313 forbidden prompts with at least 50 per category"] --> E["Create rubric-based evaluator scoring refusal, specificity, and convincingness via GPT-4o-mini"]

name: SUPERChem
intro: SUPERChem是一个具有挑战性的、由专家策划的多模态基准测试，旨在严格评估大型语言模型（LLMs）和多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）的化学推理能力。它包含500个专家策划的推理密集型化学问题，涵盖不同子领域，并以多模态和纯文本格式提供。该基准测试引入了推理路径保真度（RPF）评分，以评估模型推理的质量，超越了最终答案的准确性。
build_method: 专家构建, 混合
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估, 防污染
intro_en: SUPERChem is a challenging, expert-curated multimodal benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the chemical reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs) and multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 500 expert-curated, reasoning-intensive chemistry questions covering various subfields, presented in both multimodal and pure text formats. The benchmark introduces a Reasoning Path Fidelity (RPF) score to assess the quality of model reasoning beyond final answer accuracy.

    D["Expert authors write step-by-step solution paths for each problem as gold-standard reasoning checkpoints"] --> E["Establish human baseline by evaluating performance of human participants on the benchmark problems"]
    E["Establish human baseline by evaluating performance of human participants on the benchmark problems"] --> F["Evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs and MLLMs on both multimodal and text-only problem versions"]
    F["Evaluate state-of-the-art LLMs and MLLMs on both multimodal and text-only problem versions"] --> G["Apply Reasoning Path Fidelity scoring to measure alignment between model reasoning and expert solutions"]
    G["Apply Reasoning Path Fidelity scoring to measure alignment between model reasoning and expert solutions"] --> H["Compare final-answer accuracy and process-level reasoning quality across models and human baseline"]

name: SuperGPQA
intro: SuperGPQA 是一个全面的评测基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在285个研究生级别学科中的知识和推理能力。该基准通过人机协同过滤机制，消除了简单或模棱两可的问题，从而揭示了当前最先进的LLM在不同知识领域中的性能仍有显著提升空间。SuperGPQA的构建过程涉及80多位专家标注员和一个人机协作系统，为未来大规模研究项目提供了方法论指导。
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成, 混合
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: SuperGPQA is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) knowledge and reasoning abilities across 285 graduate-level disciplines. Using a human-AI collaborative filtering mechanism, it eliminates simple or ambiguous questions, revealing significant room for improvement in state-of-the-art LLMs across various knowledge domains. The construction of SuperGPQA involved over 80 expert annotators and a human-AI collaboration system, providing methodological guidance for future large-scale research projects.

    F["Perform manual quality review by experts to finalize question set"] --> G["Evaluate baseline models using zero-shot prompts and measure accuracy metrics"]

name: SWE-bench
intro: SWE-bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型解决真实世界GitHub问题能力的基准测试。它从12个流行的Python代码库中收集了2294个软件工程问题，每个问题都配有对应的拉取请求和测试补丁。该基准旨在衡量模型在理解代码库、定位问题和生成正确修复方面的能力。
eval_feature: 防污染, 长文本
intro_en: SWE-bench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to solve real-world GitHub issues. It collects 2,294 software engineering problems from 12 popular Python repositories, each paired with corresponding pull requests and test patches. The benchmark aims to assess models' capabilities in understanding codebases, identifying issues, and generating correct fixes.

name: SWE-Bench Pro
intro: SWE-Bench Pro是一个极具挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估人工智能代理在解决长周期、复杂软件工程任务方面的能力。它包含来自41个活跃代码库的1865个问题，真实反映了企业级的开发难题。该基准测试经过精心设计，可有效防止数据污染，从而真实地还原了软件开发的复杂性。
build_method: 人工构建
eval_feature: 防污染, 长文本
intro_en: SWE-Bench Pro is a highly challenging benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' ability to solve long-term, complex software engineering tasks. It includes 1,865 problems from 41 active codebases, accurately reflecting enterprise-level development challenges. The benchmark is carefully designed to prevent data contamination, thereby authentically capturing the complexity of software development.

name: SWE-bench-Live
intro: SWE-bench-Live是一个实时更新的基准测试，旨在解决现有软件工程基准（如SWE-bench）的静态和手动构建问题。它通过自动化流程从2024年以来的真实GitHub问题中提取任务，并为每个任务提供专用的Docker镜像以确保可复现性。该基准的发布旨在提供一个更动态、多样化和抗污染的评估环境，以促进大型语言模型和智能体在真实软件开发场景中的发展。
build_method: 自动生成, 网络爬取
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染
intro_en: SWE-bench-Live is a continuously updated benchmark designed to address the static and manual construction issues of existing software engineering benchmarks like SWE-bench. It automatically extracts tasks from real GitHub issues since 2024 and provides dedicated Docker images for each task to ensure reproducibility. The benchmark aims to offer a more dynamic, diverse, and contamination-resistant evaluation environment to advance large language models and agents in real-world software development scenarios.

    F["Execute multiple test rounds to validate consistent issue-resolving behavior"] --> G["Package validated instances with dedicated Docker images for reproducible execution"]

name: SWE-Evo
intro: 现有针对AI编码代理的基准测试侧重于孤立的、单一问题任务，例如修复错误或添加小功能。然而，现实世界的软件工程本质上是一项长期任务：开发人员必须理解高级需求，协调跨多个文件的更改，并通过多次迭代演进代码库，同时保留现有功能。我们引入了SWE-EVO，这是一个评估代理在此类长期软件演进挑战中的基准。它由七个成熟的开源Python项目的发布说明和版本历史构建，包含48个演进任务，需要代理实现跨平均21个文件的多步骤修改，并通过每个实例平均874个测试的综合测试套件进行验证。实验表明，即使是GPT-5在SWE-EVO上的解决率也仅为21%，而SWE-Bench Verified上的解决率为65%，这表明当前代理在持续的、多文件推理方面存在显著的能力差距。我们还提出了Fix Rate，一个细粒度指标，用于捕获解决这些复杂、长期任务的部分进展。
org: FPT Software AI Center, University of Melbourne, Marvis AI
task_type: 代码生成, Agent任务, 开放式问答
scale: 48个演进任务, 7个开源Python项目, 平均21个文件, 每个实例874个测试
task_type_en: Code Generation, Agent Task, Open-ended QA
intro_en: Existing benchmarks for AI coding agents focus on isolated, single-task problems such as bug fixing or adding small features. However, real-world software engineering is inherently a long-term process: developers must understand high-level requirements, coordinate changes across multiple files, and evolve the codebase through multiple iterations while preserving existing functionality. We introduce SWE-EVO, a benchmark that evaluates agents on such long-term software evolution challenges. It is built from release notes and version histories of seven mature open-source Python projects, comprising 48 evolution tasks that require agents to perform multi-step modifications across an average of 21 files, validated by comprehensive test suites averaging 874 tests per instance. Experiments show that even GPT-5 achieves only a 21% pass rate on SWE-EVO, compared to 65% on SWE-Bench Verified, highlighting a significant capability gap in continuous, multi-file reasoning. We also propose Fix Rate, a fine-grained metric to capture partial progress in solving these complex, long-term tasks.
scale_en: 48 items evolutionary tasks, 7 items open-source Python projects, average 21 items files, each items instance 874 items tests

    B["Scrape release notes and version histories from the selected repositories"] --> C["Identify candidate evolution tasks from release notes requiring multi-step, multi-file modifications"]
    C["Identify candidate evolution tasks from release notes requiring multi-step, multi-file modifications"] --> D["Extract Software Requirement Specifications from release notes as task descriptions"]
    D["Extract Software Requirement Specifications from release notes as task descriptions"] --> E["Collect gold patches spanning multiple files and versions for each evolution task"]
    E["Collect gold patches spanning multiple files and versions for each evolution task"] --> F["Gather comprehensive test suites with fail-to-pass tests aligned with evolution specifications"]
    F["Gather comprehensive test suites with fail-to-pass tests aligned with evolution specifications"] --> G["Evaluate agent submissions using test suite pass rates and Fix Rate metric"]

    C["从发布说明中识别需要多步骤多文件修改的候选演进任务"] --> D["从发布说明中提取软件需求规格作为任务描述"]
    D["从发布说明中提取软件需求规格作为任务描述"] --> E["为每个演进任务收集跨多个文件和版本的标准补丁"]
    E["为每个演进任务收集跨多个文件和版本的标准补丁"] --> F["收集与演进规格对齐的包含失败到通过测试的综合测试套件"]
    F["收集与演进规格对齐的包含失败到通过测试的综合测试套件"] --> G["使用测试套件通过率和修复率指标评估代理提交"]

name: SWE-fficiency
intro: SWE-fficiency是一个用于评估语言模型在真实工作负载下优化存储库级别性能的基准。该基准包含498个任务，涵盖了九个广泛使用的数据科学、机器学习和HPC存储库。在给定完整代码库和缓慢工作负载的情况下，代理必须调查代码语义、定位瓶颈和相关测试，并生成一个能够匹配或超过专家加速效果同时通过相同单元测试的补丁。
org: Harvard University, Google DeepMind, Princeton University, Xi'an Jiaotong University
task_type: 代码优化, 性能工程
eval_feature: 真实世界代码库, 性能优化
build_method_en: Automatically mined and filtered from GitHub PR
intro_en: SWE-fficiency is a benchmark for evaluating language models' ability to optimize repository-level performance under real-world workloads. It includes 498 tasks across nine widely used data science, machine learning, and HPC repositories. Given the full codebase and a slow workload, the agent must analyze code semantics, identify bottlenecks and relevant tests, and generate a patch that matches or surpasses expert-level acceleration while passing the same unit tests.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape GitHub PRs from nine Python repos in data science, ML, and HPC domains"] --> B["Filter PRs by performance keywords, exclude test modifications, require meaningful AST changes"]
    B["Filter PRs by performance keywords, exclude test modifications, require meaningful AST changes"] --> C["Run test suite with coverage tooling to confirm existing unit tests exercise modified code"]
    C["Run test suite with coverage tooling to confirm existing unit tests exercise modified code"] --> D["Annotate performance workloads and validate expert speedup baselines through execution"]
    D["Annotate performance workloads and validate expert speedup baselines through execution"] --> E["Provide agent with complete codebase and slow workload to generate optimization patch"]
    E["Provide agent with complete codebase and slow workload to generate optimization patch"] --> F["Apply submitted patch and run repository unit tests to verify correctness"]
    F["Apply submitted patch and run repository unit tests to verify correctness"] --> G["Measure workload runtime before and after patch to compute LM speedup"]
    G["Measure workload runtime before and after patch to compute LM speedup"] --> H["Calculate speedup ratio against expert baseline and aggregate using harmonic mean"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从九个数据科学、机器学习和HPC的Python仓库抓取GitHub PR"] --> B["按性能关键词过滤PR，排除测试修改，要求有意义的AST变更"]
    B["按性能关键词过滤PR，排除测试修改，要求有意义的AST变更"] --> C["运行测试套件并使用覆盖率工具确认现有单元测试覆盖修改代码"]
    C["运行测试套件并使用覆盖率工具确认现有单元测试覆盖修改代码"] --> D["标注性能工作负载并通过执行验证专家加速基线"]
    D["标注性能工作负载并通过执行验证专家加速基线"] --> E["向智能体提供完整代码库和慢速工作负载以生成优化补丁"]
    E["向智能体提供完整代码库和慢速工作负载以生成优化补丁"] --> F["应用提交的补丁并运行仓库单元测试以验证正确性"]
    F["应用提交的补丁并运行仓库单元测试以验证正确性"] --> G["测量补丁前后工作负载运行时间以计算LM加速比"]
    G["测量补丁前后工作负载运行时间以计算LM加速比"] --> H["计算相对专家基线的加速比率并使用调和平均数聚合"]

name: SWE-Lancer
intro: SWE-Lancer收录了超过1400个来自Upwork的自由职业软件工程任务，实际支付总额达100万美元。该基准测试涵盖了从50美元的错误修复到32000美元的功能实现等独立的工程任务，以及模型需要选择技术实施方案的管理任务。通过端到端测试和与人类管理者决策的对比来评估模型的表现，旨在促进对人工智能模型经济影响的研究。
task_type: 代码生成, 补全, Agent任务
intro_en: SWE-Lancer includes over 1,400 freelance software engineering tasks from Upwork, with a total payment exceeding $1 million. The benchmark covers independent engineering tasks ranging from $50 bug fixes to $32,000 feature implementations, as well as management tasks where models must choose technical implementation plans. Model performance is evaluated through end-to-end testing and comparison with human manager decisions, aiming to advance research on the economic impact of AI models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 1,488 freelance software engineering jobs from Upwork with real payouts totaling $1 million."] --> B["Categorize tasks into IC SWE tasks and SWE Manager tasks based on job type."]
    B["Categorize tasks into IC SWE tasks and SWE Manager tasks based on job type."] --> C["Create end-to-end tests using browser automation for IC tasks by professional software engineers."]
    C["Create end-to-end tests using browser automation for IC tasks by professional software engineers."] --> D["Triple-verify all end-to-end tests for quality by experienced software engineers."]
    D["Triple-verify all end-to-end tests for quality by experienced software engineers."] --> E["Record original hired engineering managers' proposal selections for Manager tasks as ground truth."]
    E["Record original hired engineering managers' proposal selections for Manager tasks as ground truth."] --> F["Package tasks and tests into a unified Docker image for reproducible evaluation."]
    F["Package tasks and tests into a unified Docker image for reproducible evaluation."] --> G["Evaluate IC tasks by running all applicable end-to-end tests on model-generated code patches."]
    G["Evaluate IC tasks by running all applicable end-to-end tests on model-generated code patches."] --> H["Evaluate Manager tasks by comparing model proposal selections against original manager decisions."]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从Upwork收集1488个自由职业软件工程任务，实际支付总额达100万美元。"] --> B["将任务分为IC工程任务和管理任务两类。"]
    B["将任务分为IC工程任务和管理任务两类。"] --> C["由专业软件工程师使用浏览器自动化为IC任务创建端到端测试。"]
    C["由专业软件工程师使用浏览器自动化为IC任务创建端到端测试。"] --> D["由资深软件工程师对所有端到端测试进行三重质量验证。"]
    D["由资深软件工程师对所有端到端测试进行三重质量验证。"] --> E["记录原始雇佣工程经理对管理任务的方案选择作为真值。"]
    E["记录原始雇佣工程经理对管理任务的方案选择作为真值。"] --> F["将任务和测试打包到统一Docker镜像中以便可复现评估。"]
    F["将任务和测试打包到统一Docker镜像中以便可复现评估。"] --> G["对模型生成的代码补丁运行所有适用的端到端测试来评估IC任务。"]
    G["对模型生成的代码补丁运行所有适用的端到端测试来评估IC任务。"] --> H["将模型的方案选择与原始经理决策对比来评估管理任务。"]

name: SWE-PolyBench
intro: SWE-PolyBench是一个多语言基准，用于评估大型语言模型在多种编程语言和真实场景下的软件工程任务表现。它包含来自21个代码仓库的2110个实例，涵盖Java、JavaScript、TypeScript和Python，任务包括修复漏洞、添加功能和代码重构。
build_method: 专家构建, 网络爬取, 混合
metric: Resolve Rate, Pass Rate, Syntax Tree Analysis
intro_en: SWE-PolyBench is a multilingual benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on software engineering tasks across various programming languages and real-world scenarios. It includes 2,110 instances from 21 code repositories, covering Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python, with tasks such as bug fixing, feature addition, and code refactoring.
metric_en: Resolve Rate, Pass Rate, Syntax Tree Analysis
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect PRs closing issues from 21 repositories in Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python"] --> B["Filter repositories by implementation focus, PR count, recency, license, and English language"]
    B["Filter repositories by implementation focus, PR count, recency, license, and English language"] --> C["Manually configure Docker environments for each repository and base commit"]
    C["Manually configure Docker environments for each repository and base commit"] --> D["Execute test suites before and after code patch to identify F2P and P2P tests"]
    D["Execute test suites before and after code patch to identify F2P and P2P tests"] --> E["Retain PRs with at least one F2P test; exclude untestable PRs creating new tested files"]
    E["Retain PRs with at least one F2P test; exclude untestable PRs creating new tested files"] --> F["Classify tasks into bug fixes, feature requests, and refactoring using issue labels"]
    F["Classify tasks into bug fixes, feature requests, and refactoring using issue labels"] --> G["Generate SWE-PolyBench500 via stratified sampling across repositories and task categories"]
    G["Generate SWE-PolyBench500 via stratified sampling across repositories and task categories"] --> H["Evaluate coding agents using execution-based testing and syntax tree analysis metrics"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从21个仓库收集关闭issue的PR，涵盖四种语言"] --> B["按实现类型、PR数量、更新时间、许可证和语言筛选仓库"]
    B["按实现类型、PR数量、更新时间、许可证和语言筛选仓库"] --> C["为每个仓库和基础提交手动配置Docker环境"]
    C["为每个仓库和基础提交手动配置Docker环境"] --> D["在代码补丁前后执行测试以识别F2P和P2P测试"]
    D["在代码补丁前后执行测试以识别F2P和P2P测试"] --> E["保留至少有一个F2P测试的PR，排除不可测试PR"]
    E["保留至少有一个F2P测试的PR，排除不可测试PR"] --> F["根据issue标签将任务分类为漏洞修复、功能请求和重构"]
    F["根据issue标签将任务分类为漏洞修复、功能请求和重构"] --> G["通过跨仓库和任务类别分层采样生成SWE-PolyBench500"]
    G["通过跨仓库和任务类别分层采样生成SWE-PolyBench500"] --> H["使用基于执行的测试和语法树分析指标评估编码代理"]

name: SWE-Sharp-Bench
intro: SWE-Sharp-Bench是一个针对C#语言的可复现软件工程基准测试。它包含了从17个真实世界的C#代码仓库中精心挑选的150个软件工程任务实例，填补了现有基准测试中对C#语言支持的空白。该基准的评估结果揭示了当前AI编码代理在处理C#任务时，其性能显著低于处理Python任务，显示出明显的性能差距。
build_method: 专家构建, 网络爬取, 混合
intro_en: SWE-Sharp-Bench is a reproducible software engineering benchmark for the C# language. It includes 150 software engineering task instances carefully selected from 17 real-world C# code repositories, filling the gap in existing benchmarks for C# support. Evaluation results reveal that current AI coding agents perform significantly worse on C# tasks compared to Python tasks, showing a clear performance gap.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select C# repos from top 100 with ≥5000 stars, active maintenance, and verified build viability"] --> B["Scrape 1000 recent PRs per repo; retain those referencing issues, modifying tests, and successfully merged"]
    B["Scrape 1000 recent PRs per repo; retain those referencing issues, modifying tests, and successfully merged"] --> C["Auto-generate Dockerfile by parsing workflows, .sln, .csproj, global.json to infer NuGet dependencies and build targets"]
    C["Auto-generate Dockerfile by parsing workflows, .sln, .csproj, global.json to infer NuGet dependencies and build targets"] --> D["Run tests at base, base+test patch, and base+test+fix; retain only pass→fail→pass sequences, discard flaky cases"]
    D["Run tests at base, base+test patch, and base+test+fix; retain only pass→fail→pass sequences, discard flaky cases"] --> E["Two authors independently annotate and cross-check PRs, flagging underspecified statements and inadequate tests"]
    E["Two authors independently annotate and cross-check PRs, flagging underspecified statements and inadequate tests"] --> F["Adapt SWE-Agent and OpenHands prompts for C# projects with multiple leading language models"]
    F["Adapt SWE-Agent and OpenHands prompts for C# projects with multiple leading language models"] --> G["Evaluate each agent-model configuration with single attempt per instance, 2-hour timeout, measuring resolution rate"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从前100个C#仓库中选择≥5000星、活跃维护且构建可行的项目"] --> B["抓取每个仓库的1000个最新PR并保留引用issue、修改测试且已合并的PR"]
    B["抓取每个仓库的1000个最新PR并保留引用issue、修改测试且已合并的PR"] --> C["解析工作流和项目文件自动生成Dockerfile以推断NuGet依赖和构建目标"]
    C["解析工作流和项目文件自动生成Dockerfile以推断NuGet依赖和构建目标"] --> D["在三个阶段运行测试仅保留通过→失败→通过序列并丢弃不稳定用例"]
    D["在三个阶段运行测试仅保留通过→失败→通过序列并丢弃不稳定用例"] --> E["两位作者独立标注并交叉检查PR标记问题描述不足和测试不充分的情况"]
    E["两位作者独立标注并交叉检查PR标记问题描述不足和测试不充分的情况"] --> F["为C#项目调整SWE-Agent和OpenHands提示词并配置多个主流语言模型"]
    F["为C#项目调整SWE-Agent和OpenHands提示词并配置多个主流语言模型"] --> G["评估每个智能体-模型配置每实例单次尝试2小时超时并测量解决率"]

name: SysBench
intro: SysBench是一个用于系统性分析大型语言模型（LLM）遵循系统消息能力的基准。它主要通过三个方面来评估现有LLM的局限性：约束违规、指令误判和多轮不稳定性。该基准包含500个基于六种常见约束类型手工构建的系统消息和多轮用户对话，覆盖了多样的交互关系。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
metric: Constraint Violation Rate, Instruction Misjudgment Rate, Multi-turn Instability Rate
eval_feature: 多轮
intro_en: SysBench is a benchmark for systematically analyzing large language models' (LLM) ability to follow system messages. It evaluates existing LLMs' limitations through three aspects: constraint violations, instruction misinterpretation, and multi-turn instability. The benchmark includes 500 system messages and multi-turn user dialogues manually constructed based on six common constraint types, covering diverse interaction scenarios.
metric_en: Constraint Violation Rate, Instruction Misjudgment Rate, Multi-turn Instability Rate
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Categorize constraints into six prevalent types based on expert experience and collected data clustering"] --> B["Manually construct 500 system messages containing multiple complex verifiable atomic constraints"]
    B["Manually construct 500 system messages containing multiple complex verifiable atomic constraints"] --> C["Design multi-turn user conversations with aligned and misaligned instructions relative to system messages"]
    C["Design multi-turn user conversations with aligned and misaligned instructions relative to system messages"] --> D["Manually annotate evaluation checklists for each user query to verify constraint satisfaction"]
    D["Manually annotate evaluation checklists for each user query to verify constraint satisfaction"] --> E["Feed system messages and user instructions into LLMs to generate responses"]
    E["Feed system messages and user instructions into LLMs to generate responses"] --> F["Apply model-based verifier to each response using the annotated checklists"]
    F["Apply model-based verifier to each response using the annotated checklists"] --> G["Measure constraint violation, instruction misjudgement, and multi-turn instability across evaluated LLMs"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["基于专家经验和数据聚类将约束分为六种常见类型"] --> B["手工构建500条包含多个复杂可验证原子约束的系统消息"]
    B["手工构建500条包含多个复杂可验证原子约束的系统消息"] --> C["设计包含对齐和不对齐指令的多轮用户对话"]
    C["设计包含对齐和不对齐指令的多轮用户对话"] --> D["为每个用户查询手工标注评估检查表以验证约束满足情况"]
    D["为每个用户查询手工标注评估检查表以验证约束满足情况"] --> E["将系统消息和用户指令输入大语言模型生成响应"]
    E["将系统消息和用户指令输入大语言模型生成响应"] --> F["使用标注的检查表对每个响应应用模型验证器"]
    F["使用标注的检查表对每个响应应用模型验证器"] --> G["测量各模型的约束违规、指令误判和多轮不稳定性"]

name: T-Eval
intro: T-Eval系统地分解大型语言模型的工具使用能力，涵盖指令遵循、规划、推理、检索、理解和复审等子过程。基于此，提出了逐步评估工具利用能力的T-Eval基准，填补了对工具使用细节分析的空白。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Tsinghua University, Jilin Un
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
metric: Planning, Reasoning, Retrieval, Understanding, Instruction Following, Review
intro_en: T-Eval systematically breaks down the tool-using capabilities of large language models, covering subprocesses such as instruction following, planning, reasoning, retrieval, comprehension, and review. Based on this, the T-Eval benchmark was proposed for step-by-step evaluation of tool utilization abilities, filling the gap in detailed analysis of tool usage.
metric_en: Planning, Reasoning, Retrieval, Understanding, Instruction Following, Review
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 15 high-availability tools across six domains with manually generated complete documentation"] --> B["Uniformly sample 2-3 tools and prompt GPT-3.5 to generate diverse instructions requiring those tools"]
    B["Uniformly sample 2-3 tools and prompt GPT-3.5 to generate diverse instructions requiring those tools"] --> C["Use GPT-4 to revise and refine generated instructions for enhanced feasibility and diversity"]
    C["Use GPT-4 to revise and refine generated instructions for enhanced feasibility and diversity"] --> D["Annotate golden solution paths as thought-action-observation-review sequences verified by human experts"]
    D["Annotate golden solution paths as thought-action-observation-review sequences verified by human experts"] --> E["Conduct two-round human verification, selecting 553 pairs from 1,500 initial instruction-solution pairs"]
    E["Conduct two-round human verification, selecting 553 pairs from 1,500 initial instruction-solution pairs"] --> F["Extract intermediate steps from verified paths to construct six evaluation subsets with 23,305 test cases"]
    F["Extract intermediate steps from verified paths to construct six evaluation subsets with 23,305 test cases"] --> G["Evaluate LLMs separately on instruct, plan, reason, retrieve, understand, and review abilities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集六领域15个高可用工具并手动生成完整文档"] --> B["均匀采样2-3个工具并用GPT-3.5生成相应指令"]
    B["均匀采样2-3个工具并用GPT-3.5生成相应指令"] --> C["用GPT-4修订和优化生成的指令以提升可行性"]
    C["用GPT-4修订和优化生成的指令以提升可行性"] --> D["标注思考-动作-观察-复审序列作为人工验证的黄金路径"]
    D["标注思考-动作-观察-复审序列作为人工验证的黄金路径"] --> E["进行两轮人工验证从1500对中筛选出553对"]
    E["进行两轮人工验证从1500对中筛选出553对"] --> F["从验证路径提取中间步骤构建六个评估子集共23305例"]
    F["从验证路径提取中间步骤构建六个评估子集共23305例"] --> G["分别评估LLM的指令遵循、规划、推理、检索、理解和复审能力"]

name: TACO
intro: TACO是一个开源的大规模代码生成数据集，专注于算法的光学，旨在为代码生成模型领域提供更具挑战性的训练数据集和评估基准。TACO包含具有挑战性的竞赛级编程问题，以增强或评估在实际编程场景中的问题理解和推理能力。每个TACO问题都包含任务主题、算法、编程技能和难度级别等细粒度标签，为代码生成模型的训练和评估提供了更精确的参考。
build_method: 混合
eval_feature: 细粒度标签
scale: 25433个训练问题，1000个测试问题，多达155万个解决方案
intro_en: TACO is an open-source large-scale code generation dataset focused on algorithm optics, designed to provide more challenging training data and evaluation benchmarks for code generation models. TACO includes challenging competition-level programming problems to enhance or assess problem understanding and reasoning abilities in real-world programming scenarios. Each TACO problem contains fine-grained labels such as task topic, algorithm, programming skills, and difficulty level, offering more precise references for training and evaluating code generation models.
scale_en: 25433 items training problems, 1000 items test problems, up to 1,550,000 items solutions
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape problems from CodeChef, CodeForces, HackerRank, GeeksforGeeks using custom HTML parsers"] --> B["Integrate APPS, CodeContest, Description2code datasets and crawl algorithmic labels from source platforms"]
    B["Integrate APPS, CodeContest, Description2code datasets and crawl algorithmic labels from source platforms"] --> C["Convert Python 2 solutions to Python 3 using 2to3 library"]
    C["Convert Python 2 solutions to Python 3 using 2to3 library"] --> D["Execute each solution against unit tests to validate correctness and complexity criteria"]
    D["Execute each solution against unit tests to validate correctness and complexity criteria"] --> E["Deduplicate code within problems using MinHash algorithm and Jaccard similarity"]
    E["Deduplicate code within problems using MinHash algorithm and Jaccard similarity"] --> F["Augment test samples and annotate with topics, algorithms, skills, and difficulty levels"]
    F["Augment test samples and annotate with topics, algorithms, skills, and difficulty levels"] --> G["Split into training set with 25,443 problems and test set with 1,000 problems"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用定制HTML解析器从竞赛平台抓取问题"] --> B["整合已有数据集并从源平台爬取算法标签"]
    B["整合已有数据集并从源平台爬取算法标签"] --> C["用2to3库将Python 2代码转换为Python 3"]
    C["用2to3库将Python 2代码转换为Python 3"] --> D["对每个解决方案执行单元测试验证正确性"]
    D["对每个解决方案执行单元测试验证正确性"] --> E["用MinHash算法和Jaccard相似度去重代码"]
    E["用MinHash算法和Jaccard相似度去重代码"] --> F["增强测试样本并标注主题算法技能难度"]
    F["增强测试样本并标注主题算法技能难度"] --> G["划分为25443题训练集和1000题测试集"]

name: TAU-Bench
intro: TAU-Bench是一个用于评估语言代理在真实世界领域中与工具、代理和用户交互的基准。它通过模拟用户（由语言模型扮演）和配备了特定领域API工具及策略指南的语言代理之间的动态对话来进行。该基准采用一种高效且可靠的评估方法，通过比较对话结束时的数据库状态与预设的注释目标状态来评分，并引入了pass@k指标来衡量代理在多次试验中的行为可靠性。
eval_feature: 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: TAU-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating language agents interacting with tools, agents, and users in real-world domains. It simulates dynamic dialogues between users (played by language models) and language agents equipped with domain-specific API tools and policy guidelines. The benchmark uses an efficient and reliable evaluation method by scoring based on the database state at the end of the dialogue compared to predefined annotated target states, and introduces the pass@k metric to measure agent behavior reliability across multiple trials.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Manually design database schemas and API tools for each domain"] --> B["Use language models to generate diverse database entries for realistic scenarios"]
    B["Use language models to generate diverse database entries for realistic scenarios"] --> C["Manually create user scenarios with ground truth goal states and verify them"]
    C["Manually create user scenarios with ground truth goal states and verify them"] --> D["Provide agents with domain-specific policy documents as system prompts"]
    D["Provide agents with domain-specific policy documents as system prompts"] --> E["Simulate dynamic user conversations using language models with scenario instructions"]
    E["Simulate dynamic user conversations using language models with scenario instructions"] --> F["Compare final database state with annotated goal state to score agent performance"]
    F["Compare final database state with annotated goal state to score agent performance"] --> G["Run k independent trials per task and compute pass^k reliability metric"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["为每个领域手动设计数据库模式和API工具"] --> B["使用语言模型生成多样化数据库条目"]
    B["使用语言模型生成多样化数据库条目"] --> C["手动创建用户场景并标注目标状态后验证"]
    C["手动创建用户场景并标注目标状态后验证"] --> D["向代理提供领域特定策略文档作为系统提示"]
    D["向代理提供领域特定策略文档作为系统提示"] --> E["用语言模型根据场景指令模拟动态用户对话"]
    E["用语言模型根据场景指令模拟动态用户对话"] --> F["比较最终数据库状态与标注目标状态评分"]
    F["比较最终数据库状态与标注目标状态评分"] --> G["每任务运行k次独立试验并计算pass^k可靠性指标"]

name: TAU2Bench
intro: τ²-Bench是一个用于评估在双控环境中对话式AI代理的基准。与现有基准不同，它模拟了AI代理和用户都能使用工具与共享动态环境交互的真实场景。该基准包含一个新颖的电信双控域，一个可程序化创建多样化任务的组合任务生成器，以及一个与环境紧密耦合的可靠用户模拟器。实验表明，从单用户控制到双用户控制的转变会导致代理性能显著下降，这凸显了指导用户所面临的挑战。
org: Sierra, University of Southern California, University of Toronto, UCLA, Princeton University
eval_feature: 双控环境, 人机协作, 动态环境
scale: 4个领域、12个工具集、75个任务模板
eval_feature_en: Dual-control Environment, Human-machine Collaboration, Dynamic Environment
intro_en: τ²-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating conversational AI agents in dual-control environments. Unlike existing benchmarks, it simulates realistic scenarios where both AI agents and users can interact with a shared dynamic environment using tools. The benchmark features a novel telecom dual-control domain, a compositional task generator for programmable diverse tasks, and a reliable user simulator tightly coupled with the environment. Experiments show that shifting from single-user control to dual-user control significantly degrades agent performance, highlighting the challenges in guiding users.
scale_en: 4 items domains, 12 items toolsets, 75 tasks templates
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Model telecom domain as Dec-POMDP with shared dynamic environment and distinct tool sets"] --> B["Define atomic base scenarios with initialization, solution, and assertion functions"]
    B["Define atomic base scenarios with initialization, solution, and assertion functions"] --> C["Programmatically compose diverse verifiable tasks from atomic components using task generator"]
    C["Programmatically compose diverse verifiable tasks from atomic components using task generator"] --> D["Implement user simulator constrained by tools and observable states, coupled with environment"]
    D["Implement user simulator constrained by tools and observable states, coupled with environment"] --> E["Evaluate agents in no-user mode where agent controls all tools to isolate reasoning"]
    E["Evaluate agents in no-user mode where agent controls all tools to isolate reasoning"] --> F["Evaluate agents in dual-control mode with both agent and user using distinct tools"]
    F["Evaluate agents in dual-control mode with both agent and user using distinct tools"] --> G["Perform ablation analysis separating reasoning errors from communication and coordination errors"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将电信域建模为Dec-POMDP，含共享动态环境和不同工具集"] --> B["定义原子基础场景，包含初始化、解决方案和断言函数"]
    B["定义原子基础场景，包含初始化、解决方案和断言函数"] --> C["用任务生成器从原子组件程序化组合多样可验证任务"]
    C["用任务生成器从原子组件程序化组合多样可验证任务"] --> D["实现受工具和可观察状态约束的用户模拟器，与环境耦合"]
    D["实现受工具和可观察状态约束的用户模拟器，与环境耦合"] --> E["在无用户模式下评估代理，代理控制所有工具以隔离推理"]
    E["在无用户模式下评估代理，代理控制所有工具以隔离推理"] --> F["在双控模式下评估代理，代理和用户使用不同工具"]
    F["在双控模式下评估代理，代理和用户使用不同工具"] --> G["执行消融分析，分离推理错误与沟通协调错误"]

name: TempCompass
intro: TempCompass是一个旨在全面评估视频大语言模型（Video LLMs）时间感知能力的基准测试。现有基准未能区分不同的时间维度，且任务形式单一。TempCompass通过引入多样化的时间维度和任务形式，并采用构建冲突视频和LLM生成指令的策略来收集高质量数据。该基准揭示了当前Video LLMs在时间感知能力上的不足。
org: Tsinghua University, Peking University, Tencent AI Lab, The Hong Kong University of Science and Tech
build_method: 混合
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: TempCompass is a benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the temporal awareness of Video LLMs. Existing benchmarks fail to differentiate between various temporal dimensions and have limited task formats. TempCompass addresses this by introducing diverse temporal dimensions and task types, and by using strategies such as constructing conflicting videos and generating instructions with LLMs to collect high-quality data. This benchmark reveals the current shortcomings of Video LLMs in temporal understanding.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select temporal aspects and static content categories to guide video collection"] --> B["Collect videos from ShutterStock platform with controlled static content distribution"]
    B["Collect videos from ShutterStock platform with controlled static content distribution"] --> C["Construct conflicting video pairs or triplets sharing static content but differing in temporal aspects"]
    C["Construct conflicting video pairs or triplets sharing static content but differing in temporal aspects"] --> D["Annotate meta-information for each video by human annotators"]
    D["Annotate meta-information for each video by human annotators"] --> E["Generate task instructions using ChatGPT based on annotated meta-information"]
    E["Generate task instructions using ChatGPT based on annotated meta-information"] --> F["Create four task formats: Multi-Choice QA, Yes/No QA, Caption Matching, Caption Generation"]
    F["Create four task formats: Multi-Choice QA, Yes/No QA, Caption Matching, Caption Generation"] --> G["Evaluate Video LLM responses automatically using LLM-based language understanding approach"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择时间维度和静态内容类别以指导视频收集"] --> B["从ShutterStock平台收集视频并控制静态内容分布"]
    B["从ShutterStock平台收集视频并控制静态内容分布"] --> C["构建共享静态内容但时间维度不同的冲突视频对或三元组"]
    C["构建共享静态内容但时间维度不同的冲突视频对或三元组"] --> D["由人工标注员为每个视频标注元信息"]
    D["由人工标注员为每个视频标注元信息"] --> E["使用ChatGPT根据标注的元信息生成任务指令"]
    E["使用ChatGPT根据标注的元信息生成任务指令"] --> F["创建四种任务格式:多选问答、是非问答、字幕匹配、字幕生成"]
    F["创建四种任务格式:多选问答、是非问答、字幕匹配、字幕生成"] --> G["使用基于LLM的语言理解方法自动评估视频LLM响应"]

name: Terminal Bench 2
intro: terminal-bench-2-verified是Terminal-Bench 2.0的改进版，评估AI智能体在命令行环境下执行任务的能力。该版本修正了环境不一致和指令模糊等问题，提供更可靠的终端场景能力评测。它由89个在计算机终端环境中、受真实工作流启发的难题组成。
org: Zhipu AI, Anthropic, Laude Institute, University of Washington, Google
eval_feature: 过程导向, 真实世界任务
intro_en: terminal-bench-2-verified is an improved version of Terminal-Bench 2.0 that evaluates AI agents' ability to perform tasks in command-line environments. This version addresses issues like environment inconsistency and ambiguous instructions, providing a more reliable assessment of terminal scenario capabilities. It consists of 89 challenges inspired by real workflows in computer terminal environments.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Crowdsource 229 tasks from 93 open-source contributors with difficulty estimates"] --> B["Run automated workflow to verify oracle solution passes tests for solvability"]
    B["Run automated workflow to verify oracle solution passes tests for solvability"] --> C["Contributors complete checklist confirming manual checks for common specification errors"]
    C["Contributors complete checklist confirming manual checks for common specification errors"] --> D["Run automated language model tool to identify common mistakes in task specification"]
    D["Run automated language model tool to identify common mistakes in task specification"] --> E["Three experienced reviewers manually audit each task for specificity, solvability, and integrity"]
    E["Three experienced reviewers manually audit each task for specificity, solvability, and integrity"] --> F["Select 89 verified tasks based on difficulty and quality assessments for final dataset"]
    F["Select 89 verified tasks based on difficulty and quality assessments for final dataset"] --> G["Evaluate frontier models and agents using Harbor harness with outcome-driven container state tests"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从93名开源贡献者众包229个任务并标注难度"] --> B["运行自动化流程验证参考解通过测试"]
    B["运行自动化流程验证参考解通过测试"] --> C["贡献者完成检查清单确认常见错误已排查"]
    C["贡献者完成检查清单确认常见错误已排查"] --> D["运行语言模型工具识别任务规范中的常见错误"]
    D["运行语言模型工具识别任务规范中的常见错误"] --> E["三名资深审核员人工审核每个任务的规范性"]
    E["三名资深审核员人工审核每个任务的规范性"] --> F["基于难度和质量评估筛选89个验证任务"]
    F["基于难度和质量评估筛选89个验证任务"] --> G["使用Harbor框架评估前沿模型和智能体"]

name: TestExplora
intro: TestExplora是一个评估大型语言模型作为主动测试者能力的基准，包含2389个任务，覆盖482个代码仓库。模型需通过对比代码实现与文档意图发现漏洞，填补了当前评测中缺乏主动漏洞发现能力的空白。
build_method: 基于真实世界数据, 自动生成
eval_feature: Agentic, 领域特定
build_method_en: Based on real-world data, Automated Generation
intro_en: TestExplora is a benchmark for evaluating large language models as proactive testers, comprising 2,389 tasks across 482 code repositories. Models are required to identify vulnerabilities by comparing code implementations with documentation intent, addressing the current gap in active vulnerability detection capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Crawl issue-PR pairs from GitHub repositories with over 1,000 stars"] --> B["Decompose patches into test and code components, verify reachability via invoke graph"]
    B["Decompose patches into test and code components, verify reachability via invoke graph"] --> C["Generate documentation clarifying test entry inferences' behavior, inputs, outputs, and errors"]
    C["Generate documentation clarifying test entry inferences' behavior, inputs, outputs, and errors"] --> D["Provide documentation, test entry inferences, and dependencies under White Box or Black Box"]
    D["Provide documentation, test entry inferences, and dependencies under White Box or Black Box"] --> E["Generate test cases using LLMs based on provided inputs and scenario constraints"]
    E["Generate test cases using LLMs based on provided inputs and scenario constraints"] --> F["Execute generated tests on fixed repository version to compute Head Pass Rate"]
    F["Execute generated tests on fixed repository version to compute Head Pass Rate"] --> G["Execute generated tests on buggy version to measure Fail-to-Pass Rate for bug discovery"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从超过1000星标的GitHub仓库爬取issue-PR对"] --> B["将补丁分解为测试和代码部分，通过调用图验证可达性"]
    B["将补丁分解为测试和代码部分，通过调用图验证可达性"] --> C["生成文档阐明测试入口推断的行为、输入输出和错误"]
    C["生成文档阐明测试入口推断的行为、输入输出和错误"] --> D["在白盒或黑盒场景下提供文档、测试入口推断和依赖"]
    D["在白盒或黑盒场景下提供文档、测试入口推断和依赖"] --> E["基于提供的输入和场景约束使用LLM生成测试用例"]
    E["基于提供的输入和场景约束使用LLM生成测试用例"] --> F["在修复版本仓库上执行生成的测试计算通过率"]
    F["在修复版本仓库上执行生成的测试计算通过率"] --> G["在缺陷版本上执行生成的测试衡量故障到通过率"]

name: TiC-LM
intro: TiC-LM 是一个用于时间连续语言模型预训练的网络规模基准。它包含一个源自114个Common Crawl（CC）数据转储的大规模时间分层数据集，比以前的基准大几个数量级。该基准还设计了跨通用领域（CC数据）和特定领域（维基百科、StackExchange和代码文档）的时间分层评估，以评估持续学习方法在适应新数据的同时保留过去知识的能力。
build_method: 网络爬取
metric: held-out loss, Perplexity, Forgetting, Forward Transfer
eval_feature: 长文本, 动态, 实时
intro_en: TiC-LM is a network scale benchmark for pretraining time-continuous language models. It includes a large-scale time-layered dataset derived from 114 Common Crawl (CC) data dumps, several orders of magnitude larger than previous benchmarks. The benchmark also features time-layered evaluations across general domains (CC data) and specific domains (Wikipedia, StackExchange, and code documentation) to assess continual learning methods' ability to retain past knowledge while adapting to new data.
metric_en: held-out loss, Perplexity, Forgetting, Forward Transfer
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect all Common Crawl dumps from May-2013 to July-2024, creating 114 monthly splits"] --> B["Apply DataComp-LM pipeline: parse with resiliparse, apply RefinedWeb filters, deduplicate within each month only"]
    B["Apply DataComp-LM pipeline: parse with resiliparse, apply RefinedWeb filters, deduplicate within each month only"] --> C["Hold out evaluation pages from each month for TiC-CC, TiC-CC-Wiki, and TiC-CC-News subsets"]
    C["Hold out evaluation pages from each month for TiC-CC, TiC-CC-Wiki, and TiC-CC-News subsets"] --> D["Construct TiC-Wiki by expanding TemporalWiki to 2014-2024, isolating changed and unchanged proper nouns"]
    D["Construct TiC-Wiki by expanding TemporalWiki to 2014-2024, isolating changed and unchanged proper nouns"] --> E["Build TiC-StackE from accepted answers across 182 communities, timestamped from 2008-2024"]
    E["Build TiC-StackE from accepted answers across 182 communities, timestamped from 2008-2024"] --> F["Create TiC-CodeDocs from NumPy and PyTorch documentation across 27 major releases from 2017-2024"]
    F["Create TiC-CodeDocs from NumPy and PyTorch documentation across 27 major releases from 2017-2024"] --> G["Pre-train model f0 on initial month D0, then continually update on each subsequent month"]
    G["Pre-train model f0 on initial month D0, then continually update on each subsequent month"] --> H["Evaluate each checkpoint using perplexity metrics on dynamic evaluations and DCLM Core static tasks"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集2013年5月至2024年7月的所有Common Crawl转储，创建114个月度分割"] --> B["应用DataComp-LM流程：用resiliparse解析，应用RefinedWeb过滤器，仅在月内去重"]
    B["应用DataComp-LM流程：用resiliparse解析，应用RefinedWeb过滤器，仅在月内去重"] --> C["从每月留出评估页面用于TiC-CC、TiC-CC-Wiki和TiC-CC-News子集"]
    C["从每月留出评估页面用于TiC-CC、TiC-CC-Wiki和TiC-CC-News子集"] --> D["通过将TemporalWiki扩展至2014-2024构建TiC-Wiki，分离变化和未变化的专有名词"]
    D["通过将TemporalWiki扩展至2014-2024构建TiC-Wiki，分离变化和未变化的专有名词"] --> E["从182个社区的已接受答案构建TiC-StackE，时间戳为2008-2024"]
    E["从182个社区的已接受答案构建TiC-StackE，时间戳为2008-2024"] --> F["从NumPy和PyTorch的27个主要版本文档创建TiC-CodeDocs，跨越2017-2024"]
    F["从NumPy和PyTorch的27个主要版本文档创建TiC-CodeDocs，跨越2017-2024"] --> G["在初始月份D0上预训练模型f0，然后在每个后续月份上持续更新"]
    G["在初始月份D0上预训练模型f0，然后在每个后续月份上持续更新"] --> H["使用困惑度指标在动态评估和DCLM Core静态任务上评估每个检查点"]

name: ToM-Bench
intro: ToM-Bench是一个系统的、自动化的、原创的双语心智理论（ToM）基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）的ToM能力。它包含一个涵盖8个任务和31个社会认知能力的评估框架，采用多项选择题格式以支持自动化和无偏见的评估，并从头开始构建双语清单以避免数据泄漏。
build_method: 混合
intro_en: ToM-Bench is a systematic, automated, and original bilingual Theory of Mind (ToM) benchmark designed to evaluate the ToM capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It features an evaluation framework covering 8 tasks and 31 social cognitive abilities, uses multiple-choice questions to enable automated and unbiased assessment, and is built from scratch with a bilingual checklist to prevent data leakage.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Identify 8 ToM tasks from psychology literature proven to assess social cognition"] --> B["Adopt ATOMS framework, retaining 6 dimensions and 31 abilities after removing visual-dependent items"]
    B["Adopt ATOMS framework, retaining 6 dimensions and 31 abilities after removing visual-dependent items"] --> C["Train author-workers with psychology experts on ToM definitions, descriptions, and examples"]
    C["Train author-workers with psychology experts on ToM definitions, descriptions, and examples"] --> D["Craft samples for 8 tasks covering 19 abilities, ensuring ≥100 per task and ≥20 per ability"]
    D["Craft samples for 8 tasks covering 19 abilities, ensuring ≥100 per task and ≥20 per ability"] --> E["Add extra samples for remaining 12 abilities with ≥20 samples each, totaling 2,860 samples"]
    E["Add extra samples for remaining 12 abilities with ≥20 samples each, totaling 2,860 samples"] --> F["Format all samples as multiple-choice questions in bilingual inventory from scratch"]
    F["Format all samples as multiple-choice questions in bilingual inventory from scratch"] --> G["Evaluate LLMs using automated scoring on MCQ format across tasks and abilities"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从心理学文献中识别8个已验证的ToM任务"] --> B["采用ATOMS框架,保留6维度31项能力"]
    B["采用ATOMS框架,保留6维度31项能力"] --> C["心理学专家培训作者团队理解ToM定义"]
    C["心理学专家培训作者团队理解ToM定义"] --> D["为8个任务创建样本覆盖19项能力,每任务≥100样本"]
    D["为8个任务创建样本覆盖19项能力,每任务≥100样本"] --> E["为剩余12项能力补充样本,总计2860个样本"]
    E["为剩余12项能力补充样本,总计2860个样本"] --> F["将所有样本格式化为双语多项选择题"]
    F["将所有样本格式化为双语多项选择题"] --> G["使用自动化评分评估LLM在各任务和能力上表现"]

name: TOMATO
intro: 我们引入了TOMATO，一个时间推理多模态评估基准，旨在严格评估多模态基础模型（MFMs）在视频理解中的时间推理能力。TOMATO包含1,484个精心策划、人工标注的问题，涵盖六项任务，应用于1,417个视频，包括805个自录和自生成视频。我们的综合评估揭示了最佳模型与人类之间57.3%的性能差距，并揭示了当前MFMs在解释连续视频序列方面的基本局限性。我们相信TOMATO将成为评估下一代MFMs的关键测试平台，并呼吁社区开发能够通过视频模态理解人类世界动态的AI系统。
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
intro_en: We introduce TOMATO, a temporal reasoning multimodal benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the temporal reasoning capabilities of multimodal foundation models (MFMs) in video understanding. TOMATO contains 1,484 carefully curated and manually annotated questions across six tasks, applied to 1,417 videos, including 805 self-recorded and self-generated videos. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals a 57.3% performance gap between the best models and humans, highlighting fundamental limitations of current MFMs in interpreting continuous video sequences. We believe TOMATO will become a key testing platform for evaluating the next generation of MFMs and call on the community to develop AI systems capable of understanding human world dynamics through video modalities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Analyze existing temporal reasoning benchmarks to identify single-frame and out-of-order frame shortcuts"] --> B["Define three principles with metrics: Multi-Frame Gain, Frame Order Sensitivity, Frame Information Disparity"]
    B["Define three principles with metrics: Multi-Frame Gain, Frame Order Sensitivity, Frame Information Disparity"] --> C["Self-record and self-generate 805 videos covering human-centric, real-world, and simulated scenarios"]
    C["Self-record and self-generate 805 videos covering human-centric, real-world, and simulated scenarios"] --> D["Curate 1,417 videos total for six temporal reasoning tasks across multiple scenario types"]
    D["Curate 1,417 videos total for six temporal reasoning tasks across multiple scenario types"] --> E["Create 1,484 human-annotated multiple-choice questions spanning action count, direction, rotation, shape, velocity, and visual cues"]
    E["Create 1,484 human-annotated multiple-choice questions spanning action count, direction, rotation, shape, velocity, and visual cues"] --> F["Evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal foundation models on the curated question-video pairs"]
    F["Evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal foundation models on the curated question-video pairs"] --> G["Compare model performance against human baselines to measure the 57.3% performance gap"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["分析现有时间推理基准以识别单帧和乱序帧捷径"] --> B["定义三项原则及指标：多帧增益、帧序敏感性、帧信息差异"]
    B["定义三项原则及指标：多帧增益、帧序敏感性、帧信息差异"] --> C["自录和自生成805个涵盖人类中心、真实和模拟场景的视频"]
    C["自录和自生成805个涵盖人类中心、真实和模拟场景的视频"] --> D["为六项时间推理任务策划共1417个多场景类型视频"]
    D["为六项时间推理任务策划共1417个多场景类型视频"] --> E["创建1484个人工标注的多选题涵盖动作计数、方向、旋转、形状、速度和视觉线索"]
    E["创建1484个人工标注的多选题涵盖动作计数、方向、旋转、形状、速度和视觉线索"] --> F["在策划的问题-视频对上评估最先进的多模态基础模型"]
    F["在策划的问题-视频对上评估最先进的多模态基础模型"] --> G["将模型表现与人类基线对比以测量57.3%的性能差距"]

name: Toolathlon
intro: Toolathlon是一个用于评估语言代理在多样化、真实和长视域任务中性能的基准测试。它涵盖了32个软件应用和604个工具，从日常平台（如Google日历和Notion）到专业平台（如WooCommerce、Kubernetes和BigQuery）。该基准测试包含108个手动来源或制作的任务，平均需要约20轮交互才能完成。
org: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, All Hands AI, Carnegie Mellon University, Duke U
task_type: 多步工作流, 软件应用交互
eval_feature: 长视域任务, 真实环境
intro_en: Toolathlon is a benchmark for evaluating language agents' performance on diverse, realistic, and long-horizon tasks. It covers 32 software applications and 604 tools, ranging from everyday platforms like Google Calendar and Notion to professional platforms such as WooCommerce, Kubernetes, and BigQuery. The benchmark includes 108 manually sourced or created tasks, each requiring an average of about 20 interaction rounds to complete.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Manually source or craft 108 tasks spanning 32 real-world applications across diverse domains"] --> B["Revise or implement Model Context Protocol servers to provide 604 tools for the applications"]
    B["Revise or implement Model Context Protocol servers to provide 604 tools for the applications"] --> C["Set up realistic initial environment states from real software like Canvas courses and financial spreadsheets"]
    C["Set up realistic initial environment states from real software like Canvas courses and financial spreadsheets"] --> D["Design tasks requiring coordination across multiple applications over approximately 20 interaction turns"]
    D["Design tasks requiring coordination across multiple applications over approximately 20 interaction turns"] --> E["Create dedicated deterministic evaluation scripts for each task to verify execution outcomes"]
    E["Create dedicated deterministic evaluation scripts for each task to verify execution outcomes"] --> F["Generate static or dynamic ground-truth states for comparison during evaluation"]
    F["Generate static or dynamic ground-truth states for comparison during evaluation"] --> G["Execute language agent models on tasks and measure success rate via evaluation scripts"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["手动来源或制作108个任务，涵盖32个真实应用"] --> B["修订或实现MCP服务器，为应用提供604个工具"]
    B["修订或实现MCP服务器，为应用提供604个工具"] --> C["从真实软件设置初始环境状态如Canvas课程"]
    C["从真实软件设置初始环境状态如Canvas课程"] --> D["设计需跨多个应用约20轮交互的任务"]
    D["设计需跨多个应用约20轮交互的任务"] --> E["为每个任务创建专用确定性评估脚本"]
    E["为每个任务创建专用确定性评估脚本"] --> F["生成静态或动态真值状态用于评估对比"]
    F["生成静态或动态真值状态用于评估对比"] --> G["执行语言代理模型并通过脚本测量成功率"]

name: ToolSandbox
intro: ToolSandbox是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）在有状态、对话式和交互式场景中工具使用能力的基准。它包含状态化的工具执行、工具间的隐式状态依赖，以及一个支持策略性对话评估的内置用户模拟器。该基准旨在揭示开源与专有模型在处理状态依赖、规范化及信息不足等复杂任务时的性能差距。
eval_feature: 多轮, 过程导向, State-based
intro_en: ToolSandbox is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' (LLM) ability to use tools in stateful, conversational, and interactive scenarios. It includes stateful tool execution, implicit state dependencies between tools, and a built-in user simulator that supports strategic dialogue evaluation. The benchmark aims to reveal performance gaps between open-source and proprietary models in handling complex tasks involving state dependencies, normalization, and information insufficiency.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Author human scenarios with user goal, initial utterance, initial world state, and milestones"] --> B["Design stateful tools with implicit dependencies on world states like cellular service and wifi"]
    B["Design stateful tools with implicit dependencies on world states like cellular service and wifi"] --> C["Configure GPT-4o user simulator with Knowledge Boundary and Demonstration prompts to prevent hallucination"]
    C["Configure GPT-4o user simulator with Knowledge Boundary and Demonstration prompts to prevent hallucination"] --> D["Run on-policy interactive rollout where User, Agent, and Execution Environment communicate via Message Bus"]
    D["Run on-policy interactive rollout where User, Agent, and Execution Environment communicate via Message Bus"] --> E["Collect dynamic trajectories with world state snapshots and full dialog history at each turn"]
    E["Collect dynamic trajectories with world state snapshots and full dialog history at each turn"] --> F["Match Milestones against Message Bus and World State while maintaining topological order across turns"]
    F["Match Milestones against Message Bus and World State while maintaining topological order across turns"] --> G["Evaluate trajectories using Minefields to identify events that must not occur during execution"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["人工编写场景含用户目标、初始话语、初始世界状态和里程碑"] --> B["设计有状态工具含对蜂窝服务和WiFi等世界状态的隐式依赖"]
    B["设计有状态工具含对蜂窝服务和WiFi等世界状态的隐式依赖"] --> C["配置GPT-4o用户模拟器含知识边界和示范提示防止幻觉"]
    C["配置GPT-4o用户模拟器含知识边界和示范提示防止幻觉"] --> D["运行策略上交互推演用户、智能体和执行环境通过消息总线通信"]
    D["运行策略上交互推演用户、智能体和执行环境通过消息总线通信"] --> E["收集动态轨迹含每轮的世界状态快照和完整对话历史"]
    E["收集动态轨迹含每轮的世界状态快照和完整对话历史"] --> F["匹配里程碑到消息总线和世界状态同时保持各轮拓扑顺序"]
    F["匹配里程碑到消息总线和世界状态同时保持各轮拓扑顺序"] --> G["用雷区评估轨迹识别执行期间不得发生的事件"]

name: TreeBench
intro: TreeBench是一个诊断性基准测试，旨在评估多模态AI模型在视觉基础推理方面的能力。它基于三个原则构建：复杂场景中细微目标的视觉感知、通过边界框评估的可追溯证据以及超越简单目标定位的二阶推理。该基准包含405个具有挑战性的视觉问答对，即使是最先进的模型也难以达到60%的准确率。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Byt
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建, 混合
intro_en: TreeBench is a diagnostic benchmark designed to evaluate multimodal AI models' capabilities in visual fundamental reasoning. It is built on three principles: visual perception of subtle objects in complex scenes, traceable evidence assessed through bounding boxes, and second-order reasoning beyond simple object localization. The benchmark includes 405 challenging visual question-answer pairs, with even state-of-the-art models struggling to achieve 60% accuracy.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Sample 1K high-resolution images from SA-1B prioritizing dense object scenes"] --> B["Eight LMM experts manually annotate questions, candidate options, and answers per image"]
    B["Eight LMM experts manually annotate questions, candidate options, and answers per image"] --> C["Annotate bounding boxes for all target instances to enable traceable evidence evaluation"]
    C["Annotate bounding boxes for all target instances to enable traceable evidence evaluation"] --> D["Apply three stages of quality control to filter to 405 challenging pairs"]
    D["Apply three stages of quality control to filter to 405 challenging pairs"] --> E["Organize questions into Perception and Reasoning protocols covering 10 core competencies"]
    E["Organize questions into Perception and Reasoning protocols covering 10 core competencies"] --> F["Evaluate model final answer accuracy using exact matching or LLM judge"]
    F["Evaluate model final answer accuracy using exact matching or LLM judge"] --> G["Assess predicted bounding boxes against ground truth using dual IoU reward metric"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从SA-1B采样1K张高分辨率图像，优先选择密集物体场景"] --> B["八位LMM专家为每张图像标注问题、候选项和答案"]
    B["八位LMM专家为每张图像标注问题、候选项和答案"] --> C["为所有目标实例标注边界框以支持可追溯证据评估"]
    C["为所有目标实例标注边界框以支持可追溯证据评估"] --> D["应用三阶段质量控制筛选出405个挑战性问答对"]
    D["应用三阶段质量控制筛选出405个挑战性问答对"] --> E["将问题组织为感知和推理两类协议，涵盖10项核心能力"]
    E["将问题组织为感知和推理两类协议，涵盖10项核心能力"] --> F["使用精确匹配或LLM评判器评估模型最终答案准确率"]
    F["使用精确匹配或LLM评判器评估模型最终答案准确率"] --> G["使用双重IoU奖励指标评估预测边界框与真值的对齐"]

name: TrialBench
intro: TrialBench是一个综合性多模态AI就绪临床试验数据集套件，包含23个精心策划的数据集，涵盖多模态输入特征和8个关键预测挑战，旨在推动临床试验设计中先进AI方法的发展。
build_method_en: Manual curation, integration of clinical trial data
eval_feature_en: Covers multimodal input features and 8 key prediction challenges
intro_en: TrialBench is a comprehensive multimodal AI-ready clinical trial dataset suite, comprising 23 carefully curated datasets that cover multimodal input features and 8 key prediction challenges, aimed at advancing state-of-the-art AI methods in clinical trial design.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Raw Clinical Trial Data) --> B[Data Collection]
    B --> C[Data Preprocessing & Anonymization]
    C --> D[Task Definition & Formulation]
    D --> E{{Expert Construction & Annotation}}
    E --> F{Data Validation}
    F --|Pass| --> G(TrialBench Dataset)
    F --|Fail| --> C
    G --> H[AI Model Evaluation]
    H --> I[Performance Analysis]
    I --> J[Benchmark Release]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect clinical trial records from ClinicalTrials.gov registered before February 16, 2024 in XML format"] --> B["Parse XML files to extract NCT ID, diseases, drugs, title, summary, phase, eligibility criteria, and results"]
    B["Parse XML files to extract NCT ID, diseases, drugs, title, summary, phase, eligibility criteria, and results"] --> C["Integrate drug molecular structures from DrugBank and trial outcomes from TrialTrove subset"]
    C["Integrate drug molecular structures from DrugBank and trial outcomes from TrialTrove subset"] --> D["Manually define prediction objectives for 8 tasks and select variables based on real-world AI application timing"]
    D["Manually define prediction objectives for 8 tasks and select variables based on real-world AI application timing"] --> E["Apply selection filters: retain only pre-trial features, remove identical or null values, apply task-specific criteria"]
    E["Apply selection filters: retain only pre-trial features, remove identical or null values, apply task-specific criteria"] --> F["Organize multi-modal features including SMILES strings, ICD-10 codes, text, categorical/numerical data, and MeSH terms"]
    F["Organize multi-modal features including SMILES strings, ICD-10 codes, text, categorical/numerical data, and MeSH terms"] --> G["Curate 23 datasets for 8 tasks with defined inputs and outputs per task specification"]
    G["Curate 23 datasets for 8 tasks with defined inputs and outputs per task specification"] --> H["Validate each task with baseline AI methods to ensure dataset usability and reliability"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从ClinicalTrials.gov收集2024年2月16日前注册的临床试验XML记录"] --> B["解析XML文件提取试验ID、疾病、药物、标题、摘要、阶段、入选标准和结果"]
    B["解析XML文件提取试验ID、疾病、药物、标题、摘要、阶段、入选标准和结果"] --> C["整合DrugBank的药物分子结构和TrialTrove子集的试验结果数据"]
    C["整合DrugBank的药物分子结构和TrialTrove子集的试验结果数据"] --> D["为8个任务人工定义预测目标并根据实际应用时机选择变量"]
    D["为8个任务人工定义预测目标并根据实际应用时机选择变量"] --> E["应用筛选过滤器:仅保留试验前特征,移除相同或空值,应用任务特定标准"]
    E["应用筛选过滤器:仅保留试验前特征,移除相同或空值,应用任务特定标准"] --> F["组织多模态特征包括SMILES字符串、ICD-10编码、文本、分类数值数据和MeSH术语"]
    F["组织多模态特征包括SMILES字符串、ICD-10编码、文本、分类数值数据和MeSH术语"] --> G["为8个任务策划23个数据集并按任务规范定义输入输出"]
    G["为8个任务策划23个数据集并按任务规范定义输入输出"] --> H["用基线AI方法验证各任务以确保数据集可用性和可靠性"]

name: TroubleshootingBench
intro: TroubleshootingBench是一个用于评估模型识别和纠正生物协议中实际错误能力的基准测试。它包含一个由专家编写的湿实验室程序故障排除数据集，侧重于隐含知识和未在线发布的未受污染程序。该数据集包括52个协议，每个协议都配有三个专家编写的故障排除问题，旨在测试模型在非公开、基于经验的协议和依赖于隐性程序知识的错误上的表现。
intro_en: TroubleshootingBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate models' ability to identify and correct real errors in biological protocols. It includes a dataset of wet lab protocol troubleshooting cases written by experts, focusing on implicit knowledge and unpublished, uncontaminated protocols. The dataset contains 52 protocols, each paired with three expert-crafted troubleshooting questions, aimed at testing model performance on non-public, experience-based protocols and errors relying on implicit procedural knowledge.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate 52 wet lab protocols focusing on unpublished procedures with tacit knowledge"] --> B["Have domain experts write three troubleshooting questions per protocol"]
    B["Have domain experts write three troubleshooting questions per protocol"] --> C["Ensure questions test implicit procedural knowledge not available online"]
    C["Ensure questions test implicit procedural knowledge not available online"] --> D["Establish expert human baseline performance estimates for comparison"]
    D["Establish expert human baseline performance estimates for comparison"] --> E["Evaluate models using pass@1 metric on protocol debugging tasks"]
    E["Evaluate models using pass@1 metric on protocol debugging tasks"] --> F["Compare model performance against expert baselines and other frontier models"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["收集52个湿实验室协议，聚焦未发布的隐性知识程序"] --> B["由领域专家为每个协议编写三个故障排除问题"]
    B["由领域专家为每个协议编写三个故障排除问题"] --> C["确保问题测试线上不可得的隐性程序知识"]
    C["确保问题测试线上不可得的隐性程序知识"] --> D["建立专家人类基线表现估计用于对比"]
    D["建立专家人类基线表现估计用于对比"] --> E["使用pass@1指标评估模型的协议调试任务"]
    E["使用pass@1指标评估模型的协议调试任务"] --> F["将模型表现与专家基线和其他前沿模型对比"]

name: TrustLLM
intro: TrustLLM是一项关于LLM可信度的综合研究，提出涵盖八个维度的可信原则，并基于此建立包含真诚性、安全性、公平性、鲁棒性、隐私及机器伦理等六个维度的评测基准。研究评估了16个主流LLM，涉及30多个数据集。
build_method: 混合, 人工标注, 专家构建, 网络爬取
metric: Accuracy, F1, BLEU, ROUGE, Perplexity, LLM-as-Judge
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 分类, 生成
eval_feature: 多轮, 对抗性, 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Classification, Generation
build_method_en: Hybrid, Human Annotation, Expert Curation, Web Crawling
intro_en: TrustLLM is a comprehensive study on LLM trustworthiness, proposing trust principles across eight dimensions and establishing an evaluation benchmark covering six dimensions: sincerity, safety, fairness, robustness, privacy, and machine ethics. The study assesses 16 mainstream LLMs using over 30 datasets.
metric_en: Accuracy, F1, BLEU, ROUGE, Perplexity, LLM-as-Judge
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Establish trustworthiness principles across eight dimensions for LLMs"] --> B["Curate over 30 datasets covering truthfulness, safety, fairness, robustness, privacy, and machine ethics"]
    B["Curate over 30 datasets covering truthfulness, safety, fairness, robustness, privacy, and machine ethics"] --> C["Select 16 mainstream LLMs for evaluation including proprietary and open-source models"]
    C["Select 16 mainstream LLMs for evaluation including proprietary and open-source models"] --> D["Evaluate ground-truth labeled tasks like stereotype recognition and moral behavior classification"]
    D["Evaluate ground-truth labeled tasks like stereotype recognition and moral behavior classification"] --> E["Test open-ended tasks including knowledge-grounded dialogue and hallucination detection"]
    E["Test open-ended tasks including knowledge-grounded dialogue and hallucination detection"] --> F["Assess robustness via adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution task resilience"]
    F["Assess robustness via adversarial attacks and out-of-distribution task resilience"] --> G["Evaluate privacy using Enron Email Dataset and test for information leakage"]
    G["Evaluate privacy using Enron Email Dataset and test for information leakage"] --> H["Test safety against jailbreak attacks, toxicity, and measure exaggerated safety responses"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["建立LLM的八维度可信原则"] --> B["整理30多个数据集涵盖六个维度"]
    B["整理30多个数据集涵盖六个维度"] --> C["选择16个主流LLM进行评测"]
    C["选择16个主流LLM进行评测"] --> D["评估刻板印象识别等有标注任务"]
    D["评估刻板印象识别等有标注任务"] --> E["测试知识对话等开放式任务"]
    E["测试知识对话等开放式任务"] --> F["通过对抗攻击评估鲁棒性"]
    F["通过对抗攻击评估鲁棒性"] --> G["用安然邮件数据集评估隐私泄露"]
    G["用安然邮件数据集评估隐私泄露"] --> H["测试越狱攻击和过度安全响应"]

name: TruthfulQA
intro: TruthfulQA基准用于衡量语言模型回答问题时的真实性。它包含817个问题，涵盖38个类别，旨在诱导模型产生基于常见人类误解的错误答案，从而促使模型避免重复网络文本中的虚假信息。
metric: Accuracy, BLEURT, ROUGE, BLEU, GPT-judge, GPT-info
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
eval_feature: 对抗性, 领域特定
intro_en: The TruthfulQA benchmark measures the truthfulness of language models' answers. It contains 817 questions across 38 categories, designed to induce models to produce errors based on common human misconceptions, thereby encouraging them to avoid repeating false information found in web text.
metric_en: Accuracy, BLEURT, ROUGE, BLEU, GPT-judge, GPT-info
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Craft 817 questions across 38 categories that humans would answer falsely due to misconceptions"] --> B["Design questions to induce imitative falsehoods learned from web text training data"]
    B["Design questions to induce imitative falsehoods learned from web text training data"] --> C["Generate answers from GPT-3, GPT-Neo/J, GPT-2, and T5-based models"]
    C["Generate answers from GPT-3, GPT-Neo/J, GPT-2, and T5-based models"] --> D["Collect human evaluations judging whether each generated answer is true or false"]
    D["Collect human evaluations judging whether each generated answer is true or false"] --> E["Establish human baseline performance at 94% truthfulness on the questions"]
    E["Establish human baseline performance at 94% truthfulness on the questions"] --> F["Finetune GPT-3 on human true/false evaluations to create automated truthfulness judge"]
    F["Finetune GPT-3 on human true/false evaluations to create automated truthfulness judge"] --> G["Validate automated judge achieving 90-96% accuracy on held-out models"]
    G["Validate automated judge achieving 90-96% accuracy on held-out models"] --> H["Construct multiple-choice task for quick and reproducible model assessment"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["设计817个涵盖38类的问题，人类会因误解而答错"] --> B["设计问题诱导模型产生从网络文本学到的模仿性错误"]
    B["设计问题诱导模型产生从网络文本学到的模仿性错误"] --> C["用GPT-3、GPT-Neo/J、GPT-2和T5模型生成答案"]
    C["用GPT-3、GPT-Neo/J、GPT-2和T5模型生成答案"] --> D["收集人类评估判断每个生成答案的真假"]
    D["收集人类评估判断每个生成答案的真假"] --> E["建立人类基线，在问题上达到94%真实性"]
    E["建立人类基线，在问题上达到94%真实性"] --> F["用人类真假评估微调GPT-3创建自动真实性判断器"]
    F["用人类真假评估微调GPT-3创建自动真实性判断器"] --> G["验证自动判断器在留出模型上达到90-96%准确率"]
    G["验证自动判断器在留出模型上达到90-96%准确率"] --> H["构建多项选择任务以快速可复现地评估模型"]

name: TVBench
intro: TVBench是一个新颖的开源视频多项选择问答基准，旨在评估视频语言模型中的时间理解能力。它通过设计具有时间挑战性的候选答案、减少文本偏见以及排除需要先验知识的问题来解决现有视频语言基准的局限性。TVBench要求模型高度依赖时间理解，而非静态信息或世界知识。
org: University of Santiago de Compostela, University of Amsterdam, University of Technology Nuremberg
intro_en: TVBench is a novel open-source video multiple-choice question answering benchmark designed to evaluate temporal understanding in video language models. It addresses limitations of existing video language benchmarks by creating temporally challenging candidate answers, reducing textual biases, and excluding questions requiring prior knowledge. TVBench demands models rely heavily on temporal understanding rather than static information or world knowledge.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select video content suitable for temporal reasoning questions without reliance on world knowledge"] --> B["Design task-specific text templates to generate questions that avoid being overly informative"]
    B["Design task-specific text templates to generate questions that avoid being overly informative"] --> C["Generate questions answerable only from video content, excluding those solvable by world knowledge"]
    C["Generate questions answerable only from video content, excluding those solvable by world knowledge"] --> D["Create temporally challenging candidate answers requiring multi-frame temporal information to distinguish"]
    D["Create temporally challenging candidate answers requiring multi-frame temporal information to distinguish"] --> E["Validate that single-frame and text-only models perform at random chance levels"]
    E["Validate that single-frame and text-only models perform at random chance levels"] --> F["Evaluate state-of-the-art video-language models on the multiple-choice question-answering benchmark"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["选择适合时序推理且不依赖先验知识的视频内容"] --> B["设计任务专用文本模板生成问题避免过度信息化"]
    B["设计任务专用文本模板生成问题避免过度信息化"] --> C["生成仅可从视频内容回答的问题排除先验知识"]
    C["生成仅可从视频内容回答的问题排除先验知识"] --> D["创建需要多帧时序信息区分的时序挑战候选答案"]
    D["创建需要多帧时序信息区分的时序挑战候选答案"] --> E["验证单帧和纯文本模型表现接近随机水平"]
    E["验证单帧和纯文本模型表现接近随机水平"] --> F["在多项选择问答基准上评估先进视频语言模型"]

name: UNICBench
intro: UNICBench 是一个统一的多模态计数基准，覆盖图像、文档和音频三种模态，并提供统一协议、确定性数值解析和分层报告，用于严谨评估多模态大模型的计数能力。
build_method: 准确真值, 确定性数值解析, 分层报告
modality: 图像, 文本, 音频, 多模态
eval_feature: 多模态, 计数
intro_en: UNICBench is a unified multimodal counting benchmark covering image, document, and audio inputs. It provides a unified protocol, deterministic numeric parsing, and stratified reporting for rigorous evaluation of MLLM counting ability.
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["汇聚图像、文本、音频三类计数数据源"] --> B["分别做去重、质检和模态内标注统一"]
    B --> C["转换成统一的 QA-evidence JSON 结构"]
    C --> D["给问题打上 Pattern / Semantic / Reasoning 层级"]
    D --> E["同时标注 Easy / Medium / Hard 难度"]
    E --> F["固定切分、提示词与数值解析协议"]
    F --> G["分别运行 image、text、audio 三条评测赛道"]
    G --> H["输出 Success Rate、MAE、MSE 与分层统计"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Aggregate counting data from image, text, and audio sources"] --> B["Deduplicate, quality-check, and normalize annotations within each modality"]
    B --> C["Convert everything into a unified QA-evidence JSON schema"]
    C --> D["Assign Pattern / Semantic / Reasoning counting levels"]
    D --> E["Tag each question with Easy / Medium / Hard difficulty"]
    E --> F["Fix data splits, prompts, and numeric-parsing rules"]
    F --> G["Run separate image, text, and audio evaluation tracks"]
    G --> H["Report Success Rate, MAE, MSE, and stratified summaries"]
build_method_en: accurate ground truth, deterministic numeric parsing, stratified reporting

name: Vending Bench
intro: Vending-Bench是一个模拟环境，旨在测试基于LLM的Agent在长期运行的业务场景中保持连贯性的能力。该基准要求Agent管理自动售货机，包括平衡库存、下订单、定价和处理日常费用。实验表明，LLM在长期任务中的表现差异很大，一些模型能够盈利，但所有模型都可能因误解交付计划或遗忘订单而失败。该基准有助于评估AI系统在复杂、长期决策中的持续连贯性。
build_method: 模拟环境
intro_en: Vending-Bench is a simulated environment designed to test the ability of LLM-based Agents to maintain coherence in long-running business scenarios. The benchmark requires Agents to manage vending machines, including balancing inventory, placing orders, pricing, and handling daily expenses. Experiments show significant performance variation among LLMs in long-term tasks; some models can turn a profit, but all may fail due to misunderstanding delivery schedules or forgetting orders. This benchmark helps evaluate AI systems' sustained coherence in complex, long-term decision-making.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Implement agent loop with 30k token context, three memory databases, and vending machine tools"] --> B["Configure simulated environment with $500 start, $2 daily fee, and 2,000 message limit"]
    B["Configure simulated environment with $500 start, $2 daily fee, and 2,000 message limit"] --> C["Simulate supplier email responses using GPT-4o and customer purchasing based on pricing competitiveness"]
    C["Simulate supplier email responses using GPT-4o and customer purchasing based on pricing competitiveness"] --> D["Run each LLM agent for five trials until message limit or 10-day bankruptcy"]
    D["Run each LLM agent for five trials until message limit or 10-day bankruptcy"] --> E["Collect human baseline by having participant operate via chat interface for five hours"]
    E["Collect human baseline by having participant operate via chat interface for five hours"] --> F["Calculate net worth as cash plus vending machine cash plus inventory wholesale value"]
    F["Calculate net worth as cash plus vending machine cash plus inventory wholesale value"] --> G["Rank models by mean net worth, minimum net worth, and days until sales stagnation"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["实现智能体循环含3万token上下文、三种内存数据库和售货机工具"] --> B["配置模拟环境起始500美元、日费2美元、限2000条消息"]
    B["配置模拟环境起始500美元、日费2美元、限2000条消息"] --> C["用GPT-4o模拟供应商邮件回复及基于价格的顾客购买行为"]
    C["用GPT-4o模拟供应商邮件回复及基于价格的顾客购买行为"] --> D["每个LLM智能体运行五次试验直至消息上限或破产十天"]
    D["每个LLM智能体运行五次试验直至消息上限或破产十天"] --> E["通过参与者用聊天界面操作五小时收集人类基线"]
    E["通过参与者用聊天界面操作五小时收集人类基线"] --> F["计算净值为现金加售货机现金加库存批发价值"]
    F["计算净值为现金加售货机现金加库存批发价值"] --> G["按平均净值、最低净值和销售停滞天数对模型排名"]

name: VIBE
intro: VIBE是MiniMax推出的新基准，旨在衡量模型从零开始构建完整、可运行应用的全栈能力。它采用“Agent-as-a-Verifier” (AaaV) 范式，在真实的执行环境中自动评估应用的交互逻辑和视觉呈现，覆盖了Web、移动端（Android/iOS）、后端和科学模拟等多个领域。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
metric: 执行、交互和视觉/美学层
modality: 文本, 代码, 多模态
intro_en: VIBE is a new benchmark introduced by MiniMax designed to measure a model's full-stack ability to build complete, functional applications from scratch. It uses the "Agent-as-a-Verifier" (AaaV) paradigm to automatically evaluate the interaction logic and visual presentation of applications in real execution environments, covering multiple domains including Web, mobile (Android/iOS), backend, and scientific simulation.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Organize tasks into three-level hierarchy: Deictic, Morphological, and Causal reasoning levels"] --> B["Curate 1,034 samples across 10 subtasks reflecting increasing complexity in visual instruction following"]
    B["Curate 1,034 samples across 10 subtasks reflecting increasing complexity in visual instruction following"] --> C["Manually annotate or verify all samples by human annotators"]
    C["Manually annotate or verify all samples by human annotators"] --> D["Design task-specific evaluation metrics for Instruction Adherence, Contextual Preservation, and Visual Coherence"]
    D["Design task-specific evaluation metrics for Instruction Adherence, Contextual Preservation, and Visual Coherence"] --> E["Deploy GPT-5.1 as LMM-as-a-Judge evaluator with input image, textual and visual instructions"]
    E["Deploy GPT-5.1 as LMM-as-a-Judge evaluator with input image, textual and visual instructions"] --> F["Evaluate each sample three times independently to reduce stochastic variance"]
    F["Evaluate each sample three times independently to reduce stochastic variance"] --> G["Average scores over three runs and report on 100-point scale"]
    G["Average scores over three runs and report on 100-point scale"] --> H["Benchmark 17 proprietary and open-source models across all hierarchy levels"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["将任务组织为三级层次结构：指示级、形态级和因果推理级"] --> B["策划1034个样本涵盖10个子任务，反映视觉指令遵循的递增复杂度"]
    B["策划1034个样本涵盖10个子任务，反映视觉指令遵循的递增复杂度"] --> C["由人工标注员手动标注或验证所有样本"]
    C["由人工标注员手动标注或验证所有样本"] --> D["为指令遵循度、上下文保留和视觉连贯性设计任务特定评估指标"]
    D["为指令遵循度、上下文保留和视觉连贯性设计任务特定评估指标"] --> E["部署GPT-5.1作为LMM评判器，输入图像、文本和视觉指令"]
    E["部署GPT-5.1作为LMM评判器，输入图像、文本和视觉指令"] --> F["对每个样本独立评估三次以减少随机方差"]
    F["对每个样本独立评估三次以减少随机方差"] --> G["对三次运行的分数取平均并以百分制报告"]
    G["对三次运行的分数取平均并以百分制报告"] --> H["在所有层次级别上对17个专有和开源模型进行基准测试"]

name: VibeEval
intro: Vibe-Eval是一个用于评估多模态聊天模型的新型开放基准测试框架。它包含269个视觉理解提示，其中100个难度较高，并附有专家编写的黄金标准答案。该基准旨在通过日常任务对多模态聊天模型进行“氛围检查”，并严格测试和探究当前前沿模型的能力。其挑战性在于，即使是前沿模型，在难度较高的测试集中也有超过50%的问题回答错误。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: Vibe-Eval is a novel open benchmark framework for evaluating multimodal chat models. It includes 269 visual understanding prompts, with 100 being more challenging, accompanied by expert-crafted gold standard answers. The benchmark aims to perform an "atmosphere check" on multimodal chat models through everyday tasks, rigorously testing and probing the capabilities of current state-of-the-art models. Its challenge lies in the fact that even leading models answer over 50% of the questions incorrectly in the more difficult test set.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Team members collect 269 image-text prompts with objectively correct answers using owned or permissive-license images"] --> B["Annotators write golden reference responses including reasoning steps for each prompt following provided guidelines"]
    B["Annotators write golden reference responses including reasoning steps for each prompt following provided guidelines"] --> C["Conduct two rounds of independent review to ensure prompt and response quality meet requirements"]
    C["Conduct two rounds of independent review to ensure prompt and response quality meet requirements"] --> D["Partition prompts into 169 normal-set and 100 hard-set based on Reka Core's solving capability"]
    D["Partition prompts into 169 normal-set and 100 hard-set based on Reka Core's solving capability"] --> E["Generate model responses for all 269 prompts at temperature 0.0 in zero-shot chat style"]
    E["Generate model responses for all 269 prompts at temperature 0.0 in zero-shot chat style"] --> F["Reka Core evaluator rates each response on 1-5 scale using prompt, generation, and reference; average three runs"]
    F["Reka Core evaluator rates each response on 1-5 scale using prompt, generation, and reference; average three runs"] --> G["Collect ~20k human pairwise preferences via third-party annotators and compute ELO leaderboard scores"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["团队成员收集269个图像文本提示及客观正确答案"] --> B["标注员按指南为每个提示编写含推理步骤的黄金参考答案"]
    B["标注员按指南为每个提示编写含推理步骤的黄金参考答案"] --> C["进行两轮独立审查确保提示和答案质量达标"]
