    C["进行两轮独立审查确保提示和答案质量达标"] --> D["根据Reka Core求解能力将提示分为169个普通集和100个困难集"]
    D["根据Reka Core求解能力将提示分为169个普通集和100个困难集"] --> E["以零样本对话方式在温度0.0下生成所有269个提示的模型响应"]
    E["以零样本对话方式在温度0.0下生成所有269个提示的模型响应"] --> F["Reka Core评估器用提示、生成和参考对响应评分1-5分并取三次平均"]
    F["Reka Core评估器用提示、生成和参考对响应评分1-5分并取三次平均"] --> G["通过第三方标注员收集约2万对人类偏好并计算ELO排行榜分数"]

name: Video SimpleQA
intro: Video SimpleQA是一个旨在评估大型视频语言模型（LVLMs）事实性基础的综合基准。它通过多跳事实追溯问题、短形式确定性答案和时间定位要求，专注于视频上下文中的事实性评估。该基准要求模型整合视频显式叙述之外的外部知识，并对模型进行细粒度、逐步评估。研究发现，当前LVLMs在事实遵守方面存在显著缺陷，且模型普遍过度自信。
intro_en: Video SimpleQA is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the factual grounding of large video language models (LVLMs). It focuses on factual assessment within video contexts through multi-hop fact-tracing questions, short-form definitive answers, and temporal localization requirements. The benchmark requires models to integrate external knowledge beyond explicit video narration and provides fine-grained, step-by-step evaluation. Studies show that current LVLMs have significant deficiencies in factual compliance and tend to be overly confident.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Curate knowledge-intensive videos from Wikimedia Commons 'Media of the Day' with descriptions."] --> B["Extract key terms via GPT-4o; retrieve definitions using LlamaIndex RAG from Google and Bing."]
    B["Extract key terms via GPT-4o; retrieve definitions using LlamaIndex RAG from Google and Bing."] --> C["Generator LLM creates candidate QA pairs from videos and encyclopedic knowledge."]
    C["Generator LLM creates candidate QA pairs from videos and encyclopedic knowledge."] --> D["Critic LLM evaluates compliance with six criteria; iterate refinement up to three cycles."]
    D["Critic LLM evaluates compliance with six criteria; iterate refinement up to three cycles."] --> E["Exclude questions answered correctly by all four SOTA models to ensure difficulty."]
    E["Exclude questions answered correctly by all four SOTA models to ensure difficulty."] --> F["Two annotators independently verify each question; discard non-compliant ones and verify answers."]
    F["Two annotators independently verify each question; discard non-compliant ones and verify answers."] --> G["Annotate per-hop sub-QAs alongside final multi-hop QA pairs for step-by-step evaluation."]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从维基共享资源每日媒体页面收集知识密集型视频及描述"] --> B["用GPT-4o提取关键术语并通过RAG检索定义构建百科"]
    B["用GPT-4o提取关键术语并通过RAG检索定义构建百科"] --> C["生成器LLM根据视频和百科知识创建候选问答对"]
    C["生成器LLM根据视频和百科知识创建候选问答对"] --> D["评判LLM依据六项标准评估合规性并迭代优化至多三轮"]
    D["评判LLM依据六项标准评估合规性并迭代优化至多三轮"] --> E["排除四个顶尖模型均答对的问题以确保难度"]
    E["排除四个顶尖模型均答对的问题以确保难度"] --> F["两名标注员独立验证每个问题并丢弃不合规问题"]
    F["两名标注员独立验证每个问题并丢弃不合规问题"] --> G["为最终多跳问答标注每跳子问答以支持逐步评估"]

name: Video-Holmes
intro: Video-Holmes是一个受福尔摩斯推理过程启发的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的复杂视频推理能力。它包含1,837个问题，这些问题来源于270部人工标注的悬疑短片，涵盖七个精心设计的任务。每个任务都要求模型主动定位并连接分散在不同视频片段中的多个相关视觉线索。对现有最先进MLLM的评估显示，它们在整合信息和发现关键线索方面存在显著困难。
org: ARC Lab, Tencent PCG, City University of Hong Kong
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
metric: Accuracy, SR, IMC, TCI, TA, MHR, PAR, CTI
eval_feature: 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: Video-Holmes is a benchmark inspired by Sherlock Holmes' reasoning process, designed to evaluate the complex video reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 1,837 questions derived from 270 manually annotated suspense short videos, covering seven carefully designed tasks. Each task requires the model to actively locate and connect multiple relevant visual clues scattered across different video segments. Evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals significant challenges in information integration and key clue discovery.
metric_en: Accuracy, SR, IMC, TCI, TA, MHR, PAR, CTI
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Search YouTube for suspense short films using keyword and nine subkeywords, filtering for 1-5 minute durations"] --> B["Manually curate 270 high-quality reasoning-rich films from over 2,500 retrieved videos with audio"]
    B["Manually curate 270 high-quality reasoning-rich films from over 2,500 retrieved videos with audio"] --> C["Annotate each film with segmented plots, character relationships, reasoning shots with timestamps, supernatural elements, and core themes"]
    C["Annotate each film with segmented plots, character relationships, reasoning shots with timestamps, supernatural elements, and core themes"] --> D["Design seven tasks requiring active clue location and multi-clue connection across video segments"]
    D["Design seven tasks requiring active clue location and multi-clue connection across video segments"] --> E["Use DeepSeek to generate 1,837 questions with answers and explanations based on manual annotations"]
    E["Use DeepSeek to generate 1,837 questions with answers and explanations based on manual annotations"] --> F["Evaluate MLLMs by requiring step-by-step reasoning generation before final answer on all tasks"]
    F["Evaluate MLLMs by requiring step-by-step reasoning generation before final answer on all tasks"] --> G["Apply DeepSeek to analyze model responses for visual perception, visual omission, and reasoning errors"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用关键词和九个子关键词搜索YouTube悬疑短片，筛选1-5分钟时长"] --> B["从超过2500个视频中人工筛选270部高质量推理短片"]
    B["从超过2500个视频中人工筛选270部高质量推理短片"] --> C["标注每部影片的分段情节、角色关系、推理镜头时间戳、超自然元素和核心主题"]
    C["标注每部影片的分段情节、角色关系、推理镜头时间戳、超自然元素和核心主题"] --> D["设计七个需要主动定位线索并跨片段连接多线索的任务"]
    D["设计七个需要主动定位线索并跨片段连接多线索的任务"] --> E["使用DeepSeek基于人工标注生成1837个问题及答案和解释"]
    E["使用DeepSeek基于人工标注生成1837个问题及答案和解释"] --> F["要求模型在所有任务中先生成逐步推理再给出最终答案进行评估"]
    F["要求模型在所有任务中先生成逐步推理再给出最终答案进行评估"] --> G["应用DeepSeek分析模型回答中的视觉感知、视觉遗漏和推理错误"]

name: Video-MME
intro: Video-MME是一个全面的多模态大语言模型视频分析评测基准。它涵盖了从短视频到长达一小时的视频，包含6个视觉领域和30个子领域的900个视频，共计2700个问答对。该基准不仅评估视频内容，还结合了字幕和音频，旨在全面评估模型在处理时序视觉数据时的多模态理解能力。
org: Nanjing University, Tencent Youtu Lab, ByteDance, MME-Benchmarks
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
modality: 视频, 音频, 文本
eval_feature: 长文本, Multi-modal
intro_en: Video-MME is a comprehensive multimodal large language model video analysis benchmark. It covers videos ranging from short clips to one-hour-long footage, including 900 videos across 6 visual domains and 30 subdomains, with a total of 2700 QA pairs. The benchmark evaluates not only video content but also integrates subtitles and audio, aiming to thoroughly assess models' multimodal understanding of temporal visual data.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Establish domain hierarchy with 6 key domains and 30 fine-grained video categories"] --> B["Collect 900 videos from YouTube across categories with short, medium, and long durations"]
    B["Collect 900 videos from YouTube across categories with short, medium, and long durations"] --> C["Obtain meta-information including subtitles and audios for all collected videos"]
    C["Obtain meta-information including subtitles and audios for all collected videos"] --> D["Recruit annotators with English proficiency and vision-language research experience"]
    D["Recruit annotators with English proficiency and vision-language research experience"] --> E["Annotators view entire videos and create three multiple-choice questions with four options each"]
    E["Annotators view entire videos and create three multiple-choice questions with four options each"] --> F["Design questions across 12 task types covering perception, reasoning, and information synthesis"]
    F["Design questions across 12 task types covering perception, reasoning, and information synthesis"] --> G["Conduct quality review of all 2,700 manually annotated question-answer pairs"]
    G["Conduct quality review of all 2,700 manually annotated question-answer pairs"] --> H["Evaluate MLLMs using multiple-choice format and calculate accuracy across video durations and domains"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["建立包含6个关键领域和30个细分类别的领域层级"] --> B["从YouTube收集900个不同时长的视频"]
    B["从YouTube收集900个不同时长的视频"] --> C["获取所有视频的字幕和音频等元信息"]
    C["获取所有视频的字幕和音频等元信息"] --> D["招募具有英语能力和视觉语言研究经验的标注员"]
    D["招募具有英语能力和视觉语言研究经验的标注员"] --> E["标注员观看完整视频并创建三个四选一问题"]
    E["标注员观看完整视频并创建三个四选一问题"] --> F["设计涵盖感知、推理和信息综合的12类任务问题"]
    F["设计涵盖感知、推理和信息综合的12类任务问题"] --> G["对全部2700个人工标注问答对进行质量审核"]
    G["对全部2700个人工标注问答对进行质量审核"] --> H["使用选择题格式评估模型并计算各时长和领域准确率"]

name: VideoMMMU
intro: Video-MMMU是一个多模态、多学科的视频基准测试，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）从教育视频中获取和利用知识的能力。它包含300个专家级视频和900个人工标注的问题，涵盖感知、理解和适应三个认知阶段，通过阶段对齐的问答对进行知识获取评估。该基准测试揭示了LMMs在认知需求增加时性能显著下降，并突显了模型与人类知识获取之间的巨大差距。
org: Kairui Hu, Penghao Wu, Fanyi Pu, Wang Xiao, Yuanhan Zhang, Xiang Yue, Bo Li, Ziwei Liu
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: Video-MMMU is a multimodal, multidisciplinary video benchmark designed to evaluate large multimodal models' (LMMs) ability to acquire and utilize knowledge from educational videos. It includes 300 expert-level videos and 900 manually annotated questions, covering three cognitive stages: perception, understanding, and adaptation. Knowledge acquisition is assessed through stage-aligned question-answer pairs. The benchmark reveals a significant performance drop in LMMs as cognitive demands increase and highlights the substantial gap between model and human knowledge acquisition.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Domain experts analyze college curricula across 30 subjects to establish 450 foundational assessment topics"] --> B["Generate 10 search queries per topic using GPT-4o and retrieve candidate videos via YouTube Data API"]
    B["Generate 10 search queries per topic using GPT-4o and retrieve candidate videos via YouTube Data API"] --> C["Annotators filter videos with poor audio-visual quality; GPT-4o assesses technical depth from 10 sampled frames per video"]
    C["Annotators filter videos with poor audio-visual quality; GPT-4o assesses technical depth from 10 sampled frames per video"] --> D["Domain experts verify 300 videos align with college curriculum standards and appropriate knowledge depth"]
    D["Domain experts verify 300 videos align with college curriculum standards and appropriate knowledge depth"] --> E["Annotate three question-answer pairs per video aligned with Perception, Comprehension, and Adaptation cognitive stages"]
    E["Annotate three question-answer pairs per video aligned with Perception, Comprehension, and Adaptation cognitive stages"] --> F["Design Perception questions for OCR and ASR, Comprehension for concepts and problem-solving strategies, Adaptation for novel scenarios"]
    F["Design Perception questions for OCR and ASR, Comprehension for concepts and problem-solving strategies, Adaptation for novel scenarios"] --> G["Evaluate LMMs on 900 questions and compute Δknowledge metric measuring performance gains after video viewing"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["领域专家分析30个学科的大学课程建立450个基础评估主题"] --> B["用GPT-4o为每个主题生成10个搜索查询并通过YouTube API检索候选视频"]
    B["用GPT-4o为每个主题生成10个搜索查询并通过YouTube API检索候选视频"] --> C["标注员过滤低质量视频GPT-4o从每个视频的10帧评估技术深度"]
    C["标注员过滤低质量视频GPT-4o从每个视频的10帧评估技术深度"] --> D["领域专家验证300个视频符合大学课程标准和适当知识深度"]
    D["领域专家验证300个视频符合大学课程标准和适当知识深度"] --> E["为每个视频标注三个与感知理解和适应认知阶段对齐的问答对"]
    E["为每个视频标注三个与感知理解和适应认知阶段对齐的问答对"] --> F["设计感知问题测OCR和ASR理解问题测概念和解题策略适应问题测新场景"]
    F["设计感知问题测OCR和ASR理解问题测概念和解题策略适应问题测新场景"] --> G["在900个问题上评估LMM并计算观看视频后性能提升的Δknowledge指标"]

name: VideoReasonBench
intro: VideoReasonBench是一个旨在评估以视觉为中心、复杂视频推理能力的基准。它通过包含一系列精细操作的视频来确保视觉丰富性和高推理复杂性，这些操作作用于视频中部分可见的潜在状态。该基准评估了回忆观察到的视觉信息、推断潜在状态内容以及预测视频之外信息这三个递进的视频推理技能级别。研究发现，大多数多模态大语言模型在此基准上表现不佳，且扩展思维预算对于提升性能至关重要。
org: Peking University, Moonshot AI, Nanjing University
eval_feature: 思维链, 零样本
intro_en: VideoReasonBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate visually-centered, complex video reasoning capabilities. It ensures visual richness and high reasoning complexity by including videos with a series of fine-grained operations acting on partially visible latent states. The benchmark assesses three progressive levels of video reasoning skills: recalling observed visual information, inferring latent state content, and predicting information beyond the video. Studies show that most multimodal large language models perform poorly on this benchmark, and scaling the reasoning budget is crucial for improving performance.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Randomly initialize state and generate operation sequences with state transitions following demonstration-specific rules"] --> B["Generate videos programmatically via Matplotlib for Number/Circle/Cup or record human actors for File/Card/Chip demonstrations"]
    B["Generate videos programmatically via Matplotlib for Number/Circle/Cup or record human actors for File/Card/Chip demonstrations"] --> C["Create questions across three levels: recall operations, infer latent states, predict beyond video content"]
    C["Create questions across three levels: recall operations, infer latent states, predict beyond video content"] --> D["Construct 1,440 questions from 240 videos with equal distribution per skill and 5-14 operations per video"]
    D["Construct 1,440 questions from 240 videos with equal distribution per skill and 5-14 operations per video"] --> E["Evaluate 18 MLLMs including proprietary, thinking-augmented, and open-source models using official APIs or local inference"]
    E["Evaluate 18 MLLMs including proprietary, thinking-augmented, and open-source models using official APIs or local inference"] --> F["Use Qwen2.5-72B judge to assess response correctness by comparing model answers with ground-truth answers"]
    F["Use Qwen2.5-72B judge to assess response correctness by comparing model answers with ground-truth answers"] --> G["For Predict Operation questions, extract operations from responses and simulate state transitions to verify target match"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["随机初始化状态并按演示规则生成操作序列及状态转换"] --> B["用Matplotlib生成数字/圆圈/杯子视频或录制文件/卡片/筹码演示"]
    B["用Matplotlib生成数字/圆圈/杯子视频或录制文件/卡片/筹码演示"] --> C["创建三级问题:回忆操作、推断潜在状态、预测视频外内容"]
    C["创建三级问题:回忆操作、推断潜在状态、预测视频外内容"] --> D["从240个视频构建1440个问题,每技能均分,每视频5-14个操作"]
    D["从240个视频构建1440个问题,每技能均分,每视频5-14个操作"] --> E["评估18个多模态模型,含专有、思维增强和开源模型"]
    E["评估18个多模态模型,含专有、思维增强和开源模型"] --> F["用Qwen2.5-72B判断模型答案与标准答案的正确性"]
    F["用Qwen2.5-72B判断模型答案与标准答案的正确性"] --> G["对预测操作问题,提取操作并模拟状态转换以验证目标匹配"]

name: VisFactor
intro: VisFactor是一个新颖的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）的基本视觉认知能力。它将Factor-Referenced Cognitive Test（FRCT）中20个以视觉为中心的子测试数字化，涵盖人类视觉认知的四个领域。该基准测试设计了算法，可以自动构建和验证具有可控难度的无限测试用例。通过VisFactor，研究人员评估了23个前沿MLLMs，发现模型在心理旋转、空间关系推理和图形-背景区分等任务上表现不佳，表明现有通用基准测试的改进可能未能真正掌握类人视觉认知。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Tencent AI Lab, Nanyang Technological U
modality: 图像, 文本, 多模态
task_type: 视觉推理, 图像问答
intro_en: VisFactor is a novel benchmark designed to evaluate the fundamental visual cognition abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It digitizes 20 visually-centered subtests from the Factor-Referenced Cognitive Test (FRCT), covering four domains of human visual cognition. The benchmark includes algorithms that automatically generate and validate unlimited test cases with controllable difficulty. Using VisFactor, researchers assessed 23 state-of-the-art MLLMs and found that models performed poorly on tasks such as mental rotation, spatial relation reasoning, and figure-ground discrimination, indicating that improvements in existing general benchmarks may not truly capture human-like visual cognition.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select 20 vision-centric subtests from FRCT covering 10 cognitive factors across four domains"] --> B["Use GPT-4o and Gemini-2.5-Flash to summarize instructions into minimal AI-friendly prompts"]
    B["Use GPT-4o and Gemini-2.5-Flash to summarize instructions into minimal AI-friendly prompts"] --> C["Human annotator reconciles model summaries with original FRCT manuals to finalize prompts"]
    C["Human annotator reconciles model summaries with original FRCT manuals to finalize prompts"] --> D["Capture all images at 300 dpi and crop to task stimuli regions only"]
    D["Capture all images at 300 dpi and crop to task stimuli regions only"] --> E["Extract ground-truth answers verbatim from FRCT manuals for each subtest"]
    E["Extract ground-truth answers verbatim from FRCT manuals for each subtest"] --> F["Generate rule-based variants using decomposed multiple-choice and grouped-consistency formats reducing chance to 2.89%"]
    F["Generate rule-based variants using decomposed multiple-choice and grouped-consistency formats reducing chance to 2.89%"] --> G["Design parametric generators to automatically produce unlimited difficulty-controlled test cases"]
    G["Design parametric generators to automatically produce unlimited difficulty-controlled test cases"] --> H["Evaluate 23 frontier MLLMs using VLMEvalKit with Chain-of-Thought prompting strategies"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从FRCT中选择20个视觉子测试涵盖四领域10因子"] --> B["用GPT-4o和Gemini精简指令为AI友好提示词"]
    B["用GPT-4o和Gemini精简指令为AI友好提示词"] --> C["人工标注员核对模型摘要与原始手册定稿提示"]
    C["人工标注员核对模型摘要与原始手册定稿提示"] --> D["以300 dpi采集图像并裁剪至任务刺激区域"]
    D["以300 dpi采集图像并裁剪至任务刺激区域"] --> E["从FRCT手册中逐字提取各子测试标准答案"]
    E["从FRCT手册中逐字提取各子测试标准答案"] --> F["生成规则变体采用分解选择和分组一致性格式降至2.89%"]
    F["生成规则变体采用分解选择和分组一致性格式降至2.89%"] --> G["设计参数生成器自动产出无限难度可控测试用例"]
    G["设计参数生成器自动产出无限难度可控测试用例"] --> H["用VLMEvalKit和思维链策略评估23个前沿模型"]

name: Visual Puzzles
intro: VisualPuzzles是一个多模态基准测试，旨在评估大型模型的推理能力，同时尽量减少对领域特定知识的依赖。它包含1168个多样化的谜题，涵盖算法、类比、演绎、归纳和空间推理五种类别。该基准测试的问题主要来源于人工翻译的中国公务员考试逻辑推理题，旨在更清晰地评估模型在视觉推理方面的能力。
intro_en: VisualPuzzles is a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate large models' reasoning abilities while minimizing reliance on domain-specific knowledge. It includes 1,168 diverse puzzles across five categories: algorithmic, analogy, deductive, inductive, and spatial reasoning. The questions are primarily sourced from manually translated Chinese civil service exam logic reasoning problems, aiming to more clearly assess models' visual reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Manually translate logical reasoning questions from Chinese Civil Service Examination"] --> B["Collect puzzles from online resources, textbooks, and synthesize items using vision datasets"]
    B["Collect puzzles from online resources, textbooks, and synthesize items using vision datasets"] --> C["Repurpose selected items from existing multimodal reasoning benchmarks"]
    C["Repurpose selected items from existing multimodal reasoning benchmarks"] --> D["Adapt all collected items into consistent four-option multiple-choice format"]
    D["Adapt all collected items into consistent four-option multiple-choice format"] --> E["Filter out questions requiring advanced math or specialized domain knowledge"]
    E["Filter out questions requiring advanced math or specialized domain knowledge"] --> F["Retain only questions solvable using information present in the image"]
    F["Retain only questions solvable using information present in the image"] --> G["Categorize 1,168 questions into algorithmic, analogical, deductive, inductive, and spatial reasoning"]
    G["Categorize 1,168 questions into algorithmic, analogical, deductive, inductive, and spatial reasoning"] --> H["Annotate each question with difficulty levels across reasoning categories"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["人工翻译中国公务员考试逻辑推理题"] --> B["从在线资源和教材收集谜题并合成题目"]
    B["从在线资源和教材收集谜题并合成题目"] --> C["从现有多模态推理基准改编题目"]
    C["从现有多模态推理基准改编题目"] --> D["将所有题目改编为统一的四选项格式"]
    D["将所有题目改编为统一的四选项格式"] --> E["过滤需要高级数学或专业知识的题目"]
    E["过滤需要高级数学或专业知识的题目"] --> F["仅保留可用图像信息解答的题目"]
    F["仅保留可用图像信息解答的题目"] --> G["将1168道题分为五类推理类型"]
    G["将1168道题分为五类推理类型"] --> H["为每道题标注难度等级"]

name: VisuLogic
intro: VisuLogic是一个旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）视觉推理能力的新基准。它包含1000个经过人工验证的问题，涵盖六个类别，旨在避免基于语言的推理捷径，从而更严格地评估视觉推理能力。该基准测试揭示了当前MLLMs在视觉推理方面存在的显著差距，大多数模型准确率低于30%。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Xi'an Jiaotong University, Zhejiang University, Shang
intro_en: VisuLogic is a new benchmark designed to evaluate the visual reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 1,000 manually verified questions across six categories, aiming to avoid language-based reasoning shortcuts for a more rigorous assessment of visual reasoning. The benchmark reveals significant gaps in current MLLMs' visual reasoning, with most models scoring below 30% accuracy.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Scrape question-answer pairs from public online resources using Playwright and custom parsing scripts"] --> B["Clean noise and HTML markup, then structure data into JSONL format"]
    B["Clean noise and HTML markup, then structure data into JSONL format"] --> C["Verify image existence and formatting, removing invalid entries after human review"]
    C["Verify image existence and formatting, removing invalid entries after human review"] --> D["Remove duplicates via text overlap detection and perceptual hashing for images"]
    D["Remove duplicates via text overlap detection and perceptual hashing for images"] --> E["Expert annotators categorize questions into six reasoning classes, then manually validate all entries"]
    E["Expert annotators categorize questions into six reasoning classes, then manually validate all entries"] --> F["Curate supplementary training set of 4,296 questions using identical validation to prevent overlap"]
    F["Curate supplementary training set of 4,296 questions using identical validation to prevent overlap"] --> G["Collect human performance by having 100 graduate students solve 10 random questions each"]
    G["Collect human performance by having 100 graduate students solve 10 random questions each"] --> H["Evaluate 28 models with CoT prompts and analyze accuracy across six reasoning categories"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["用Playwright从公开在线资源抓取问答对"] --> B["清理噪声和HTML标记后结构化为JSONL"]
    B["清理噪声和HTML标记后结构化为JSONL"] --> C["验证图像存在性和格式并人工审核删除无效项"]
    C["验证图像存在性和格式并人工审核删除无效项"] --> D["通过文本重叠检测和图像感知哈希去重"]
    D["通过文本重叠检测和图像感知哈希去重"] --> E["专家标注员将问题分为六类并人工验证所有条目"]
    E["专家标注员将问题分为六类并人工验证所有条目"] --> F["用相同验证流程整理4296题补充训练集防止重叠"]
    F["用相同验证流程整理4296题补充训练集防止重叠"] --> G["让100名研究生各解10道随机题收集人类表现"]
    G["让100名研究生各解10道随机题收集人类表现"] --> H["用CoT提示评估28个模型并分析六类推理准确率"]

name: VitaBench
intro: VitaBench是一个旨在评估LLM代理在真实世界交互任务中表现的基准测试。它通过模拟外卖、店内消费和在线旅游服务等日常应用场景，构建了一个包含66种工具的复杂仿真环境。该基准测试包含100个跨场景任务和300个单场景任务，旨在评估代理处理复杂信息、利用多样资源和管理动态用户交互的能力。
scale: 100个跨场景任务, 300个单场景任务
intro_en: VitaBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate LLM agents' performance in real-world interactive tasks. It simulates everyday application scenarios such as food delivery, in-store dining, and online travel services, creating a complex simulation environment with 66 tools. The benchmark includes 100 cross-scenario tasks and 300 single-scenario tasks, aiming to assess agents' abilities to handle complex information, utilize diverse resources, and manage dynamic user interactions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Construct 66 tools across three domains and model inter-tool dependencies as graph structure"] --> B["Derive tasks from multiple authentic user requests with annotated profiles and spatiotemporal contexts"]
    B["Derive tasks from multiple authentic user requests with annotated profiles and spatiotemporal contexts"] --> C["Compose flexible scenarios by eliminating domain policies, creating 100 cross-scenario and 300 single-scenario tasks"]
    C["Compose flexible scenarios by eliminating domain policies, creating 100 cross-scenario and 300 single-scenario tasks"] --> D["Equip each task with independent environment containing service databases and initial user state"]
    D["Equip each task with independent environment containing service databases and initial user state"] --> E["Agent interacts via tool invocation and multi-turn dialogue with simulated user in POMDP setting"]
    E["Agent interacts via tool invocation and multi-turn dialogue with simulated user in POMDP setting"] --> F["Apply rubric-based sliding window evaluator to track progress across agent trajectory"]
    F["Apply rubric-based sliding window evaluator to track progress across agent trajectory"] --> G["Assess diverse solution pathways in stochastic interactions using rubric checklist"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["构建三个领域的66个工具并建模工具间依赖图结构"] --> B["从真实用户请求派生任务并标注用户画像和时空上下文"]
    B["从真实用户请求派生任务并标注用户画像和时空上下文"] --> C["消除领域策略灵活组合场景生成100个跨场景和300个单场景任务"]
    C["消除领域策略灵活组合场景生成100个跨场景和300个单场景任务"] --> D["为每个任务配备独立环境含服务数据库和初始用户状态"]
    D["为每个任务配备独立环境含服务数据库和初始用户状态"] --> E["代理在POMDP设定中通过工具调用和多轮对话与模拟用户交互"]
    E["代理在POMDP设定中通过工具调用和多轮对话与模拟用户交互"] --> F["应用基于评分准则的滑动窗口评估器追踪代理轨迹进展"]
    F["应用基于评分准则的滑动窗口评估器追踪代理轨迹进展"] --> G["使用评分清单评估随机交互中的多样化解决路径"]

name: VivaBench
intro: VivaBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在多轮对话中表现的基准测试，特别关注模型在长期交互中保持一致性和质量的能力。
org: Georgia Institute of Technology, University of Toronto, University of Cambridge
build_method: 人工构建
eval_feature: 多轮, 顺序临床推理
intro_en: VivaBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' performance in multi-turn conversations, with a focus on the models' ability to maintain consistency and quality over long interactions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source clinical vignettes from MedQA, physician college materials, and PubMed case reports"] --> B["Filter cases by clinical relevance, diagnostic complexity, clear pathways, and misdiagnosis consequences"]
    B["Filter cases by clinical relevance, diagnostic complexity, clear pathways, and misdiagnosis consequences"] --> C["Parse free-text into structured format with History, Physical Exam, Imaging, and Laboratory components"]
    C["Parse free-text into structured format with History, Physical Exam, Imaging, and Laboratory components"] --> D["Map clinical elements to SNOMED-CT, LOINC, and ICD codes for standardization"]
    D["Map clinical elements to SNOMED-CT, LOINC, and ICD codes for standardization"] --> E["Manually review and structure each vignette for interactive probing from limited initial information"]
    E["Manually review and structure each vignette for interactive probing from limited initial information"] --> F["Agent queries bedside information in Review phase; examiner retrieves History and Physical Exam data"]
    F["Agent queries bedside information in Review phase; examiner retrieves History and Physical Exam data"] --> G["Agent orders investigations in Investigation phase; examiner retrieves Imaging and Laboratory results deterministically"]
    G["Agent orders investigations in Investigation phase; examiner retrieves Imaging and Laboratory results deterministically"] --> H["Evaluate provisional and final diagnoses against ground truth diagnosis set including accepted differentials"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从MedQA、医师学院材料和PubMed病例报告获取临床案例"] --> B["按临床相关性、诊断复杂性、清晰路径和误诊后果筛选病例"]
    B["按临床相关性、诊断复杂性、清晰路径和误诊后果筛选病例"] --> C["将自由文本解析为病史、体检、影像和实验室结构化格式"]
    C["将自由文本解析为病史、体检、影像和实验室结构化格式"] --> D["将临床元素映射到SNOMED-CT、LOINC和ICD代码标准化"]
    D["将临床元素映射到SNOMED-CT、LOINC和ICD代码标准化"] --> E["人工审核并构建每个案例以支持从有限初始信息交互探查"]
    E["人工审核并构建每个案例以支持从有限初始信息交互探查"] --> F["智能体在审查阶段查询床旁信息，考官检索病史和体检数据"]
    F["智能体在审查阶段查询床旁信息，考官检索病史和体检数据"] --> G["智能体在检查阶段申请检验，考官确定性检索影像和实验室结果"]
    G["智能体在检查阶段申请检验，考官确定性检索影像和实验室结果"] --> H["根据包含可接受鉴别诊断的真实诊断集评估初步和最终诊断"]

name: VQA-RAD
intro: VQA-RAD是首个由临床医生手工构建的放射学视觉问答数据集，包含315张放射学图像和3515个临床医生自然提问，涵盖头部、胸部、腹部等多个解剖区域，旨在推动医学VQA技术发展。
eval_feature_en: The first radiology VQA dataset manually constructed by clinicians
intro_en: VQA-RAD is the first radiology visual question answering dataset manually constructed by clinicians, containing 315 radiology images and 3,515 natural questions from clinicians. It covers multiple anatomical regions including the head, chest, and abdomen, aiming to advance medical VQA technology.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Radiology Image Sources) --> B[Image Collection]
    B --> C[Image Selection & Anonymization]
    C --> D[Doctor-posed Q&A Generation]
    D --> E{Annotation Quality Check}
    E -- Pass --> F[Expert Review & Validation]

    F --> H(VQA-RAD Dataset)

    G["Resolve 280 disagreements through team consensus meetings and expert radiologist ground truth review"] --> H["Calculate F1 scores for evaluated pairs and finalize question type categorization"]

    F["通过严格和宽松一致性验证问答对含反转转换和包含关系"] --> G["通过团队共识会议和专家放射科医生审查解决280个分歧"]
    G["通过团队共识会议和专家放射科医生审查解决280个分歧"] --> H["计算已评估问答对的F1分数并最终确定问题类型分类"]

name: VSI-Bench
intro: VSI-Bench是一个新颖的、基于视频的视觉空间智能基准，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在从序列视觉观察中记忆空间方面的能力。该基准包含超过5,000个问答对，发现MLLMs表现出有竞争力但低于人类的视觉空间智能。研究表明，空间推理能力是MLLMs性能提升的主要瓶颈，而显式生成认知地图可以增强其空间距离能力。
intro_en: VSI-Bench is a novel video-based visual spatial intelligence benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to remember spatial information from sequential visual observations. The benchmark includes over 5,000 QA pairs and finds that MLLMs demonstrate competitive but subhuman visual spatial intelligence. The study shows that spatial reasoning is the main bottleneck for MLLM performance, while explicitly generating cognitive maps can enhance their spatial distance capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source videos from ScanNet, ScanNet++, and ARKitScenes validation sets with object-level 3D annotations"] --> B["Unify diverse datasets into standardized meta-information format including object categories and bounding boxes"]
    B["Unify diverse datasets into standardized meta-information format including object categories and bounding boxes"] --> C["Generate QA pairs using question templates for auto-annotation and human annotation for route planning"]
    C["Generate QA pairs using question templates for auto-annotation and human annotation for route planning"] --> D["Apply human verification to filter low-quality videos, incorrect annotations, and ambiguous questions iteratively"]
    D["Apply human verification to filter low-quality videos, incorrect annotations, and ambiguous questions iteratively"] --> E["Organize 5,000+ QA pairs into eight tasks: configurational, measurement estimation, and spatiotemporal categories"]
    E["Organize 5,000+ QA pairs into eight tasks: configurational, measurement estimation, and spatiotemporal categories"] --> F["Evaluate MLLMs under zero-shot settings using greedy decoding with model-specific default prompts"]
    F["Evaluate MLLMs under zero-shot settings using greedy decoding with model-specific default prompts"] --> G["Compute Accuracy for multiple-choice tasks and Mean Relative Accuracy across confidence thresholds for numerical tasks"]

    B["将数据集统一为标准元信息格式含类别和边界框"] --> C["用问题模板自动生成问答对并人工标注路径规划"]
    C["用问题模板自动生成问答对并人工标注路径规划"] --> D["人工验证过滤低质量视频错误标注和模糊问题"]
    D["人工验证过滤低质量视频错误标注和模糊问题"] --> E["将5000余问答对组织为配置测量和时空三类八任务"]
    E["将5000余问答对组织为配置测量和时空三类八任务"] --> F["零样本设置下用贪婪解码和默认提示评估模型"]
    F["零样本设置下用贪婪解码和默认提示评估模型"] --> G["计算选择题准确率和数值题多置信阈值相对准确率"]

name: We-Math
intro: We-Math是一个旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）视觉数学推理能力的基准。它超越了传统的端到端性能评估，深入探究模型在知识获取和泛化方面的潜在原理。该基准包含6.5K个视觉数学问题，涵盖67个分层知识概念和五层知识粒度。We-Math引入了四维指标（IK、IG、CM、RM），以分层评估LMMs推理过程中的固有问题。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications
metric: Insufficient Knowledge (IK), Inadequate Generalization (IG), Complete Mastery (CM), Rote Memorizatio
eval_feature: 过程评估
intro_en: We-Math is a benchmark designed to evaluate the visual mathematical reasoning abilities of large multimodal models (LMMs). It goes beyond traditional end-to-end performance assessment to explore the underlying principles of models' knowledge acquisition and generalization. The benchmark includes 6.5K visual math problems covering 67 hierarchical knowledge concepts across five levels of knowledge granularity. We-Math introduces four-dimensional metrics (IK, IG, CM, RM) to hierarchically assess inherent issues in LMMs' reasoning processes.
metric_en: Insufficient Knowledge (IK), Inadequate Generalization (IG), Complete Mastery (CM), Rote Memorizatio
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 6.5K visual math problems from authoritative mathematics websites"] --> B["Organize problems into 67 knowledge concepts across five hierarchical categories"]
    B["Organize problems into 67 knowledge concepts across five hierarchical categories"] --> C["Three experts manually label each problem with knowledge concepts and cross-validate"]
    C["Three experts manually label each problem with knowledge concepts and cross-validate"] --> D["Annotate problem-solving steps and categorize into One-Step, Two-Step, Three-Step classes"]
    D["Annotate problem-solving steps and categorize into One-Step, Two-Step, Three-Step classes"] --> E["Decompose composite problems into sub-problems based on required knowledge concepts"]
    E["Decompose composite problems into sub-problems based on required knowledge concepts"] --> F["Create 67 knowledge concept cards from textbooks and Wikipedia by experts"]
    F["Create 67 knowledge concept cards from textbooks and Wikipedia by experts"] --> G["Standardize testmini samples into multiple-choice format with uncertain option"]
    G["Standardize testmini samples into multiple-choice format with uncertain option"] --> H["Evaluate LMMs using regex matching and four-dimensional metric IK, IG, CM, RM"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从权威数学网站收集6.5K个视觉数学问题"] --> B["将问题组织为五层67个知识概念"]
    B["将问题组织为五层67个知识概念"] --> C["三位专家标注知识概念并交叉验证"]
    C["三位专家标注知识概念并交叉验证"] --> D["标注解题步骤并分为一步、二步、三步类别"]
    D["标注解题步骤并分为一步、二步、三步类别"] --> E["根据所需知识概念将复合问题分解为子问题"]
    E["根据所需知识概念将复合问题分解为子问题"] --> F["专家从教材和维基百科创建67个知识概念卡"]
    F["专家从教材和维基百科创建67个知识概念卡"] --> G["将测试样本标准化为含不确定选项的选择题"]
    G["将测试样本标准化为含不确定选项的选择题"] --> H["用正则匹配和四维指标IK、IG、CM、RM评估模型"]

name: WebArena
intro: WebArena是一个为构建自主智能体而设计的真实网络环境。它提供了来自电子商务、社交论坛、协作软件开发和内容管理等四个常见领域的全功能网站。该基准测试包含多样化、长周期的任务，旨在模拟人类在互联网上日常执行的任务，并评估任务完成的功能正确性。
intro_en: WebArena is a real-world web environment designed for building autonomous agents. It provides fully functional websites from four common domains: e-commerce, social forums, collaborative software development, and content management. This benchmark includes diverse, long-duration tasks aimed at simulating everyday human activities on the internet and evaluating the functional correctness of task completion.

flowchart LR

    B --> C{{Expert Task Design}}
    C --> D[Task Specification & Scripting]

    F --> G{Manual Task Verification}
    G -->|Pass| H(Verified WebArena Tasks)
    G -->|Fail| I[Task Refinement]
    I --> D
    H --> J[Agent Capability Evaluation]
    J --> K(Agent Performance Logs)
    K --> L[Performance Analysis & Reporting]

    D["Configure observation space with URL, tabs, and page content in DOM, screenshot, or accessibility tree"] --> E["Define compound action space with element operations, tab actions, and URL navigation"]

    F["Generate unique user profiles with distinct roles, permissions, and interaction histories per platform"] --> G["Release 812 test tasks designed to emulate human routines on the internet"]
    G["Release 812 test tasks designed to emulate human routines on the internet"] --> H["Evaluate agent completions using functional correctness reward function on final states"]

    A["分析浏览历史识别四类网站和三种工具"] --> B["用开源库构建电商、GitLab、Reddit等网站"]
    B["用开源库构建电商、GitLab、Reddit等网站"] --> C["从真实网站导入采样数据到自建环境"]
    C["从真实网站导入采样数据到自建环境"] --> D["配置观察空间含URL、标签页和页面内容"]
    D["配置观察空间含URL、标签页和页面内容"] --> E["定义复合动作空间含元素操作和导航"]

    F["为各平台生成不同角色和权限的用户档案"] --> G["发布812个模拟人类日常网络任务的测试"]
    G["发布812个模拟人类日常网络任务的测试"] --> H["用功能正确性奖励函数评估最终状态"]

name: WebArena-Verified
intro: WebArena-Verified 是对 WebArena 的可复现实证重审版本，系统审计全部任务与评测器，移除脆弱字符串匹配并改为结构化、确定性的离线评测。
build_method: 系统审计812个任务, 修复错位评测, 澄清歧义指令
metric: Task Success Rate, Template-level Macro Average
eval_feature: 后端状态校验, JSON结构化输出, 确定性评分
intro_en: WebArena-Verified is a reproducible re-evaluation of WebArena that audits every task and evaluator, replacing brittle checks with deterministic structured scoring.
build_method_en: systematic audit of all 812 tasks, evaluator repairs, ambiguity clarification
metric_en: Task Success Rate, Template-level Macro Average
eval_feature_en: Backend State Verification, Structured JSON Outputs, Deterministic Scoring
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["保留原始 WebArena 容器化网站环境"] --> B["系统审计全部 812 个任务、参考答案与评测器"]
    B --> C["修复错位评测并澄清含糊任务说明"]
    C --> D["用类型感知与归一化比较替代脆弱字符串匹配"]
    D --> E["对状态变更类任务增加后端状态验证"]
    E --> F["统一为带显式状态码的 JSON 输出与确定性评分"]
    F --> G["报告模板级宏平均、95% 置信区间与失败模式分解"]
    G --> H["额外发布 137 个任务的 Verified Hard 子集"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Keep the original containerized WebArena environments"] --> B["Systematically audit all 812 tasks, reference answers, and evaluators"]
    B --> C["Repair misaligned evaluations and clarify ambiguous instructions"]
    C --> D["Replace brittle string matching with type-aware normalized comparison"]
    D --> E["Add backend-state verification for state-changing tasks"]
    E --> F["Standardize outputs into JSON with explicit status codes for deterministic scoring"]
    F --> G["Report template-level macro averages, 95% confidence intervals, and failure-mode breakdowns"]
    G --> H["Release the 137-task Verified Hard subset"]

name: WebTailBench
intro: WebTailBench是一个全面的评估基准，旨在评估计算机代理（CUA）模型在各种真实世界网页任务中的表现。它特别关注现有基准中代表性不足的任务类型，包括11个类别的609个手工验证任务，例如房地产、求职和多步骤工作流程。此外，它还包含111个有害任务，以评估代理拒绝不安全请求的能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: WebTailBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the performance of computer agent (CUA) models on a variety of real-world web tasks. It focuses on task types underrepresented in existing benchmarks, featuring 609 manually verified tasks across 11 categories such as real estate, job hunting, and multi-step workflows. Additionally, it includes 111 harmful tasks to assess agents' ability to refuse unsafe requests.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Identify under-represented web task categories missing from existing CUA benchmarks"] --> B["Curate 609 tasks across 11 categories including real estate, job seeking, and multi-step workflows"]
    B["Curate 609 tasks across 11 categories including real estate, job seeking, and multi-step workflows"] --> C["Hand-verify each task to ensure quality and realistic user intent"]
    C["Hand-verify each task to ensure quality and realistic user intent"] --> D["Add 111 harmful tasks to test agent safety and refusal capabilities"]
    D["Add 111 harmful tasks to test agent safety and refusal capabilities"] --> E["Evaluate CUA models on task completion accuracy across all categories"]
    E["Evaluate CUA models on task completion accuracy across all categories"] --> F["Assess agent ability to refuse unsafe or harmful requests appropriately"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["识别现有基准中缺失的网页任务类别"] --> B["策划11类共609个任务涵盖房地产求职等"]
    B["策划11类共609个任务涵盖房地产求职等"] --> C["人工验证每个任务确保质量和真实性"]
    C["人工验证每个任务确保质量和真实性"] --> D["添加111个有害任务测试代理安全拒绝能力"]
    D["添加111个有害任务测试代理安全拒绝能力"] --> E["评估计算机代理模型在各类任务的完成准确率"]
    E["评估计算机代理模型在各类任务的完成准确率"] --> F["评估代理适当拒绝不安全请求的能力"]

name: WideSearch
intro: WideSearch评测大型语言模型驱动代理在广泛信息检索任务中的能力。包含200个手工筛选的问题（100英文、100中文），涵盖15个以上领域，基于真实用户查询。任务要求代理收集大量可逐条验证的原子信息，并组织成结构化输出。
org: Institute of Automation, CAS, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, ByteDance Seed, TikTok, UC
task_type: Agent任务, 开放式问答, 生成
intro_en: WideSearch evaluates the ability of large language model-driven agents in extensive information retrieval tasks. It includes 200 manually curated questions (100 in English, 100 in Chinese) across more than 15 domains, based on real user queries. The task requires agents to gather a large amount of verifiable atomic information and organize it into structured outputs.

    I -- Pass --> J(Final Curated Questions)
    J --> K(WideSearch Dataset)
    K --> L[Agent Information Retrieval Task]
    L --> M[Performance Evaluation]
    M --> N[Agent Capability Assessment]

    B["Manually curate 200 questions across 15+ domains, ensuring high search volume, temporal invariance, and objective verifiability."] --> C["Design predefined table schemas specifying column headers for structured output of entities and their attributes."]
    C["Design predefined table schemas specifying column headers for structured output of entities and their attributes."] --> D["Apply five-stage quality control pipeline to validate task difficulty, completeness, and verifiability by domain experts."]
    D["Apply five-stage quality control pipeline to validate task difficulty, completeness, and verifiability by domain experts."] --> E["Conduct cross-validation with multiple human testers to establish ground-truth answers achieving near 100% success rate."]
    E["Conduct cross-validation with multiple human testers to establish ground-truth answers achieving near 100% success rate."] --> F["Evaluate 10+ state-of-the-art agentic search systems including single-agent, multi-agent, and commercial end-to-end frameworks."]
    F["Evaluate 10+ state-of-the-art agentic search systems including single-agent, multi-agent, and commercial end-to-end frameworks."] --> G["Use hybrid automated evaluation system to objectively verify agent-populated tables against ground-truth atomic information."]

    E["多名人工测试员交叉验证建立接近100%成功率的标准答案"] --> F["评测10+个先进代理搜索系统包括单代理多代理和商业端到端框架"]

name: Wiki Live Challenge
intro: Wiki Live Challenge是一个实时基准，旨在评估深度研究代理（DRA）生成专家级维基百科文章的能力。该基准利用最新的维基百科优良条目（Good Articles）作为专家级参考，并提出了包含39个写作质量标准和事实可验证性指标的Wiki Eval评估框架。实验表明，现有DRA与人类专家水平存在显著差距，验证了WLC在推动智能体研究方面的有效性。
org: University of Science and Technology of China
build_method: 人工构建
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染
intro_en: Wiki Live Challenge is a real-time benchmark designed to evaluate Deep Research Agents' (DRA) ability to generate expert-level Wikipedia articles. It uses the latest Wikipedia Good Articles as expert references and introduces the Wiki Eval evaluation framework, which includes 39 writing quality criteria and factual verifiability metrics. Experiments show a significant gap between current DRAs and human experts, validating WLC's effectiveness in advancing agent research.

    H --> I(39 Writing Quality Criteria)
    I --> G
    G --> J(Evaluation Results)
    J --> K[Evaluate DRA Ability]

    E["Select four Wikipedia Good Article criteria dimensions for DRA evaluation"] --> F["Construct Wiki Eval with 39 fine-grained writing quality criteria"]
    F["Construct Wiki Eval with 39 fine-grained writing quality criteria"] --> G["Apply rigorous factual verifiability metrics to evaluate DRA-generated articles"]

    C["按引用URL数量和结构深度对304篇优良条目排序"] --> D["排除简单列表类文章并精选15个领域的100篇文章"]
    D["排除简单列表类文章并精选15个领域的100篇文章"] --> E["选择四个维基百科优良条目标准维度用于评估"]
    E["选择四个维基百科优良条目标准维度用于评估"] --> F["构建包含39项细粒度写作质量标准的Wiki Eval框架"]
    F["构建包含39项细粒度写作质量标准的Wiki Eval框架"] --> G["应用严格的事实可验证性指标评估智能体生成文章"]

name: WildBench
intro: WildBench是一个自动化评测框架，利用真实用户查询中的1024个任务评估大型语言模型。通过任务专用检查表和两项指标（WB-Reward和WB-Score）实现系统化和可解释的自动评估。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
task_type: 对话, 生成, 排序
intro_en: WildBench is an automated evaluation framework that assesses large language models using 1024 tasks derived from real user queries. It enables systematic and interpretable automatic evaluation through task-specific checklists and two metrics: WB-Reward and WB-Score.
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source tasks from WildChat dataset containing one million real human-chatbot conversations"] --> B["Apply basic filtering: remove short/long queries, multi-turn conversations, non-English, toxic, and high-similarity tasks"]
    B["Apply basic filtering: remove short/long queries, multi-turn conversations, non-English, toxic, and high-similarity tasks"] --> C["Use GPT-4-Turbo and Claude models to rate task difficulty; exclude easy tasks"]
    C["Use GPT-4-Turbo and Claude models to rate task difficulty; exclude easy tasks"] --> D["Generate intent summaries with GPT-4-Turbo; human reviewers remove nonsensical tasks to retain 1,024 examples"]
    D["Generate intent summaries with GPT-4-Turbo; human reviewers remove nonsensical tasks to retain 1,024 examples"] --> E["Evaluate model outputs using task-specific checklists with three baseline models at varying performance levels"]
    E["Evaluate model outputs using task-specific checklists with three baseline models at varying performance levels"] --> F["Compute WB-Reward from pairwise comparisons and WB-Score from individual quality assessments using GPT-4-turbo"]
    F["Compute WB-Reward from pairwise comparisons and WB-Score from individual quality assessments using GPT-4-turbo"] --> G["Mitigate length bias by converting slight wins to ties when winner exceeds loser by K characters"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从WildChat数据集的百万真实人机对话中获取任务"] --> B["基础过滤：移除过短过长、多轮、非英语、有害及高相似度任务"]
    B["基础过滤：移除过短过长、多轮、非英语、有害及高相似度任务"] --> C["用GPT-4-Turbo和Claude模型评估难度并排除简单任务"]
    C["用GPT-4-Turbo和Claude模型评估难度并排除简单任务"] --> D["用GPT-4-Turbo生成意图摘要，人工审核移除无意义任务保留1024个"]
    D["用GPT-4-Turbo生成意图摘要，人工审核移除无意义任务保留1024个"] --> E["用任务专用检查表和三个不同性能基线模型评估输出"]
    E["用任务专用检查表和三个不同性能基线模型评估输出"] --> F["用GPT-4-turbo计算成对比较的WB-Reward和单独质量的WB-Score"]
    F["用GPT-4-turbo计算成对比较的WB-Reward和单独质量的WB-Score"] --> G["当赢家超出输家K字符时将轻微优势转为平局以缓解长度偏差"]

name: WildToolBench
intro: WildToolBench（也称为WildBench）是一个用于评估大型语言模型在真实世界场景中工具使用能力的基准测试。该基准由艾伦人工智能研究所开发，包含多样化的工具使用任务。
intro_en: WildToolBench (also known as WildBench) is a benchmark developed by the Allen Institute for AI to evaluate large language models' tool usage capabilities in real-world scenarios. It includes a diverse set of tool usage tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world Scenarios & Tools) --> B[Task Identification & Design]
    B --> C[Task Specification & Formalization]
    C --> D{Human Expert Review}
    D -- "Feedback" --> E[Task Refinement]
    E --> F(WildToolBench Tasks)
    F --> G[LLM Execution on Tasks]
    G --> H[Performance Measurement]
    H --> I(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Source tasks from WildChat dataset containing one million real human-chatbot conversations"] --> B["Apply basic filtering: remove short/long queries, multi-turn conversations, non-English, toxic, high-similarity, and duplicate-user tasks"]
    B["Apply basic filtering: remove short/long queries, multi-turn conversations, non-English, toxic, high-similarity, and duplicate-user tasks"] --> C["Use GPT-4-Turbo and Claude models to rate task difficulty; exclude tasks rated easy by all"]
    C["Use GPT-4-Turbo and Claude models to rate task difficulty; exclude tasks rated easy by all"] --> D["Randomly sample 1,500 tasks ensuring category distribution matches the original dataset"]
    D["Randomly sample 1,500 tasks ensuring category distribution matches the original dataset"] --> E["Generate query intent summaries with GPT-4-Turbo; human reviewers remove nonsensical tasks to finalize 1,024 examples"]
    E["Generate query intent summaries with GPT-4-Turbo; human reviewers remove nonsensical tasks to finalize 1,024 examples"] --> F["Evaluate model outputs using task-specific checklists with three baseline models at varying performance levels"]
    F["Evaluate model outputs using task-specific checklists with three baseline models at varying performance levels"] --> G["Compute WB-Score and WB-Reward metrics with GPT-4-turbo, applying length bias mitigation for pairwise comparisons"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从WildChat数据集的百万真实人机对话中获取任务"] --> B["基础过滤：移除过短过长、多轮、非英语、有害、高相似及重复用户任务"]
    B["基础过滤：移除过短过长、多轮、非英语、有害、高相似及重复用户任务"] --> C["用GPT-4-Turbo和Claude模型评估难度，排除所有模型评为简单的任务"]
    C["用GPT-4-Turbo和Claude模型评估难度，排除所有模型评为简单的任务"] --> D["随机抽取1500个任务，确保类别分布与原始数据集一致"]
    D["随机抽取1500个任务，确保类别分布与原始数据集一致"] --> E["用GPT-4-Turbo生成查询意图摘要，人工审核移除无意义任务得到1024个样本"]
    E["用GPT-4-Turbo生成查询意图摘要，人工审核移除无意义任务得到1024个样本"] --> F["使用任务特定检查表和三个不同性能基线模型评估模型输出"]
    F["使用任务特定检查表和三个不同性能基线模型评估模型输出"] --> G["用GPT-4-turbo计算WB-Score和WB-Reward指标，对成对比较应用长度偏差缓解"]

name: Winogrande
intro: WinoGrande是一个包含4.4万个问题的大规模数据集，其灵感源于原始的Winograd Schema Challenge（WSC），但在规模和难度上都进行了显著提升。该数据集通过精心设计的众包流程构建，并利用新颖的AfLite算法系统性地减少了数据偏差。此基准专注于常识推理能力，任务形式为填空选择题，旨在评估模型为给定句子选择正确选项的能力。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
build_method: 众包, 算法生成
eval_feature: 对抗性
intro_en: WinoGrande is a large-scale dataset containing 44,000 questions, inspired by the original Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) but significantly expanded in scale and difficulty. The dataset was constructed through a carefully designed crowdsourcing process and systematically reduces data bias using the novel AfLite algorithm. This benchmark focuses on commonsense reasoning ability, presented as fill-in-the-blank multiple-choice questions, aiming to evaluate a model’s capability to select the correct option for a given sentence.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A((WSC Principles)) --> B{{Crowdsourcing}}
    B --> C[Initial Question Generation]
    C --> D{{Algorithm Generation}}
    D --> E[Scale & Difficulty Expansion]
    E --> F[Bias Reduction Process]
    F --> G{Quality Check & Refinement}
    G -->|Pass| H((WinoGrande Dataset\n44,000 Questions))
    G -->|Fail| C
    H --> I[Model Evaluation]
    I --> J[Research & Analysis]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 44k pronoun resolution problems through carefully designed crowdsourcing procedure inspired by WSC"] --> B["Construct problem pairs as twins with nearly identical sentences and two answer choices"]
    B["Construct problem pairs as twins with nearly identical sentences and two answer choices"] --> C["Identify human-detectable word association biases between answer choices and context words"]
    C["Identify human-detectable word association biases between answer choices and context words"] --> D["Apply AFLITE algorithm to detect and reduce machine-detectable embedding associations systematically"]
    D["Apply AFLITE algorithm to detect and reduce machine-detectable embedding associations systematically"] --> E["Validate dataset hardness by measuring human performance baseline at 94.0% accuracy"]
    E["Validate dataset hardness by measuring human performance baseline at 94.0% accuracy"] --> F["Evaluate state-of-the-art models achieving 59.4-79.1% based on training data amount allowed"]
    F["Evaluate state-of-the-art models achieving 59.4-79.1% based on training data amount allowed"] --> G["Test transfer learning effectiveness on five related benchmarks including WSC and COPA"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["通过精心设计的众包流程收集4.4万个代词消解问题"] --> B["构建成对的孪生问题，句子几乎相同但有两个答案选项"]
    B["构建成对的孪生问题，句子几乎相同但有两个答案选项"] --> C["识别答案选项与上下文词之间的人类可检测词关联偏差"]
    C["识别答案选项与上下文词之间的人类可检测词关联偏差"] --> D["应用AFLITE算法系统性检测并减少机器可检测的嵌入关联"]
    D["应用AFLITE算法系统性检测并减少机器可检测的嵌入关联"] --> E["通过测量人类94.0%准确率基线验证数据集难度"]
    E["通过测量人类94.0%准确率基线验证数据集难度"] --> F["评估最先进模型在不同训练数据量下达到59.4-79.1%"]
    F["评估最先进模型在不同训练数据量下达到59.4-79.1%"] --> G["在WSC和COPA等五个相关基准上测试迁移学习效果"]

name: WorldTravel
intro: WorldTravel是一个真实的、多模态的旅行规划基准，包含150个跨5个城市的真实旅行场景，每个场景涉及平均15个以上相互依赖的时间和逻辑约束。为了在真实部署中评估智能体，该基准开发了WorldTravel-Webscape，一个多模态环境，包含2000多个渲染网页，智能体必须直接从视觉布局中感知约束参数以进行规划。对10个前沿模型的评估显示，即使是GPT-5.2在文本环境中也仅达到32.67%的可行性，在多模态环境中更是降至19.33%。
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估
intro_en: WorldTravel is a realistic, multimodal travel planning benchmark featuring 150 real travel scenarios across 5 cities, each involving an average of over 15 interdependent temporal and logical constraints. To evaluate agents in real-world deployment, the benchmark developed WorldTravel-Webscape, a multimodal environment containing over 2,000 rendered web pages where agents must perceive constraint parameters directly from visual layouts for planning. Evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art models shows that even GPT-5.2 achieves only 32.67% feasibility in the text environment, dropping to 19.33% in the multimodal environment.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real-world Travel Context) --> B[Scenario Identification]
    B --> C{{Manual Annotation}}
    C --> D(Initial Scenarios & Constraints)
    D --> E{{Automatic Generation}}
    E --> F[Constraint Integration & Refinement]
    F --> G{Constraint Validation}
    G -- Valid --> H(WorldTravel-Webscape Dataset)
    G -- Invalid --> I[Review & Adjust]
    I --> F
    H --> J[Agent Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect factual data from official venue websites and practical data from travel platforms across 5 cities"] --> B["Generate static HTML webpages via GPT-5.2 with manual review, distributing entity information across multiple pages"]
    B["Generate static HTML webpages via GPT-5.2 with manual review, distributing entity information across multiple pages"] --> C["Expert annotators design city-specific tasks with distinct reasoning challenges for each location"]
    C["Expert annotators design city-specific tasks with distinct reasoning challenges for each location"] --> D["Adjust ticket availability and block time slots to create tightly coupled constraints with unique solutions"]
    D["Adjust ticket availability and block time slots to create tightly coupled constraints with unique solutions"] --> E["Conduct three-round verification: author self-review, independent cross-solving, and external validation"]
    E["Conduct three-round verification: author self-review, independent cross-solving, and external validation"] --> F["Run pilot experiments on GPT-4.1, Doubao-1.8-Pro, and Gemini-2.5-Pro to filter edge cases"]
    F["Run pilot experiments on GPT-4.1, Doubao-1.8-Pro, and Gemini-2.5-Pro to filter edge cases"] --> G["Define 8 APIs that return rendered webpage screenshots instead of structured JSON data"]
    G["Define 8 APIs that return rendered webpage screenshots instead of structured JSON data"] --> H["Evaluate using automated constraint verification functions measuring feasibility rate, violation rate, and decision accuracy"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从官方场馆网站和旅行平台收集5城市数据"] --> B["用GPT-5.2生成静态网页并人工审核分散信息"]
    B["用GPT-5.2生成静态网页并人工审核分散信息"] --> C["专家标注员为每个城市设计特定推理挑战任务"]
    C["专家标注员为每个城市设计特定推理挑战任务"] --> D["调整票务可用性和时段以创建紧密耦合约束"]
    D["调整票务可用性和时段以创建紧密耦合约束"] --> E["执行三轮验证：自审、交叉求解和外部验证"]
    E["执行三轮验证：自审、交叉求解和外部验证"] --> F["在三个模型上试运行以过滤边缘案例"]
    F["在三个模型上试运行以过滤边缘案例"] --> G["定义8个返回网页截图而非JSON的API"]
    G["定义8个返回网页截图而非JSON的API"] --> H["用自动约束验证函数评估可行率和决策准确性"]

name: WorldVQA
intro: WorldVQA 是一个用于评估多模态大模型原子级视觉世界知识的基准，强调将视觉知识记忆与推理能力解耦，专门衡量模型对视觉实体的识别、命名和事实性掌握能力。
build_method: 专家标注, 双重验证
eval_feature: 事实性, 长尾分布, 双重验证
intro_en: WorldVQA is a benchmark for evaluating atomic visual world knowledge in multimodal large language models. It explicitly decouples knowledge memorization from reasoning and measures recognition, naming, and factual grounding for visual entities.
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["先确定 Atomic Isolation、Encyclopedic Diversity、Data Fidelity 原则"] --> B["10 名专家按 taxonomy 收集原子级实体"]
    B --> C["从可信来源取图并编写对应 VQA 对"]
    C --> D["做地区分布平衡并控制类别内中国特有实体比例"]
    D --> E["对覆盖不足的类别用 GPT / Kimi 扩展候选"]
    E --> F["用前沿 MLLM 检查事实一致性与视觉清晰度"]
    F --> G["再做独立盲审专家复核"]
    G --> H["做难度分层并仅保留全部验证通过的样本"]
    H --> I["最终用 Accuracy、CGA、F-score 报告结果"]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Set the principles of Atomic Isolation, Encyclopedic Diversity, and Data Fidelity"] --> B["Have ten experts collect atomic entities under the taxonomy"]
    B --> C["Retrieve trusted images and write matching VQA pairs"]
    C --> D["Balance regional coverage and cap China-specific entities within each category"]
    D --> E["Use GPT / Kimi to expand categories with insufficient coverage"]
    E --> F["Run frontier-MLLM checks for factual consistency and visual clarity"]
    F --> G["Run independent blind expert review"]
    G --> H["Stratify difficulty and keep only fully verified samples"]
    H --> I["Report final performance with Accuracy, CGA, and F-score"]

name: WritingBench
intro: WritingBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成式写作方面的表现。它涵盖了6个核心写作领域和100个子领域，并提出了一个查询依赖的评估框架，使LLMs能够动态生成实例特定的评估标准。该框架通过一个微调的评论模型进行标准感知评分，能够评估写作的风格、格式和长度。该基准测试及其评估工具和模块化框架组件均已开源，以促进LLMs在写作领域的发展。
org: Alibaba Group, Renmin University of China, Zhejiang University, University of California, Berkeley
build_method: 混合 (查询依赖评估框架, 数据策展)
metric: Style, Format, Length (通过评论模型评分)
scale: 1000个真实世界查询, 6个主要领域, 100个子领域
intro_en: WritingBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) in generative writing. It covers 6 core writing domains and 100 subdomains, introducing a query-dependent evaluation framework that enables LLMs to dynamically generate instance-specific evaluation criteria. This framework uses a fine-tuned critique model for standard-aware scoring, assessing style, format, and length. The benchmark, along with its evaluation tools and modular framework components, is open-sourced to promote the development of LLMs in writing.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Text Corpora) --> B[Initial Data Collection]
    B --> C[Data Curation & Filtering]
    C --> D{Domain & Subdomain Mapping}
    D -->|Matched| E[Prompt Generation]
    D -->|Unmatched| F[Discard Irrelevant Data]
    E --> G(Curated Writing Prompts)
    G --> H{{Query-Dependent Evaluation Framework}}
    H --> I[LLM Generative Writing]
    I --> J[Dynamic Criteria Generation]
    J --> K[Human Expert Review]
    K --> L[Evaluation Scoring]
    L --> M(Benchmark Results)
metric_en: Style, Format, Length (Scored by Review Model)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Construct two-tiered domain pool with 6 primary domains and 100 subdomains from real-world scenarios"] --> B["Prompt GPT-4o and Claude-3.5-Sonnet to generate initial writing query drafts using domain tags"]
    B["Prompt GPT-4o and Claude-3.5-Sonnet to generate initial writing query drafts using domain tags"] --> C["Apply diversification strategies to enrich queries with multi-dimensional requirements and material suggestions"]
    C["Apply diversification strategies to enrich queries with multi-dimensional requirements and material suggestions"] --> D["Collect heterogeneous source materials and optimize queries through human annotation"]
    D["Collect heterogeneous source materials and optimize queries through human annotation"] --> E["Prompt LLM to dynamically generate five instance-specific evaluation criteria per query"]
    E["Prompt LLM to dynamically generate five instance-specific evaluation criteria per query"] --> F["Fine-tune dedicated critic model to perform criteria-aware scoring on style, format, and length"]
    F["Fine-tune dedicated critic model to perform criteria-aware scoring on style, format, and length"] --> G["Curate high-quality training data using evaluation framework to train writing-enhanced models"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["构建两层领域池，包含6个主领域和100个子领域"] --> B["用GPT-4o和Claude生成初始写作查询草稿"]
    B["用GPT-4o和Claude生成初始写作查询草稿"] --> C["应用多样化策略丰富查询的多维需求"]
    C["应用多样化策略丰富查询的多维需求"] --> D["人工收集异构材料并优化查询"]
    D["人工收集异构材料并优化查询"] --> E["用LLM为每个查询动态生成五条评估标准"]
    E["用LLM为每个查询动态生成五条评估标准"] --> F["微调评论模型进行标准感知评分"]
    F["微调评论模型进行标准感知评分"] --> G["用评估框架筛选高质量数据训练模型"]

name: WSC(Winograd Schema Challenge)
intro: WSC（Winograd Schema Challenge）是一个常识推理基准，使用特定的Winograd语义结构题。题目包含一个歧义代词，需根据句中某个词正确指代先行词，考验模型的世界知识和推理能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: WSC (Winograd Schema Challenge) is a common-sense reasoning benchmark that uses specific Winograd semantic structure questions. Each question contains an ambiguous pronoun that must be correctly resolved to its antecedent based on a word in the sentence, testing the model's world knowledge and reasoning ability.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Linguistic Principles & Common-Sense Knowledge) --> B[Expert Question Design]
    B --> C{{Manual Annotation}}
    C --> D[Ambiguity Resolution & Antecedent Identification]
    D --> E[Expert Review & Validation]
    E --> F{Consistency Check}
    F -- Pass --> G(Winograd Schema Questions Dataset)
    F -- Fail --> B
    G --> H(Ambiguous Pronouns & Antecedents)
    G --> I[Model Common-Sense Reasoning Test]
    I --> J[Pronoun Resolution Task]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Design sentence pairs differing in one or two words with opposite pronoun resolutions"] --> B["Ensure schemas require world knowledge and reasoning, not selectional restrictions or statistical methods"]
    B["Ensure schemas require world knowledge and reasoning, not selectional restrictions or statistical methods"] --> C["Verify each schema is easily disambiguated by human readers without noticing ambiguity"]
    C["Verify each schema is easily disambiguated by human readers without noticing ambiguity"] --> D["Compile collection of 150 Winograd schemas meeting all design criteria"]
    D["Compile collection of 150 Winograd schemas meeting all design criteria"] --> E["Select one sentence from each schema pair for contestant presentation"]
    E["Select one sentence from each schema pair for contestant presentation"] --> F["Present contestants with collection requiring binary choice for pronoun disambiguation"]
    F["Present contestants with collection requiring binary choice for pronoun disambiguation"] --> G["Grade contestant responses and compare accuracy against human-level performance baseline"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["设计仅一两词不同且代词指代相反的句对"] --> B["确保题目需要世界知识和推理而非统计方法"]
    B["确保题目需要世界知识和推理而非统计方法"] --> C["验证人类读者可轻松消歧且不察觉歧义"]
    C["验证人类读者可轻松消歧且不察觉歧义"] --> D["编译150个符合所有设计标准的模式"]
    D["编译150个符合所有设计标准的模式"] --> E["从每个模式句对中选一句呈现给参赛者"]
    E["从每个模式句对中选一句呈现给参赛者"] --> F["呈现需二元选择消歧代词的题集"]
    F["呈现需二元选择消歧代词的题集"] --> G["评分参赛者答案并与人类水平基线比较"]

name: xbench
intro: xbench是一个动态的、与职业对齐的评估套件，旨在弥合AI代理能力与现实世界生产力之间的差距。它通过行业专业人士定义的评估任务，针对具有商业意义的领域，创建与生产力价值强相关的指标。该框架能够预测技术-市场契合度（TMF），并随着时间的推移跟踪产品能力。初步实施包括招聘和营销两个基准，分别评估代理在真实业务场景中的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
scale: 招聘50个任务, 营销50个需求
intro_en: xbench is a dynamic, career-aligned evaluation suite designed to bridge the gap between AI agent capabilities and real-world productivity. It creates metrics highly correlated with productivity value through evaluation tasks defined by industry professionals, targeting commercially significant domains. The framework can predict Technology-Market Fit (TMF) and track product capabilities over time. Initial implementations include two benchmarks, recruiting and marketing, which assess agent performance in real business scenarios.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Industry Professional Requirements) --> B[Task Definition by Experts]
    B --> C[Scenario Design]
    C --> D[Data Generation/Curating]
    D --> E[Manual Annotation]
    E --> F{Annotation Review}
    F -- Fail --> E
    F -- Pass --> G[Expert Validation]
    G --> H{Quality Check}
    H -- Fail --> C
    H -- Pass --> I(Refined Evaluation Tasks)
    I --> J(xbench Evaluation Suite)
    J --> K[AI Agent Capability Evaluation]
    K --> L[Performance Metrics Generation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Select domains by market size and technological maturity for commercial scalability"] --> B["Interview field experts to map work time allocation and assess task importance"]
    B["Interview field experts to map work time allocation and assess task importance"] --> C["Categorize tasks by feasibility and evaluability, prioritizing evaluable components"]
    C["Categorize tasks by feasibility and evaluability, prioritizing evaluable components"] --> D["Collect live evaluation tasks from ongoing expert business operations over time"]
    D["Collect live evaluation tasks from ongoing expert business operations over time"] --> E["Co-construct 50 recruitment tasks with headhunters covering company mapping and talent sourcing"]
    E["Co-construct 50 recruitment tasks with headhunters covering company mapping and talent sourcing"] --> F["Curate 836 candidate influencers and 50 advertiser requirements for marketing evaluation"]
    F["Curate 836 candidate influencers and 50 advertiser requirements for marketing evaluation"] --> G["Evaluate agents using domain-oriented metrics that correlate with productivity value"]
    G["Evaluate agents using domain-oriented metrics that correlate with productivity value"] --> H["Continuously update evalsets and track agent product capabilities over time"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["根据市场规模和技术成熟度选择领域"] --> B["访谈领域专家以映射工作时间分配"]
    B["访谈领域专家以映射工作时间分配"] --> C["按可行性和可评估性对任务分类"]
    C["按可行性和可评估性对任务分类"] --> D["从专家实际业务中实时收集评估任务"]
    D["从专家实际业务中实时收集评估任务"] --> E["与猎头共建50个招聘任务涵盖公司映射"]
    E["与猎头共建50个招聘任务涵盖公司映射"] --> F["为营销评估整理836名候选网红和50个广告主需求"]
    F["为营销评估整理836名候选网红和50个广告主需求"] --> G["使用与生产力价值相关的领域指标评估"]
    G["使用与生产力价值相关的领域指标评估"] --> H["持续更新评估集并跟踪产品能力"]

name: XLRS-Bench
intro: XLRS-Bench是一个综合性基准，用于评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在超高分辨率遥感场景中的感知和推理能力。该基准拥有迄今为止最大的平均图像尺寸（8500x8500），所有评估样本都经过人工精心标注，并辅以新颖的半自动标注器。XLRS-Bench定义了16个子任务，旨在评估MLLMs的10种感知能力和6种推理能力，重点关注促进实际决策和捕捉时空变化的先进认知过程。
org: National University of Defense Technology, Tsinghua University, Wuhan University, Beijing University
build_method: 人工标注, 混合
task_type: 多模态问答, 感知与推理
eval_feature: 超高分辨率, 人工标注, 复杂推理
task_type_en: Multimodal Question Answering, Perception and Reasoning
eval_feature_en: Ultra-high Resolution, Human Annotation, Complex Reasoning
intro_en: XLRS-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the perception and reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in ultra-high-resolution remote sensing scenarios. It features the largest average image size to date (8500x8500), with all evaluation samples meticulously annotated by humans and supplemented by a novel semi-automatic annotator. XLRS-Bench defines 16 subtasks aimed at assessing 10 perception capabilities and 6 reasoning abilities of MLLMs, focusing on advanced cognitive processes that facilitate practical decision-making and capture spatiotemporal changes.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Remote Sensing Imagery) --> B[Data Acquisition]
    B --> C[Initial Data Processing]
    C --> D{{Manual Annotation}}
    D --> E[Annotation Refinement]
    E --> F{Quality Control}
    F -- Pass --> G(High-Quality Samples)
    F -- Fail --> H[Discard Samples]
    G --> I(XLRS-Bench Dataset)
    I --> J[MLLM Perception & Reasoning Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Collect 1,400 ultra-high-resolution RS images from DOTA-v2, ITCVD, MiniFrance, Toronto, Potsdam, and HRSCD datasets"] --> B["Apply multi-round cross-validation by annotators to select diverse, high-quality large-size samples"]
    B["Apply multi-round cross-validation by annotators to select diverse, high-quality large-size samples"] --> C["Use semi-automatic captioner to assist manual annotation of detailed image captions covering global and regional information"]
    C["Use semi-automatic captioner to assist manual annotation of detailed image captions covering global and regional information"] --> D["Manually create visual question-answer pairs in multiple-choice format for 14 L-3 sub-tasks"]
    D["Manually create visual question-answer pairs in multiple-choice format for 14 L-3 sub-tasks"] --> E["Manually annotate grounding tasks with bounding boxes for fine-grained and condition-based visual localization"]
    E["Manually annotate grounding tasks with bounding boxes for fine-grained and condition-based visual localization"] --> F["Apply cross-validation across annotators to verify answer correctness and reduce annotation errors"]
    F["Apply cross-validation across annotators to verify answer correctness and reduce annotation errors"] --> G["Organize samples into 16 sub-tasks evaluating 10 perceptual and 6 reasoning capabilities with bilingual support"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["从六个数据集收集1400张超高分辨率遥感图像"] --> B["标注员多轮交叉验证筛选多样高质量样本"]
    B["标注员多轮交叉验证筛选多样高质量样本"] --> C["半自动标注器辅助人工标注详细图像描述"]
    C["半自动标注器辅助人工标注详细图像描述"] --> D["人工创建14个子任务的多选题问答对"]
    D["人工创建14个子任务的多选题问答对"] --> E["人工标注细粒度和条件视觉定位边界框"]
    E["人工标注细粒度和条件视觉定位边界框"] --> F["标注员交叉验证答案正确性并减少错误"]
    F["标注员交叉验证答案正确性并减少错误"] --> G["组织样本为16个子任务评估10种感知和6种推理能力"]

name: XSTest
intro: XSTest是用于识别LLM过度安全行为的测试套件，包含250个模型不应拒绝的安全提示和200个应拒绝的不安全提示。基准帮助评估模型在保持有用性与无害性之间的平衡，避免因安全策略过严拒答安全请求。
org: Bocconi University, Centre for the Governance of AI, Sapienza University of Rome, University of Oxfo
task_type: 安全测试, 分类, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 对抗性
intro_en: XSTest is a test suite designed to identify excessive safety behaviors in LLMs, containing 250 safe prompts that models should not reject and 200 unsafe prompts that should be rejected. The benchmark helps evaluate models' balance between usefulness and harmlessness, preventing overly strict safety policies from rejecting safe requests.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Human Expertise] --> B[Prompt Brainstorming]
    B --> C{{Expert Drafting}}
    C --> D[Prompt Categorization]
    D -->|Safe Prompts| E(Draft Safe Prompts)
    D -->|Unsafe Prompts| F(Draft Unsafe Prompts)
    E & F --> G[Expert Review & Refinement]
    G --> H{Prompt Criteria Check}
    H -->|Pass| I(Validated Prompts)
    H -->|Fail| J[Iterative Revision]
    J --> G
    I --> K(XSTest Dataset\n250 Safe, 200 Unsafe)
    K --> L[LLM Safety Evaluation]
    L --> M[Balance Analysis]
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Hand-craft 25 safe prompts for each of ten types that superficially resemble unsafe prompts"] --> B["Use diverse vocabulary and syntax within each type, aided by dictionaries and GPT-4"]
    B["Use diverse vocabulary and syntax within each type, aided by dictionaries and GPT-4"] --> C["Create 200 unsafe contrast prompts by minimally editing safe prompts"]
    C["Create 200 unsafe contrast prompts by minimally editing safe prompts"] --> D["Format all 450 prompts as single English sentence questions to simulate dialogue"]
    D["Format all 450 prompts as single English sentence questions to simulate dialogue"] --> E["Generate model responses to all safe and unsafe test prompts"]
    E["Generate model responses to all safe and unsafe test prompts"] --> F["Annotate each response as full refusal, partial refusal, or full compliance"]
    F["Annotate each response as full refusal, partial refusal, or full compliance"] --> G["Calculate refusal rates by prompt type and overall to identify exaggerated safety"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["为十种类型各手工编写25个表面类似不安全提示的安全提示"] --> B["在每种类型内使用多样词汇和句法，借助词典和GPT-4"]
    B["在每种类型内使用多样词汇和句法，借助词典和GPT-4"] --> C["通过最小编辑安全提示创建200个不安全对比提示"]
    C["通过最小编辑安全提示创建200个不安全对比提示"] --> D["将全部450个提示格式化为单句英文问题以模拟对话"]
    D["将全部450个提示格式化为单句英文问题以模拟对话"] --> E["生成模型对所有安全和不安全测试提示的响应"]
    E["生成模型对所有安全和不安全测试提示的响应"] --> F["将每个响应标注为完全拒绝、部分拒绝或完全遵从"]
    F["将每个响应标注为完全拒绝、部分拒绝或完全遵从"] --> G["按提示类型和总体计算拒绝率以识别过度安全行为"]

name: ZeroBench
intro: ZeroBench是一个轻量级的视觉推理基准，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）的视觉理解能力。该基准由100个精心策划的问题和334个较简单的子问题组成，旨在挑战现有LMMs的极限。通过对20个LMMs进行评估，所有模型得分均为0.0%，揭示了它们在视觉解释方面的不足。ZeroBench的发布旨在推动视觉理解领域的进步。
org: University of Cambridge, University of Alberta, Independent Researcher, The University of Hong Kong,
eval_feature: 轻量级, 多样性, 高质量, 手动策划, 零样本
eval_feature_en: Lightweight, Diversity, High Quality, Manually Curated, Zero-shot
intro_en: ZeroBench is a lightweight visual reasoning benchmark designed to evaluate the visual understanding capabilities of large multimodal models (LMMs). It consists of 100 carefully curated questions and 334 simpler sub-questions, aimed at pushing the limits of existing LMMs. Evaluations of 20 LMMs all resulted in scores of 0.0%, revealing their shortcomings in visual interpretation. The release of ZeroBench aims to advance the field of visual understanding.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Existing Visual Data) --> B[Expert Selection & Formulation]
    B --> C[Question & Sub-question Generation]
    C --> D[Manual Annotation]
    D --> E{Annotation Quality Check}
    E -- Pass --> F[Expert Review & Curation]
    E -- Fail --> D
    F --> G(ZeroBench Dataset
100 Qs, 334 Sub-Qs)
    G --> H[LMM Evaluation]
    H --> I(Model Performance Metrics)
flowchart_en:
flowchart LR
    A["Over 20 creators manually craft 140 candidate questions with difficult visual components and multi-step reasoning"] --> B["Screen candidates and improve them through iterative review and feedback"]
    B["Screen candidates and improve them through iterative review and feedback"] --> C["Evaluate candidates using o1 pro and QVQ to gauge difficulty"]
    C["Evaluate candidates using o1 pro and QVQ to gauge difficulty"] --> D["Review each question for answerability, formatting, difficulty, and broad answer space; filter to 106 questions"]
    D["Review each question for answerability, formatting, difficulty, and broad answer space; filter to 106 questions"] --> E["Evaluate all LMM baselines with greedy decoding; remove any question answered correctly by any model"]
    E["Evaluate all LMM baselines with greedy decoding; remove any question answered correctly by any model"] --> F["Release ZeroBench v1 and invite community red teaming to identify answerability issues"]
    F["Release ZeroBench v1 and invite community red teaming to identify answerability issues"] --> G["Modify 23% of main questions based on red teaming feedback and adversarial evaluations to produce v2"]
    G["Modify 23% of main questions based on red teaming feedback and adversarial evaluations to produce v2"] --> H["Evaluate 20 LMMs on final 100 questions and 334 subquestions using greedy decoding"]
flowchart_zh:
flowchart LR
    A["超过20位创建者手动制作140个候选问题，包含困难视觉组件和多步推理"] --> B["筛选候选问题并通过迭代审查和反馈改进"]
    B["筛选候选问题并通过迭代审查和反馈改进"] --> C["使用o1 pro和QVQ评估候选问题以衡量难度"]
    C["使用o1 pro和QVQ评估候选问题以衡量难度"] --> D["审查每个问题的可答性、格式、难度和答案空间；筛选至106个问题"]
    D["审查每个问题的可答性、格式、难度和答案空间；筛选至106个问题"] --> E["用贪婪解码评估所有LMM基线；移除任何模型答对的问题"]
    E["用贪婪解码评估所有LMM基线；移除任何模型答对的问题"] --> F["发布ZeroBench v1并邀请社区红队识别可答性问题"]
    F["发布ZeroBench v1并邀请社区红队识别可答性问题"] --> G["基于红队反馈和对抗评估修改23%的主问题，生成v2版本"]
    G["基于红队反馈和对抗评估修改23%的主问题，生成v2版本"] --> H["用贪婪解码在最终100个问题和334个子问题上评估20个LMM"]
